learnEmpty: Azikho izindawo zokufunda ezitholakalayo zale modi.

learnExamBalancedHint: Imodi yokugxila: ukuqonda okunokulinganisela, ukuzijwayeza, nokubuyekeza.
learnExamHardHint: Imodi yokugxila: imisebenzi yesitayela sokuhlolwa enengcindezi yesikhathi kanye nempendulo esheshayo.

dashNoHomeschool: Setha isimiso kokuthi Funda ukuze uthole isiqondiso lapha.

teacherToolsSubtitle: Lawula ukufinyelela kwekilasi, vala amamodi abafundi futhi usabalalise okuqukethwe kwesifundo ngaphandle kokunikeza abafundi amalungelo othisha.
teacherClassControlDesc: Khiya ukushintsha kwabafundi phakathi kwemodi yesikole neyenyuvesi futhi ugcine ikilasi ligxile kukharikhulamu yamanje.
teacherShareMaterialDesc: Shicilela imisebenzi ezokwenziwa noma amanothi okubuyekeza okusheshayo ekilasi lakho.
settingsCountrySub: Ilungisa izikali zebanga, izigaba zesikole, namafomethi ezinombolo ohlelweni lwakho lwemfundo.
learnSch_mathematics_title: I-Algebra isebenzisa izinhlamvu nezimpawu ukumela izinombolo nokuchaza ubudlelwano. Iwumgogodla wazo zonke izibalo ezithuthukile. Ufunda ukuxazulula izibalo, ukusebenza ngezinto eziguquguqukayo, futhi uthole amanani angaziwa ngezinyathelo ezinengqondo.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_name: Xazulula: 3x − 5 = 10. Bhala isinyathelo ngasinye. Bese uhlola impendulo yakho ngokufaka u-x emuva.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_desc: Okuhlukile (njengo x noma y) kumele inombolo engaziwa.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_task: Izibalo zibonisa ukuthi izinkulumo ezimbili ziyalingana (isb. 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp0: Ukuze uxazulule isibalo, yenza umsebenzi ofanayo kuzo zombili izinhlangothi ukuze uhlukanise okuguquguqukayo.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp1: Imisebenzi yenza imephu yonke into ephumayo ibe yinye ncamashi: f(x) = 2x isho okuphindwe kabili okokufaka.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_desc: Ijiyomethri ifunda ngobumo, ama-engeli, nobudlelwano bendawo. Kukufundisa ukucabanga ngendlela enengqondo futhi ufakazele izitatimende usebenzisa izincazelo namathiyori. Ijiyomethri ivela ekwakhiweni kwezakhiwo, ezobuciko, ezobunjiniyela, nasempilweni yansuku zonke.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_task: Unxantathu ongakwesokudla unemilenze engu-3 cm no-4 cm. Bala i-hypotenuse usebenzisa a² + b² = c².
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp0: Iphuzu alinawo usayizi; umugqa unwebeka ngokungenamkhawulo kuzo zombili izinkomba.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp1: Ama-engeli akalwa ngamadigri: i-engeli engakwesokudla = 90°, i-engeli eqondile = 180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp2: Isamba sama-engeli kunoma yimuphi unxantathu sihlala singu-180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp3: Ithiyori yePythagorean: kunxantathu ongakwesokudla, a² + b² = c² (c yi-hypotenuse).
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp4: Izimo ezihambisanayo ziyefana ngosayizi nokuma; amajamo afanayo anama-engeli afanayo kodwa amasayizi ahlukene.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_name: Izibalo zikusiza ukuthi uqoqe, uhlele, futhi utolike idatha ukuze ufinyelele esiphethweni. Amathuba alinganisa ukuthi umcimbi ungakanani. Ndawonye abalulekile kwezesayensi, ezomnotho, nasekuthatheni izinqumo kwansuku zonke.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_desc: Roll a die: mangakanani amathuba okuthola inombolo elinganayo? Bonisa isibalo.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_task: Isho = isamba sawo wonke amanani ÷ inombolo yamanani.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp0: I-Median = inani eliphakathi lapho idatha ihlungwa.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp3: Ukuhlobana kukhombisa ukuthi ngabe okuguquguqukayo okubili kujwayele ukuhamba ndawonye - kodwa hhayi imbangela.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_name: I-Trigonometry || I-Trigonometry ifunda ubudlelwane phakathi kwama-engeli nobude obusemaceleni konxantathu. Isetshenziswa ku-physics, engineering, navigation, kanye nomculo. Imisebenzi emithathu eyinhloko - i-sine, i-cosine, ne-tangent - ixhuma ama-engeli nezilinganiso zezinhlangothi.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_desc: Iladi elingu-5 m ubude lincike odongeni ngo-60°. Ifinyelela phezulu kangakanani? Sebenzisa isono(60°) = √3/2.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_task: Kunxantathu ongakwesokudla: sin(θ) = okuphambene/hypotenuse, cos(θ) = okuseduze/hypotenuse, tan(θ) = okuphambene/okuseduze.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp1: Umbuthano weyunithi unweba i-trig kuwo wonke ama-engeli angaphezu kuka-90°.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp2: I-Sine ne-cosine ziyizikhathi: ziphinda njalo ngo-360° (2π radians).
learnSch_mathematics_f3_tp2: Ithiyori Yezinombolo || Ithiyori yezinombolo ifunda izici zama-integers - ikakhulukazi izinombolo eziyinhloko, ukuhlukana, kanye nokwenza izinto. Ingelinye lamagatsha amadala kakhulu ezibalo futhi isisekelo se-cryptography yesimanje.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_name: Thola i-GCD(48, 18) usebenzisa i-algorithm ye-Euclidean. Bese uthola i-LCM(48, 18).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_desc: Inombolo eyinhloko inezici ezimbili ncamashi: 1 kanye nayo uqobo (isb. 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_task: Yonke inombolo > 1 ingabhalwa njengomkhiqizo oyingqayizivele wama-primes (i-fundamental theorem ye-arithmetic).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp0: Imithetho yokuhlukanisa: inombolo ihlukaniswa ngo-3 uma isamba samadijithi ayo sihlukaniswa ngo-3.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp1: I-GCD (isihlukanisi esikhulu kunazo zonke): inombolo enkulu kunazo zonke ehlukanisa kokubili. Sebenzisa i-algorithm ye-Euclidean: GCD(a, b) = GCD(b, a mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp2: I-LCM (okuningi okungajwayelekile okungajwayelekile): I-LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp3: GCD (greatest common divisor): largest number dividing both. Use Euclidean algorithm: GCD(a, b) = GCD(b, a mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp4: LCM (least common multiple): LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_tp1: I-GCD ne-LCM || Ama-Vector || Ivekhtha inakho kokubili ubukhulu (usayizi) kanye nesiqondiso. Ama-Vector abalulekile ku-physics (amandla, isivinini) kanye nezibalo eziphezulu. Zingangezwa, zikhishwe, futhi zikalwe, futhi zijwayeleke ngokwemvelo esikhaleni se-3D.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_tp2: Uma unikezwa u = (2, 3) kanye no-v = (4, -1), thola: (a) u + v, (b) |u|, (c) u · v. Ingabe u-v kanye ne-v perpendicular?
learnSch_mathematics_f5_name: Ivekhtha ibhalwa njengomcibisholo noma njengezixhumanisi: v = (3, 4) isho amayunithi angu-3 kwesokudla, amayunithi angu-4 phezulu.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_task: Ukwengezwa kweVector: (a, b) + (c, d) = (a+c, b+d). Ukukhipha kuyafana nokususa.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp1: Umkhiqizo wamachashazi: (a, b)·(c, d) = ac + bd. Uma umkhiqizo wechashazi = 0, ama-vectors are perpendicular.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_tp0: Ukulandelana kuwuhlu oluhlelekile lwezinombolo ezilandela iphethini. Uchungechunge yisamba semigomo yokulandelana. Zombili zivela kuzo zonke izibalo kanye nokumodela komhlaba wangempela (ukukhula, ezezimali, i-physics).
learnSch_mathematics_f5_tp1: Ukulandelana kuqala 2, 6, 18, 54, … (a) Ingabe i-arithmetic noma ijometri? (b) Thola ithemu yesi-7. (c) Thola isamba samatemu ayi-5 okuqala.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_tp2: Ukulandelana kwe-arithmetic: ithemu ngayinye ihluka ngenani elimisiwe d (umehluko ojwayelekile). aₙ = a₁ + (n−1)d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_name: Isamba sokulandelana kwe-arithmetic: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_desc: Ukulandelana kwejiyomethri: ithemu ngayinye iphindaphindwa ngesilinganiso esinqunyiwe r. aₙ = a₁ · rⁿ⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_task: A sequence starts 2, 6, 18, 54, … (a) Is it arithmetic or geometric? (b) Find the 7th term. (c) Find the sum of the first 5 terms.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp0: Arithmetic sequence: each term differs by a fixed amount d (common difference). aₙ = a₁ + (n−1)d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp1: Sum of arithmetic sequence: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp2: Geometric sequence: each term is multiplied by a fixed ratio r. aₙ = a₁ · rⁿ⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp3: Isamba sokulandelana kwejometri: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 − rⁿ) / (1 − r) ku-r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp4: Uchungechunge lwejiyomethri engapheli luguqukela ku-S = a₁ / (1 − r) lapho |r| < 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_desc: Izifundo zezibalo ezihlukile amazinga okushintsha kanye nemithambeka yamajika. Okuphuma kokunye kukutshela ukuthi umsebenzi ushintsha ngokushesha kangakanani noma kunini. Ibalulekile ku-physics, engineering, economics, nakuzo zonke isayensi yobuningi.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_task: Thola okuphuma kokunye kokuthi f(x) = 4x³ − 2x² + 5. Bese uthola lapho umthambeko ulingana noziro.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp0: Okuphuma kokunye okuphuma kokunye okuthi f′(x) kunikeza ukuthambeka komugqa we-tangent ukuze kube f(x) endaweni ethi x.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp1: Umthetho wamandla: uma u-f(x) = xⁿ, bese u-f′(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Isibonelo: (x³)′ = 3x².
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp2: Umthetho ohlanganisayo: (f + g)′ = f′ + g′. Umthetho womkhiqizo: (fg)′ = f′g + fg′.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp3: Isimiso sochungechunge: okuphuma ku-f(g(x)) ngu-f′(g(x)) · g′(x).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp4: Umsebenzi unomkhawulo wendawo noma ubuncane lapho f′(x) = 0 (iphoyinti elibalulekile).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_desc: I-Integral calculus ibala izindawo ezingaphansi kwamajika namanani aqoqiwe. Kuwukusebenza okuphambene kokuhlukanisa. Ama-Integrals asetshenziswa ku-physics (umsebenzi, ibanga), izibalo (amathuba), kanye nobunjiniyela.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_task: Linganisa ∫₀² (3x² + 2) dx. Bonisa zonke izinyathelo usebenzisa i-fundamental theorem ye-calculus.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp0: I-intefinite integral ∫f(x)dx inikeza umndeni wemisebenzi okuphuma kwayo okungu-f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp1: Isimiso samandla sokuhlanganisa: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C (for n ≠ −1).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp2: Okubalulekile okuqondile ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx kunikeza indawo eqondile phakathi kwejika ne-eksisi engu-x ukusuka ku-a ukuya ku-b.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp3: Ithiyori eyisisekelo yokubala: ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx = F(b) − F(a), lapho u-F′ = f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp4: Indawo ephakathi kwamajika amabili: ∫ₐᵇ [f(x) − g(x)] dx, lapho u-f(x) ≥ g(x).
learnSch_physics_f0_name: Omakhenikha || I-Mechanics isifundo sokunyakaza namandla akubangelayo. Imithetho emithathu kaNewton yokunyakaza iyisisekelo. Ukuqonda umakhenikha kusiza ukuchaza yonke into kusukela ezintweni eziwayo kuye ekuqalisweni kwamarokhethi.
learnSch_physics_f0_desc: Ibhola elingu-2 kg liyashesha ku-3 m/s². Yimaphi amandla asebenza kuwo? Sebenzisa F = ma.
learnSch_physics_f0_task: Umthetho wokuqala ka-Newton: into ephumulile ihlala iphumule ngaphandle uma kwenziwa ngamandla.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp0: Umthetho wesibili kaNewton: Force = mass × acceleration (F = ma).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp1: Umthetho wesithathu kaNewton: zonke izenzo zinokusabela okulinganayo nokuphambene.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp2: Amandla e-Kinetic = ½ × isisindo × isivinini² (KE = ½mv²).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp3: Umsebenzi = Phoqa × ibanga lapho uqonde khona amandla (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f1_desc: Ugesi ukuhamba kweshaje kagesi ngamakhondaktha. I-Magnetism ivela emalini ahambayo kanye nezinto zikazibuthe. Zombili zihlangene ku-electromagnetism, enika amandla ubuchwepheshe besimanje.
learnSch_physics_f1_task: Isekhethi inebhethri engu-12 V kanye ne-resistor engu-4 Ω. Uyini umsinga? Sebenzisa i-V = IR.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp0: Umthetho ka-Ohm: I-Voltage = Yamanje × Ukumelana (V = IR).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp1: Isekethe yochungechunge: okwamanje okufanayo kuzo zonke izingxenye; ama-voltage ayanda.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp2: I-parallel circuit: i-voltage efanayo kuzo zonke izingxenye; imisinga iyahlanganisa.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp4: Izinkambu zikazibuthe zisebenzisa amandla ezindlekweni ezihambayo: F = qvB.
learnSch_physics_f1_tp0: Imibuthano || Yamanje kanye ne-voltage || Izinkambu zikazibuthe
learnSch_physics_f1_tp2: Amagagasi adlulisa amandla ngaphandle kokudlulisa udaba. Umsindo nokukhanya kokubili amagagasi. I-Optics icwaninga ukuthi ukukhanya kuziphatha kanjani - ukukhombisa ngaphandle kwezibuko, ukugoba kumalensi, nokwenza izithombe.
learnSch_physics_f2_name: Igagasi lomsindo linemvamisa engu-440 Hz kanye nesivinini esingu-340 m/s. Buyini ubude bayo begagasi? Sebenzisa v = fλ.
learnSch_physics_f2_desc: Isivinini samaza = imvamisa × ubude begagasi (v = fλ).
learnSch_physics_f2_task: Umsindo uhamba ngendaba; ayikwazi ukuhamba endaweni engenalutho.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp0: Ukukhanya kuhamba ku-300,000 km/s endaweni engenalutho (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp2: I-Refraction: ukukhanya kugoba lapho kudlula phakathi kwezinto zokuminyana okuhlukene (umthetho ka-Snell).
learnSch_chemistry_f0_desc: Yonke into yenziwe ngama-athomu. I-athomu ngayinye ine-nucleus (ama-proton + neutron) ezungezwe ama-electron. Ithebula le-periodic lihlela izakhi ngenombolo yazo ye-athomu kanye nezakhiwo zamakhemikhali.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_task: Ikhabhoni inenombolo ye-athomu 6. Mangaki amaphrothoni, ama-electron, nama-neutron i-¹²C enawo?
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp0: Inombolo ye-athomu = inani lamaphrothoni; inquma ukuthi iyiphi ingxenye.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp2: Ama-electron athatha amazinga wamandla (amagobolondo); ama-electron angaphandle anquma ukusebenza kabusha.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp3: Ama-Isotopes ama-athomu e-elementi efanayo anezinombolo ezahlukene zama-neutron.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp4: Amabhondi e-Ionic: ukudluliswa kwama-electron. Amabhondi e-Covalent: ama-electron abiwe.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_tp2: Ukusabela Kwamakhemikhali || Ukusabela kwamakhemikhali hlela kabusha ama-athomu ukuze akhe izinto ezintsha. Ama-reactants aguqulwa abe yimikhiqizo. Ukuqonda ukusabela kusiza kwezokwelapha, isayensi yezinto zokwakha, ukupheka, kanye nezimboni.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_name: Linganisa le zibalo: H₂ + O₂ → H₂O. Mangaki ama-molecule we-H₂ ne-O₂ owadingayo?
learnSch_chemistry_f1_desc: Umthetho wokongiwa kwesisindo: ama-athomu awadalwa futhi awabhujiswa ngokusabela.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_task: Izibalo zokulinganisa: inombolo ye-athomu ngayinye kufanele ilingane nhlangothi zombili.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp0: Izinga lokusabela likhuphuka ngezinga lokushisa eliphakeme, ukugxilisa ingqondo, noma indawo engaphezulu.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp2: Reaction rate increases with higher temperature, concentration, or surface area.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp3: Catalysts speed up reactions without being consumed.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp4: I-Stoichiometry isebenzisa izilinganiso ze-mole ukuze ibale amanani ekuphenduleni.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_name: Ama-Acid anikela nge-hydrogen ions (H⁺); izisekelo ziyazamukela. Isilinganiso se-pH sikala i-asidi isuka ku-0 (i-acidic kakhulu) iye ku-14 (eyisisekelo kakhulu), kanti u-7 ungathathi hlangothi. Ukusabela kokungathathi hlangothi kuhlanganisa ama-asidi nezisekelo ukwenza amanzi nosawoti.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_desc: Uma uxuba i-hydrochloric acid (HCl) ne-sodium hydroxide (NaOH), yimiphi imikhiqizo eyakhayo? Bhala isibalo.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_task: i-pH <7 = ene-acidic (isb. uviniga pH ≈ 3). pH > 7 = okuyisisekelo (isb. i-baking soda pH ≈ 9).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp0: Ukungathathi hlangothi: i-asidi + isisekelo → usawoti + amanzi.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp2: Ama-asidi aqinile ahlukanisa ngokuphelele (i-HCl); ama-acids abuthakathaka ahlukanisa kancane (CH₃COOH).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp3: I-Titration inquma ukugxila okungaziwa ngokusabela ngesixazululo esaziwayo.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_tp1: Ibhayoloji || I-Cell Biology || Ingqamuzana liyiyunithi eyisisekelo yazo zonke izinto eziphilayo. Amaseli enza yonke imisebenzi yokuphila: ukuthola amandla, ukuphendula endaweni ezungezile, ukukhula, kanye nokuzalana. Ukuqonda amaseli kuyisisekelo sayo yonke isayensi yezinto eziphilayo.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_tp2: Yisho umehluko emithathu phakathi kwengqamuzana lesitshalo neseli yesilwane enomsebenzi owodwa womehluko ngamunye.
learnSch_biology_title: I-Prokaryotes (amagciwane) ayinayo i-nucleus; ama-eukaryote (izilwane, izitshalo, isikhunta) ane-nucleus.
learnSch_biology_f0_desc: The cell is the basic unit of all living things. Cells carry out all life functions: obtaining energy, responding to the environment, growing, and reproducing. Understanding cells is the foundation for all biology.
learnSch_biology_f0_task: Name three differences between a plant cell and an animal cell with one function for each difference.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp0: Prokaryotes (bacteria) have no nucleus; eukaryotes (animals, plants, fungi) have a nucleus.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp1: I-nucleus iqukethe i-DNA, ipulani yofuzo yeseli.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp2: I-Mitochondria ikhiqiza amandla ngokusebenzisa ukuphefumula kwamaselula (ATP).
learnSch_biology_f0_kp3: I-Mitosis ikhiqiza amaseli amantombazane amabili afanayo ukuze akhule futhi alungiswe.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp4: I-Meiosis ikhiqiza amangqamuzana ocansi amane (ama-gametes) anengxenye yenombolo ye-chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f0_tp1: I-Mitosis kanye ne-meiosis || I-DNA ne-RNA || I-Human Biology || Umzimba womuntu uwuhlelo oluyinkimbinkimbi lwezinhlelo zezitho ezisebenza ndawonye ukuze kugcinwe ukuphila. Ukuqonda ukuthi lezi zinhlelo zisebenza kanjani kusiza empilweni, emithini, nasenhlalakahleni yomuntu.
learnSch_biology_f0_tp2: Landelela indlela yokuphefumula komoya-mpilo kusuka ekhaleni kuya engqamuzaneni yemisipha. Yisho isistimu yesitho ngasinye esihilelekile.
learnSch_biology_f1_name: Isimiso sokujikeleza kwegazi simpompa igazi emzimbeni, siletha umoya-mpilo nezakhi.
learnSch_biology_f1_desc: Uhlelo lokugaya ukudla luhlephula ukudla kube imisoco umzimba ongamunca.
learnSch_biology_f1_task: Isimiso sezinzwa sicubungula ulwazi futhi sixhumanise izimpendulo.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp0: I-Homeostasis igcina izimo zangaphakathi zizinzile (isb. izinga lokushisa lomzimba libe ngu-37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp1: Ukudla okunomsoco: ama-carbohydrate anika amandla; ukwakha amaprotheni; amafutha agcina amandla futhi avikele izitho.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp2: Amasistimu omzimba || Umsoco || I-Homeostasis || I-Ecology || I-Ecology icwaninga ukuthi izinto eziphilayo zixhumana kanjani nendawo yazo. Ukuqonda imvelo kusisiza ukuthi sivikele izinhlobonhlobo zezinto eziphilayo, silawule izinsiza, futhi sibhekane nokushintsha kwesimo sezulu.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp3: Homeostasis keeps internal conditions stable (e.g. body temperature at 37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp4: Nutrition: carbohydrates give energy; proteins build; fats store energy and protect organs.
learnSch_biology_f2_desc: Ecology studies how living organisms interact with each other and their environment. Understanding ecosystems helps us protect biodiversity, manage resources, and address climate change.
learnSch_biology_f2_task: Dweba iwebhu yokudla elula enezidalwa ezi-5. Abakhiqizi belebula, abathengi abayinhloko, nabathengi besibili.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp0: Abakhiqizi (izitshalo) benza ukudla nge-photosynthesis; abathengi bayawadla.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp1: Uchungechunge lokudla lubonisa ukuhamba kwamandla: Ilanga → tshala → i-herbivore → inyamazane.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp2: Cishe u-10% kuphela wamandla adluliselwa ezingeni elilandelayo le-trophic.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp3: Ukuhlukahluka kwemvelo kwenza izimiso zemvelo zikwazi ukumelana noshintsho.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp4: Ukushintsha kwesimo sezulu kushintsha izindawo zokuhlala, kushintsha izinhlobonhlobo zezinhlobo zezilwane, futhi kuphazamise ukwakheka kokudla.
learnSch_biology_f2_tp0: I-ecosystems || Amawebhu okudla || Umthelela wesimo sezulu
learnSch_biology_f2_tp2: Ukucabanga ngekhompyutha kuyindlela yokuxazulula izinkinga esetshenziswa ezinhlelweni nangale kwalokho. Yephula izinkinga eziyinkimbinkimbi zibe izingxenye ezilawulekayo futhi ithole izixazululo zesinyathelo nesinyathelo ezingalandelwa ikhompuyutha (noma umuntu).
learnSch_computer_science_title: Bhala i-algorithm yesinyathelo nesinyathelo (ngolimi olulula) yokuhlunga idekhi eshoviwe yamakhadi ama-5 ngenombolo.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_name: Ukubola: hlukanisa inkinga enkulu ibe yizinkinga ezincane ezixazululekayo.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_desc: Ukuqashelwa kwephethini: thola ukufana nokujwayelekile ezinkingeni.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_task: Abstract: gxila ezingxenyeni ezibalulekile futhi uzibe imininingwane engabalulekile.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp0: I-algorithm: ukulandelana okunembayo kwezinyathelo zokuxazulula inkinga.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp1: I-pseudocode isiza ukuhlela i-algorithm ngolimi olulula ngaphambi kokufaka ikhodi.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp3: Algorithm: a precise sequence of steps to solve a problem.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp4: Pseudocode helps plan an algorithm in plain language before coding.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_desc: Ukuhlela kuhumusha imibono enengqondo ibe yimiyalelo engenziwa ikhompuyutha. Lonke uhlelo lusebenzisa okuguquguqukayo, izimo, amaluphu, nemisebenzi. Ukulungisa iphutha - ukuthola nokulungisa amaphutha - kuyikhono elibalulekile.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_task: Bhala i-pseudocode noma ikhodi yangempela ebuza umsebenzisi inombolo futhi iphrinte ukuthi iyinqaba noma isho njalo.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp1: Iluphu iphinda ikhodi: i-i in range(5) igijima umzimba izikhathi ezi-5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp2: Uma-isitatimende senza isinqumo: uma x > 0: phrinta("positive").
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp3: Amaqembu omsebenzi ikhodi esebenzisekayo: def greet(igama): buyisela "Sawubona" ​​+ igama.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp4: Izinhlobo zamaphutha avamile: amaphutha e-syntax (isipelingi esingalungile), amaphutha wesikhathi sokusebenza (ukuphahlazeka), amaphutha engqondo (umphumela ongalungile).
learnSch_computer_science_f1_tp2: Amasistimu Edijithali || Amasistimu edijithali akha ingqalasizinda ye-inthanethi kanye nekhompyutha yesimanje. Ukuqonda amanethiwekhi, ukumelwa kwedatha, kanye ne-cybersecurity kubalulekile kunoma ubani osebenzisa noma ukwakha ubuchwepheshe.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_name: Guqula inombolo yedesimali engu-13 ibe kanambambili. Bonisa ukusebenza kwakho (hlukanisa ngo-2 ngokuphindaphindiwe).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_desc: Idatha igcinwa ku-binary (0s no-1s): amabhithi angu-8 = ibhayithi elingu-1.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_task: Izinombolo zemephu ye-ASCII kanye ne-Unicode kuya kuzinhlamvu (isb. A = 65 ku-ASCII).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp0: I-inthanethi iyinethiwekhi yomhlaba wonke yamanethiwekhi asebenzisa imigomo ye-TCP/IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp1: I-HTTP isetshenziselwa amakhasi ewebhu; I-HTTPS yengeza ukubethela ukuze kuvikeleke.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp2: Ukubethela kuphazamisa idatha ukuze kube kuphela umamukeli ohlosiwe ongayifunda.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp3: HTTP is used for web pages; HTTPS adds encryption for security.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp4: Encryption scrambles data so only the intended recipient can read it.
learnSch_language_arts_title: Ukufunda nokuhlaziya kukufundisa ukuqonda nokuhlola imibhalo ngokuhlolisisa. Ufunda ukuhlonza inhloso yombhali, uhlele izimpikiswano, futhi uhlole ikhwalithi yobufakazi obusetshenzisiwe.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_name: Funda isigaba esisodwa kunoma yisiphi isihloko. Thola: (1) isimangalo esiyinhloko, (2) ubufakazi obubodwa, (3) ukuchema okungaba khona.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_desc: Izinhlobo zesakhiwo sombhalo: ngokulandelana kwezikhathi, isixazululo senkinga, umphumela, qhathanisa-nokuqhathanisa.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_task: Impikiswano eyinhloko isimangalo esimaphakathi umbhali afuna usamukele.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp0: Ubufakazi busekela izimangalo: bheka amaqiniso, izibalo, izingcaphuno zochwepheshe, nezibonelo.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp1: Linganisa umthombo: ingabe umbhali uthembekile? Ingabe ubufakazi bamuva futhi bubalulekile?
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp2: Ukuchema kwenzeka lapho umbhalo wethula uhlangothi olulodwa lwempikiswano.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_tp2: Ukubhala okuhle kudlulisa imibono ngokucacile nangokukholisayo. Inqubo ibandakanya ukuhlela, ukubhala, ukubukeza kanye nokuhlela. Isakhiwo nobufakazi bubaluleke njengesilulumagama.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_name: Bhala isigaba esisodwa se-PEEL (imisho emi-5-7) uphikisane ngokuthi umsebenzi wesikole uyazuzisa noma uyingozi. Sebenzisa ubufakazi obubodwa.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_desc: Isigaba se-PEEL: Iphuzu → Ubufakazi → Chaza → Xhumanisa emuva.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_task: Isingeniso sendatshana sisho impikiswano; isiphetho sikuphinda ngokuqondisisa.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp0: PEEL paragraph: Point → Evidence → Explain → Link back.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp1: An essay introduction states the argument; the conclusion restates it with insight.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp2: Ukubhala okusemthethweni kugwema ukufinyela, isitsotsi, kanye nomuntu wokuqala ngaphandle kokuthi kucacisiwe.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp3: Izwi elisebenzayo licacile: "Umfundi uxazulule inkinga" (hhayi "ixazululwe ngu").
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp4: Buyekeza njalo: hlola ukuqonda, ubufakazi, uhlelo lolimi, nokuhlukahluka kwemisho.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_tp2: Imithetho yohlelo ilawula ukuthi amagama ahlangana kanjani abe imisho efanele. Isilulumagama esiqinile senza ukubhala kunembe futhi kuthandeke. Kokubili kudinga ukuzijwayeza okusebenzayo - hhayi nje ukufunda okwenziwayo.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_name: Phinda ubhale lo musho ube ezikhathini ezintathu ezahlukene: "Iqembu liwina umdlalo." (okwedlule, okuzayo, okwamanje kuphelele)
learnSch_language_arts_f2_task: Izikhathi zibonisa isikhathi: isikhathi samanje (ukugijima), okwedlule (kugijima), okuzayo (kuzogijima), okwamanje okuphelele (kusebenzile).
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp0: Izigaba zomthetho: isigatshana somthetho sizimele sodwa; isigatshana esingaphansi sidinga isigatshana esiyinhloko.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp1: Izimpawu zokuloba ziqondisa umfundi: ukhefana = ukuma kancane, isemikholoni = hlanganisa imibono ehlobene.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp2: Izinkomba zomongo zisiza ekuhlukaniseni amagama angajwayelekile: bheka amagama azungezile.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_tp1: Umlando Womhlaba || Umlando womhlaba ulandelela ukuthi imiphakathi yabantu yathuthuka kanjani ezinkulungwaneni zeminyaka, kusukela empucukweni yasendulo ngokusebenzisa imibuso, ukuvukela umbuso, nezimpi zomhlaba kuya ohlelweni lwanamuhla lomhlaba. Umlando usisiza ukuba siqonde ukuthi kungani umhlaba unje.
learnSch_history_f0_desc: World history traces how human societies developed over thousands of years, from ancient civilisations through empires, revolutions, and world wars to the modern global order. History helps us understand why the world is the way it is.
learnSch_history_f0_task: Khetha isenzakalo esisodwa esibalulekile esingokomlando bese uchaza: (1) imbangela yaso, (2) okwenzeka, (3) umphumela waso wesikhathi eside.
learnSch_history_f0_kp0: I-Mesopotamia (i-Iraq) ne-Egypt ziphakathi kwempucuko yokuqala eyaziwayo.
learnSch_history_f0_kp1: INguquko Yezimboni (18th–19th c.) yaguqula umnotho wasuka kwezolimo wayisa kwezokukhiqiza.
learnSch_history_f0_kp2: IMpi Yezwe I (1914-1918) kanye neMpi Yezwe II (1939-1945) zalungisa kabusha ukuhleleka komhlaba.
learnSch_history_f0_kp3: I-Cold War (1947-1991) yahlukanisa umhlaba phakathi kwe-US neSoviet Union.
learnSch_history_f0_kp4: Ukuhwebelana kwembulunga yonke kusukela ngeminyaka yawo-1990 kwadala umnotho namasiko axhumene.
learnSch_history_f0_tp1: Inkathi yezimboni || Izingxabano zomhlaba || Imithombo Eyinhloko
learnSch_history_f0_tp2: Imithombo eyinhloko amadokhumenti oqobo noma izinto zobuciko zesikhathi esifundwayo — izincwadi, izinkulumo, izithombe, imithetho, idayari. Izazi-mlando ziwasebenzisela ukwakha kabusha okwedlule ngokunembe ngangokunokwenzeka.
learnSch_history_f1_name: Thola ukucaphuna okufushane komlando (kusuka enkulumweni noma encwadini). Khomba umbhali, idethi, kanye nokuchema okungaba khona.
learnSch_history_f1_desc: Imithombo eyinhloko ihlanganisa idayari, imithetho, izithombe, izinkulumo, nezivumelwano.
learnSch_history_f1_task: Imithombo yesibili ihumusha imithombo eyinhloko: izincwadi zokufunda, umlando wokuphila kwabantu, amadokhumenti.
learnSch_history_f1_kp0: Buza: Ubani obhale lokhu? Nini? Kwabaphi abalaleli? Uyini umbono wabo?
learnSch_history_f1_kp1: Ukuchema akwenzi umthombo ube yize - kuveza umbono wombhali womhlaba.
learnSch_history_f1_kp2: Ukuqinisa: hlola umthombo ngokumelene nobunye ubufakazi ukuze uhlole ukwethembeka.
learnSch_geography_title: IJografi || I-Physical Geography || I-Physical geography ifunda izici zemvelo zomhlaba - ukumila komhlaba, imifula, isimo sezulu, kanye nemvelo. Ukuqonda ukuma kwezwe kuchaza ukuthi kungani amadolobha, imizila yezohwebo, kanye nempucuko kwathuthukiswa lapho kwenzeka khona.
learnSch_geography_f0_name: Chaza ukuthi kungani ukuzamazama komhlaba kwenzeka eduze kwe-"Ring of Fire" usebenzisa ama-plate tectonics.
learnSch_geography_f0_desc: I-Plate tectonics: Uqweqwe lomhlaba luhlukaniswe ngamapuleti anyakazayo, okubangela ukuzamazama komhlaba nezintaba-mlilo.
learnSch_geography_f0_task: Umjikelezo wamanzi: ukuhwamuka → ukuminyanisa → imvula → ukugeleza → ukuphinda.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp0: Izindawo zesimo sezulu: ezishisayo, ezomile, ezipholile, ezwekazini, ezipholile.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp1: Isimiso somfula sinomthombo (izwe eliphakeme), imifula, nomlomo (lapho uhlangana khona nolwandle).
learnSch_geography_f0_kp2: Izingozi zemvelo (ukuzamazama komhlaba, izikhukhula, iziphepho) zakhiwe yi-geography.
learnSch_geography_f0_tp0: Izingozi zemvelo || I-Human Geography || I-geography yabantu ifunda ukuthi abantu basebenzisana kanjani nendawo yabo nokuthi basihlela kanjani isikhala. Izihloko zihlanganisa lapho abantu behlala khona, kungani amadolobha ekhula, nokuthi umnotho uhluka kanjani emhlabeni wonke.
learnSch_geography_f0_tp1: Qhathanisa amazwe amabili nge-HDI yawo. Thola izizathu ezimbili zokuthi umuntu abeke phezulu kunomunye.
learnSch_geography_f0_tp2: Ukuminyana kwabantu = abantu ÷ indawo. Kuminyene ezindaweni ezisogwini nezivundile; ewugwadule nasezintabeni.
learnSch_geography_f1_name: Ukufudukela emadolobheni: abantu abasuka ezindaweni zasemakhaya beya emadolobheni beyofuna imisebenzi nezinkonzo.
learnSch_geography_f1_desc: Izinto eziphushayo zixosha abantu (isb. ubumpofu, ukungqubuzana); izici zokudonsa zibaheha (isb. imisebenzi, ukuphepha).
learnSch_geography_f1_task: Ukuhwebelana kwembulunga yonke: izimpahla, imali, abantu, kanye nemibono idlula imingcele ngokukhululeka.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp0: Intuthuko ingakalwa nge-GDP ngomuntu ngamunye, iminyaka yokuphila, kanye nemfundo (HDI).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp1: Urbanisation: people moving from rural to urban areas for jobs and services.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp2: Push factors drive people away (e.g. poverty, conflict); pull factors attract them (e.g. jobs, safety).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp3: Globalisation: goods, capital, people, and ideas move across borders more freely.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp4: Development can be measured by GDP per capita, life expectancy, and education (HDI).
learnSch_geography_f1_tp0: Inani labantu || Ukufudukela emadolobheni || Ukufuduka || Ezomnotho
learnSch_geography_f1_tp1: I-Microeconomics || I-Microeconomics ifunda ukuthi abantu ngabanye kanye namafemu benza kanjani izinqumo mayelana nezinsiza. Ichaza ukuthi izintengo zisethwa kanjani, kungani izimakethe ngezinye izikhathi zingaphumeleli, kanye nokuthi izikhuthazo zishintsha kanjani ukuziphatha.
learnSch_geography_f1_tp2: Uma intengo yekhofi ikhuphuka, kwenzekani ngesidingo setiye? Chaza usebenzisa ezinye izinto.
learnSch_economics_title: Isidingo: njengoba intengo yehla, inani elifunekayo liyakhuphuka (ubudlelwano obuphambene).
learnSch_economics_f0_name: Ukunikezwa: njengoba intengo ikhuphuka, inani elinikeziwe liyakhuphuka (ubudlelwano obuqondile).
learnSch_economics_f0_desc: Ukulingana: lapho ukunikezwa kuhlangabezana nesidingo - inani lokususa imakethe.
learnSch_economics_f0_task: I-Elasticity ikala ukuthi isidingo esibucayi noma ukunikezwa kunjani ekushintsheni kwentengo.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp0: Ukwehluleka kwezimakethe: lapho izimakethe zikhiqiza kakhulu (izinto zangaphandle ezingezinhle) noma ezincane kakhulu (izimpahla zomphakathi).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp3: Ukuziphatha kwabathengi || Izimali Zomuntu Siqu || Izimali zomuntu siqu zikusiza ukuthi uphathe imali yakho ngokuhlakanipha. Ukuqonda ibhajethi, ukonga, kanye nekhredithi kusho ukuthi ungenza izinqumo ezinolwazi empilweni yakho yonke.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp4: Uzuza u-€800/ngenyanga. Faka kuhlu izigaba ezi-5 zezindleko bese unikeza isabelomali salolo nalolo olungeza ku-€800.
learnSch_economics_f0_tp0: Isabelomali silandelela imali engenayo nezindleko. Chitha imali encane kunaleyo oyiholayo ukuze wonge.
learnSch_economics_f0_tp1: Isithakazelo esilula: I = P × r × t (Uthishanhloko × isilinganiso × isikhathi).
learnSch_economics_f1_desc: Personal finance helps you manage your money wisely. Understanding budgeting, saving, and credit means you can make informed decisions throughout your life.
learnSch_economics_f1_task: You earn €800/month. List 5 categories of expenses and allocate a budget for each that adds up to €800.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp0: A budget tracks income and expenses. Spend less than you earn to save.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp1: Simple interest: I = P × r × t (Principal × rate × time).
learnSch_economics_f1_kp2: Inzalo ehlanganisiwe ikhulisa ukonga kakhulu - qala kusenesikhathi.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp3: Isikweletu: ukuboleka manje bese ubuyisela kamuva nenzalo; sebenzisa ngokucophelela.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp4: Isikhwama sezimo eziphuthumayo kufanele sihlanganise izindleko zezinyanga ezi-3-6.
learnSch_economics_f1_tp2: Geology || I-Geology icwaninga ukwakheka koMhlaba, amadwala owakhiwe ngawo, nokuthi ushintsha kanjani ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Umhlaba uneminyaka engaba yizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-4.5. Izendlalelo zayo - uqweqwe, ingubo yokugqoka, ingaphakathi langaphandle, ingaphakathi langaphakathi - zinezakhiwo ezihlukene.
learnSch_earth_science_title: Ukugeleza kwe-lava kuyaphola futhi kube lukhuni. Hlobo luni lwamafomu edwala? Yini engayenza ibe yidwala le-metamorphic ngokuhamba kwesikhathi?
learnSch_earth_science_f0_name: Umjikelezo wedwala: igneous → sedimentary → metamorphic → ukubuyela ku-magma.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_desc: Amadwala e-igneous akheka kusuka ku-magma epholile noma udaka (isb. igwadle, i-basalt).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_task: Amatshe e-Sedimentary akha kusuka ezingqimbeni ezicindezelwe zenzinga (isb. sandstone, limestone).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp0: Amatshe e-Metamorphic ashintshwa ukushisa nokucindezela (isb. imabula, isileyithi).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp1: I-Plate tectonics ichaza ukuzamazama komhlaba, izintaba-mlilo, nokwakhiwa kwezintaba.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_tp0: I-Astronomy ifunda yonke into ngale koMhlaba - amaplanethi, izinkanyezi, imithala, nomkhathi ngokwawo. Isimiso sethu sonozungezilanga sakhiwe eminyakeni engaba yizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-4.6 edlule. Umkhathi ulinganiselwa eminyakeni eyizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-13.8.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_desc: Astronomy studies everything beyond Earth — planets, stars, galaxies, and the universe itself. Our solar system formed about 4.6 billion years ago. The universe is estimated to be 13.8 billion years old.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_task: Bala: ukukhanya kuhamba ku-300,000 km/s. Ukukhanya kuhamba kude kangakanani ngeminithi elingu-1? Ehoreni elingu-1?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp0: Isimiso sethu sonozungezilanga: Amaplanethi ayi-8 azungeza iLanga. I-oda: iMercury, iVenus, umhlaba, iMars, iJupiter, iSaturn, i-Uranus, iNeptune.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp1: Izinkanyezi zikhiqiza amandla ngokuhlangana kwenuzi: ama-athomu e-hydrogen ahlangana ukuze akhe i-helium.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp2: I-light-year ibanga elihanjwa ukukhanya onyakeni owodwa (≈9.46 trillion km).
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp3: I-Milky Way ingumthala wethu; iqukethe izinkanyezi ezingaphezu kwezigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-200.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp4: Ithiyori ye-Big Bang: indawo yonke yaqala njengephuzu elishisa kakhulu, eliminyene ~eminyakeni eyizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-13.8 edlule.
learnSch_health_title: Imfundo Yezempilo || Impilo yomuntu || Impilo yomuntu siqu ihlanganisa imikhuba nokukhetha okuthinta inhlalakahle yakho ngokomzimba nangokwengqondo. Izenzo ezincane zansuku zonke - ukulala, ukudla okunomsoco, ukuzivocavoca - kunemiphumela yesikhathi eside empilweni.
learnSch_health_f0_name: Hlela ukudla okunomsoco okungenani namaqembu okudla ama-4. Khomba isakhi esisodwa kanye nomsebenzi waso ekudleni ngakunye.
learnSch_health_f0_desc: Abantu abadala badinga amahora angu-7-9 okulala ubusuku ngabunye; intsha idinga amahora angu-8-10.
learnSch_health_f0_task: Ukudla okunomsoco kuhlanganisa ama-carbohydrate, amaprotheni, amafutha anempilo, amavithamini namaminerali.
learnSch_health_f0_kp0: Ukuzivivinya okuvamile (imizuzu engu-150/isonto ukuqina okumaphakathi) kunciphisa ingozi yesifo.
learnSch_health_f0_kp1: I-Hydration: inhloso ≈2 wamalitha amanzi ngosuku kuye ngomsebenzi nesimo sezulu.
learnSch_health_f0_kp2: Ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuvimbelayo: ukuhlolwa njalo, ukugoma, nokuvakasha kwamazinyo.
learnSch_health_f0_kp4: Preventive healthcare: regular check-ups, vaccinations, and dental visits.
learnSch_health_f1_name: Impilo Yengqondo || Impilo yengqondo ibaluleke njengempilo yomzimba. Kuthinta indlela esicabanga ngayo, esizizwa ngayo nesenza ngayo. Ukuqonda ingcindezi nemizwa - nokuthi ungalutholaphi usizo - kuyikhono lempilo.
learnSch_health_f1_desc: Bhala izindlela ezi-3 ezinempilo zokulawula ingcindezi. Chaza ukuthi kungani isu ngalinye lisebenza ngokomzimba noma ngokwengqondo.
learnSch_health_f1_task: Ukucindezeleka kuyimpendulo evamile ezinseleleni; ukucindezeleka okungapheli kulimaza impilo.
learnSch_health_f1_kp0: Amasu: ukuphefumula okujulile, ukuvivinya umzimba, ukukhuluma nothile, ukuphatha isikhathi.
learnSch_health_f1_kp1: Ukukhathazeka nokucindezeleka kuvamile - kuyizimo zezokwelapha, hhayi ubuthakathaka.
learnSch_health_f1_kp2: Ukusiza umngane: lalela ngaphandle kokwahlulela, khuthaza ukwesekwa kochwepheshe.
learnSch_health_f1_kp3: Ukulala, ukuzivocavoca, nokuxhumana nabantu kuthuthukisa impilo yengqondo.
learnSch_health_f1_kp4: Ukulawula ingcindezi || Izinsiza zosizo || Imikhuba enempilo || Ubuciko Nokuklama || Ubuciko obubonakalayo || Ubuciko obubonakalayo buveza imibono, imizwa, nezindaba ngezithombe nezinto. Ukudweba, ukudweba, ukubaza, nokuklama konke kusebenzisa izakhi zesisekelo ezifanayo: umugqa, umumo, umbala, ukuthungwa, indawo, kanye nesimo.
learnSch_health_f1_tp0: Dweba noma iyiphi into usebenzisa imigqa ekhonkolo kuphela (uhlaka kuphela). Bese ufaka umthunzi endaweni eyodwa ukukhombisa ukujula.
learnSch_health_f1_tp1: Isondo lombala: okuyisisekelo (okubomvu, okuphuzi, okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka) → okwesibili (okuwolintshi, okuluhlaza okotshani, oku-violet).
learnSch_health_f1_tp2: Imibala ehambisanayo ihlala ibhekene nomunye esondweni (obomvu-oluhlaza, oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka-owolintshi).
learnSch_arts_title: Ukubunjwa: ukuthi izakhi zihlelwa kanjani. Umthetho wokuthathu uhlukanisa ifreyimu ibe izingxenye eziyi-9 ezilinganayo.
learnSch_arts_f0_desc: Visual arts express ideas, emotions, and stories through images and objects. Drawing, painting, sculpture, and design all use the same foundational elements: line, shape, colour, texture, space, and form.
learnSch_arts_f0_task: Sketch any object using only contour lines (outline only). Then shade one area to show depth.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp0: The colour wheel: primary (red, yellow, blue) → secondary (orange, green, violet).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp1: Complementary colours sit opposite each other on the wheel (red–green, blue–orange).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp2: Composition: how elements are arranged. Rule of thirds divides the frame into 9 equal parts.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp3: Line: can suggest movement, emotion, direction.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp4: Isikhala esingesihle: ingemuva elizungeze isihloko — libaluleke njengesihloko ngokwaso.
learnSch_music_f0_desc: Ithiyori yomculo iwulimi lomculo. Ichaza indlela imisindo ehlelwe ngayo yaba imiculo, ukuvumelana nezigqi. Ukufunda umbhalo womculo kufana nokufunda imephu yomsindo.
learnSch_music_f0_task: Shaya ihlombe ngesigqi sengoma oyaziyo. Yibhale usebenzisa izimpawu ezinde (—) nezifushane (·). Mangaki amabhithi ngebha?
learnSch_music_f0_kp0: Iphimbo: ukuphakama noma ukwehla komsindo. Kukalwa ngo-Hz.
learnSch_music_f0_kp1: Amanothi kubasebenzi: Treble clef lines (EGBDF), izikhala (FACE).
learnSch_music_f0_kp2: Beat = ukushaya kwenhliziyo okuqinile. I-Tempo = isivinini (BPM). Isigqi = amaphethini emisindo emide nemifushane.
learnSch_music_f0_kp3: Isilinganiso siwukulandelana kwamanothi kuphethini ethile (isb. Isikali esikhulu: yonke-ingxenye-yonke-yonke-yonke-ingxenye-yonke-yonke-ingxenye).
learnSch_music_f0_kp4: I-chord inamanothi angu-3+ adlalwa ndawonye; amaculo amakhulu azwakala agqamile, amaculo amancane azwakala ngokumnyama.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_desc: Ukufaneleka komzimba kunezingxenye ezine eziyinhloko: ukukhuthazela kwenhliziyo nemithambo yegazi, amandla emisipha, ukuguquguquka, kanye nokwakheka komzimba. Ukuqeqesha indawo ngayinye kuthuthukisa njalo impilo nokusebenza.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_task: Dala uhlelo lokujima lwamasonto onke lwemizuzu engama-30 usebenzisa isimiso se-FITT. Faka okungenani izinhlobo ezi-2 zokuzivocavoca.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp0: Ukuzivocavoca kwe-Aerobic (ukugijima, ukubhukuda) kuqinisa inhliziyo namaphaphu.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp1: Ukuzivocavoca kwe-Anaerobic (ukuphakamisa isisindo, ukugijima) kwakha amandla emisipha.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp2: Ukulayisha ngokweqile okuqhubekayo: kancane kancane kwandisa ukuqina ukuze uqhubeke uthuthuka.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp3: Ukuphumula nokululama yilapho imisipha ikhula ngamandla.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp4: Isimiso se-FITT: Imvamisa, Ukuqina, Isikhathi, Uhlobo — izinsika zohlelo lokuqeqesha.
learnSch_german_language_title: Uhlelo lolimi lwesiJalimane lwakhiwe phezu kwezimo ezine (Nominativ, Akkusativ, Dativ, Genitiv) ezinquma amafomu ebizo kanye ne-athikili. Ukuqonda amacala kuwukhiye wokwakha imisho yesiJalimane efanele.
learnSch_german_language_f0_name: Bhala kabusha esimweni esifanele: 'Der Hund (beißen) ___ Mann.' Faka i-athikili elungile ye-Akkusasativ ye-'Mann'.
learnSch_german_language_f0_desc: I-Nominativ = isihloko (Ubani owenza isenzo?). Akkusativ = into eqondile (Yini?). I-Dativ = into engaqondile (Ku/kubani?). I-Genitiv = ifa.
learnSch_german_language_f0_task: Iziqephu zendatshana eziqondile zishintsha ngokwezinhlamvu: der/die/das (Nom.) → den/die/das (Akk.) → dem/der/dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp0: Isimo sesenzo: ezigatshaneni eziyinhloko, isenzo sihlala sisesibili. Ezigatshaneni ezingaphansi, isenzo siya ekugcineni.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp1: Iziphetho zesiphawulo ziyashintsha kuye nge-athikili kanye necala (okunamandla, okubuthakathaka, ukwehla okuxubile).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp2: Izenzo ze-modal (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, mögen) zihlale zibhanqa ne-infinitive ekugcineni.
learnSch_german_language_f1_desc: Ukuhlaziywa kombhalo wesiJalimane kukufundisa ukuhlonza amathuluzi okubhala, uhumushe incazelo, futhi ubhale izimpikiswano ezihlelekile. Lawa makhono asebenza ezinkondlweni, ezindabeni ezimfushane, nephrozi ende.
learnSch_german_language_f1_task: Thola isingathekiso esisodwa nesifaniso esisodwa enkondlweni emfushane yesiJalimane. Bhala umusho owodwa uchaze ukuthi ngamunye usho ukuthini.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp0: Hlaziya isakhiwo: isingeniso, umzimba oyinhloko, isiphetho (Einleitung, Hauptteil, Schluss).
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp1: Imishini yokufunda: Isingathekiso (isingathekiso), i-Vergleich (isifaniso), i-Alliteration, i-Personifikation.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp2: I-Textsorte matters: inkondlo ihlaziywa ngokwehlukile embikweni wezindaba.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp3: I-Thesis (Lezi) + ubufakazi (Beleg) + ukuphawula (Deutung) = isakhiwo sokuhlaziya esijwayelekile.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp4: Inkulumo engaqondile isebenzisa i-Konjunktiv I: Er sagt, er könne helfen.
learnSch_german_language_f1_tp2: Ukubhalwa kwe-eseyi || Ukubhala Nesitayela || Ukubhala okuhle kwesiJalimane kunembayo, kwakheke kahle, futhi kusebenzisa isilulumagama esihlukene nobude bemisho. Ukuzijwayeza izinhlobo ezahlukene zemibhalo kwakha ukuzethemba ezivivinyweni nasekuxhumaneni kwangempela kwempilo.
learnSch_german_language_f2_name: Bhala i-Erörterung enemisho emi-5 kokuthi: 'Sollten Smartphones in der Schule verboten werden?' Sebenzisa okuthi 'einerseits…andererseits'.
learnSch_german_language_f2_desc: I-Erörterung (i-eseyi eyi-discursive) yethula ama-pro and contra argument kanye nesiphetho somuntu siqu.
learnSch_german_language_f2_task: U-Kommentar (ukuhlaziya) uphikisa isikhundla esisodwa ngobufakazi kanye nemibuzo yokukhuluma.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp0: I-Zusammenfassung (isifinyezo): kafushane, umuntu wesithathu, inkathi yamanje, ayikho imibono.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp1: Shintshanisa iziqalo zemisho: sebenzisa izihlanganiso ezingaphansi (weil, obwohl, damit, wenn) ezakhiwo eziyinkimbinkimbi.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp2: Izimpawu zokuloba: okhefana ngaphambi kwazo zonke izigaba ezingaphansi (Nebensätze).
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp4: Punctuation: commas before all subordinate clauses (Nebensätze).
learnSch_religion_ethics_title: Inkolo Nokuziphatha || Izinkolo Zomhlaba || Ukuqonda izinkolo ezinkulu zomhlaba kusiza ekuthuthukiseni inhlonipho, uzwela, nokufunda ngamasiko. Isiko ngalinye linikeza izimpendulo eziyingqayizivele zemibuzo ephathelene nokuphila, ukufa, ubulungisa, nenjongo.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_name: Qhathanisa indlela izinkolo ezimbili ozifundile eziwuphendula ngayo lo mbuzo: 'Kwenzekani ngemva kokufa?' Bhala imisho emi-3 ngayinye.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_desc: UbuKristu: ukukholelwa kuNkulunkulu oyedwa, uJesu njengomsindisi; umbhalo ongcwele = iBhayibheli; ~ 2.4 billion abalandeli.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_task: I-Islam: ukukholelwa kuAllah, uMuhammad njengomprofethi; umbhalo ongcwele = Quran; izinsika ezinhlanu ziqondisa impilo yansuku zonke.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp0: UbuJuda: ukukholelwa kuNkulunkulu oyedwa; iTorah (iBhayibheli lesiHebheru); 613 imiyalo (mitzvot); ~ 15 million abalandeli.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp1: UbuHindu: onkulunkulu abaningi, iqiniso elilodwa lokugcina (Brahman); imiqondo karma, dharma, ukuphindukuzalwa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp2: UbuBuddha: izimfundiso zikaBuddha; Amaqiniso Amane Ahloniphekile, Indlela Ephindwe Kasishiyagalombili; umgomo = Nirvana (ukukhululwa ekuhluphekeni).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_tp1: Izimiso zokuziphatha ziyabuza: yikuphi okulungile nokungalungile, futhi ngani? Amathiyori wezimiso zokuziphatha anikeza izinhlaka ezahlukene zokwenza izinqumo zokuziphatha. Ukuziqonda kukusiza ukuthi ucabange ngezinkinga zomhlaba wangempela.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_tp2: Imoto ezishayelayo kufanele ikhethe: shaya umuntu ongu-1 noma ijike bese ishayisa abangu-5. Hlaziya le nkinga ngombono we-utilitarian KANYE ne-deontological.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_name: Consequentialism (isb. I-Utilitarianism): gweba izenzo ngemiphumela yazo. Okuhle kakhulu kunombolo enkulu (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_desc: I-Deontology (Kant): ezinye izenzo zilungile noma azilungile ngokwazo, ngaphandle kwemiphumela. I-Categorical Imperative: yenza kuphela ngendlela ongenza ngayo wonke umuntu.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_task: I-Virtue Ethics (i-Aristotle): gxila kumlingiswa, hhayi emithethweni. Umuntu olungile ukhetha incazelo yegolide phakathi kokweqisa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp0: Consequentialism (e.g. Utilitarianism): judge actions by their outcomes. Greatest good for the greatest number (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp1: Deontology (Kant): some acts are right or wrong in themselves, regardless of consequences. The Categorical Imperative: act only as you could will everyone to act.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp2: Virtue Ethics (Aristotle): focus on character, not rules. The virtuous person chooses the golden mean between extremes.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp3: I-Contractarianism (Rawls): ubulungisa yilokho abantu abanengqondo abangavumelana nakho ngemuva 'kweveyili yokungazi' (ukungazi indawo yabo emphakathini).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp4: Izimiso zokuziphatha ezisetshenziswayo: ukuthi le mibono yazisa kanjani izimpikiswano zangempela - i-euthanasia, amalungelo ezilwane, i-AI, ubulungiswa besimo sezulu.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_tp0: I-Utilitarianism || Kantian ethics || Izimiso zokuziphatha || Izifundo Zezenhlalakahle || Intando Yeningi Nohulumeni
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_tp1: Ukuqonda ukuthi ohulumeni basebenza kanjani kubalulekile ukuze ube yisakhamuzi esisebenzayo. Izinhlelo zentando yeningi zivikela amalungelo, amandla ahlukene, futhi zinikeze izakhamuzi izwi ngokhetho.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_tp2: Chaza amagatsha amathathu kahulumeni ezweni lakini. Nikeza isibonelo esisodwa samandla egatsha ngalinye.
learnSch_social_studies_title: Intando yeningi: amandla asezandleni zabantu, avezwa ngokhetho olukhululekile namalungelo avikelwe.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_name: Ukwehlukaniswa kwamandla: umthetho (wenza imithetho), isikhulu (usebenzisa imithetho), ubulungiswa (uhumusha imithetho).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_desc: Amasistimu e-Federal ahlukanisa amandla phakathi kohulumeni bezifunda (isb. Germany, USA).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_task: Amalungelo oluntu angamalungelo asemhlabeni wonke, angehlukaniseki (isb. Isimemezelo se-UN Samalungelo Abantu, 1948).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp0: Izinhlelo zePhalamende uma ziqhathaniswa nomongameli: ezinhlelweni zephalamende isigungu esiphezulu sivela esishayamthetho.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp3: Umphakathi Namasiko || Umphakathi ubunjwa isiko, umnotho, izikhungo, namandla omlando. Isayensi yezokuhlalisana kwabantu kanye nezifundo zamasiko zisisiza ukuthi siqonde ukungalingani, ubuwena, kanye noshintsho emphakathini.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp4: Nikeza isibonelo esisodwa sokuthi ukuhwebelana kwembulunga yonke kuyishintshe kanjani impilo yansuku zonke ezweni lakini. Ingabe umphumela ulungile, unegethivu, noma kokubili? Chaza.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_desc: Society is shaped by culture, economy, institutions, and historical forces. Sociology and cultural studies help us understand inequality, identity, and social change.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_task: Give one example of how globalization has changed daily life in your country. Is the effect positive, negative, or both? Explain.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp0: I-Socialisation: inqubo lapho abantu befunda khona imikhuba, izindinganiso, kanye neqhaza lomphakathi wabo.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp1: Ukuhlukaniswa komphakathi: ukungalingani okuhlelekile emphakathini (isigaba, ubulili, ubuhlanga).
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp2: Isiko: amagugu okwabelwana ngawo, izinkolelo, imikhuba, kanye nezimpawu ezihlanganisa iqembu ndawonye.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp3: Ukuhwebelana kwembulunga yonke kusheshise ukuhwebelana ngamasiko kanye nokuncikana kwezomnotho.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp4: Ukufunda kwabezindaba: ukuhlola imithombo yokuchema, umbono, kanye nobufakazi kuyikhono elibalulekile lekhulu lama-21.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_desc: I-Epistemology iyabuza: yini esingayazi, futhi sazi kanjani? Ihlola imithombo kanye nemikhawulo yolwazi lomuntu—isizathu, ulwazi, ulwazi, negunya.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_task: Kungenzeka yini ukwazi okuthile ngokuqiniseka okuphelele? Bhala impendulo enemisho emi-4 evela kungqondongqondo KANYE nombono we-empiricist.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp0: I-Rationalism (Descartes, Kant): isizathu siwumthombo oyinhloko wolwazi. 'Cogito ergo sum' — Ngiyacabanga, ngakho-ke ngiyiyo.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp1: I-Empiricism (Locke, Hume): ulwazi luvela kulwazi lwezinzwa. Ingqondo iqala njenge-slate engenalutho (tabula rasa).
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp2: Ukungabaza: kufanele singabaze zonke izimangalo futhi samukele kuphela lokho okungafakazelwa.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp3: Inkolelo Yeqiniso Eqinisekisiwe (uPlato): ulwazi = okuthile kuyiqiniso, uyakholelwa, futhi unokulungisiswa.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp4: Izinkinga ze-Gettier zibonisa ukuthi ukukholelwa kweqiniso okuthethelelekayo akwanele ngaso sonke isikhathi olwazini.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_desc: Iyini ingqondo? Ingabe sikhululekile ukwenza izinqumo zangempela? Le mibuzo ihlezi ezimpambanweni zefilosofi, isayensi yezinzwa, nempilo yansuku zonke.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_task: Ingabe abantu bakhululeke ngempela? Bhala ukuphikisana kwemisho emi-5 kungaba ngeyokufanelana noma ukunquma kanzima.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp0: I-Dualism (Descartes): ingqondo nomzimba yizinto ezihlukene. Inkinga: baxhumana kanjani?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp1: I-Physicalism: ingqondo iwumkhiqizo womsebenzi wobuchopho ngokuphelele.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp2: I-Functionalism: izimo zengqondo zichazwa ngendima yazo yokusebenza, hhayi ingqikithi yazo yomzimba.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp3: Inkinga enzima yokuqaphela: kungani ukucubungula ngokomzimba kubangela isipiliyoni sokuziphendulela?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp4: Ukuvumelana: inkululeko yokuzikhethela kanye ne-determinism ingaba khona ndawonye - inkululeko = ukwenza ngokuvumelana nezizathu zakho, noma ngabe kubangelwa.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_tp2: Ubuchwepheshe Nokuklama || Ukucabanga Kwedizayini || Ukucabanga kokuklama kuyindlela egxile kumuntu yokuxazulula izinkinga ngobuchule nangendlela ehlelekile. Isetshenziswa ekwakhiweni komkhiqizo, ubunjiniyela, i-UX, kanye nokuqamba izinto ezintsha kuzo zonke izimboni.
learnSch_technology_title: Khetha inkinga esikoleni sakho. Sebenzisa izigaba ezintathu zokuqala zokucabanga zokuklama: chaza inkinga, chaza ukuthi ubani othintekayo, futhi ukhiqize imibono emi-3.
learnSch_technology_f0_name: Izigaba ezi-5: Ukuzwela → Chaza → Ideate → I-Prototype → Isivivinyo.
learnSch_technology_f0_desc: Ukuzwela: qonda izidingo zangempela zabasebenzisi ngocwaningo nokubheka.
learnSch_technology_f0_task: Ukucabanga: khiqiza imibono eminingi ngaphandle kokwahlulela; ubuningi ngaphambi kwekhwalithi.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp0: I-Prototype: yakha amamodeli asheshayo, ashibhile ukuze uhlole imibono ngaphambi kokutshala izinsiza.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp1: Ukuphindaphinda: ukuklama kuwumjikelezo; impendulo ithuthukisa zonke izinguqulo.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp2: Ideate: generate many ideas without judgment; quantity before quality.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp3: Prototype: build quick, cheap models to test ideas before investing resources.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp4: Iteration: design is a cycle; feedback improves every version.
learnSch_technology_f1_desc: Ukufunda ngedijithali kusho ukuqonda ukuthi ubuchwepheshe busebenza kanjani, ukuthi idatha isetshenziswa kanjani, kanye nendlela yokuzulazula emhlabeni wedijithali ngokuphepha nangokuhlolisisa. I-AI iguqula yonke insimu.
learnSch_technology_f1_task: Faka kuhlu 3 izinhlobo zedatha yomuntu siqu eqoqwa ifoni yakho. Kokunye, chaza ingozi eyodwa kanye nenzuzo eyodwa yalelo qoqo ledatha.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp0: Ama-algorithms yizinqubo zesinyathelo ngesinyathelo ezilandelwa amakhompyutha. Banika amandla ukusesha, izincomo, kanye ne-AI.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp1: Ukufunda ngomshini: amasistimu athuthukayo kusuka kudatha ngaphandle kokuhlelwa ngokusobala.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp2: Ubumfihlo bedatha: qonda ukuthi iziphi izinhlelo zokusebenza eziqoqayo ngawe nokuthi isetshenziswa kanjani.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp3: Imininingwane engamanga: ama-deepfakes, amabhamuza okuhlunga, nokukhulisa i-algorithmic kwenza ukuhlola okubalulekile kubaluleke.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp4: Izisekelo ze-Cybersecurity: sebenzisa amagama ayimfihlo aqinile, nika amandla i-2FA, qaphela imizamo yobugebengu bokweba imininingwane ebucayi.
learnSch_technology_f1_tp0: Ama-algorithms || Okuyisisekelo kwe-AI || Ukuphepha kwedijithali || Ulimi lwesi-Arabhu
learnSch_technology_f1_tp2: Isi-Arabhu sibhalwa kwesokudla kuye kwesobunxele (RTL) kusetshenziswa izinhlamvu ezingama-28. Umumo wezinhlamvu uyashintsha kuye ngokuthi indawo yegama (eyokuqala, ephakathi, yokugcina, ehlukanisiwe). Isi-Arabic sisebenzisa izinombolo zesi-Eastern Arabic-Indic (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) — izinombolo zaseNtshonalanga 0–9 zithathwe kulezi ngokomlando.
learnSch_arabic_language_title: Bhala izinombolo 1–10 ngezinombolo zesi-Eastern Arabic-Indic (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Qhathanisa ngayinye nozakwabo waseNtshonalanga. Bese ubhala igama lesi-Arabhu elisho "inombolo" (رقم – raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_name: Isi-Arabhu siyafundwa futhi sibhalwe ukusuka kwesokudla kuye kwesokunxele (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_desc: I-alfabhethi inezinhlamvu ezingama-28; iningi lawongwaqa. Onkamisa bavame ukukhonjiswa njengezimpawu zokukhuluma ( ḥarakāt).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_task: Write the numbers 1–10 in Eastern Arabic-Indic numerals (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Compare each with its Western counterpart. Then write the Arabic word for "number" (رقم – raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp0: Arabic is read and written from right to left (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp1: The alphabet has 28 letters; most are consonants. Vowels are often shown as diacritics (ḥarakāt).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp2: Uhlamvu ngalunye lunamafomu afika kwangu-4: ahlukanisiwe (م), isiqalo (مـ), esimaphakathi (ـمـ), okokugcina (ـم).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp3: Isi-Arabic sisebenzisa izinombolo zesi-Eastern Arabic-Indic: ٠ ١ ٢ ٣ ٤ ٥ ٦ ٧ ٨ ٩ (0–9). Amadijithi aseNtshonalanga 0-9 avele kulezi zibalo nge-medieval Islamic mathematics — igama elithi "izinombolo zesi-Arabhu" eNtshonalanga empeleni lisho lezi zinhlamvu zoqobo zaseMpumalanga.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp4: I-Modern Standard Arabic (Fuṣḥā) isetshenziswa kwezemfundo nabezindaba; Izilimi zesigodi ze-Darija/Levantine/Gulf ziyahlukahluka ngendawo.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_desc: Uhlelo lolimi lwesi-Arabhu lusekelwe ezimpandeni ezinezinhlamvu ezintathu (جذور) ezikhiqiza amagama ahlobene. Amabizo anobulili bohlelo (owesilisa/owesifazane), inombolo (ubunye/okubili/ubuningi), kanye necala. Izenzo zihlanganiswa kumuntu, ubulili, nenombolo.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_task: Khomba izinhlamvu zezimpande zika: كَاتِب (umbhali), مَكْتُوب (obhaliwe), كِتَابَة (ukubhala). Uyini umsuka ovamile?
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp0: Isistimu yempande ezinhlangothi ezintathu: impande ethi ك-ت-ب (k-t-b) inikeza: كَتَبَ (kataba, wabhala), كِتَاب (kitāb, incwadi), مَكْتَبَة (maktaba, umtapo wolwazi).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp1: Amabizo angabesilisa noma abesifazane. Amabizo esifazane ngokuvamile agcina ngo-ة (tā' marbūṭa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp2: Okukabili kwakhiwe ngokwengeza u-ان- (ibizo) egameni: كِتَابَان = izincwadi ezimbili.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp3: Ubuningi obuphukile: ubuningi bobuningi besi-Arabhu bushintsha onkamisa bangaphakathi, isib. كِتَاب → كُتُب (izincwadi).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp4: I-Verb-subject-object (VSO) ukuhleleka kwamagama okuzenzakalelayo ngesi-Arabhu sakudala; I-SVO ivamile ngesi-Modern Standard Arabic.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_tp0: Isistimu yezimpande || Ubulili nenombolo || Ukuhlanganiswa kwesenzo
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_tp2: Ukwakha ulwazimagama lwesi-Arabhu kulula uma usuqonda uhlelo lwempande. Imikhonzo evamile, izinombolo, namagama ansuku zonke akunikeza isisekelo sokuxhumana kwangempela.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_name: Humushela olimini lwesi-Arabhu: 'Ufunda incwadi.' (هو يقرأ كتاباً). Bese ubhala umusho usebenzisa uhlelo lwe-verb-first (VSO).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_desc: Building Arabic vocabulary is easier once you understand the root system. Common greetings, numbers, and everyday words give you a foundation for real communication.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_task: Translate into Arabic: 'He reads a book.' (هو يقرأ كتاباً). Then write the sentence using the verb-first (VSO) classical order.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp0: Ukubingelela: السلام عليكم (As-salāmu ʿalaykum) - Ukuthula makube phezu kwenu. Impendulo: وعليكم السلام.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp1: Izinombolo: وَاحِد (1), اثْنَان (2), ثَلَاثَة (3), أَرْبَعَة (4), خَمْسَة (5), سِتَّة (6), سَبْعَة (7), ثَمَانِيَة (8), تَانِيَة (8), تَسْعَة (8), تَسْعَة (8), تَسْعَة (8), تَسْعَة (8), تَسْسَة 19.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp2: Izinsuku: الأحد (NgeSonto), الاثنين (NgoMsombuluko), الثلاثاء (NgoLwesibili), الأربعاء (NgoLwesithathu), الخميس (NgoLwesine), الجمعة (NgoLwesihlanu), السبت (NgoMgqibelo).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp3: Izenzo ezivamile: ذَهَبَ (dhahaba, ukuhamba), أَكَلَ (akala, ukudla), قَرَأَ (qara'a, ukufunda), كَتَبَ (kataba, ukubhala).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp4: Okusemthethweni vs okungakahleleki: I-Modern Standard Arabic isetshenziswa kwezemfundo; izilimi zesigodi ziyahlukahluka kuwo wonke umhlaba wama-Arab.
learnSch_french_language_f0_name: Ukuphimisela kwesiFulentshi kungaba inselele kwabakhuluma isiNgisi ngenxa yonkamisa bamakhala, izinhlamvu ezithule, nezixhumanisi. Ukwazi imisindo kusenesikhathi kwenza ukukhuluma nokuqonda kube lula kakhulu.
learnSch_french_language_f0_desc: Funda ngokuphimisela: 'Les enfants ont un ami anglais.' Maka ukuthi yiziphi izixhumanisi okudingeka uzenze. Prakthiza izikhathi ezi-3.
learnSch_french_language_f0_task: Onkamisa bamakhala: zu/em, in/im/ain/ein, on/om, un — ungwaqa wokugcina akaphinyiswa: 'bon' = /bɔ̃/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp0: Izinhlamvu ezithulile: ongwaqa bokugcina ngokuvamile abathuli (isb. 'vous' = /vu/), ngaphandle kwangaphambi kukankamisa (isixhumanisi).
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp1: Ukuxhumana: ungwaqa wokugcina ovamise ukuthule uphinyiswa lapho igama elilandelayo liqala ngonkamisa: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp2: U-R ngesiFulentshi umsindo we-guttural (uvular), ngokungafani nesiNgisi r.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp3: Amamaki okugcizelela: é (kuvaliwe u-e), è (ovuliwe u-e), ê (omlando), ç (othambile c = /s/), î, ô, û (iningi lawomlando).
learnSch_french_language_f1_desc: Uhlelo lolimi lwesiFulentshi lisebenzisa amabizo obulili, ukuhlanganisa izenzo kubantu abayisi-6, kanye nohlu lwezinkathi. Ikhono elibaluleke kakhulu ukwazi isikhathi samanje, esedlule (passé compé), kanye nenkathi engaphelele.
learnSch_french_language_f1_task: Hlanganisa 'i-parler' (ukukhuluma) enkathini yamanje kubo bonke abantu aba-6. Bese ubhala imisho emi-2 usebenzisa i- passé compé.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp0: Wonke amabizo esiFulentshi angabesilisa noma abesifazane: le livre (m.), itafula (f.). Imibhalo iyavumelana: un/une, le/la, les.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp1: Iziphawulo ziyavumelana ngobulili nangenombolo: un grand livre / une grande maison.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp2: Passé compé = avoir/être + past participle: j'ai mangé (ngadla), il est allé (wahamba).
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp3: Ukungapheleli (i-imparfait) kuchaza izimo ezedlule eziqhubekayo: je mangeais (ngangidla), il faisait chaud.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp4: Ukuphika: ne ... pas uzungeza isenzo: Je ne sais pas (angazi).
learnSch_french_language_f2_name: Ukubhala ngesiFulentshi || Ukubhala ngesiFulentshi kudinga ukunakwa emithethweni yesivumelwano, izimpawu zokuloba (izikhala zangaphambili !? ; :), nerejista esemthethweni. Isakhiwo esicacile - isingeniso, ukuthuthukiswa, isiphetho - siyisisekelo sokubhala kwezemfundo yesiFulentshi.
learnSch_french_language_f2_desc: Bhala ibinzana lesiFulentshi elinemisho engu-6 ngesizini yakho oyintandokazi. Sebenzisa okungenani izixhumi zenkulumo ezi-3 kanye ne-subjunctive eyodwa.
learnSch_french_language_f2_task: Izimpawu zokuloba zesiFulentshi zengeza isikhala ngaphambi:; ! ? futhi ngaphakathi "ama-guillemets" (izimpawu zokucaphuna).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp0: I-subjunctive (i-subjonctif) iveza ukungabaza, imizwa, noma isidingo: Il faut que tu viennes.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp1: Izixhumi zenkulumo: d'abord (kuqala), ensuite/puis (bese), enfin (ekugcineni), cependant (nokho), en effet (ngempela).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp2: Izakhiwo ezingezona ezomuntu zivamile: Il est important de + infinitive; On peut dire que...
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp3: Ifomethi yezinhlamvu: Madame/Monsieur (ukuvulwa okusemthethweni), i-Veuillez agréer l'expression de mes salutations distinuées (kuvala okusemthethweni).
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_name: ISpanishi siwulimi olungaguquki ngefonetiki - amagama aphinyiswa ngendlela ebhaliwe. Lokhu kuyenza ibe olunye lwezilimi ezifinyeleleka kakhulu kwabaqalayo. Ukwazi kahle imisindo nesistimu yokuphimisela kusenesikhathi kubalulekile.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_desc: Maka ingcindezi kokuthi: universidad, hablar, árbol, joven. Sebenzisa umthetho omisiwe futhi uhlole ukuthi yikuphi okudinga uphawu lokugcizelela.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_task: ISpanishi sinonkamisa abangu-5 abamsulwa: a, e, i, o, u - bonke baphinyiswa ngokungaguquki.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp0: Uhlamvu ñ luzwakala njengokuthi 'ny' (España, mañana). I-double ll izwakala njengo-'y' ezilimini eziningi zesigodi.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp1: Ukucindezelwa: amagama agcina ngonkamisa, n, noma u-s agcizelelwa kuhlamvu lwesibili ukuya kokugcina. Omaki be-accent (á, é) bayakweqa lokhu.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp3: Izilimi zesigodi: IsiCastilian (eSpain) sisebenzisa u-/θ/ ku-c/z; I-Latin American Spanish isebenzisa /s/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_name: Ulimi lwesiSpanishi luhlelekile futhi luvamile. Ukwazi ubulili bebizo, ukuhlanganisa izenzo, kanye nezikhathi ezimbili ezedlule (i-preterite nengaphelele) kukunikeza amathuluzi okuxhumana ngokuzethemba.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_desc: Chaza ukuthi isetshenziswa nini i-ser vs. estar. Bhala imisho emi-4 eyisibonelo: 2 nge-ser, 2 nge-estar.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_task: Amabizo angowesilisa noma owesifazane: el libro (m.), la mesa (f.). Iziphawulo ziyavumelana: un libro interesante / una mesa interesante.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp0: I-Ser vs. estar: kokubili kusho 'ukuba'. Ser = izici ezihlala njalo; estar = izimo zesikhashana: Soy médico / Estoy cansado.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp1: I-Preterite (indefinido) = iphelile esedlule: Ayer comí pizza. Okungaphelele (imperfecto) = okuqhubekayo okwedlule: Cuando era niño, jugaba...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp2: Preterite (indefinido) = completed past: Ayer comí pizza. Imperfect (imperfecto) = ongoing past: Cuando era niño, jugaba...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp3: Izenzo zokuziphendulela: me lavo (ngiyazigeza), se llama (igama lakhe ngu).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp4: Ukuthobela izifiso/ukungabaza: Quiero que vengas. Kungenzeka futhi.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_name: Ukubhala kweSpanishi kulandela izivumelwano ezicacile. Imibhalo yezemfundo isebenzisa irejista esemthethweni, kanti ukuxhumana kwansuku zonke kuvame ukufudumala nokuqondile. Umyalo oqinile wezixhumi kanye ne-subjunctive iphakamisa ukubhala kwakho.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_desc: Bhala i-imeyili emfushane (imisho engu-6) ngesi-Spanish umeme umngane ephathini yosuku lokuzalwa. Sebenzisa irejista esemthethweni nengakahleleki — bese uqhathanisa.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_task: Isi-Spanish sisebenzisa umbuzo ohlanekezelwe ¿ kanye namamaki ezibabazo ekuqaleni kwemisho.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp0: Irejista esemthethweni: isetshenziswa (ngokusemthethweni wena), akukho ukufinyezwa, okuhambisana nezicelo ezinesizotha.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp1: Izixhumi: sin embargo (nokho), además (ngaphezu kwalokho), por lo tanto (ngakho-ke), i-aunque (nakuba), es decir (lokho).
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp2: Ukuvulwa kwencwadi: Estimado/a Sr./Sra. + isibongo. Ukuvala: Le saluda atentamente / Un cordial saludo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp3: Isakhiwo se-eseyi: introducción (tesis), desarrollo (argumentos con ejemplos), conclusión.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_tp2: Izisekelo Zolimi || Uhlelo lolimi lwesiNgisi lulula ngesakhiwo kodwa lunamaphethini amaningi angajwayelekile. Ukuqonda izikhathi, izihloko, kanye nezenzo ze-modal kuyisihluthulelo sokuxhumana okunembile.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_tit: Phinda ubhale le misho esebenzayo ngezwi lokwenziwa: (1) 'Uthisha usichazile isifundo.' (2) 'Ososayensi bathola uhlobo olusha lwezilwane.'
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f0_: English grammar is relatively simple in structure but has many irregular patterns. Understanding tenses, articles, and modal verbs is the key to accurate communication.
Rewrite these active sentences in passive voice: (1) 'The teacher explained the lesson.' (2) 'Scientists discovered a new species.'

IsiNgisi sinezinkathi zezenzo eziyi-12. Okuvame kakhulu: okwamanje okulula (ngiyasebenza), okuqhubekayo okuqhubekayo (ngiyasebenza), okwedlule okulula (ngisebenzile), okwamanje okuphelele (ngisebenzile).
Imibhalo: 'a/an' yamabizo angaqondile (incwadi); 'the' yamabizo athile (incwadi esikhulume ngayo).
Izenzo ze-modal (zinga, zinga, kufanele, kufanele, zizokwazi, zinga, zingase) ziveze ikhono, imvume, isibopho, noma amathuba.
Imibandela: Ukube + okwedlule okulula → bekungaba + okungapheli (okunemibandela yesibili: Ukube benginesikhathi, bengizohamba).
Izwi lokwenziwa: Into iba yisihloko: 'Iphepha labhalwa umfundi.'
Izenzo ze-Modal || Izwi lokwenziwa || Ukufunda Nokuqonda
Ukuqonda ukufunda okuqinile kusho ukuqonda incazelo ecacile, ukwenza iziphetho, nokuhlola inhloso nezindlela zombhali. Kubalulekile empumelelweni yezemfundo kunoma yisiphi isifundo.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f1_: Funda noma yisiphi isihloko sezindaba sesigaba esisodwa. Bhala: (1) umqondo oyinhloko, (2) ubufakazi obubodwa obunikeziwe, (3) inhloso okungenzeka yombhali.
Skimming: funda ngokushesha ukuze uthole umqondo oyinhloko. Ukuskena: bheka imininingwane ethile.
I-inference: ukufunda 'phakathi kwemigqa' - yini eshiwo kodwa engashiwongo ngokuqondile?
Inhloso yombhali: ukwazisa, ukuncenga, ukujabulisa, noma ukuchaza.
Silulumagama kumongo: sebenzisa amagama azungezile ukuze uthole incazelo yamagama angaziwa.
Ukufundwa okubucayi: thola izimangalo, hlola ubufakazi, bese ubuza imibuzo ecatshangwayo.
Amakhono okuqonda || Ukufunda okubalulekile || Ukubhala Kwezemfundo
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f2_: Ukubhala kwesiNgisi Kwezemfundo kulandela izimiso ezicacile: irejista esemthethweni, isilulumagama esinembayo, nesakhiwo esinengqondo. Ukwenza kahle le mihlangano kusiza ezivivinyweni, izicelo zasenyuvesi, kanye nempilo yobungcweti.
Bhala isingeniso semisho emi-5 sendatshana ethi: 'Umthelela wenkundla yezokuxhumana empilweni yengqondo yentsha.' Faka nesitatimende sethisisi.
Isakhiwo se-eseyi: Isingeniso (ihhuku + umongo + thesis), Umzimba (iphuzu, ubufakazi, incazelo ngendima ngayinye), Isiphetho (phinda ithisisi + nokubaluleka okubanzi).
Isitatimende seThesis: umusho owodwa ocacile osho impikiswano eyinhloko yendaba.
Ulimi oluhlanganisayo ekubhaleni kwezemfundo: 'Kungaphikiswa ngokuthi…', 'Ubufakazi buphakamisa…', 'Lokhu kungase kubonise…'
Gwema ulimi olungakahleleki: ungasebenzisi izifinyezo (ungazenzi → ungazenzi), isitsotsi, noma ukulandisa komuntu wokuqala ngaphandle kokuthi uceliwe.
Ireferensi: caphuna imithombo ngendlela efanele (APA, MLA, Harvard) ukuze ugweme ukukopela.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_desc: I-Calculus iyizibalo zoshintsho. Umehluko wokubala uthola amazinga oshintsho (okuphuma kokunye); i-integral calculus ithola amanani anqwabelene (ama-integrals). Isekela i-physics, ubunjiniyela, ezomnotho, kanye nayo yonke isayensi yobuningi.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_task: Thola okuphuma kokunye kokuthi f(x) = 3x³ − 2x² + 5x − 7. Bonisa isinyathelo ngasinye usebenzisa umthetho wamandla.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp0: Umkhawulo uchaza inani umsebenzi osondela kulo njengoba u-x esondela ephoyinti.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp1: Okuphuma kokunye: f′(x) = izinga loshintsho. Ku-f(x) = xⁿ, f′(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (umthetho wamandla).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp3: Integral = indawo engaphansi kwejika. ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp4: I-Theorem eyisisekelo ye-calculus: ukuhlukanisa nokuhlanganisa kuyimisebenzi ephambene.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_name: I-Linear Algebra || I-algebra ewumugqa yizibalo zamavekhtha, omatikuletsheni, nokuguqulwa komugqa. Ibalulekile ekufundeni komshini, ihluzo zekhompiyutha, ubunjiniyela, kanye nesayensi yedatha.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_desc: Phindaphinda i-matrix A = [[1,2],[3,4]] nge-matrix B = [[5,6],[7,8]]. Bonisa zonke izibalo.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_task: Ivekhtha inobukhulu nesiqondiso. Ama-Vector angangezwa futhi akalwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp0: I-matrix imelela ukuguqulwa komugqa noma uhlelo lwezibalo.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp1: Ukuphindaphinda kwe-matrix akuguquki: AB ≠ BA ngokuvamile.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp2: I-Determinant: isikala esitshela ukuthi i-matrix ayiguquleki. det(A) = 0 → ayiguquki.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp3: Ama-Eigenvalues ​​nama-eigenvectors: Av = λv. Isetshenziswa ku-PCA, i-physics, ne-PageRank ye-Google.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_tp2: Izibalo zenyuvesi zisuka kokuchazayo ziye kokungasho lutho - kusetshenziswa idatha yesampula ukuze kufinyelelwe esiphethweni mayelana nezibalo zabantu. I-Probability theory inikeza isisekelo esiqinile.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_name: Isampula labafundi abangu-30 linesilinganiso sobude obungu-170 cm, SD 8 cm. Bala isikhawu sokuzethemba esingu-95%.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_desc: Ukuhlukahluka okungahleliwe: okuguquguqukayo okunenani elinqunywa isenzakalo esingahleliwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_task: Ukusabalalisa okuvamile: ijika lensimbi, isho = imodi = imodi; 68-95-99.7 umthetho.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp0: Ukuhlolwa kwe-hypothesis: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (okunye). p-value < 0.05 → yenqaba u-H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp1: Isikhawu sokuzithemba: ububanzi lapho ipharamitha yangempela ilele khona namathuba ashiwo.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp2: Hypothesis testing: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (alternative). p-value < 0.05 → reject H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp3: Confidence interval: range in which the true parameter lies with stated probability.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp4: I-coefficient yokuhlobanisa r: −1 = inegethivu ephelele, 0 = abukho ubudlelwano bomugqa, +1 = iphozithivu ephelele.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_desc: Izibalo ezihlukene zichaza ukuthi amanani ashintsha kanjani ngokuphathelene namanye amanani. Ziwulimi lwefiziksi, ubunjiniyela, ibhayoloji, kanye nezomnotho - zimodela yonke into kusukela ekukhuleni kwenani labantu kuya emigudwini yeplanethi.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_task: Xazulula dy/dx = 2xy ngo-y(0) = 1. Hlukanisa okuguquguqukayo, hlanganisa, sebenzisa isimo sokuqala.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp0: I-ODE (izibalo ezihlukile ezijwayelekile) ihlanganisa okuphuma kokunye ngokuphathelene nokuhluka okukodwa: dy/dx = f(x, y).
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp1: I-ODE Ehlukanisekayo: dy/dx = g(x)·h(y) → okuguquguqukayo okuhlukene futhi uhlanganise izinhlangothi zombili.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp2: I-ODE yomugqa we-oda lokuqala: dy/dx + P(x)y = Q(x), ixazululwe ngokuhlanganisa isici μ = e^∫P(x)dx.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp3: I-ODE yomugqa wohlelo lwesibili enama-coefficients angashintshi: ay″ + by′ + cy = 0. Xazulula ngesibalo sesici ar² + br + c = 0.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp4: Izinkinga zenani lokuqala (IVP): sebenzisa izimo zokuqala ezinikeziwe ukuze uthole isisombululo esithile esingaguquki C.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_tp1: Ama-ODE alayini || Izicelo ku-physics || Izinombolo Eziyinkimbinkimbi || Izinombolo eziyinkimbinkimbi zelula izinombolo zangempela ngokwethula i = √(−1). Zibalulekile kubunjiniyela bakagesi, ukucubungula isignali, i-quantum mechanics, nokuhlaziya okuyinkimbinkimbi.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_tp2: I-Express z = 1 + i ngesimo se-polar. Thola i-modulus yayo, impikiswano, bese uyibhala njenge-re^(iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_name: Inombolo eyinkimbinkimbi: z = a + bi, lapho u-a eyingxenye yangempela kanye no-b ingxenye ecatshangwayo.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_task: Express z = 1 + i in polar form. Find its modulus, argument, and write it as re^(iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp0: A complex number: z = a + bi, where a is the real part and b the imaginary part.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp2: I-Polar form: z = r(cosθ + i·sinθ) = re^(iθ) (ifomula ka-Euler).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp3: Ubunikazi buka-Euler: e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 — ngokuvamile ebizwa ngokuthi isibalo esihle kakhulu sezibalo.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp4: Ithiyori ka-De Moivre: (cosθ + i·sinθ)ⁿ = cos(nθ) + i·sin(nθ).
learnUni_physics_f0_desc: Imishini yakudala ichaza ukunyakaza kwezinto ezinkulu kusetshenziswa imithetho kaNewton. I-Lagrangian kanye ne-Hamiltonian mechanics yizinguquko ezinamandla kakhulu ezisetshenziswa ku-physics ethuthukisiwe.
learnUni_physics_f0_task: Isisindo esingu-3 kg sishelela phansi ethambekeni elingaguquki elingu-30°. Bala ukusheshisa kwayo usebenzisa umthetho wesibili we-Newton.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp0: Umthetho wesibili we-Newton kwifomu le-vector: ΣF = ma.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp1: Ukulondolozwa komfutho: umfutho ophelele wesistimu evaliwe uhlala njalo.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp2: Ukongiwa kwamandla: ohlelweni oluvaliwe, amandla aphelele emishini ahlala njalo.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp3: Umfutho we-angular L = Iω (umzuzu we-inertia × isivinini se-angular).
learnUni_physics_f0_kp4: I-Lagrangian mechanics: L = T − V (kinetic susa amandla angaba namandla). Izibalo ze-Euler-Lagrange zithola ukunyakaza.
learnUni_physics_f1_desc: I-Electromagnetism ihlanganisa ugesi, uzibuthe, nokukhanya. Izibalo ezine zikaMaxwell zichaza ngokuphelele izenzakalo ze-electromagnetic futhi zibikezela amaza kagesi.
learnUni_physics_f1_task: Buza umthetho we-Faraday futhi unikeze uhlelo olulodwa lwangempela lomhlaba (isb. ijeneretha kagesi noma i-transformer).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp0: Umthetho ka-Coulomb: F = kq₁q₂/r² (phoqa phakathi kwezindleko).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp1: Umthetho kaGauss: ugesi uhamba endaweni evaliwe ∝ inkokhiso evalekile.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp2: Umthetho kaFaraday: ukushintsha ukuguquguquka kazibuthe kubangela i-EMF.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp3: Izibalo zikaMaxwell zibikezela ukuthi amaza kagesi ahamba ngesivinini sokukhanya.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp4: Ukukhanya kuyigagasi kazibuthe: Izinkambu ze-E no-B zi-oscillate perpendicular to another and to the direction of travel.
learnUni_physics_f1_tp2: Isayensi Yekhompyutha || Izakhiwo Zedatha kanye nama-Algorithms
learnUni_computer_science_title: Izakhiwo zedatha zihlela idatha kahle; ama-algorithms ayayicubungula. Ukukhetha ukwakheka kwedatha efanele kanye ne-algorithm kunquma ukuthi uhlelo lusebenza ngama-millisecond noma amahora kumadathasethi amakhulu.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_name: Landela ngokusesha kanambambili ohlwini oluhleliwe [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23] ufuna 12. Zingaki izinyathelo?
learnUni_computer_science_f0_desc: Uhlu: usayizi ongashintshi, O(1) ukufinyelela. Uhlu oluxhunyiwe: usayizi oguqukayo, O(n) ukufinyelela.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_task: Isitaki (LIFO) kanye Nomugqa (FIFO): sisetshenziswa ezinhlelweni zokuhlehlisa, i-BFS/DFS traversal.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp0: Ithebula le-Hash: O(1) ukubheka okumaphakathi kusetshenziswa umsebenzi we-hashi.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp1: Ukusesha kanambambili: O(log n) — kudinga idatha ehlungiwe. Ukusesha ngomugqa: O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp2: I-Big-O notation ikala ukuthi isikhathi sokusebenza sikhula kanjani ngosayizi wokufakwayo: O(1) < O(log n) < O(n) < O(n²).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_name: Imininingo egciniwe igcina futhi ihlele idatha ukuze ibuyiswe futhi isetshenziswe ngendlela efanele. Imininingo egciniwe yokuxhumana isebenzisa amathebula kanye ne-SQL; Isizindalwazi se-NoSQL siphatha idatha engahlelekile noma esabalalisiwe.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_desc: Bhala umbuzo we-SQL ukuze uthole bonke abafundi abanebanga elingaphezu kuka-80 etafuleni elibizwa ngokuthi "abafundi" elinamakholomu (id, igama, ibanga).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_task: Isizindalwazi esihlobene sigcina idatha kumathebula (imigqa = amarekhodi, amakholomu = izimfanelo).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp0: Umbuzo we-SQL KHETHA: KHETHA ikholomu KUSUKA ithebula LAPHO isimo ORDER BY column.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp1: Ukhiye oyinhloko: isihlonzi esiyingqayizivele somugqa ngamunye. Ukhiye wangaphandle: izixhumanisi zemigqa kuwo wonke amathebula.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp2: JOIN ihlanganisa imigqa esuka kumathebula amaningi: INNER JOIN ibuyisela imigqa efanayo.
