learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp3: Izakhiwo ze-ACID: I-Atomicity, Ukungaguquguquki, Ukuhlukaniswa, Ukuqina — qinisekisa ukuthengiselana okuthembekile.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_tp2: I-Macroeconomics || I-Macroeconomics ifunda umnotho uwonke: I-GDP, ukwehla kwamandla emali, ukuntuleka kwemisebenzi, inqubomgomo yezimali kanye nezezimali. Amabhange amakhulu kanye nohulumeni basebenzisa la mathuluzi ukukhuthaza ukukhula okuzinzile.
learnUni_economics_title: Uma ibhange elikhulu likhuphula izinga lenzalo, kwenzekani ngokuboleka, ukutshalwa kwezimali, kanye nokwehla kwamandla emali? Chaza uchungechunge lwemiphumela.
learnUni_economics_f0_name: I-GDP = C + I + G + (X−M): ukusetshenziswa + utshalomali + ukusetshenziswa kukahulumeni + ingqikithi yokuthunyelwa kwamanye amazwe.
learnUni_economics_f0_desc: Ukwehla kwamandla emali: ukwenyuka okujwayelekile kwamanani. I-Deflation: ukwehla kwezintengo. Kokubili kungaba yingozi uma kudlulele.
learnUni_economics_f0_task: Ukungasebenzi: ukungqubuzana (phakathi kwemisebenzi), ukwakheka (ukungafani kwamakhono), umjikelezo (ukwehla komnotho).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp0: Amabhange amakhulu akhuphula izinga lenzalo ukuze alwe nokwehla kwamandla emali; zehlise ukuze zikhuthaze ukukhula.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp1: Inflation: general rise in prices. Deflation: fall in prices. Both can be harmful if extreme.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp2: Unemployment: frictional (between jobs), structural (skills mismatch), cyclical (recession).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp3: Central banks raise interest rates to fight inflation; lower them to stimulate growth.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp4: Ezomnotho zaseKeynesian: ohulumeni kufanele banyuse imali ngesikhathi sokwehla komnotho.
learnUni_economics_f0_tp1: Ukwehla kwamandla emali kanye nokwehla kwamandla emali
learnUni_biology_title: Ibhayoloji || I-Molecular Biology || Ibhayoloji yamangqamuzana ifunda izindlela zokuphila zamangqamuzana - ukuphindaphinda kwe-DNA, ukuloba, ukuhumusha, nokulawulwa kofuzo. Kuyisisekelo se-biotechnology, imithi, kanye nezakhi zofuzo.
learnUni_biology_f0_name: Uma kubhekwa ukulandelana kwe-DNA ATG-GCC-TAA, kuyini ukulandelana kwe-mRNA? (Faka u-T ufake u-U, kanye no-A↔T, C↔G)
learnUni_biology_f0_desc: I-DNA → i-RNA → Amaprotheni: imfundiso eyinhloko yebhayoloji yamangqamuzana.
learnUni_biology_f0_task: Ukuloba: I-DNA ikopishwa kusithunywa i-RNA (mRNA) ku-nucleus.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp0: Ukuhumusha: ama-ribosomes afunda i-mRNA futhi ahlanganise ama-amino acid abe yiphrotheni.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp1: I-codon iwukulandelana kwe-nucleotide engu-3 efaka ikhodi eyodwa ye-amino acid.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp2: I-CRISPR-Cas9: ithuluzi lokuhlela izakhi zofuzo elingakwazi ukusika ngokunembile futhi liguqule ukulandelana kwe-DNA.
learnUni_biology_f0_tp0: I-Genetics ichaza ukuthi izici zitholakala kanjani njengefa. I-Evolution ichaza ukuthi izinhlobo zezilwane zishintsha kanjani ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ngokukhethwa kwemvelo nokuhlukahluka kwezakhi zofuzo. Bendawonye bachaza ukwehlukahlukana kwempilo.
learnUni_biology_f0_tp1: Sebenzisa isikwele sePunnett ukukhombisa isiphambano Aa × Aa. Yiziphi izilinganiso ze-genotype ne-phenotype?
learnUni_biology_f0_tp2: Imithetho kaMendel: umthetho wokuhlukanisa (ama-alleles ahlukene ngesikhathi sokubunjwa kwe-gamete); umthetho we-assortment ezimele.
learnUni_biology_f1_desc: Genetics explains how traits are inherited. Evolution explains how species change over time through natural selection and genetic variation. Together they explain the diversity of life.
learnUni_biology_f1_task: Use a Punnett square to show the cross Aa × Aa. What are the genotype and phenotype ratios?
learnUni_biology_f1_kp0: Mendel’s laws: law of segregation (alleles separate during gamete formation); law of independent assortment.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp1: Ama-alleles abusayo afihla ama-alleles aphindaphindiwe ku-heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp2: I-Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium: amafrikhwensi e-allele ahlala engashintshi lapho kungekho khona ukuziphendukela kwemvelo.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp3: Ukukhetha kwemvelo: abantu abanezici ezifanele kangcono imvelo bayasinda futhi bakhiqize kakhudlwana.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp4: Ukuguqulwa kwezakhi zofuzo kuwumthombo omkhulu wokushintsha kwezakhi zofuzo; iningi alithathi hlangothi.
learnUni_social_work_title: I-Thermodynamics ifunda ukushisa, izinga lokushisa, nokuguqulwa kwamandla abe umsebenzi. Imithetho emithathu eyinhloko ilawula yonke injini yokushisa, isiqandisi, nokusabela kwamakhemikhali eMhlabeni. Ukuqonda i-thermodynamics kuchaza ukuthi kungani izinjini zingakwazi ukusebenza kahle ngo-100 % nokuthi kungani iqhwa lincibilika lapho lithintwa.
learnUni_nutrition_dietetics_title: Izinga lokushisa likala isilinganiso samandla e-kinetic ezinhlayiya; kukalwa ngo-Kelvin (K) noma ngo-Celsius (°C).
learnSch_physics_f3_name: Umthetho Wokuqala We-Thermodynamics: amandla ayalondolozwa — ukushisa okwengezwe ohlelweni kulingana noshintsho lwamandla angaphakathi nomsebenzi owenziwe (ΔU = Q − W).
learnSch_physics_f3_desc: Umthetho wesi-2: ukushisa kugeleza ngokuzenzekelayo ukusuka ekushiseni kuye kubanda, akukaze kube ngokuhlehlayo. I-Entropy (i-disorder) ikhula njalo ohlelweni olungalodwa.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp0: Umthamo wokushisa othize (c): Q = mcΔT — amandla adingekayo ukuze kukhushulwe u-1 kg wento ngo-1 °C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp1: Ukusebenza kahle kwenjini yokushisa: η = W/Q_hot = 1 − T_cold/T_hot (Carnot performance — theory maximum).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp2: 2nd Law: heat flows spontaneously from hot to cold, never the reverse. Entropy (disorder) always increases in an isolated system.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp3: Specific heat capacity (c): Q = mcΔT — the energy needed to raise 1 kg of a substance by 1 °C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp4: Efficiency of a heat engine: η = W/Q_hot = 1 − T_cold/T_hot (Carnot efficiency — the theoretical maximum).
learnSch_physics_f3_task: I-iron block engu-200 g (c = 0.45 J/g·°C) ifudunyezwa isuka ku-20 °C iye ku-100 °C. Angakanani amandla adingekayo? Bese ubala ukusebenza kahle kwe-Carnot kwenjini esebenza phakathi kuka-500 K no-300 K.
learnSch_physics_f4_desc: I-Nuclear physics ihlola ukwakheka kwenuclei ye-athomu namandla azibambe ndawonye. Ama-nuclei angazinzile akhipha amandla njengemisebe ukuze afinyelele esimweni esizinzile. Ukusabela kwe-nuclear amandla eLanga, izitshalo zenuzi, futhi kuchaza umsuka wezakhi ezinkanyezini.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp0: I-nucleus iqukethe ama-proton (positive) kanye nama-neutron (angathathi hlangothi), ahlanganiswe amandla enuzi anamandla - anamandla kakhulu kunokunyanyiswa kwe-electrostatic.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp1: Ukubola kwe-alpha (α) kukhipha i-helium nucleus (ama-proton ama-2 + ama-neutron angu-2). Ukubola kwe-Beta (β) kukhipha i-electron noma i-positron. Ukubola kwe-Gamma (γ) kukhipha imisebe ye-electromagnetic enamandla amakhulu.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp2: Ingxenye yempilo: isikhathi sesampula ye-radioactive ukubola. Ngemuva kwe-n-half-life, ingxenye esele ithi (½)ⁿ.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp3: Ukulingana kwamandla amakhulu: E = mc² — isisindo esincane siguqulela kumandla amakhulu (c = 3×10⁸ m/s).
learnSch_physics_f4_kp4: I-Fission ihlukanisa i-nucleus esindayo (isb. ²³⁵U) ikhipha amandla; i-fusion ijoyina i-nuclei ekhanyayo (isb. ²H + ³H → ⁴He) ikhipha amandla engeziwe ngeyunithi ngayinye yesisindo.
learnSch_physics_f4_task: I-isotope enemisebe ine-half-life yeminyaka emi-5. Uma uqala ngo-80 g, yimalini esele ngemva kweminyaka eyi-15? Bhala isinyathelo ngasinye. Bese usebenzisa u-E = mc² ukuze uthole amandla akhululiwe uma i-1 g yesisindo iguqulwa ngokuphelele ibe amandla.
learnSch_physics_f5_desc: I-Quantum physics ichaza ukuziphatha kwento namandla esikalini se-athomu ne-subatomic. Kuleli zinga, izinhlayiya ziziphatha njengamagagasi, amandla afika ngamaphakethe ahlukene (i-quanta), futhi isenzo sokulinganisa sithinta lokho okubonwayo. I-Quantum physics isekela ama-lasers, ama-semiconductors, nezikena ze-MRI.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp0: Ubuhlobo buka-Planck: amandla e-photon ngu-E = hf, lapho h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s (okungaguquki kuka-Planck) futhi u-f eyifrikhwensi.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp1: Umphumela we-Photoelectric: ukukhanya kukhipha ama-electron endaweni yensimbi - kufakazela ukukhanya kuziphatha njengezinhlayiya (amaphothoni). U-Einstein wawina uMklomelo KaNobel ngale ncazelo.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp2: I-Wave-particle duality: ama-electron (nazo zonke izinhlayiya) ziziphatha njengamagagasi nezinhlayiya zombili; de Broglie wavelength λ = h/(mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp3: Isimiso sokungaqiniseki se-Heisenberg: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ/2 — awukwazi kokubili ukuma nomfutho wezinhlayiyana ngesikhathi esisodwa.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp4: Ama-electron athatha amazinga ahlukene wamandla kuma-athomu; lapho i-electron yehlela ezingeni eliphansi, ikhipha i-photon enamandla alingana nomehluko.
learnSch_physics_f5_task: I-photon ine-frequency engu-6.0×10¹⁴ Hz. Bala amandla ayo (h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s). Bese uthola ubude begagasi be-electron ihamba ku-2.0×10⁶ m/s (isisindo = 9.11×10⁻³¹ kg).
learnSch_physics_f6_desc: Ukuhlobana okukhethekile kuka-Einstein (1905) kwashintsha i-physics ngokubonisa ukuthi indawo nesikhathi akukona okuphelele - kuyanwebeka futhi kucindezele kuye ngesivinini esihlobene. Ngesivinini esiseduze nesivinini sokukhanya, isikhathi siyancipha, izinto ziyafinyela, futhi isisindo siyakhula. Le miphumela, eqinisekiswa amasathelayithi e-GPS nezisheshisi zezinhlayiyana, ishintsha indlela esiwuqonda ngayo umkhathi.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp0: 1st postulate: imithetho yefiziksi iyafana kuwo wonke amafreyimu ereferensi angasebenzi (okungasheshisi).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp1: I-postulate yesi-2: isivinini sokukhanya c = 3×10⁸ m/s sihlala sinjalo kubo bonke ababukele, kungakhathaliseki ukunyakaza komthombo noma isibukeli.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp2: Ukunwetshwa kwesikhathi: iwashi elihambayo lihamba kancane. Δt' = Δt / √(1 − v²/c²). Lapho uhamba ngokushesha, isikhathi esihamba kancane siyakudlula.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp3: Ukufinyezwa kobude: into ehambayo imfushane lapho inyakaza khona. L' = L₀ √(1 − v²/c²).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp4: Ukulingana kwe-mass-energy E = mc²: isisindo sokuphumula siwuhlobo olugciniwe lwamandla. Yingakho ukusabela kwenuzi kukhulula amandla amaningi kangaka.
learnSch_physics_f6_task: Irokhethi inobude obuyi-100 m uma iphumule futhi ihamba ngo-0.8c. Bungakanani ubude bayo njengoba ikalwa ngumuntu obukele eMhlabeni? Sebenzisa L' = L₀√(1 − v²/c²). Futhi, ingabe umzuzu owodwa ku-rocket uhluka ngemizuzwana emingaki kumzuzu owodwa emhlabeni?
learnSch_chemistry_f3_desc: I-Organic chemistry ifunda izinhlanganisela ezisuselwa kukhabhoni. Ikhono eliyingqayizivele lekhabhoni lokwakha amabhondi amane aqinile lidala cishe inhlobo engapheli yama-molecule - izakhi zokuphila, imithi, izinto zokubasa, namapulasitiki. Ukwenza kahle amaqembu asebenzayo nezinhlobo zokusabela kuvula i-biochemistry, i-pharmacology, nesayensi yezinto zokwakha.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp0: Wonke ama-molecule e-organic aqukethe ikhabhoni, ngokuvamile ehlanganiswa ne-hydrogen (C–H) futhi ngokuvamile kanye no-O, N, S, noma ama-halogen.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp1: Ama-Hydrocarbons: ama-alkanes (C-C amabhondi angashadile, agcwele), ama-alkenes (C=C ibhondi ephindwe kabili, engagcwalisiwe), ama-alkynes (C≡C ibhondi ephindwe kathathu).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp2: Amaqembu asebenzayo anquma izici zamakhemikhali: -OH (utshwala), -COOH (carboxylic acid), -NH₂ (amine), -CHO (aldehyde), -C=O (ketone).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp3: Ama-isomer esakhiwo anefomula yamangqamuzana efanayo kodwa ukuxhumana okuhlukile; ama-stereoisomer anokuxhumana okufanayo kodwa ukuhlelwa kwendawo okuhlukile.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp4: Ama-polymer ama-molecule amakhulu akhiwe ngokuphindaphinda amayunithi e-monomer: ukuhlanganisa i-polymerisation (i-ethene → i-polyethene) kanye ne-condensation polymerisation (ama-amino acid → amaprotheni).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_task: Dweba ifomula ephelele yesakhiwo se-ethanoic acid (CH₃COOH). Khomba iqembu elisebenzayo. Bhala isibalo sokusabela kwayo nge-sodium hydroxide (NaOH) bese uqamba imikhiqizo.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_name: Electrochemistry || I-Electrochemistry ihlola ubudlelwano phakathi kokusabela kwamakhemikhali namandla kagesi. Amabhethri aguqula amandla amakhemikhali abe ugesi; i-electrolysis yenza okuphambene. Ukusabela kwe-redox - ukudluliswa kwama-electron phakathi kwezinhlobo zezinto eziphilayo - kusenhliziyweni yayo yonke inqubo ye-electrochemical, kusukela ku-iron egqwalayo kuye ekushajeni ifoni yakho.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_desc: I-Oxidation = ukulahlekelwa kwama-electron (AMAFUTHA); Ukunciphisa = ukuzuza kwama-electron (RIG). Konke ukusabela kwe-redox kunezinqubo zombili ngasikhathi sinye.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp0: Kuseli ye-galvanic (voltaic), ukusabela kwe-redox okuzenzakalelayo kushayela i-electric current. I-anode ayinayo (i-oxidation); i-cathode ilungile (ukunciphisa).
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp1: I-Electrolysis isebenzisa amandla kagesi angaphandle ukushayela ukusabela okuzenzakalelayo - okusetshenziselwa ukucwenga izinsimbi, ukukhiqiza i-aluminium, nokuhlukanisa amanzi abe yi-H₂ ne-O₂.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp2: Amandla e-electrode ajwayelekile (E°): u-E° aphezulu asho i-ejenti ye-oxidizing enamandla. I-voltage yeseli = E°cathode − E°anode.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp3: Imithetho kaFaraday: inqwaba yento efakwe ku-electrolysis ilingana nenkokhiso ephasisiwe (Q = It) kanye nesisindo se-molar.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp4: Ku-electrolysis ye-dilute sulfuric acid, bhala i-half-equations ku-electrode ngayinye. Khomba imikhiqizo ye-anode ne-cathode. Uma i-current ye-2 A igeleza ngamasekhondi angu-500, mangaki ama-moles ama-electron adluliswayo? (F = 96 500 C/mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f5_desc: Ukulingana kwamakhemikhali kwenzeka ohlelweni oluvaliwe lapho ukusabela okuya phambili nokuhlehlayo kuqhubeka ngamanani alinganayo, ngakho ukugxila kwama-reactants nemikhiqizo kuhlala kungashintshi. Ukuqonda ukulingana kubalulekile kumakhemikhali ezimboni (inqubo ye-Haber) nezinhlelo zebhayoloji (i-pH yegazi, umsebenzi we-enzyme).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp0: Ekulinganisweni, izinga lokusabela phambili lilingana nezinga lokusabela okuhlanekezelwe - ukugxilisa ingqondo kuhlala njalo kodwa akulingani ngempela.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp1: Ukungaguquguquki kokulingana K = [imikhiqizo]^n / [ama-reactants]^m. K >> 1: imikhiqizo ethandwayo. K << 1: ama-reactants athandwayo.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp2: Umgomo ka-Le Chatelier: uma isistimu ekulinganisweni iphazamiseka, iyashintsha ukuze imelane noshintsho futhi ibuyisele ukulingana.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp3: Ukugxila okukhulayo kwe-reactant kushintsha ukulingana kumikhiqizo. Ukukhipha umkhiqizo kwenza okufanayo.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp4: Kumagesi: ingcindezi ekhulayo ishintsha ukulingana ibheke ohlangothini olunamavukuzane ambalwa egesi. Ukwenyuka kwezinga lokushisa kuthanda ukuqondiswa kwe-endothermic.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_task: N₂(g) + 3H₂(g) ⇌ 2NH₃(g) ΔH = −92 kJ/mol. Qagela ukushintsha kokulingana lapho: (a) ingcindezi inyuswa, (b) izinga lokushisa liphakanyisiwe, (c) i-N₂ eyengeziwe yengezwa. Chaza ngayinye usebenzisa isimiso sika-Le Chatelier.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_desc: Ikhemistri yezemvelo iphenya ukuthi izinto zamakhemikhali zihlangana kanjani nomoya, amanzi, nomhlabathi - nokuthi umsebenzi womuntu uzishintsha kanjani lezi zinhlelo. Ichaza ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukuwohloka kwe-ozone, ukungcoliswa kwamanzi, kanye ne-chemistry ngemuva kwezixazululo ezisimeme njenge-green chemistry nezinto ezibolayo.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp0: Amagesi abamba ukushisa (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O vapour) amunca futhi akhiphe kabusha imisebe ye-infrared, efudumeza ubuso bomhlaba — umphumela wegreenhouse.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp1: Imvula ene-asidi: I-SO₂ ne-NOₓ (kusuka ekushisweni kukaphethiloli wezinto ezimbiwa phansi) zincibilika emanzini emvula enze i-H₂SO₃ ne-HNO₃, yehlise i-pH futhi ilimaze i-ecosystem.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp2: Ukuncipha kwe-ozone: Ama-CFC akhulula ama-Cl· radicals ku-stratosphere, acekela phansi u-O₃: Cl· + O₃ → ClO· + O₂ (ukusabela kweketango).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp3: I-Eutrophication: i-nitrate ne-phosphate ephuma kumanyolo kubangela ukuqhakaza kwe-algal okuqeda umoya-mpilo oncibilikisiwe futhi kubulale impilo yasemanzini.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp4: Izimiso zamakhemikhali aluhlaza: ukusabela kokuklama okunciphisa ukungcola, sebenzisa izitokwe zokudla ezivuselelekayo, ukugwema izincibilikisi eziyingozi, nokukhulisa umnotho we-athomu.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_task: Chaza ukusabela okuphelele kochungechunge lapho ingqamuzana elilodwa le-CFC lingabhubhisa izinkulungwane zamangqamuzana e-ozone. Bhala izinyathelo ezimbili ezibalulekile. Bese ubala umnotho we-athomu wokusabela 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O.
learnSch_biology_f3_desc: I-Genetics isayensi yofuzo - ukuthi izici zidluliselwa kanjani kusuka kubazali kuya enzalweni ngokusebenzisa izakhi zofuzo nama-chromosome. Isekela imithi (izifo zofuzo, ukwelashwa komuntu siqu), ezolimo (ukuzalanisa izitshalo), kanye nesayensi yezobunhloli (iphrofayili yeDNA). Ukuqonda izakhi zofuzo kusho ukuqonda ukuthi kungani abantu behluka nokuthi izifo ezitholakala ngofuzo zivela kanjani.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp0: Izakhi zofuzo ziyizingxenye ze-DNA ezikhodi amaprotheni. Isakhi sofuzo ngasinye sithatha indawo ethile (locus) kuchromosome.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp1: Abantu banamapheya angama-23 ama-chromosome (ingqikithi engama-46); isethi eyodwa kumzali ngamunye. Ama-chromosome ocansi: XX = owesifazane, XY = owesilisa.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp2: I-allele evelele (B) ivala i-allele ephindaphindayo (b) ku-heterozygote (Bb). Izici eziphindaphindayo zivela kuphela uma i-homozygous (bb).
learnSch_biology_f3_kp3: Izikwele ze-Punnett zibikezela amathuba okuthi inzalo i-genotypes. Isiphambano se-monohybrid esithi Bb × Bb sinikeza isilinganiso se-phenotype esingu-3:1.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp4: Izici ezixhumene nobulili (isb. ubumpumputhe bemibala, i-haemophilia) zithwalwa ku-X chromosome; abesilisa (XY) bavame ukuthinteka.
learnSch_biology_f3_task: Abazali ababili abanamehlo ansundu (Bb × Bb) banezingane. Dweba isikwele se-Punnett. Angakanani amathuba okuthi ingane ibe namehlo aluhlaza (bb)? Yiziphi izilinganiso ze-genotype ne-phenotype?
learnSch_biology_f3_tp0: Ifa le-Mendelian || Izikwele ze-Punnett || Ifa elixhumene nocansi
learnSch_biology_f3_tp2: I-Evolution ingushintsho ezicini ezizuzwayo zabantu ezizukulwaneni ngezizukulwane. Ukukhetha kwemvelo kuka-Darwin kuyindlela eyinhloko: abantu abanezici ezinenzuzo bayasinda futhi bakhiqize kakhudlwana. I-Evolution ichaza ukwehlukahlukana okukhulu kwempilo eMhlabeni kanye nezici ezabiwe phakathi kwezinhlobo ezahlukene zezilwane.
learnSch_biology_f4_name: Ukukhetha kwemvelo: abantu abanezici ezifanele kangcono imvelo bayasinda futhi bazalane kakhulu, bedlulisela izici ezizuzisayo enzalweni.
learnSch_biology_f4_desc: Ubufakazi bokuziphendukela kwemvelo: irekhodi lezinsalela, i-anatomy yokuqhathanisa (izakhiwo ezi-homologous), ukufana kwe-DNA, i-biogeography, i-speciation ephawuliwe.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp0: Ukuguqulwa kwezakhi zofuzo ku-DNA kuwumthombo omkhulu wokuhlukahluka kofuzo okusha. Iningi alithathi hlangothi; ezinye ziyingozi; abambalwa banikeza inzuzo.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp1: Ukucaciswa: uma abantu behlukanisiwe (indawo, ukuzala) isikhathi eside ngokwanele, bashintsha babe izinhlobo ezihlukene ezingasakwazi ukuzalanisa.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp2: Ukumelana nama-antibiotic kuwukuziphendukela kwemvelo ekusebenzeni: amabhaktheriya anezakhi zofuzo zokumelana ayasinda futhi azalane, okwenza izinhlobo ezimelana nazo zibe namandla.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp3: Chaza ngezinyathelo ezi-4 ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani ukumelana nama-antibiotic kubhaktheriya usebenzisa ukukhetha kwemvelo. Bese uchaza izinhlobo ezimbili ezihlukene zobufakazi bokuziphendukela kwemvelo bese uchaza ukuthi ngayinye ibonisani.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp4: Antibiotic resistance is evolution in action: bacteria with resistance genes survive and reproduce, making resistant strains dominant.
learnSch_biology_f4_task: Explain in 4 steps how antibiotic resistance develops in a bacterial population using natural selection. Then describe two different types of evidence for evolution and explain what each shows.
learnSch_biology_f5_desc: Izitshalo zingabakhiqizi abayinhloko cishe kuzo zonke izinto eziphilayo - zithatha amandla elanga futhi ziwaguqule zibe izinto eziphilayo ngokusebenzisa i-photosynthesis. Ukuqonda ibhayoloji yezitshalo ihlanganisa ukwakheka (izimpande, iziqu, amaqabunga, izimbali), i-photosynthesis, ukuzala, kanye nendima ebalulekile edlalwa yizitshalo ekulawuleni umkhathi womhlaba kanye nokudla ukuphila.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp0: I-Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + amandla okukhanya → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Kwenzeka kuma-chloroplast aqukethe i-chlorophyll.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp1: Amaqabunga alungiselelwa i-photosynthesis: indawo enkulu, i-epidermis encane, esobala, i-stomata yokungena kwe-CO₂, kanye nenethiwekhi ecebile yemithambo.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp2: I-Xylem ihambisa amanzi namaminerali kusuka ezimpandeni kuya emaqabunga. I-Phloem ihambisa ushukela ukusuka emaqabunga ukuya kwesinye isitshalo.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp3: I-Transpiration: amanzi ayahwamuka nge-stomata, edonsa amanzi enyuke nge-xylem (umfudlana wokuphefumula).
learnSch_biology_f5_kp4: Ukuzalanisa kwezitshalo: izitshalo eziqhakazayo zisebenzisa impova (ukudluliswa kwempova) kanye nokuvundisa ukukhiqiza imbewu; imbewu ihlakazeka ezindaweni ezintsha.
learnSch_biology_f5_task: Dizayina ukuhlola ukuze uhlole ukuthi ukukhanya kokukhanya kuyalithinta yini izinga le-photosynthesis ku-pondweed. Yisho okuguquguqukayo okuzimele, okuncikile, nokulawulwayo. Qagela futhi uchaze umphumela.
learnSch_biology_f5_tp0: I-Photosynthesis || Ezokuthutha ezitshalweni || Ukukhiqizwa kabusha kwezitshalo
learnSch_biology_f5_tp1: I-Microbiology || I-Microbiology isifundo sezinto eziphilayo ezincane - amagciwane, amagciwane, isikhunta, nama-protists. Lezi zinhlaka ezincane zibumba impilo yabantu, ezolimo, ukukhiqizwa kokudla, kanye nomjikelezo wekhabhoni womhlaba wonke. Ukuqonda amagciwane kubalulekile emithini (imithi elwa namagciwane, imithi yokugoma), i-biotechnology, kanye nesifo sokuqonda.
learnSch_biology_f5_tp2: Amagciwane angama-prokaryotes (ayikho i-nucleus). Eziningi azinangozi noma zinenzuzo; amanye amagciwane adala izifo ezifana nesifo sofuba nekholera.
learnSch_biology_f6_name: Amagciwane awawona amaseli - ayimicu ye-DNA/RNA ejazini lamaprotheni. Baziphindaphinda kuphela ngokuduna imishini yeseli elibambile.
learnSch_biology_f6_desc: Ama-antibiotics abulala noma avimbe amagciwane kodwa awasizi ngalutho kumagciwane (umkhuhlane ovamile, umkhuhlane). Ukusebenzisa ngokweqile kubangela ukumelana nama-antibiotic.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp0: Amasosha omzimba: izivikelo ezingaqondile (isikhumba, i-phagocyte) kanye nezivikelo ezithile (ama-lymphocyte akhiqiza amasosha omzimba). Imithi yokugoma iqeqesha amasosha omzimba ngaphandle kokudala izifo.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp1: Viruses are not cells — they are strands of DNA/RNA in a protein coat. They replicate only by hijacking a host cell's machinery.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp2: Antibiotics kill or inhibit bacteria but are useless against viruses (the common cold, flu). Overuse drives antibiotic resistance.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp3: The immune system: non-specific defences (skin, phagocytes) and specific defences (lymphocytes producing antibodies). Vaccines train the immune system without causing disease.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp4: Amagciwane awusizo: amagciwane amathumbu asiza ukugaya; isikhunta sikhiqiza ama-antibiotics (i-penicillin evela ku-Penicillium); imvubelo ibilisa ushukela ukuze uthole isinkwa nobhiya.
learnSch_biology_f6_task: Qhathanisa ukwakheka kwebhaktheriya negciwane. Chaza ukuthi kungani ama-antibiotic esebenza komunye kodwa engasebenzi kwenye. Bese uchaza izindlela ezimbili umzimba ozivikela ngazo ekuthelelekeni ngamagciwane.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_desc: Izakhiwo zedatha ziyizindlela ezihlelekile zokugcina nokufinyelela idatha; ama-algorithms ayizinqubo zesinyathelo ngesinyathelo zokuxazulula izinkinga. Ukukhetha ukwakheka kwedatha efanele kanye ne-algorithm inquma ukuthi uhlelo lusebenza ngama-millisecond noma amahora. Lesi sihloko siwumgogodla wokuthuthukiswa kwesofthiwe ephumelelayo.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp0: Ama-arrays ama-elementi esitolo ngokulandelana okungaguquki; ukufinyelela ngenkomba ngu-O(1). Uhlu luvumela usayizi oguqukayo kodwa lungase lube nokufinyelela okunensayo.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp1: Izitaki (LIFO - okokugcina, ukuphuma kuqala) kanye nolayini (FIFO - kuqala ukungena, ukuphuma kuqala) baphatha amaqoqo a-odwe ezimweni ezithile zokusetshenziswa.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp2: Ukusesha ngomugqa kuhlola yonke into (O(n)); ukusesha kanambambili kudinga idatha ehlungiwe futhi kuhhafu indawo yokusesha isinyathelo ngasinye (O(log n)).
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp3: Ukuhlunga kwebhamuza kuqhathanisa izakhi eziseduze futhi kuzishintshanisa (O(n²)). Hlanganisa ukuhlukaniswa kokuhlunga nokuhlanganisa ngokuphindaphindiwe (O(n log n)) — ngokushesha okukhulu ngedatha enkulu.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp4: I-Big-O notation ichaza ukusebenza kahle kwe-algorithm: U-O(1) uhlala njalo, u-O(n) unomugqa, u-O(n²) une-quadratic — ukuncipha kungcono kokokufaka okukhulu.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_task: Landelela ukuhlunga kwebhamuza ohlwini [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]. Bonisa iphasi ngayinye. Bala ukuqhathanisa okuphelele nokushintshaniswa. Bese ubhala i-pseudocode yokusesha kanambambili ohlwini oluhleliwe.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_desc: Isizindalwazi siyiqoqo elihlelekile ledatha ehlelekile. Imininingo egciniwe yobudlelwano igcina idatha kumathebula axhunywe ngokhiye. I-SQL ikuvumela ukuthi udale, ubuze, ubuyekeze, futhi ususe amarekhodi. Imininingo egciniwe inika amandla zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza ezinkulu kusukela kumasistimu okuphatha esikoleni kuya ezinkundleni zokuxhumana.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp0: Isizindalwazi esihlobene sigcina idatha kumathebula (imigqa = amarekhodi, amakholomu = izinkambu). Amathebula axhunywe ngokhiye abayinhloko nabangaphandle.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp1: Ukhiye oyinhloko: inkomba ehlukile yerekhodi ngalinye kuthebula. Ukhiye wangaphandle: uxhumanisa ithebula elilodwa nokhiye oyinhloko wenye.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp2: Umbuzo we-SQL KHETHA: KHETHA ikholomu KUSUKA ithebula LAPHO isimo ORDER BY column. Isibonelo: KHETHA igama KUBAFUNDI LAPHO ibanga = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp3: Ukwenza okuvamile kunciphisa ukuphindaphinda kwedatha ngokuhlukanisa amathebula ukuze ucezu ngalunye lwedatha lugcinwe kanye kuphela.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp4: Imisebenzi ye-CRUD: Dala (FAKA), Funda (KHETHA), Buyekeza (BUYEKEZWA), Susa (SUSA) — izenzo ezine eziyisisekelo zesizindalwazi.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_task: Yakha isizindalwazi esilula somtapo wezincwadi wesikole (izincwadi, abafundi, imalimboleko). Chaza okungenani amathebula ama-3, izinkambu zawo, nobudlelwano. Bese ubhala umbuzo we-SQL ukuze uthole zonke izincwadi ezibolekwe njengamanje ku-ID yomfundi 42.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_name: Amanethiwekhi Ne-inthanethi || Inethiwekhi ixhuma amakhompyutha ukwabelana ngedatha nezisetshenziswa. I-inthanethi iyinethiwekhi enkulu kunazo zonke emhlabeni — inethiwekhi yamanethiwekhi. Ukuqonda ukuthi idatha ihamba kanjani (amaphrothokholi, amakheli e-IP, i-DNS) nokuthi ivikelwa kanjani (ukubethela, izindonga zokuvikela umlilo) kubalulekile enkathini yedijithali.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_desc: I-LAN (Inethiwekhi Yendawo Yendawo): ixhuma amadivaysi endaweni encane. I-WAN (Inethiwekhi Yendawo Ebanzi): ixhuma ama-LAN emabangeni amakhulu — i-inthanethi iyi-WAN.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp0: Ikheli lasesizindeni se-inthanethi: ilebula yezinombolo eyingqayizivele yedivayisi ngayinye ekunethiwekhi (isb. 192.168.1.1 ye-IPv4). I-DNS ihumusha amagama esizinda (google.com) kuya kumakheli e-IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp1: I-TCP/IP protocol suite: I-Transmission Control Protocol iqinisekisa ukuthi amaphakethe wedatha afika ngendlela efanele; Iphrothokholi ye-inthanethi iyabahambisa.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp2: I-HTTP (i-HyperText Transfer Protocol) idlulisela amakhasi ewebhu. I-HTTPS yengeza ukubethela kwe-TLS — isithonjana se-padlock sibonisa ukuthi ukuxhumana kwakho kubethelwe.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp3: Ukushintsha iphakethe: idatha ihlukaniswa ibe amaphakethe, ngalinye lihanjiswa ngokuzimela kuyo yonke inethiwekhi, bese lihlanganiswa kabusha endaweni okuyiwa kuyo.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp4: Landelela ukuthi kwenzekani uma uthayipha okuthi 'www.example.com' esipheqululini bese ucindezela u-Enter — kusukela ekubhekeni kwe-DNS kuya ekutholeni ikhasi lewebhu. Yisho yonke iphrothokholi nesinyathelo esihilelekile.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_tp0: Amakheli e-IP kanye ne-DNS || Ukuphepha: I-HTTPS nokubethela
learnSch_computer_science_f5_tp2: I-rhetoric iwubuciko bokuxhumana okukholisayo - ukusebenzisa ulimi ngempumelelo ukwazisa, ukuncenga, noma ukugqugquzela izethameli. Ukuphikisana kukufundisa ukwakha izimpikiswano ezinengqondo, ezisekelwe ebufakazini kanye nokukhomba nokuphikisa ukucabanga okubuthakathaka. Lawa makhono abalulekile ezingxoxweni, ama-eseyi, ukuqulwa kwecala, kanye nempilo yomphakathi.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_desc: Rhetoric is the art of persuasive communication — using language effectively to inform, persuade, or motivate an audience. Argumentation teaches you to construct logical, evidence-based arguments and to identify and counter weak reasoning. These skills are essential for debates, essays, legal proceedings, and civic life.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp0: Izindlela ezintathu zika-Aristotle zokukholisa: I-Ethos (ukwethembeka kwesikhulumi), i-Pathos (izikhalazo ezingokomzwelo), i-Logos (impikiswano enengqondo kanye nobufakazi).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp1: Impikiswano eqinile ine: isimangalo esicacile (thesis), izizathu ezisekelayo, ubufakazi, kanye nempendulo ekuphikisaneni.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp2: Amanga anengqondo alulaza izingxabano: i-ad hominem (ukuhlasela umuntu), i-straw man (ihlanekezela umbono ophikisayo), i-dichotomy engamanga (izinketho ezimbili kuphela ezethulwe).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp3: Ukucabanga okuguquguqukayo kusuka ezimisweni ezijwayelekile kuye eziphethweni ezithile (bonke abantu bayafa; uSocrates ungumuntu; ngakho-ke uSocrates uyafa).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp4: Ukucabanga okuguquguqukayo kudonsa iziphetho ezijwayelekile ekubonweni okuthile - kunamandla kodwa kungaba okungalungile uma izibonelo zingameleli.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_task: Funda isiqephu sephephandaba. Khomba isimangalo esiyinhloko, izingcezu ezintathu zobufakazi obusekelayo, izethameli ezihlosiwe, kanye nephutha elilodwa eliphusile (uma likhona). Bese ubhala ukuphikiswa kwamagama angama-200 usebenzisa zontathu izindlela zika-Aristotle.
learnSch_history_f2_name: Isikhathi samanje siguqule umhlaba ngokuhlola, uguquko, kanye nezimboni. Ukwanda kweYurophu kwaxhumanisa amazwekazi, Ukukhanya kwabekela inselele isiko ngesizathu, izinguquko zentando yeningi zabumba kabusha ohulumeni, futhi INguquko Yezimboni yashintsha indlela abantu ababephila ngayo nabasebenza ngayo - yabeka izisekelo zomhlaba wangaleso sikhathi.
learnSch_history_f2_desc: Iminyaka Yokuhlola (1400s–1600s): Amazwe ase-Europe (Portugal, Spain, England, Netherlands) azulazula aya emazweni aseMelika, e-Afrika, nase-Asia, enza amanethiwekhi okuhweba omhlaba kanye nemibuso yamakholoni.
learnSch_history_f2_kp0: Inguquko Yesayensi Nokukhanya (1600s–1700s): ongqondongqondo abafana noGalileo, Newton, Locke, noVoltaire basebenzisa ingqondo nokubona ukuze baphonsele inselelo igunya lesonto namandla endabuko.
learnSch_history_f2_kp1: INguquko YaseMelika (1776) kanye Nenguquko YaseFrance (1789): egqugquzelwe imibono Yokukhanyiselwa, amakoloni kanye nezakhamizi zaketula amakhosi ukuze kusungulwe amalungelo, imithethosisekelo, nobukhosi obudumile.
learnSch_history_f2_kp2: I-Industrial Revolution (1760s-1850s): yaqala eBrithani - amalahle, izinjini zesitimu, amafekthri, nezitimela zaguqula imiphakathi esekwe kwezolimo yaba iminotho yasemadolobheni yezimboni.
learnSch_history_f2_kp3: Ubukoloniyali: Izizwe zaseYurophu zenza ikoloni i-Afrika, i-Asia, kanye namazwe aseMelika - zikhipha izinsiza, zaxosha abantu, futhi zashiya imiphumela ehlala isikhathi eside yezombangazwe namasiko.
learnSch_history_f2_kp4: Khetha umcimbi owodwa kusukela ngo-1500–1900 (isb. Inguquko YaseFrance). Chaza: (a) izimbangela ezintathu, (b) izenzakalo ezimbili ezibalulekile, (c) imiphumela emibili yesikhathi eside. Sebenzisa amadethi athile nabantu.
learnSch_history_f3_desc: Ikhulu lama-20 laletha izimpi zomhlaba, ubushiqela, ukuchithwa kwekoloni, neMpi Yomshoshaphansi - kwakha kabusha zonke izizwe ezisemhlabeni. Kuphinde kube yikhulu leminyaka lenqubekelaphambili emangalisayo: ukunqotshwa kobufascism, ukukhuphuka kwamalungelo abantu, ukufika kwenyanga, kanye nenguquko yedijithali. Ukuliqonda kubalulekile ukuze siqonde izwe lanamuhla.
learnSch_history_f3_kp0: IMpi Yezwe I (1914–1918): yaqalwa ukubulawa kuka-Archduke Franz Ferdinand; okubangelwa ubuzwe, i-imperialism, impi, nezinhlelo zokubumbana. ~ 17 million abashonile.
learnSch_history_f3_kp1: IMpi Yezwe II (1939-1945): IJalimane lobuNazi, i-Italy yobuFascist, kanye ne-Imperial Japan ngokumelene nama-Allies. UkuQothulwa Kwesizwe kwabulala abantu abangamaJuda abayizigidi ezingu-6. Iphele ngamabhomu e-athomu eHiroshima naseNagasaki.
learnSch_history_f3_kp2: Impi Yomshoshaphansi (1947-1991): umbango wemibono kanye nepolitiki phakathi kwe-USA (capitalism, democracy) kanye ne-USSR (ubukhomanisi). Izimpi zama-proxy, i-Space Race, umjaho wezikhali zenuzi, kanye ne-Berlin Wall yahlukanisa umhlaba.
learnSch_history_f3_kp3: I-Decolonization (1945-1975): ukunyakaza kokuzimela e-Afrika, e-Asia, naseMpumalanga Ephakathi kwaqeda imibuso yamakholoni yaseYurophu. Ngokuvamile kuhambisana nokungqubuzana nokungazinzi.
learnSch_history_f3_kp4: IZizwe Ezihlangene zasungulwa ngo-1945 ukuze kugcinwe ukuthula; I-Universal Declaration of Human Rights yamukelwa ngo-1948 - kokubili izimpendulo eziqondile zonya lwe-WWII.
learnSch_history_f3_task: Qhathanisa izimbangela nemiphumela ye-WWI ne-WWII. Dala itafula ngalezi: Imbangela eyinhloko, indawo yokuguqula ukhiye, Inani lokufa, umphumela omkhulu. Bese uchaza ukuthi iWWII yaholela kanjani ngqo eMpini Yomshoshaphansi.
learnSch_history_f3_tp0: Izimpi Zomhlaba || Impi Yomshoshaphansi || Ukuqedwa kobukoloni namalungelo abantu
learnSch_history_f3_tp2: Umlando awuwona nje izinsuku nezenzakalo - ukuchazwa kobufakazi. Izazi-mlando zihlaziya imithombo eyinhloko (imibhalo yokuqala, izinto zobuciko) kanye nemithombo yesibili (izincwadi zokufunda, umlando wokuphila kwabantu) ukuze bakhe kabusha okwedlule. Ukufunda ukuhlola imithombo ngokujulile kukwenza umcwaningi, umcabangi, kanye nesakhamuzi esingcono.
learnSch_history_f4_name: Umthombo oyinhloko: udalwe ngesikhathi somcimbi (idayari, isithombe, isivumelwano, iphephandaba). Umthombo wesibili: udalwe kamuva, ukuhumusha imithombo eyinhloko (i-biography, idokhumentari, incwadi yokufunda).
learnSch_history_f4_desc: Ukuhlaziywa kwe-SOAPS: Umthombo, Isenzakalo, Izithameli, Inhloso, Isihloko — uhlaka lokuqonda noma yimuphi umbhalo womlando.
learnSch_history_f4_kp0: Ukwethembeka uma kuqhathaniswa nokuba usizo: umthombo ochemile usengaba usizo njengobufakazi balokho umbhali akukholelwayo noma ukuthi iyiphi inkulumo-ze eyayikhona ngaleso sikhathi.
learnSch_history_f4_kp1: Isizathu vs. ukuhlobana: ngenxa yokuthi izehlakalo ezimbili zenzeka ndawonye akusho ukuthi enye ibangele enye. Izazi-mlando zibheka ubufakazi bokuxhumana okuqondile.
learnSch_history_f4_kp2: I-Historiography iwucwaningo lokuthi umlando ubhalwe futhi uhunyushwe kanjani. Isenzakalo esifanayo (isib. INguquko YaseFrance) singabonakala ngokuhluke kakhulu kosomlando abahlukene.
learnSch_history_f4_kp3: Thola inkulumo yomlando noma incwadi yanoma yisiphi isikhathi. Sebenzisa ukuhlaziywa kwe-SOAPS. Hlola ukwethembeka kwayo (cabangela isikhundla sombhali nenjongo yakhe) kanye nokuba usizo kwayo (miphi imibuzo yomlando esiza ukuyiphendula?).
learnSch_history_f4_task: Find a historical speech or letter from any period. Apply SOAPS analysis. Assess its reliability (consider the author's position and purpose) and its usefulness (what historical questions does it help answer?).
learnSch_geography_f2_name: Amamephu nezithombe || Amamephu angamathuluzi anamandla okumela ulwazi lwendawo. I-Cartography isayensi nobuciko bokwenza amamephu. Kusukela kumathebulethi obumba asendulo kuya ezithombeni zesathelayithi ye-GPS, amamephu aqondise ukuhlola, ipolitiki eyakhiwe, futhi enza umhlaba wethu ube nengqondo. Ukufunda nokudala amamephu kuyikhono eliyisisekelo lendawo.
learnSch_geography_f2_desc: Isikali: isilinganiso phakathi kwebanga kumephu nebanga lomhlaba wangempela. Imephu yesikali esingu-1:50,000 isho 1 cm = 500 m.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp0: Izinkomba zegridi: imigqa ye-latitude (evundlile, ilinganisa inyakatho/eningizimu) kanye nobude (okuqondile, kulinganisa impumalanga/entshonalanga) ibeka ngokuqondile noma iyiphi iphoyinti eMhlabeni.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp1: Imigqa yamakhontolo ixhuma amaphuzu okuphakama okulinganayo; amakhonsathi asondelene kakhulu = umqansa; indawo ebanzi = umthambeka omnene.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp2: Ukuqagela kwemephu kuhlanekezela indawo egobile yomhlaba kumephu eyisicaba. I-Mercator projection igcina umumo kodwa ihlanekezela usayizi; Peters projection igcina indawo kodwa ihlanekezela umumo.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp3: I-GIS (I-Geographic Information System) yendlalela amasethi edatha amaningi (inani labantu, ukusetshenziswa komhlaba, isimo sezulu) kumamephu edijithali ukuze kuhlaziywe futhi kuthathwe izinqumo.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp4: Usebenzisa imephu yendawo (noma ukudweba owakho), hlonza: (a) umqansa, (b) isigodi, (c) isiqongo segquma. Bhala ireferensi yegridi yezibalo ezingu-6 yengqungquthela. Bala ibanga langempela lomzila ongu-4 cm kumephu engu-1:50,000.
learnSch_geography_f3_name: Isimo sezulu isimo sesikhashana somkhathi; Isimo sezulu siyisilinganiso sesikhathi eside. Izimo zezulu zomhlaba - kusukela ezindaweni ezishisayo ukuya ezindaweni ezishisayo - zibunjwa yi-latitude, imisinga yolwandle, ukuphakama, kanye nemimoya ekhona. Ukuqonda izinhlelo zesimo sezulu kubalulekile kwezolimo, ukulungela izinhlekelele, kanye nokubhekana nokuguquguquka kwesimo sezulu.
learnSch_geography_f3_desc: Izinto ezithinta isimo sezulu: i-latitude (i-angle yelanga), ukuphakama (izinga lokushisa lehla ~ 6.5°C ku-1000 m), ibanga ukusuka olwandle, imisinga yolwandle, imimoya ekhona.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp0: Isimo sezulu esishisayo: kushisa futhi kumanzi unyaka wonke, eduze nenkabazwe. IMedithera: ihlobo elomile elishisayo, ubusika obumanzi obuncane. I-polar: kubanda unomphela, imvula encane.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp1: Imvula yangaphambili: kuhlangana izixuku zomoya ofudumele nezibandayo; umoya ofudumele ukhuphuka phezu kwamakhaza, uphole futhi ujiye. Kujwayelekile kuma-latitudes amaphakathi (UK, Germany).
learnSch_geography_f3_kp2: Umjikelezo wamanzi: ukuhwamuka → ukufiphala (ukwakheka kwamafu) → imvula → ukuphuma kwamanzi / ukungena → ukubuyela ekuhwameni.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp3: Ukushintsha kwesimo sezulu: ukukhuphuka kwe-CO₂ kuqinisa umphumela we-greenhouse, kubangele ukufudumala kwembulunga yonke, izehlakalo zesimo sezulu esibi kakhulu, ukukhuphuka kwamazinga olwandle, kanye nokuguquguquka kwezindawo zesimo sezulu.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp4: Climate change: rising CO₂ intensifies the greenhouse effect, causing global warming, more extreme weather events, rising sea levels, and shifting climate zones.
learnSch_geography_f3_task: Qhathanisa isimo sezulu sendawo yehlathi elishisayo nendawo ewugwadule. Kulowo nalowo: isimo sisho izinga lokushisa lonyaka, imvula yaminyaka yonke, izimbangela, kanye nezimo ezimbili zezinto eziphilayo ezihlala lapho.
learnSch_economics_f2_name: Ukuhwebelana Kwamazwe Ngamazwe Nokubambisana Kwembulunga yonke
learnSch_economics_f2_desc: Uhwebo lwamazwe ngamazwe luvumela amazwe ukuthi agxile kulokho akukhiqizayo ngendlela ephumelelayo futhi ahwebe ngayo yonke enye into. Ukuhwebelana kwembulunga yonke - ukuxhumana okwandayo kwezomnotho, amasiko, nabantu - kuye kwakhipha amakhulu ezigidi ebuphofini kodwa futhi kwadala ukungalingani kanye nezinselele zemvelo.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp0: Inzuzo yokuqhathanisa: izwe kufanele ligxile ekukhiqizeni izimpahla lapho inani lalo lethuba liphansi kakhulu, bese lihweba - ngisho noma lingcono kakhulu kukho konke.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp1: Ukuthunyelwa kwamanye amazwe: izimpahla nezinsiza ezithengiswa phesheya (imali engenayo yezwe). Ukungenisa: izimpahla kanye nezinsizakalo ezithengwa phesheya (izindleko).
learnSch_economics_f2_kp2: Izithiyo zohwebo: izintela (izintela ezithengwa kwamanye amazwe), ama-quota (imikhawulo yokungenisa), izivimbelo (ukuvinjelwa okuphelele) — vikela izimboni zasekhaya kodwa zikhuphule amanani kubathengi.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp3: Izivumelwano zohwebo lwamahhala (isb. I-EU Single Market, i-NAFTA) zinciphisa imigoqo phakathi kwamazwe angamalungu, ezithuthukisa uhwebo nokukhula komnotho.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp4: Ibhalansi yohwebo: izinto ezithunyelwa ngaphandle − eziphuma kwamanye amazwe. Insalela yohwebo isho ukuthi okuningi kuthunyelwa kwamanye amazwe; ukushoda kwezohwebo kusho ukuthi kuthengiwe kwamanye amazwe.
learnSch_economics_f2_task: Izwe A lingakhiqiza amakhompyutha ayi-100 NOMA amathani angama-200 kakolweni ngonyaka. Izwe B lingakhiqiza amakhompyutha angama-60 NOMA amathani ayi-180 kakolweni. Bonisa ukuthi yiliphi izwe elinenzuzo yokuqhathanisa emkhiqizweni ngamunye futhi uchaze ukuthi kungani bobabili bezuza ekuqeqesheni nasekuhwebeni.
learnSch_economics_f3_name: Izimali Zomuntu Siqu || Izimali zomuntu siqu zibandakanya ukuphatha imali ngendlela engokoqobo: ukuzuza, ukonga, ukwenza ibhajethi, ukuboleka, nokutshala imali. Ukufunda ngezezimali kukusiza ukuthi ugweme izingibe zezikweletu, wakhe ingcebo, futhi wenze izinqumo ezinolwazi empilweni yakho yonke - kusukela emsebenzini wakho wokuqala kuya kumhlalaphansi. Lawa makhono awavamile ukufundiswa kodwa adingeka emhlabeni wonke.
learnSch_economics_f3_desc: Isabelomali sabela iholo lakho kuzo zonke izidingo (irenti, ukudla), izinto ozifunayo (ukuzijabulisa), nokonga. Umthetho we-50/30/20: 50% udinga, 30% ufuna, 20% ukonga.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp0: Inzalo ehlanganisiwe: inzalo itholwa kukho kokubili inzalo eyinhloko kanye nenzalo enqwabelene. €1,000 ku-5% inzalo ehlanganisiwe yonyaka iba ngu-€1,629 ngemva kweminyaka eyi-10.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp1: Isikweletu esihle (imalimboleko, imali mboleko yabafundi) singakha ingcebo noma amakhono. Isikweletu esibi (ikhadi lesikweletu elinenzalo enkulu, imali ebolekiwe yosuku lokukhokha) sikuvalela emjikelezweni wokukhokha.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp2: Good debt (mortgage, student loan) can build wealth or skills. Bad debt (high-interest credit card, payday loan) traps you in a cycle of payments.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp3: Ukwehla kwamandla emali kuqeda amandla okuthenga: uma ukwehla kwamandla emali kungu-3% futhi imali oyilondolozile ihola u-1%, imali yakho ilahlekelwa inani langempela minyaka yonke.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp4: Ukuhlukahluka: ukusabalalisa utshalomali ezimpahleni ezahlukene (izitoko, amabhondi, impahla) kunciphisa ubungozi — 'ungawabeki wonke amaqanda akho kubhasikidi owodwa'.
learnSch_economics_f3_task: Dala isabelomali sanyanga zonke somfundi ohola u-€800/ngenyanga. Yabela amanani usebenzisa umthetho wama-50/30/20. Bese ubala ukuthi i-€500 ikhula ibe yimalini eminyakeni emi-5 ngo-4% wenzalo ehlanganisiwe yonyaka: A = P(1 + r)^n.
learnSch_economics_f3_tp2: Isikweletu, utshalomali, kanye nokwehla kwamandla emali
learnSch_earth_science_f2_desc: Izilwandle zimboza u-71% womhlaba futhi zilawula isimo sezulu, zikhiqiza umoya-mpilo, futhi zisekela izinhlobonhlobo zezinto eziphilayo ezingavamile. Umjikelezo wamanzi ngokuqhubekayo uhambisa amanzi phakathi kolwandle, umkhathi, nomhlaba, okwenza uMhlaba kube ukuphela kweplanethi enamanzi awuketshezi endaweni yawo - isimo esibalulekile sokuphila.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp0: Umjikelezo wamanzi: ukuhwamuka (uketshezi oluya kugesi, oluqhutshwa amandla elanga) → ukufiphala (igesi iye kumaconsi, ukwakheka kwamafu) → imvula (imvula, iqhwa) → ukugeleza nokungena emanzini → ukubuyela ekuhwamukeni.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp1: Izilwandle zigcina ukushisa nesimo sezulu esimaphakathi: zimunca i-CO₂ kanye nokushisa elangeni, ziyikhiphe kancane futhi zigcine izinga lokushisa liphakeme kakhulu.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp2: Imisinga yasolwandle (isb. i-Gulf Stream) idlulisa ukushisa emhlabeni wonke, ukufudumala noma ukupholisa izifunda ezisogwini ezikude nenkabazwe.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp3: I-Ocean acidification: njengoba i-CO₂ incibilika emanzini olwandle yenza i-carbonic acid (H₂CO₃), yehlise i-pH futhi isongela izixhobo zamakhorali nezimbaza.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp4: Amanzi angaphansi komhlaba: amanzi agcinwe emanzini angaphansi komhlaba. Ukukhipha kakhulu amanzi angaphansi komhlaba ngokushesha kunokushajwa - inkinga ekhulayo yokuvikeleka kwamanzi emhlabeni jikelele.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_task: Dweba bese ulebula ngokugcwele umjikelezo wamanzi. Esigabeni ngasinye, sho inqubo ebonakalayo ehilelekile (ukuhwamuka, ukufingqa, njll.) kanye nomthombo wamandla okushayelayo. Bese uchaza izinto ezimbili ezenziwa abantu eziphazamisa umjikelezo wamanzi.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_name: Izingozi zemvelo - ukuzamazama komhlaba, izintaba-mlilo, ama-tsunami, izivunguvungu - zivela emandleni omhlaba angaphakathi nasemkhathini. Ukuqonda izimbangela zabo, ukusatshalaliswa, kanye nemiphumela kuvumela imiphakathi ukuthi ilungiselele, inciphise umonakalo, futhi isindise izimpilo. Ingozi kubantu incike kakhulu ezicini zezenhlalo nezomnotho njengasebungozini bomzimba uqobo.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_desc: Ukuzamazama komhlaba kwenzeka emingceleni ye-tectonic plate (elondolozayo, ebhubhisayo, eyakhayo). Isikali sika-Richter / umzuzu wobukhulu sikala ukukhululwa kwamandla; iyunithi ngayinye = × izikhathi ezingu-32 zamandla amaningi.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp0: Earthquakes occur at tectonic plate boundaries (conservative, destructive, constructive). The Richter / moment magnitude scale measures energy release; each unit = ×32 times more energy.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp1: Izintaba-mlilo zakha ezindaweni ezincishisiwe (eziqhumayo, i-viscous lava) kanye nasezindaweni ezishisayo/emingceleni eyakhayo (i-lava egelezayo, isb. Iceland, Hawaii).
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp2: Ama-tsunami amagagasi amakhulu olwandle abangelwa ukuzamazama komhlaba ngaphansi kolwandle noma ukuqhuma kwentaba-mlilo. I-tsunami yase-Indian Ocean ka-2004 yabulala abantu abangu-230,000.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp3: Iziphepho ezishisayo (iziphepho/izivunguvungu) zakha phezu kwamanzi olwandle afudumele (≥26°C). Baletha imimoya enamandla, iziphepho ezinamandla, nezikhukhula.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp4: Ukuba sengozini kwezingozi zemvelo kuncike ebumpofu, ikhwalithi yokwakha, izinhlelo zokuxwayisa, kanye nokubusa - amazwe ampofu ahlupheka kakhulu.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_task: Qhathanisa izimbangela nemiphumela yokuzamazama komhlaba okukhulu (isb., i-Haiti 2010) nokuqhuma kwentaba-mlilo okukhulu (isb., i-Mount Pinatubo 1991). Sebenzisa ithebula: Imbangela, ubukhulu, imiphumela eyinhloko, imiphumela yesibili, impendulo yomuntu.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_tp1: Amatsunami || Ubungozi, ukuba sengozini, kanye nokuphathwa
learnSch_earth_science_f3_tp2: Usizo Lokuqala Nokuphepha Komuntu Siqu || Usizo lokuqala wusizo olusheshayo olunikezwa umuntu olimele noma ogulayo ngaphambi kokufika kosizo lwezokwelapha oluqeqeshiwe. Ukwazi usizo lokuqala kusindisa izimpilo - okuhlanganisa 'uchungechunge lokusinda' ekuboshweni kwenhliziyo. Ulwazi lokuphepha lomuntu siqu lusiza ukuvimbela izingozi, ukubona ingozi, nokwenza izinqumo ezinhle ezimweni eziphuthumayo.
learnSch_health_f2_name: Inhlolovo eyinhloko (ABCDE): Indlela Yomoya, Ukuphefumula, Ukujikeleza, Ukukhubazeka (izinga lokuqaphela), Ukuchayeka (ukulimala okubonakalayo).
learnSch_health_f2_desc: I-CPR (I-Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation): Ukucindezelwa kwesifuba kwe-30 ekujuleni kwe-5-6 cm kanye ~ ~ 100-120 ngomzuzu, bese kuba 2 ukuphefumula kokuhlenga. Phinda kuze kufike usizo.
learnSch_health_f2_kp0: Indawo yokululama: kumuntu oqulekile kodwa ophefumulayo — igwema ukuminyanisa ukuhlanza futhi igcine indlela yokuphefumula ivulekile.
learnSch_health_f2_kp1: Ngokusha: pholisa ngaphansi kwamanzi apholile ahambayo imizuzu eyi-10. UNGASEBENZISI iqhwa, ibhotela, noma umuthi wokuxubha. Mboza ngengubo ehlanzekile engenamanzi.
learnSch_health_f2_kp2: Ukushayela abezimo eziphuthumayo: chaza indawo yakho, uhlobo lwesimo esiphuthumayo, kanye nenani labantu abathintekile. Hlala kulayini futhi ulandele imiyalelo.
learnSch_health_f2_kp3: Bhala umhlahlandlela wesinyathelo ngesinyathelo sokuphendula umuntu ovele wawa futhi ongaphenduli. Faka phakathi: ukuhlola ukuphepha, ukuhlola ukwazi, ukucela usizo, izinyathelo ze-CPR, kanye nesikhathi sokuma. Faka izinombolo ezilinganiselwe (izinga lokucindezela, ukujula).
learnSch_arts_f1_desc: Amaciko akhetha ezinhlobonhlobo zamasu nezinto zokwakha - ukudweba, ukudweba, ukuphrinta, ukudweba, ubuciko bedijithali - ngayinye enezimfanelo ezihlukile kanye nokusetshenziswa. Ukuqonda imidiya ehlukene yobuciko kukusiza ukuthi ukhethe ithuluzi elifanele lenhloso yakho yobuciko, futhi wakhe ulwazimagama ukuze uxoxe futhi uhlole imisebenzi yobuciko ngokujulile.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp0: Imidiya yokudweba: ipensela (igraphite), amalahle, uyinki - ngayinye ikhiqiza ikhwalithi yomugqa ohlukile, iphimbo, nokuthungwa. Amasu omthunzi: ukuchanyuselwa, ukuchamisela, ukugoqa, ukuhlanganisa.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp1: Imidiya yokudweba: i-watercolor (izindawo ezisobala, ezikhanyayo ezishiywe zingapendiwe), ama-acrylics (asekelwe emanzini, omisa ngokushesha, ahlukahlukene), amafutha (ukoma kancane, umbala ocebile, inqubo yendabuko yokucwenga).
learnSch_arts_f1_kp2: Ukuphrinta: ukuphrinta kwempumuzo (i-linocut — ukusika ukuze ushiye umklamo), ukuphrinta kwesikrini, ukukopisha — amaphrinti amaningi afanayo asuka ku-matrix eyodwa.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp3: Ukubaza: okungeziwe (imodeli yobumba, ukuhlangana), ukususa (itshe lokuqopha noma ukhuni), ukubunjwa (ithusi, i-resin). Ubuciko bokufaka busebenzisa indawo ngokwayo njengendawo yokuxhumana.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp4: Amathuluzi obuciko bedijithali (Procreate, Photoshop, Blender) aphindaphinda futhi andise amasu avamile - izendlalelo, amabhulashi, nokumodela kwe-3D - kodwa adinga ulwazi lwezimiso ezifanayo eziyisisekelo.
learnSch_arts_f1_task: Khetha umsebenzi wobuciko owodwa kanye nendawo eyodwa yobuciko ongakaze uyisebenzise ngaphambilini. Cwaninga izici zayo, bese udala ucwaningo usebenzisa leyo ndlela. Bhala amagama ayi-150 uhlole ukuthi yini esebenzile, yini ebinzima, kanye nokuthi isisetshenziswa siwuthinte kanjani umphumela.
learnSch_arts_f2_name: Ithiyori Yombala || Umbala uyisici esibonakalayo esinamandla kakhulu — uvusa imizwa, udala ukujula, futhi uqondise iso lombukeli. Ithiyori yemibala ichaza ubudlelwano phakathi kwemibala kanye nendlela yokuyisebenzisa ngenhloso. Kusukela esondweni lombala ukuya ekuhlanganisweni kokubona, umbala wokuba yingcweti uguqula umthelela wanoma yimuphi umsebenzi wobuciko.
learnSch_arts_f2_desc: Imibala eyinhloko (i-RYB yopende: obomvu, ophuzi, oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka) ayinakwenziwa ngokuxutshwa. Imibala yesibili (owolintshi, oluhlaza okotshani, onsomi) yenziwa kusuka kumaprimaries amabili.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp0: Imibala ehambisanayo ihlala ibhekene nomunye esondweni lombala (isb. obomvu–oluhlaza okotshani, oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka–owolintshi). Zibekwe eceleni ziyaqinisana; zixutshwe zishintsha zibe grey/brown.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp1: Izinga lokushisa lombala: imibala efudumele (obomvu, osawolintshi, ophuzi) izizwa inomdlandla futhi ihamba phambili ngokubukeka. Imibala epholile (oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, oluhlaza okotshani, onsomi) izizwa izolile futhi ihlehla.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp2: I-Tint = umbala + omhlophe (olula). Umthunzi = umbala + omnyama (omnyama). Ithoni = umbala + ompunga. Lokhu kudala ububanzi bevelu emsebenzini wobuciko.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp3: Izikimu zombala ezifanayo (imibala eseduze) zidala ukuzwana. Izikimu ze-Triadic (imibala emithathu enezikhala ngokulinganayo) zidala ukugqama okugqamile. I-Monochromatic isebenzisa i-hue eyodwa ngamavelu ahlukene.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp4: Dala isondo lombala elibonisa wonke ama-hues angu-12 (3 primary, 3 secondary, 6 tertiary). Bese upenda noma udwebe izikwele ezimbili ezincane zihlangene usebenzisa ipheya ehambisanayo bese uchaza umphumela wokubukwayo. Chasisa ngokuthi: i-tint, umthunzi, nethoni yombala owodwa.
learnSch_music_f1_desc: Izinsimbi zomculo zomhlaba zihlelwa ngemindeni ngendlela ezikhiqiza ngayo umsindo. Izinhlobo zomculo - kusukela kokwakudala kuye kweye-jazz kuya ku-hip-hop - zibonisa isiko, umlando, nomongo womphakathi. Ukwazi izinsimbi nezinhlobo kukunikeza kokubili isilulumagama esisebenzayo kanye nokwazisa okubanzi komculo njengendlela yobuciko ephilayo, ethuthukayo.
learnSch_music_f1_kp0: Imindeni yezinsimbi: izintambo (i-violin, isiginci — izintambo ezidlidlizayo), umoya wokhuni (umtshingo, i-clarinet — ikholomu yomoya edlidlizayo), ithusi (icilongo, i-trombone — izindebe ezikhalayo), i-percussion (izigubhu, ixylophone — ishaywe), ikhibhodi (piano, isitho — izindlela eziningi).
learnSch_music_f1_kp1: Izigaba ze-orchestra: izintambo, umoya wokhuni, ithusi, i-percussion. Umqhubi uhlanganisa zonke izigaba esebenzisa ukuthinta kanye nenduku.
learnSch_music_f1_kp2: Umculo wakudala (1750–1820): amafomu ahlelekile (sonata, i-symphony, ikhonsathi), abaqambi abafana noMozart, uHaydn, uBeethoven. Umculo wothando (1820-1900): inkulumo ethinta imizwa eyengeziwe, ama-orchestra amakhulu, amaBrahms, uTchaikovsky, uWagner.
learnSch_music_f1_kp3: I-Jazz (1900s, imvelaphi yase-Afrika-yaseMelika): ukuthuthukiswa, ukuvumelanisa, isigqi sokushwiba. Izinhlobo ezingaphansi: i-bebop, i-cool jazz, i-fusion. Blues: call-and-response, 12-bar form.
learnSch_music_f1_kp4: I-Pop ne-rock (1950s–): isiginci sikagesi, ibhesi, izigubhu, amazwi. I-Hip-hop (1970s, Bronx NY): I-DJing, isampula, i-rapping, i-breakdancing - ukunyakaza okuphelele kwamasiko.
learnSch_music_f1_task: Lalela ucezu olulodwa ohlotsheni ngalunye lwezinhlobo ezimbili ezihlukene (isb. i-symphony ye-Beethoven nengoma ye-blues). Kuyinye: khomba izinsimbi ezisetshenzisiwe, i-tempo, amandla, ukuma kwenhliziyo, kanye nesici somculo esisodwa esiqondene nalolo hlobo. Ziqhathanise etafuleni.
learnSch_music_f1_tp2: Umlando Womculo || Umlando womculo ulandelela ukuthi izitayela zomculo, izinsimbi, nemibono kwavela kanjani emakhulwini eminyaka namasiko. Kusukela ekuculweni kukaGregorian kuya kumasimfoni ka-Beethoven kuya emculweni womdanso we-elekthronikhi, inkathi ngayinye ibonisa izimiso zomphakathi wayo, ubuchwepheshe, nokubuka komhlaba. Ukuqonda umlando womculo kujulisa ukwazisa futhi kubeka umculo wamanje esimweni.
learnSch_music_f2_name: Inkathi Ephakathi (500–1400): Ingoma kaGregory (i-monophonic, umculo wezwi ongaphelezelwa wesonto). I-Renaissance (1400-1600): i-polyphony (izingxenye eziningi zezwi ezizimele); kuphuma umculo wezwe.
learnSch_music_f2_desc: I-Baroque (1600-1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. I-Ornate counterpoint, i-basso continuo, amafomu: i-fugue, i-suite, i-oratorio. I-Opera yasungulwa eFlorence (~1600).
learnSch_music_f2_kp0: Isikhathi se-Classical (1750-1820): ibhalansi, ukucaca, ukuthuthukiswa kwe-symphony, ifomu le-sonata, i-quartet yezintambo. UMozart, uHaydn, uBeethoven wokuqala.
learnSch_music_f2_kp1: Inkathi yothando (1820–1900): ukushuba kwemizwa, umculo wohlelo (uxoxa indaba), ubuzwe (uGrieg, uSibelius, uDvořák), ama-orchestra anwebeka kakhulu.
learnSch_music_f2_kp2: Ikhulu lama-20: I-Modernism (Stravinsky, isistimu ye-Schoenberg's 12-tone), i-Jazz Age, inguquko ye-Rock & Roll (1950s), i-minimalism (i-Philip Glass), kanye nenguquko yedijithali edala umculo we-electronic nowekhompyutha.
learnSch_music_f2_kp3: Dala umugqa wesikhathi womculo waseNtshonalanga kusukela ngo-500 CE kuze kube manje. Enkathini ngayinye: bhala igama, izinsuku, abaqambi/abaculi ababili, isici esisodwa esiyinhloko somculo, kanye nensimbi eyodwa eyisici noma ifomu. Fanisa noma chaza isiqephu somculo esisodwa enkathini ngayinye.
learnSch_music_f2_kp4: 20th century: Modernism (Stravinsky, Schoenberg's 12-tone system), Jazz Age, Rock & Roll revolution (1950s), minimalism (Philip Glass), and the digital revolution creating electronic and computer music.
learnSch_music_f2_task: Create a timeline of Western music from 500 CE to the present. For each period: write the name, dates, two composers/artists, one key musical feature, and one characteristic instrument or form. Illustrate or annotate one musical excerpt from each period.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_name: Ezemidlalo Yeqembu Namaqhinga || Imidlalo yeqembu ithuthukisa amakhono omzimba, ukucabanga kwamasu, ukuxhumana, kanye nobuholi. Kungakhathaliseki ukuthi ibhola lezinyawo, i-basketball, i-volleyball, noma i-handball - ngayinye idinga ukuqonda kwemithetho, izikhundla, namasu eqembu. Ukufunda ukufunda umdlalo nokwenza izinqumo ezisheshayo kubaluleke njengekhono lomzimba.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_desc: Ukuxhumana: ukubiza ibhola, ukuhlela ukuzivikela, nokukhuthaza ozakwethu beqembu kubaluleke njengekhono lobuchwepheshe emidlalweni yeqembu.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp0: Amaqhinga ebholeni: ukwakheka (4-4-2, 4-3-3) kunquma ukuthi abadlali babekwe kanjani. Ukucindezela phezulu phezulu kuqhathaniswa nokuvikela okujulile izindlela zamasu ezihlukile.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp1: Ukwenza izinqumo: abadlali abangcono kakhulu bahlala beskena indawo yabo, balindele umnyakazo olandelayo, futhi bakhethe inketho ezuzisa iqembu kunokukhombisa ikhono lomuntu ngamunye.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp2: Imithetho ikhona yokulunga nokuphepha. Ukuqonda umthetho we-offside (ibhola), izikrini ezingekho emthethweni (ibasketball), noma amaphutha okuzungezisa (i-volleyball) kuvimbela amaphutha nezijeziso.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp3: Ubuholi kanye nezemidlalo: okaputeni bayakhuthaza futhi baxhumane; bonke abadlali bahlonipha izimbangi, onompempe, nemiphumela — amanani abalulekile ezemidlalo.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp4: Khetha umdlalo weqembu owudlalayo noma owubukayo. Dizayina ukuzijwayeza ukuthuthukisa ikhono elithile (isb., ukunemba kokuphasa ebholeni). Isho: ikhono eliqondiwe, okokusebenza okudingekayo, imiyalelo yokubhoboza, indlela yokwenza kube nzima, kanye nendlela yokuhlola intuthuko.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_tp2: Wellness & Healthy Lifestyle || Ukuphila kahle kungaphezu kokufaneleka komzimba - kuhlanganisa impilo yengqondo, ukulala, ukudla okunomsoco, ukuxhumana nomphakathi, nokulawula ingcindezi. Indlela yokuphila enempilo eyakhelwe ekusebenzeni okuvamile, ukudla okulinganiselayo, ukulala ngokwanele, nobudlelwano obuhle kuvikela izifo ezingamahlalakhona futhi isekela inhlalakahle kukho konke ukuphila.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_name: I-WHO incoma imizuzu engu-150–300 yomsebenzi we-aerobic omaphakathi ngeviki kubantu abadala (isb. ukuhamba usheshe, ukugibela ibhayisikili) noma imizuzu engama-75 yomsebenzi onamandla.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_desc: Ukulala: intsha idinga amahora angu-8-10 ubusuku ngabunye. Ukungalali ngokwanele kukhinyabeza ukuqiniswa kwenkumbulo, ukuma kwenhliziyo, ukusebenza kwamasosha omzimba, nesikhathi sokusabela.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp0: Amasu okulawula ukucindezeleka: ukuvivinya umzimba, ukucabangela, ukuphefumula okujulile, ukuphatha isikhathi, nokukhuluma nomuntu othembekile konke kuyizindlela ezisekelwe ebufakazini.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp1: Isikhathi sesikrini: Ukusetshenziswa ngokweqile (ikakhulukazi inkundla yezokuxhumana ebusuku) kuphazamisa ukulala futhi kuxhunyaniswa nokukhathazeka nokuzethemba okuphansi entsheni. Ukunqamuka kwedijithali nemingcele kuyasiza.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp2: Stress management techniques: physical exercise, mindfulness, deep breathing, time management, and talking to a trusted person are all evidence-based approaches.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp3: Screen time: excessive use (especially social media at night) disrupts sleep and is linked to anxiety and low self-esteem in adolescents. Digital breaks and boundaries help.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp4: Ukuqwashisa ngezidakamizwa: utshwala nogwayi kusemthethweni kodwa kuyingozi - utshwala bulimaza isibindi nobuchopho; ukubhema kubangela umdlavuza wamaphaphu nesifo senhliziyo nemithambo yegazi. Zombili ziyingozi ikakhulukazi emizimbeni ekhulayo.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_task: Dala uhlelo lomuntu siqu lweviki lonke lwezempilo. Kufaka phakathi: izikhathi ezi-5 zomsebenzi womzimba (uhlobo, ubude besikhathi, ukushuba), ishejuli yokulala, izindlela ezi-3 zokulawula ingcindezi, nemigomo engu-2 yokondleka. Cabanga ukuthi iyiphi indawo edinga ukuthuthukiswa kakhulu nokuthi kungani.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_desc: Izimiso zokuziphatha zefilosofi ziyabuza: kufanele senze kanjani? Yini eyenza isenzo sibe silungile noma singalungile? Izimiso zokuziphatha ezintathu ezinkulu - consequentialism, deontology, kanye nezimiso zokulunga - zinikeza izimpendulo ezihlukene. Ukusebenzisa lezi zinhlaka ezinkingeni zomhlaba wangempela (i-euthanasia, ubulungiswa besimo sezulu, i-AI) kuthuthukisa ukucabanga okucacile, okuhlelekile kokuziphatha.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp0: Consequentialism (Utilitarianism — Mill, Bentham): isenzo silungile uma siveza injabulo enkulu kunani lonke. Imiphumela inquma ukuziphatha.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp1: I-Deontology (Kant): ezinye izenzo zilungile noma azilungile, ngaphandle kwemiphumela. I-Categorical Imperative: yenza kuphela ngemithetho ongayenza ibe imithetho yendawo yonke.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp2: Izimiso zokuhle (i-Aristotle): gxila kumlingiswa kunemithetho noma imiphumela. Umuntu olungile uye wahlakulela imikhuba yesibindi, ukwethembeka, ubulungisa, nokuzithiba.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp3: Ukuhlobana kokuziphatha: izimiso zokuziphatha ziyahlukahluka phakathi kwamasiko nabantu ngabanye — ayikho indinganiso yendawo yonke. I-Moral absolutism: ezinye izenzo zihlale zilungile noma zingalungile kungakhathaliseki isiko.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp4: Izimiso zokuziphatha ezisetshenziswayo zihlola izimpikiswano ezithile: izimiso zokuziphatha zezokwelapha (i-euthanasia, ukukhipha isisu), izimiso zemvelo (imisebenzi yemvelo okungeyona ezomuntu), kanye nezimiso zokuziphatha ze-AI (izikhali ezizimele, ubumfihlo).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_task: Sebenzisa uhlaka ngalunye lwezimiso zokuziphatha ezintathu ezinkulu (i-utilitarianism, deontology, virtue ethics) kule nkinga: 'Ingabe kuwukuziphatha ukuqamba amanga ukuvikela imizwa yothile?' Kokunye, sho umgomo owumongo wohlaka kanye nempendulo yalo enkingeni.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_tp1: Izimiso zokuziphatha okuhle kanye nezimiso zokuziphatha ezisetshenziswayo
learnSch_social_studies_f2_name: Amalungelo abantu ngamalungelo atholakala emhlabeni wonke aphethwe yiwo wonke umuntu, kungakhathalekile ubuzwe, ubulili, uhlanga, noma inkolo. I-Universal Declaration of Human Rights (1948) iwafaka emthethweni wamazwe ngamazwe. Ukuba isakhamuzi somhlaba wonke kusho ukuqonda amalungelo nezibopho zakho emhlabeni oxhumene nokuthatha isinyathelo ngekusasa elinobulungiswa, elisimeme.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_desc: I-Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR, 1948) inezihloko ezingu-30 ezihlanganisa amalungelo omphakathi, ezombusazwe, ezomnotho, ezenhlalakahle, kanye namasiko - isisekelo somthetho wamazwe ngamazwe wamalungelo abantu.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp0: Amalungelo esizukulwane sokuqala: ezombangazwe nezombusazwe (inkululeko yokukhuluma, ilungelo lokuqulwa kwecala ngendlela efanele, ilungelo lokuvota). Isizukulwane sesibili: ezomnotho nezenhlalakahle (ilungelo lemfundo, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, umsebenzi).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp1: First-generation rights: civil and political (free speech, right to a fair trial, right to vote). Second-generation: economic and social (right to education, healthcare, work).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp2: Izinhlaka zamalungelo abantu: I-UN Human Rights Council, i-International Criminal Court (ishushisa amacala empi namacala abhekiswe esintwini), iNkantolo YaseYurophu Yamalungelo Abantu.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp3: Amalungelo ezingane: I-UN Convention on the Rights of the Child (1989) iqinisekisa amalungelo ezingane okuthola imfundo, ukuvikelwa, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, nokubamba iqhaza. Igunyazwe ngamazwe angu-196.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp4: Ukuba yisakhamuzi somhlaba wonke: ukuthatha isibopho ngezindaba zomhlaba wonke (ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukungalingani, ukungqubuzana) nokusebenza endaweni nasemhlabeni jikelele. Ama-NGO (Amnesty International, Médecins Sans Frontières) ahlanganisa lo mgomo.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_task: Khetha izihloko ezintathu ku-Universal Declaration of Human Rights. Kulowo nalowo: sho ilungelo, nikeza isibonelo somhlaba wangempela lapho leli lungelo liphulwa khona namuhla, futhi uphakamise isenzo esisodwa umuntu noma uhulumeni angasithatha.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_tp1: Amalungelo ezingane || Ubuzwe bomhlaba wonke kanye nesenzo
learnSch_philosophy_f2_name: Ukuziphatha kuyigatsha lefilosofi elibuza ukuthi kufanele siphile futhi senze kanjani. Ifilosofi yokuziphatha ihlola izisekelo zezindinganiso zethu: yini enhle, yini enobulungisa, futhi kufanele sibaphathe kanjani abanye? Le mibuzo ayiyona into engaqondakali - isekela imithetho, izinqumo zezokwelapha, ukuthuthukiswa kwe-AI, nokukhetha kwansuku zonke.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_desc: Iqiniso lokuziphatha: amaqiniso anenhloso yokuziphatha akhona ngaphandle kwalokho okucatshangwayo. Ukuziphatha okungahambisani neqiniso: ukuziphatha kwakhiwe abantu, imiphakathi, noma ukubonakaliswa kwemizwelo.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp0: Inkinga yetroli (Judith Jarvis Thomson / Philippa Foot): ungaphambukisa inqola ebalekile ukuze ubulale umuntu oyedwa bese usindisa abahlanu? Izinhlaka ezehlukene zinikeza izimpendulo ezihlukene.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp1: Justice (Rawls): sungula umphakathi ngemuva 'kweveyili yokungazi' — ungazi isikhundla sakho, ukhetha imithetho efanelekile wonke umuntu angavumelana nayo.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp2: Inqubekelaphambili yokuziphatha: imiphakathi ishintsha imibono yayo yokuziphatha ngokuhamba kwesikhathi - ubugqila kwake kwaba semthethweni futhi kwamukelwa; ukuhlukumeza kwake kwasetshenziswa ezinkantolo. Lokhu kuphakamisa: ingabe ukuziphatha kuhlobene nesikhathi?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp3: Izimiso zokuziphatha kwezilwane: Impikiswano kaPeter Singer yokuthi ukuhlupheka kwezilwane kubalwa ngokokuziphatha ngokulinganayo nokuhlupheka komuntu. Ingabe kunjalo? Yini elandelayo endleleni esidla ngayo nesicwaninga ngayo?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp4: Hlaziya inkinga yetroli usebenzisa izinhlaka zesimilo ezimbili ezihlukene. Ngabe uhlaka ngalunye lungaluleka luphi? Bese uklama eyakho inkinga yokuziphatha bese uyihlaziya. Xoxani ngokuthi ikhona yini impendulo 'elungile' noma enengqondo engcono kuphela.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp0: Justice and Rawls || Isimilo sezilwane kanye nezingqinamba ezisetshenziswayo
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp1: Amarobhothi & Okuzenzakalelayo || Amarobhothi ahlanganisa ubunjiniyela bemishini, i-electronics, kanye nezinhlelo ukudala imishini eyenza imisebenzi ngokuzenzakalelayo noma ngokuzenzakalelayo. Imishini ezenzakalelayo - ukushintsha umsebenzi womuntu ngemishini - iguqula imboni, imithi, kanye nempilo yansuku zonke. Ukuqonda amarobhothi kukulungiselela umhlaba lapho abantu nemishini ngokuya besebenza ndawonye.
learnSch_technology_f2_desc: Robotics combines mechanical engineering, electronics, and programming to create machines that perform tasks autonomously or semi-autonomously. Automation — replacing human labour with machines — is transforming industry, medicine, and everyday life. Understanding robotics prepares you for a world where humans and machines increasingly work together.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp0: Amarobhothi anezingxenye ezintathu eziyinhloko: izinzwa (bona indawo ezungezile), ama-actuator (umnyakazo futhi wenze), kanye nesilawuli (sicubungula idatha yenzwa bese sinquma izenzo — 'ubuchopho').
learnSch_technology_f2_kp1: Amadigri enkululeko (DoF): inombolo yezindlela ezizimele irobhothi elinganyakaza ngazo. Ingalo yerobhothi ene-6 DoF ingafinyelela noma yikuphi ukuma nokuma endaweni ye-3D.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp2: Amarobhothi ezimboni: ukushisela, ukudweba, ukuhlanganisa ezimbonini zezimoto. Amarobhothi asebenzisanayo (ama-cobots) asebenza ngokuphepha eduze kwabantu. Amarobhothi okuhlinza (Da Vinci) avumela ukusebenza okunembayo.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp3: I-Artificial Intelligence (AI) ithuthukisa amarobhothi anokubona (izinto ezibonayo), ukucutshungulwa kolimi lwemvelo (imiyalo yezwi), nokufunda ngomshini (ukuthuthukiswa kokuhlangenwe nakho).
learnSch_technology_f2_kp4: Okuzenzakalelayo kanye nomnotho: amarobhothi andisa ukukhiqiza kodwa asuse imisebenzi ethile. Kudaleka imisebenzi emisha ekunakekeleni amarobhothi, ukuhlela, nokuklama. Umthelela wensalela kuyaphikiswana ngawo.
learnSch_technology_f2_task: Dizayina irobhothi elilula ukwenza umsebenzi owodwa othize (isb. ukuhlunga okugaywa kabusha). Chaza: izinzwa ezidingekayo, ama-actuator ayadingeka, lawula ingqondo (i-flowchart noma i-pseudocode), kanye nezindlela ezingase zehluleke. Bese nixoxa ngokukhathazeka okukodwa kokuziphatha mayelana nokwenza lo msebenzi ngokuzenzakalelayo.
learnSch_technology_f2_tp1: Amarobhothi ezimboni nezokwelapha || I-AI kanye nekusasa lomsebenzi
learnSch_technology_f2_tp2: Intando Yeningi Nezinhlelo Zikahulumeni || Izinhlelo zikahulumeni zinquma ukuthi umphakathi uhlelwa kanjani nokuthi amandla asakazwa kanjani. Intando yeningi - ukubusa kwabantu - kuthatha izindlela eziningi: ukuqondisa, ukumela, umongameli, kanye nephalamende. Ukuqhathanisa amasistimu kusisiza siqonde ukuthi kungani amanye amazwe ezinzile futhi ekhululekile kuyilapho amanye enegunya noma engazinzile.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_name: Intando yeningi: izakhamuzi zikhetha abameleli abazenzela imithetho. Izimiso ezibalulekile: ukubusa komthetho, ukuhlukaniswa kwamandla, inkululeko yokukhuluma, ijaji elizimele.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_desc: Uhlelo lukaMongameli (i-USA): i-executive (umongameli) ikhethwa ngokuqondile futhi ihlukaniswe nesishayamthetho. Uhlelo lwePhalamende (e-UK, eJalimane): isigungu esiphezulu sivela futhi sibophezelekile ephalamende.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp0: Ukwehlukaniswa kwamandla: umthetho (wenza imithetho), isikhulu (usebenzisa imithetho), ubulungiswa (uhumusha imithetho). Amasheke namabhalansi avimbela noma yiliphi igatsha elilodwa ekubeni namandla kakhulu.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp1: Imibuso enegunya: amandla agxile kumholi oyedwa noma inhlangano ngaphandle kokuziphendulela kwangempela kwentando yeningi (isb., i-North Korea, Belarus). Imibuso exubile: ukhetho lubanjwe kodwa hhayi olukhululekile noma olunobulungiswa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp2: Izwe: indawo enabantu abahlala njalo, uhulumeni osebenzayo, nobukhosi obaziwayo. Izizwe zingaqukatha izinhlanga eziningi; amazwe-kazwelonke aqondisa ubuzwe nemingcele yezombangazwe.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp3: Qhathanisa izinhlelo zezepolitiki zase-USA (zomongameli) kanye neJalimane (ephalamende). Kokunye: chaza ukuthi isiphathimandla sikhethwa kanjani, imithetho yenziwa kanjani, nokuthi kwenzekani uma uhulumeni elahlekelwa ukwesekwa ngumphakathi. Ucabanga ukuthi yikuphi okunamandla okuziphendulela ngentando yeningi? Qinisekisa.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_name: Amalungelo Abantu Nomthetho Wamazwe Ngamazwe || Umthetho wamazwe ngamazwe ulawula ubudlelwano phakathi kwezifundazwe futhi uvikela amalungelo abantu ngabanye. Umyalo wangemva kweWWII wadala i-UN, i-International Criminal Court, kanye nezivumelwano ezibopha amazwe ukuthi ahloniphe amalungelo abantu. Ukuqonda lezi zikhungo kukusiza ukuthi uhlole ukuthi umhlaba usabela kanjani ezingxabanweni, ukungabi nabulungisa, kanye nezinkinga zobuntu.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_desc: IZizwe Ezihlangene (eyasungulwa ngo-1945, amazwe angamalungu angu-193): igcina ukuthula nokulondeka kwamazwe ngamazwe, ikhuthaza intuthuko kanye namalungelo abantu ngama-ejensi ayo akhethekile ayi-15.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp0: Umthetho wamazwe ngamazwe wokusiza abantu (i-Geneva Conventions): uvikela izakhamuzi, amasosha alimele, kanye neziboshwa zempi ngesikhathi sokungqubuzana kwezikhali. Ukuwephula kuwubugebengu bempi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp1: I-International Criminal Court (ICC, The Hague): ishushisa abantu ngamacala okubulala abantu, amacala abhekiswe esintwini, namacala empi lapho izinkantolo zikazwelonke zehluleka ukuthatha isinyathelo.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp2: Ubukhosi vs. Ukungenelela: imibuso inamandla (akukho ukugxambukela kwangaphandle ezindabeni zangaphakathi), kodwa imfundiso ethi 'Isibopho Sokuvikela' (R2P) ivumela ukungenelela lapho umbuso wenza unya olukhulu.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp3: Umthetho wababaleki: I-Refugee Convention yango-1951 ichaza umbaleki njengomuntu obalekela ukushushiswa ngokusekelwe kuhlanga, inkolo, ubuzwe, umbono wezepolitiki, noma iqembu lezenhlalo. Amazwe akumele awabuyisele engozini (ukungabuyiswa kabusha).
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp4: Cwaninga ngenhlekelele yamanje noma yakamuva yamazwe ngamazwe (isb. ingxabano noma isimo esiphuthumayo sobuntu). Thola: (a) ukuthi yimiphi imithetho yamazwe ngamazwe esebenzayo, (b) yiziphi izinyathelo ezithathwe yi-UN noma i-ICC, (c) impikiswano eyodwa kanye nenye emelene nokungenelela kwezempi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_task: Uhlelo lweZizwe Ezihlangene || Inkantolo Yamazwe Ngamazwe || Ababaleki nobukhosi
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp1: Ukubamba iqhaza kwedemokhrasi kudlulela ngalé kokuvota - kuhlanganisa ukukhankasa, ukufaka izicelo, ukubhikisha, kanye nokungenela ukhetho. Izinhlelo zokhetho zinquma ukuthi amavoti ahumusha kanjani izihlalo futhi alolonge imiphumela yezombangazwe. Ukuqonda ukubamba iqhaza kukusiza ukuthi usebenzise amalungelo akho futhi ubone umehluko phakathi kwentando yeningi enempilo nokucindezelwa kwabavoti.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp2: Amasistimu okuvota: First-Past-The-Post (UK, USA) — ikhandidethi elinamavoti amaningi liyawina, livamise ukukhiqiza amasistimu ezinhlangano ezimbili. I-Proportional Representation (Germany, Netherlands) — amaqembu awina izihlalo ngokulingana namavoti, akhuthaza imifelandawonye yamaqembu amaningi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_name: Amaqembu ezepolitiki ahlela abantu abanemibono efanayo ukuze bangenele ukhetho futhi bakhe ohulumeni. Uphiko lwesokunxele: ukulingana okukhulu, ukungenelela kombuso. Right-wing: inkululeko yomuntu ngamunye, izimakethe zamahhala. Isikhungo: izikhundla ezimaphakathi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_desc: Ukuvota kwabavoti kuyehluka: ukuzibandakanya komphakathi okuphezulu kuqinisa intando yeningi. Izithiyo zihlanganisa: ukubhalisa okuyinkimbinkimbi, izidingo zomazisi womvoti, iziteshi zokuvota ezingafinyeleleki, kanye nokudumala.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp0: Ukubamba iqhaza okungezona okhethweni: izicelo, imibhikisho, ukungalaleli komphakathi (ukwephulwa komthetho ngokuthula ukuze kugqanyiswe ukungabi nabulungisa - okusetshenziswa uGandhi, uMartin Luther King), ubushoshovu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp1: Imidiya nentando yeningi: umshini wezindaba wamahhala ubamba ohulumeni ukuthi baphendule (i-4th estate). Amabhamuza okuhlunga kanye nolwazi olunganembile lusongela ukuvota unolwazi — ukufunda nemidiya kuyikhono lomphakathi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp2: Qhathanisa i-FPTP kanye Nokumelelwa Ngokwesilinganiso usebenzisa lezi zindlela zokunquma: ukumelwa ngendlela efanele, ukuzinza kukahulumeni, ukukhetha kwabavoti, kanye nokuba nokwenzeka komfelandawonye. Bese uklama umkhankaso wokhetho lomkhandlu wesikole - bhala i-manifesto, khomba abavoti bakho, bese uhlela imisebenzi emithathu yomkhankaso.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp4: Media and democracy: free press holds governments to account (4th estate). Filter bubbles and misinformation threaten informed voting — media literacy is a civic skill.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_task: Compare FPTP and Proportional Representation using these criteria: fairness of representation, stability of government, voter choice, and likelihood of coalition. Then design a campaign for a school council election — write a manifesto, identify your voters, and plan three campaign activities.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_desc: I-Psychology iwucwaningo lwesayensi lwengqondo, ingqondo, nokuziphatha. Ifuna ukuqonda ukuthi kungani abantu becabanga, bezizwa, futhi benze ngendlela abenza ngayo - kusukela ekulaleni nasenkumbulo kuya othandweni nolaka. Izindlela zePsychology zingezesayensi: ukuhlola okulawulwayo, ukuqaphela, nokuhlaziya izibalo. Iguqule imithi, imfundo, nokuphila kwansuku zonke.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp0: Imibono emikhulu yePsychology: yebhayoloji (ubuchopho, izakhi zofuzo), ingqondo (izinqubo zokucabanga), ukuziphatha (ukuziphatha okuqaphelekayo, isimo), i-psychodynamic (ukushayela engazi lutho), kanye nobuntu (ukuzenzakalela).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp1: Indlela yesayensi kuPsychology: hypothesis → ukuhlola → ukuqoqwa kwedatha → ukuhlaziywa → isiphetho. Ukubuyekezwa kontanga kuqinisekisa ukuthi okutholakele kuyahlolwa ngaphambi kokushicilelwa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp2: Izindawo ezibalulekile zobuchopho: i-prefrontal cortex (ukwenza izinqumo, ubuntu), i-amygdala (imizwa, impendulo yokwesaba), i-hippocampus (ukwakheka kwenkumbulo), i-cerebellum (ukuxhumanisa).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp3: Impikiswano yemvelo uma iqhathaniswa nokukhulisa: ingabe izakhi zofuzo (imvelo) ziqhathaniswa nemvelo nolwazi (ukukhulisa) zilolonga kangakanani ubuntu, ukuhlakanipha, nempilo yengqondo? Ukuvumelana kwamanje: kokubili kuyasebenzisana.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp4: Izimiso zokuziphatha kusayikholoji: ababambiqhaza kufanele banikeze imvume benolwazi, bangahoxa noma nini, idatha iyimfihlo, futhi izifundo akufanele zibangele ukulimala okuhlala njalo. Ukuhlolwa kwe-Milgram (1960s) kwaphakamisa imibuzo emikhulu yokuziphatha.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_task: Dala ucwaningo lokuqaphela ukuziphatha ukuze uphenye ukuthi ingabe abafundi baphazamiseka kakhulu lapho befunda ngomculo noma ngokuthula. Isho: umbuzo wocwaningo, indlela, okuguquguqukayo, ukudideka okungaba khona, nokuthi ungayihlaziya kanjani idatha.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_name: Ingqondo Nenkumbulo || Ukuqonda kubhekisela kuzo zonke izinqubo zengqondo: ukubona, ukunaka, inkumbulo, ukucabanga, ulimi, nokuxazulula izinkinga. Ukuqonda inkumbulo - ukuthi yakheka kanjani, igcinwe, futhi ibuyiswe kanjani - kuhlobene ngokuqondile nokutadisha. Ucwaningo lubonisa ukuthi ukukhumbula okusebenzayo kanye nokuphindaphinda kwezikhala kudlula ngokumangalisayo ukufunda kabusha kokwenziwa kokugcinwa kwesikhathi eside.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_desc: Imodeli yezitolo eziningi (Atkinson & Shiffrin): inkumbulo yezinzwa (ingxenyana yomzuzwana) → inkumbulo yesikhashana (izinto ezingu-7±2, ~20 sec) → inkumbulo yesikhathi eside (umthamo ongenamkhawulo, okungenzeka unomphela).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp0: Umbhalo wekhodi: ukuguqula okuhlangenwe nakho kube ukulandelana kwenkumbulo. Umbhalo wekhodi onemininingwane (ukuxhumanisa ulwazi olusha nolwazi olukhona) usebenza kakhulu kunokuphindaphinda ngekhanda.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp1: Umthelela wesikhala: ukufunda into efanayo kumaseshini amaningi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi (ukuphindaphinda okuhlukaniswe ngezikhala) kuholela ekukhunjulweni okungcono kakhulu kwesikhathi eside kunokuthi 'i-cramming' egcwele.
