learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp2: Ukuzijwayeza ukubuyisa: ukukhumbula ulwazi ngentshiseko (ukuzihlola, amakhadi emakhadi) kuqinisa imikhondo yenkumbulo ngaphezu kokuphinda ufunde. Lona 'umphumela wokuhlola'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp3: Inkumbulo iyakha kabusha, ayizali: ngaso sonke isikhathi uma sikhumbula inkumbulo, siyayishintsha ngobuqili. Ngakho-ke ubufakazi bofakazi bokuzibonela abuthembeki - buboniswa ngokuphindaphindiwe ocwaningweni lwasenkantolo.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp4: Memory is reconstructive, not reproductive: every time we recall a memory, we subtly alter it. Eyewitness testimony is therefore unreliable — shown repeatedly in courtroom research.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_task: Hlola umphumela wokuhlukanisa: funda amagama amasha angama-20 usebenzisa ukuzijwayeza okuxubile (konke ngasikhathi sinye namuhla). Zihlole ngemuva kosuku olungu-1. Bese ufunda amagama amasha angama-20 ezinsukwini ezi-5 (ama-4 ngosuku). Hlola ngemva kwezinsuku ezingu-7. Qhathanisa izikolo zakho bese ubhala okutholile.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_tp1: Amasu okufunda kusuka ku-psychology || I-Social Psychology || Isayikholoji yezokuhlalisana ifunda ukuthi abantu bacabanga kanjani, bazizwe kanjani, futhi baziphathe kanjani phambi kwabanye - okwangempela noma okucatshangelwayo. Iveza ukuthi umongo wethu usibumba ngokujule kangakanani: sihambisana namaqembu, silalela igunya, futhi sihlakulela ukuchema - ngokuvamile singanakile. Ukuqonda ithonya lenhlalo kusisiza ukuthi senze izinqumo ezizimele, nezimiso zokuziphatha.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_tp2: Ukuvumelana (ukuhlolwa kwe-Asch, 1951): ababambiqhaza banikeze ngokusobala izimpendulo ezingalungile lapho bebona abanye bezinikeza - bebonisa ithonya elivamile (lokufuna ukungena) kanye nolwazi (abakholelwa ukuthi abanye balungile) ithonya emphakathini.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_name: Ukulalela (Milgram, 1963): ababambiqhaza basebenzise ukushaqeka kukagesi okuyingozi ngoba isikhulu sibatshele ukuthi - ama-65% aya phezulu. Ibonisa indlela igunya elidlula ngayo unembeza womuntu.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_desc: Umthelela wombukeli: uma bekhona abantu abaningi esimweni esiphuthumayo, mancane amathuba okuthi noma yimuphi umuntu oyedwa asize (ukusatshalaliswa kwesibopho). Icala likaKitty Genovese, 1964.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp0: Ithiyori yesichasiselo: sichaza ukuziphatha ngokukuchaza kuzimbangela zangaphakathi (ubuntu, ikhono) noma zangaphandle (isimo, inhlanhla). Iphutha lemfanelo eliyisisekelo: ukulinganisa ngokweqile izimbangela zangaphakathi zokuziphatha okubi kwabanye.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp1: Ukuchema kwangaphakathi kweqembu nangaphandle kweqembu: sikhetha abantu esihlonza ngabo ('thina') futhi singabandlulula abanye ('bona'). Ukuhlolwa kwe-Robbers Cave kubonise ukuthi ukuncintisana kweqembu kuzala ubutha kanjani.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp2: Uyaqaphela ukuthi ehholo eligcwele abantu akukho muntu osiza umuntu olahle izincwadi zakhe futhi abonakale ebuhlungu. Usebenzisa isayense yezokuhlalisana kwabantu, chaza: (a) kungani lokhu kungase kwenzeke, (b) iziphi izici ezithile ezandisa noma ezinciphisa ithuba lokusiza, (c) lokho wena ongakwenza ukuze unqobe umphumela wobukele.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_tp0: I-Solar System || Isimiso sethu sonozungezilanga senziwa eminyakeni engaba yizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-4.6 edlule ngenxa yefu legesi nothuli. Iqukethe inkanyezi eyodwa (iLanga), amaplanethi ayisishiyagalombili, inqwaba yezinyanga, nemizimba emincane engenakubalwa - ama-asteroid, izinkanyezi ezinomsila, namaplanethi amancane. Ukuqonda ukwakheka kwayo namandla ayilawulayo kuxhumanisa i-physics, i-chemistry, nendawo yethu endaweni yonke.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_tp1: ILanga liqukethe u-99.86% wesisindo sohlelo sonozungezilanga. Ikhiqiza amandla ngokuhlangana kwe-nuclear: i-hydrogen nuclei fuse yakhe i-helium, ikhipha amanani amakhulu okukhanya nokushisa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_tp2: Amaplanethi anamatshe angaphakathi: iMercury, Venus, Earth, Mars — amancane, aminyene, asondelene neLanga. Imidondoshiya yegesi/iqhwa: iJupiter, iSaturn, i-Uranus, iNeptune — inkulu kakhulu, iqhelelene neLanga.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_name: Imithetho kaKepler: amaplanethi azungeza iLanga ngama-ellipses (hhayi imibuthano); hamba ngokushesha uma useduze neLanga; futhi isikwele senkathi ye-orbital silingana ne-cube ye-orbital radius.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_desc: Our solar system formed about 4.6 billion years ago from a cloud of gas and dust. It contains one star (the Sun), eight planets, dozens of moons, and countless smaller bodies — asteroids, comets, and dwarf planets. Understanding its structure and the forces that govern it connects physics, chemistry, and our place in the cosmos.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp0: The Sun contains 99.86% of the solar system's mass. It generates energy by nuclear fusion: hydrogen nuclei fuse to form helium, releasing enormous amounts of light and heat.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp1: Inner rocky planets: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars — small, dense, close to the Sun. Outer gas/ice giants: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune — much larger, farther from the Sun.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp2: Kepler's laws: planets orbit the Sun in ellipses (not circles); move faster when closer to the Sun; and the square of the orbital period is proportional to the cube of the orbital radius.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp3: Ibhande le-asteroid liphakathi kweMars neJupiter; iKuiper Belt ngale kweNeptune iqukethe iPluto namanye amaplanethi amancane. Inkanyezi enomsila isuka ku-Oort Cloud.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp4: Amandla adonsela phansi abamba yonke into ku-orbit. I-Escape velocity: isivinini esidingekayo ukuze ugqashule kumandla adonsela phansi omzimba — Umhlaba ungu ~11.2 km/s; eyeNyanga ingu ~2.4 km/s.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_task: Dala umdwebo onezichasiselo wesistimu sonozungezilanga. Ngeplanethi ngayinye: sho ubukhulu bayo obuhlobene noMhlaba, inkathi ye-orbital, isici esisodwa esiyingqayizivele, nokuthi ingabe ingasekela ukuphila. Maka ibhande le-asteroid kanye ne-Kuiper Belt. Chaza umthetho wesibili ka-Kepler usebenzisa umdwebo wakho.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_desc: Izinkanyezi aziyona ingunaphakade - ziyazalwa, ziphile, futhi ziyafa, ngokuvamile ngokuqhuma okumangalisayo. Ukudalelwa kwenkanyezi kuncike ngokuphelele ebuningini bayo. ILanga ekugcineni lizokhula libe umdondoshiya obomvu bese ligoqeka libe yinto encane emhlophe, kuyilapho izinkanyezi ezinkulu kakhulu zigcina njengezinkanyezi ezinkulu ne-neutron noma izimbobo ezimnyama. Zonke izakhi ezisinda kune-hydrogen zakhiwe ezinkanyezini.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp0: Izinkanyezi zakheka ku-nebulae (amafu amakhulu egesi nothuli) lapho amandla adonsela phansi edala ukuthi izigaxana zigoqe futhi zishise kuze kuthungeleke ukuhlanganiswa kwe-nuclear — ukuzalwa kwe-protostar, bese kuba inkanyezi eyinhloko elandelanayo.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp1: Ukulandelana okuyinhloko: izinkanyezi zichitha ingxenye enkulu yokuphila kwazo zixubanisa i-hydrogen ne-helium esimweni esizinzile. ILanga belilokhu likuchungechunge oluyinhloko iminyaka engu-~ 4.6 billion futhi selisele ~ 5 billion.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp2: Umdwebo we-Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) uhlela izinkanyezi ngokukhanya ngokumelene nezinga lokushisa. Ukulandelana okuyinhloko kuhamba nge-diagonally; ama-red giants (phezulu kwesokudla) nama-white dwarfs (phansi kwesokunxele) aphumile kulo mugqa.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp3: Izinkanyezi ezinobunzima obuphansi (njengeLanga): ukulandelana okuyinhloko → umdondoshiya obomvu → i-planetary nebula → i-white dwarf → (ekugcineni) emnyama emnyama.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp4: Izinkanyezi ezinesisindo esikhulu: ukulandelana okuyinhloko → i-supergiant ebomvu → ukuqhuma kwe-supernova (kudala izakhi ezisindayo kunensimbi, kuzisakaze emkhathini) → inkanyezi yenutroni noma umgodi omnyama.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_task: Dweba izindlela ezimbili zokuziphendukela kwezinkanyezi kumdwebo wakwa-HR: owodwa owenkanyezi efana neLanga, owenkanyezi ngokuphindwe izikhathi ezingu-20. Esigabeni ngasinye: sho igama, isilinganiso sesikhathi, kanye nenqubo yenuzi eyinhloko eyenzekayo. Chaza ukuthi iyini i-supernova nokuthi kungani ibalulekile ngemvelaphi yezinto eziseMhlabeni.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_name: Ngale kwesimiso sethu sonozungezilanga kunezigidigidi zezinkanyezi eziqoqwe zaba yimithala, futhi ngale kwemithala kukhona indawo yonke ebonakalayo - cishe iminyaka eyizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingama-93 ububanzi kanye neminyaka eyizigidi eziyizinkulungwane eziyi-13.8 ubudala. I-Cosmology - isayensi yemvelaphi kanye nokuziphendukela kwemvelo kwendawo yonke - yembule isithombe esimangalisayo: i-Big Bang, indawo ekhulayo, izinto ezimnyama, namandla amnyama.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_desc: I-Milky Way ingumthala ozungezayo ovinjiwe oqukethe cishe izinkanyezi eziyizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingama-250. ILanga lethu litholakala ku-~27,000 light-years ukusuka esikhungweni se-galactic. Kuthatha iLanga ~ iminyaka eyizigidi ezingama-225 ukuzungeza umthala.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp0: The Milky Way is a barred spiral galaxy containing ~250 billion stars. Our Sun is located ~27,000 light-years from the galactic centre. It takes the Sun ~225 million years to orbit the galaxy.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp1: Izinhlobo ze-Galaxy: i-spiral (njenge-Milky Way ne-Andromeda), i-elliptical (izinkanyezi ezindala, igesi encane), engajwayelekile (akukho umumo ochaziwe, ngokuvamile umphumela wokushayisana kwe-galactic).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp2: Ithiyori ye-Big Bang: ~ eminyakeni eyizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-13.8 edlule, indawo yonke yaqala njengendawo eshisa kakhulu, iminyene futhi ibilokhu ikhula kusukela ngaleso sikhathi. Ubufakazi: imisebe ye-cosmic microwave yangemuva, umthetho kaHubble (imithala ihlehla ngokushesha uma ikude).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp3: I-Dark matter: into engabonakali engakhiphi ukukhanya kodwa amandla adonsela phansi abamba imithala ndawonye. Yenza kufika ku-27% wamandla amakhulu omkhathi. Imvelo yayo ayaziwa.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp4: Amandla amnyama: amandla angaqondakali aqhuba ukwanda okusheshisayo kwendawo yonke. Yakha ~ 68% wendawo yonke. Izinto ezijwayelekile (izinkanyezi, amaplanethi, igesi) zingama-5%.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_task: Dala 'ikheli' lomhlaba: iplanethi, isistimu yenkanyezi, umthala, iqembu lomthala, iqoqo elikhulu, indawo yonke ebonakalayo. Nikeza ibanga/usayizi wezinga ngalinye. Bese uchaza izingcezu ezimbili zobufakazi bethiyori ye-Big Bang, kuhlanganise nokuthi iyini imisebe yangemuva ye-cosmic microwave.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_desc: IsiLatini siwulimi oluguquliwe — iziphetho zamagama (hhayi ukuhleleka kwamagama) zibonisa umsebenzi wohlelo. Ubungcweti bokuhlanjululwa kwebizo kanye nokuhlanganisa izenzo kuvula incazelo yanoma yimuphi umbhalo wesiLatini, kusukela kumbiko wempi kaKhesari kuya ezinkondlweni ezidumile zikaVirgil. Uhlelo lolimi lwesiLatini luphinde luthuthukise ukuqonda kwesiNgisi, isiFulentshi, iSpanishi, isiNtaliyane, nesiPutukezi.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp0: IsiLatini sinezinciphiso ezinhlanu zamabizo. Ukwehliswa ngakunye kunezimo eziyisithupha: i-nominative (isihloko), i-accusative (into), i-genitive (impahla), i-dative (into engaqondile), i-ablative (ehlukahlukene), i-vocative (ikheli).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp1: Isibonelo sokuqala sokwehla: i-puella (intombazane) — i-puella (nom.), i-puellam (i-acc.), i-puellae (gen.), i-puellae (dat.), i-puella (abl.), i-puella (voc.). Ubuningi: i-puella, i-puella, i-puellarum, i-puellis, i-puellis, i-puellae.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp2: Izenzo zihlanganiswe kumuntu (1st/2nd/3rd), inombolo (ubunye/ubuningi), inkathi (isikhathi samanje, esingaphelele, esiphelele, esizayo), izwi (elisebenzayo/lenziwayo), kanye nesimo semizwa (inkomba, i-subjunctive, impoqo).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp3: Present tense of amare (to love): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant — I love, you love, he/she/it love, we love, you (pl.) love, they love.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp4: Ukuhleleka kwamagama ngesi-Latin kuyavumelana nezimo ngoba iziphetho zidlulisela umsebenzi: 'Puella aquam portat' kanye ne-'Aquam puella portat' zombili zisho 'Intombazane ephethe amanzi.' Ukugcizelela kuyashintsha kodwa incazelo ihlezi.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_task: Yenqaba ibizo elithi 'dominus' (master, 2nd declension masculine) kuzo zonke izimo eziyisithupha, ebunyeni nasebuningini. Bese uhlanganisa 'videre' (ukubona) enkathini yamanje, bonke abantu. Humusha: 'Dominus puellas amat' kanye ne-'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_desc: Ukufunda imibhalo yesiLatini eyiqiniso - uKhesari, uCicero, uVirgil, u-Ovid - kukuxhumanisa neminyaka eyizi-2,000 yemicabango yaseNtshonalanga, umthetho, izincwadi, nesayensi. Ikhono lokuhumusha lakha ukunemba kokuhlaziya, isineke, kanye nekhono lokusebenza ngemisho eyinkimbinkimbi. Ngisho nemibhalo elula yembula izindinganiso zamaRoma, umlando, kanye nenkulumo-nkulumo.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp0: Isu lokuhumusha: khomba isenzo kuqala (sikutshela isenzo kanye nenkathi), bese kuba isihloko (okuqokiwe), bese kuba umenziwa (okusolayo), bese kuba ezinye izakhi.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp1: 'De Bello Gallico' kaKhesari ibhalwe ngesiLatini esicacile, sezempi - ilungele abaqalayo. Izinkulumo zikaCicero zisebenzisa izinkulumo eziyinkimbinkimbi. 'Aeneid' kaVirgil iyinkondlo enemitha nolimi olungokomfanekiso.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp2: Izigaba ezingaphansi: i-accusative + infinitive (isitatimende esingaqondile), i-cum clauses (nini/kusukela), izigaba ezihlobene (qui, quae, quod — who, which), result clauses (ut + subjunctive).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp3: Isikhathi esiphelele: izenzo ezedlule ziqediwe. Iziphetho eziphelele ezijwayelekile: -i, -isti, -it, -imus, -istis, -erunt. Isibonelo: amavi = ngithandile / ngithandile.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp4: Amasu okufunda: izinkomba zomongo ziyasiza lapho uhlelo lolimi lungacacile. Sebenzisa ulwazi lwezimpande zamagama — amagama amaningi esiNgisi asuselwa ku-Latin (isb. 'port' from portare = to carry).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_task: Humusha lesi siqephu esivela kuKhesari: 'Milites Romani castrum magnum aedificaverunt. Galli per silvas fugerunt et in montibus se celaverunt.' Hlaziya: khomba isihloko, isenzo, umenziwa, kanye nanoma yimiphi imishwana ehunyushwayo. Yiziphi inkathi izenzo? Kusitshelani lokhu ngalokho osekwenzekile?
learnSch_latin_language_f2_name: Isiko LamaRoma Ngolimi || IsiLatini kwakungelona nje ulimi - kwakuyinqola yempucuko yonke eyakha umthetho, izakhiwo, inkolo, nemicabango yezombangazwe kulo lonke elaseYurophu nasemhlabeni. Imiqondo yamaRoma eshumekwe ngesiLatini - res publica, imperium, senatus, ius - isinike ngokuqondile 'i-republic', 'empire', 'senate', kanye 'nobulungisa'. Ukuqonda leli fa akuhlukaniseki ekuqondeni umlando waseNtshonalanga.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_desc: Ifa lesiLatini: ~ 60% wesilulumagama sesiNgisi sisuselwa kusiLatini noma isiFulentshi esithonywe isiLatini. Amagama esayensi, amagama asemthethweni, kanye nesilulumagama sezokwelapha ayisiLatini kakhulu.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp0: Imiqondo yezomthetho yaseRoma isasetshenziswa: i-habeas corpus (kufanele ukhiqize umzimba — ilungelo lokungaboshwa ngaphandle kwecala), ijaji elincane (ngaphansi kwejaji), uma engekho, i-pro bono, i-ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp1: Iminikelo yenkolo namasiko yamaRoma: ikhalenda (izinyanga eziqanjwe ngonkulunkulu nababusi bamaRoma: uJanuwari/Janus, uMashi/Mars, uJulayi/uJulius Caesar), imiyalo yezakhiwo (uDoric, i-Ionic, iKorinte).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp2: Iziqubulo zesiLatini zisasetshenziswa: carpe diem (bamba usuku), cogito ergo sum (ngicabanga, ngakho-ke ngiyiyo), veni vidi vici (ngaza, ngabona, nganqoba - uJulius Caesar), e pluribus unum (kwabaningi, esisodwa - isiqubulo sase-USA).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp3: Izincwadi zamaRoma: 'Aeneid' kaVirgil (inganekwane edumile yokusungula yaseRoma), 'Metamorphoses' ka-Ovid (izinganekwane zoguquko), izinkulumo zikaCicero, imibhalo kaKhesari yezempi - konke kusafundwa futhi kwafundwa nanamuhla.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp4: Thola amagama esiNgisi ayi-10 asuselwa kuzimpande zesiLatini endimeni eyodwa yanoma iyiphi incwadi. Kokunye: bhala impande yesiLatini, incazelo yayo, kanye negama lesiNgisi. Bese uchaza umqondo owodwa wezomthetho wamaRoma futhi ubonise ukuthi usebenza kanjani ohlelweni lwezomthetho lwesimanje.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_name: I-media literacy yikhono lokufinyelela, ukuhlaziya, ukuhlola, nokudala imidiya. Emhlabeni ogcwele ulwazi - izindaba, inkundla yezokuxhumana, ukukhangisa, ezokuzijabulisa - ikhono lokuhlola imithombo ngokujulile, ukuhlonza ukuchema, nokuqaphela ukukhohlisa kuyikhono lentando yeningi eliyisisekelo. Izakhamizi ezikwazi ukufunda nabezindaba kunzima ukuzikhohlisa.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_desc: Yonke imilayezo yemidiya yakhiwe: yenziwa othile, ngenjongo, izethameli, esebenzisa amasu athile, anemiphumela engaba khona. Uhlaka lwe-CAGE: Ukwakhiwa, Izithameli, Uhlobo, Umphumela.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp0: Ukuchema ezindabeni: ukukhetha ukukhetha (iziphi izindaba ezivezwayo), ukuchema kohlaka (ukuthi zethulwa kanjani), kanye nokuchema kwemithombo (okuzwakala amazwi abo). Yonke imithombo yezindaba inokwenzelela okuthile - umbuzo uthi kungakanani futhi ngakuphi.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp1: Imininingwane engamanga: ulwazi olungamanga lusakazwa ngaphandle kwenhloso yokukhohlisa. I-Disinformation: ulwazi olungamanga ngamabomu oludalelwe ukudukisa. Amawebhusayithi okuhlola amaqiniso (I-Snopes, Iqiniso Eligcwele, I-Politifact) asiza ukuqinisekisa izimangalo.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp2: Amasu okukhangisa: ukukhanga ngokomzwelo, ukuvumela usaziwayo, i-bandwagon ('wonke umuntu uyayisebenzisa'), ukushoda ('ukunikezwa okulinganiselwe'), ukuphindaphinda. Ukukhangisa kusebenza ngokungazi — ngisho noma siwazi amaqhinga.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp3: Ubunikazi bubalulekile: inombolo encane yezinkampani eziphethe imidiya yomhlaba wonke (News Corp, Disney, Google, Meta). Ubunikazi obugxilile bungakhawulela ukuhlukahluka kwemibono.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp4: Khetha indaba eyodwa yezindaba ehlanganiswe izitolo ezintathu ezihlukene (isb. i-athikili ye-BBC, i-tabloid, nokuthunyelwe kwenkundla yezokuxhumana). Qhathanisa: isihloko, iphimbo, ubufakazi obusetshenzisiwe, izingcaphuno zabo zifakiwe, nokuthi yini esele. Linganisa ngayinye ngokwethembeka. Phetha ngokuthi ikuphi okuthembeke kakhulu nokuthi kungani.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_tp2: Ifilimu nemidiya ebonakalayo || Ifilimu ingenye yemidiya yokuxoxa izindaba enamandla kakhulu eyake yasungulwa. Ihlanganisa isithombe, umsindo, ukunyakaza, nokuhlela ukuze kwakhiwe incazelo. Ukufunda 'ukufunda' ifilimu njengombhalo — ukuhlaziya ama-engeli ekhamera, ukukhanya, idizayini yomsindo, nesakhiwo sokulandisa — kuvula ulwazi olucebile lwesinema futhi kukunikeza amathuluzi okudala izindaba zakho ezibukwayo.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_name: Amashothi ekhamera: ukusondelana ngokwedlulele (umzwelo, imininingwane), ukusondela (ukusabela kohlamvu), ishothi emaphakathi (uhlamvu + umongo), ishuthi elide (isilungiselelo), ishothi elide ngokwedlulele (ukuhlukaniswa, ukuma kwezwe). Ngayinye idala imiphumela ehlukene yemizwa.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_desc: Ama-engeli ekhamera: i-engeli ephansi (yenza isihloko sibukeke sinamandla), i-engeli ephezulu (yenza isihloko sibukeke sincane/ sibe sengozini), ileveli yeso (ingathathi hlangothi), i-Dutch tilt (i-unease/tension). Izithombe zephoyinti lokubuka zicwilisa isibukeli ngendlela umlingiswa abuka ngayo.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp0: Ukuhlela: ukusika (ushintsho olusheshayo), fade (kancane kancane kuye kumnyama - iphakamisa ukuhamba kwesikhathi), ncibilikisa (ukugqagqana - kuphakamisa ukuxhumana). Ukuhlela kwe-Montage kudala incazelo ngokulandelana (Eisenstein).
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp1: Umsindo: umsindo we-diegetic (ukhona emhlabeni wefilimu — inkhulumomphendvulwano, izinyathelo), i-non-diegetic (iculo elizwakala izethameli kuphela). Umculo udala isimo sengqondo; ukuthula kudala ukungezwani.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp2: I-Mise-en-scène: yonke into ebekwe ohlakeni - isethi yokuklama, izingubo zokugqoka, ukukhanya, ukuma komlingisi. Isici ngasinye sikhuluma ngencazelo ngamabomu.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp3: Khetha isigcawu esiyimizuzu emi-2 efilimini. Hlaziya: (a) izinhlobo ezintathu zokudubula ezihlukene ezisetshenzisiwe kanye nomthelela wazo, (b) ukukhanya (ukhiye ophezulu = okhanyayo/ojabule noma ukhiye ophansi = umnyama/ongaqondakali?), (c) umsindo (chaza i-diegetic ne-non-diegetic), (d) ukuthi ukuhlela kudala kanjani ijubane. Phetha ngokuthi imuphi umuzwa odalwayo nokuthi kanjani.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp4: Mise-en-scène: everything placed in the frame — set design, costumes, lighting, actor positioning. Each element communicates meaning deliberately.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_task: Choose a 2-minute scene from a film. Analyse: (a) three different shot types used and their effect, (b) lighting (high-key = bright/cheerful or low-key = dark/mysterious?), (c) sound (describe diegetic and non-diegetic), (d) how editing creates pace. Conclude what mood is created and how.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_desc: Izinkundla zokuxhumana ziguqule indlela abantu abaxhumana ngayo, abasebenzisa ngayo izindaba, kanye nobunikazi bamafomu. Baphinde bethula ubungozi obusha: ukukhohlisa kwe-algorithmic, ubuxhwanguxhwangu be-inthanethi, ukuguguleka kobumfihlo, kanye nokuhlukaniswa kwezepolitiki. Ukuqonda ukuthi amapulatifomu asebenza kanjani nokuthi asetshenziswa kanjani ngokugxeka nangokuphepha kubalulekile ukuba isakhamuzi sedijithali.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp0: Ama-algorithms enza okuqukethwe kube ngokwakho ngokusekelwe ekuziphatheni kwakho - lokho okuchofozayo, okuthandayo, nokwabelana ngakho. Lokhu kudala amabhamuza okuhlunga lapho ubona khona kuphela imibono eqinisekisayo, ikhulisa ukuhlukaniswa.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp1: Imodeli yebhizinisi: izinkundla zokuxhumana eziningi zimahhala ngoba idatha yabasebenzisi nokunaka kungumkhiqizo odayiselwa abakhangisi. 'Uma ungakhokhi, ungumkhiqizo.'
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp2: Izigxivizo zedijithali: yonke into oyithumelayo, oyithandayo, noma oseshayo ishiya umkhondo unomphela. Abaqashi bakusasa, amanyuvesi, kanye nabezomthetho bangafinyelela okuqukethwe kwakho okusesidlangalaleni futhi kwesinye isikhathi okuyimfihlo.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp3: Ubuxhwanguxhwangu be-inthanethi: ukuhlukunyezwa okuku-inthanethi okungaziwa, kufinyelele izisulu noma yikuphi, futhi kushiye irekhodi elingunaphakade. Imithelela empilweni yengqondo mibi; kuyicala elisemthethweni emazweni amaningi.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp4: Ama-Deepfakes kanye nemidiya yokwenziwa: I-AI ingakha amavidiyo mbumbulu akholisayo abantu bangempela. Lokhu kwenza ubufakazi obubonakalayo buqhubeke bungathembeki — 'ukubona' akusakholi 'ukukholwa'.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_task: Hlola ubukhona bakho benkundla yezokuxhumana: isiphi isithombe sakho owakha okuthunyelwe kwakho okusesidlangalaleni? Ikubonisani i-algorithm yakho? Ingabe ulandela ama-akhawunti anemibono ephikisanayo? Bese udizayina umhlahlandlela womfundi Wonyaka 7 ngokusetshenziswa kwenkundla yezokuxhumana okuphephile nokubalulekile - faka amathiphu angu-5 aqondile, asebenzayo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_name: Izisekelo zesi-Mandarin: I-Pinyin namathoni || IsiShayina saseMandarin sinezikhulumi ezingaphezu kwebhiliyoni eyodwa emhlabeni wonke futhi siwulimi olukhulunywa kakhulu izikhulumi zomdabu. Ngokungafani nezilimi zama-alfabhethi, isi-Mandarin sisebenzisa amathoni - izinguquko zephimbo ezishintsha incazelo - kanye nesistimu yokubhala ye-logographic. Ukwazi kahle isistimu ye-Pinyin romanisation kanye namathoni amane kuyisinyathelo sokuqala esibalulekile.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_desc: I-Pinyin: isistimu yothando esemthethweni yesi-Mandarin. Isebenzisa izinhlamvu zesiLatini ezinamamaki ethoni ukumela ukuphimisela. Ibalulekile ekufundeni izinhlamvu nokusebenzisa izindlela zokufaka ezidijithali.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp0: Amathoni amane: eyoku-1 (izinga eliphezulu, ā) — 'mā' isho umama. 2nd (rising, á) — 'má' isho i-hemp. Okwesithathu (ukucwilisa, ǎ) - 'mǎ' kusho ihhashi. 4th (falling, à) - 'mà' kusho ukuthethisa. Kanye nethoni engathathi hlangothi (ayikho uphawu).
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp1: Iziqalo (ongwaqa): b, p, m, f, d, t, n, l, g, k, h, j, q, x, zh, ch, sh, r, z, c, s. Okokugcina (onkamisa neziphetho): a, o, e, i, u, ü, ai, ei, ao, ou, an, en, ang, eng, ong, njll.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp2: Imikhonzo ebalulekile: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) - sawubona; 谢谢 (xièxiè) — ngiyabonga; 不客气 (bù kèqì) — wamukelekile; 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) - uxolo; 再见 (zàijiàn) — sala kahle.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp3: Essential greetings: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) — hello; 谢谢 (xièxiè) — thank you; 不客气 (bù kèqì) — you're welcome; 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) — sorry; 再见 (zàijiàn) — goodbye.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp4: Ulimi lwesiMandarin lulula kunezilimi zaseYurophu ngandlela thize: akukho conjugation yesenzo, akukho ubulili bohlelo, akukho iziphetho ubuningi. Ukuhleleka kwamagama (Isihloko-Isenzo-Into) kunencazelo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_task: Lalela amathoni amane ka-'ma' bese uphinda uze ukwazi ukukhiqiza ngalinye ngokugqamile. Bhala 'Ngingumfundi' ngesi-Mandarin usebenzisa i-Pinyin: 'Wǒ shì xuéshēng.' Bese ubhala: 'Ngifuna ukudla irayisi' — 'Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn.' Chaza umehluko encazelweni obangelwa ukushintsha kwephimbo ku-'mā/mǎ'.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_name: Izinhlamvu zesiShayina (汉字, Hànzì) zingezinye zezinhlelo zokubhala ezindala kakhulu emhlabeni, ezinezinhlamvu ezingaphezu kuka-50,000 - nakuba ukufunda nokubhala kudinga ukwazi mayelana nezingu-2,000–3,000 ezivamile. Izinhlamvu akuzona imidwebo engahleliwe — zakhiwe ngezinto ezizwakalayo ezibizwa ngokuthi ama-radicals, ahlinzeka ngemikhondo encazelweni futhi kwesinye isikhathi ukuphimisela.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_desc: Izinhlamvu zibhalwa kugridi eyisikwele futhi zakhiwe imivimbo ngokulandelana kwayo. Imithetho ye-stroke order iqinisekisa ukuvumelana kanye nokusiza inkumbulo: ngokuvamile ukusuka phezulu kuye phansi, kwesobunxele kuye kwesokudla, okuvundlile ngaphambi kokuma mpo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp0: Ama-Radicals: zonke izinhlamvu ziqukethe i-semantic radical ebonisa incazelo. I-水 (i-water radical 氵) ivela ku-海 (ulwandle), 河 (umfula), 泳 (bhukuda). Ukwazi ~200 radicals kuvula amaphethini ezinkulungwaneni zezinhlamvu.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp1: I-Simplified vs. Traditional: Izinhlamvu ezenziwe lula (ezisetshenziswa e-mainland China, Singapore) zine-stroke embalwa. Abalingiswa bendabuko (i-Taiwan, Hong Kong, imiphakathi yaphesheya kwezilwandle) balondoloza amafomu omlando. Isibonelo: uthando — 爱 (okwenziwe lula) vs. 愛 (kwesiko).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp2: I-HSK (Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi): ukuhlolwa kobuchwepheshe okujwayelekile kwesiShayina. HSK 1 = amagama angu-150, HSK 2 = 300, kufika ku-HSK 6 = amagama angu-5,000. Ibhentshimakhi ebalulekile yabafundi baseShayina.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp3: Izinhlamvu ezivamile okufanele uzifunde kuqala: 一二三四五六七八九十 (1–10), 人 (umuntu), 大 (omkhulu), 小 (omncane), 中 (maphakathi/China), 日 (ilanga/usuku), 月 (inyanga/inyanga), 山 (intaba), 山 (intaba), 汱 (intaba), 汱 (intaba).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp4: Funda futhi ubhale (ngokulandelana kwe-stroke) izinombolo 1-10 ngezinhlamvu zesiShayina. Bese ufunda izinhlamvu ezinhlanu usebenzisa ama-radicals azo njengezinsiza zenkumbulo — chaza ukuxhumana ngakunye. Ekugcineni, bhala igama lakho ngesi-Pinyin bese ukhetha izinhlamvu zesiShayina ezifanele zalo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_tp1: Esenziwe lula uma kuqhathaniswa nezinhlamvu zendabuko
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_name: Ukufunda isi-Mandarin esixoxayo kuvula iminyango yezingxoxo ezingaba yizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-1.4 kanye nelinye lamasiko omhlaba anempilo. Izihloko ezibalulekile - izingeniso, isikhathi, ukuthenga, ukudla, izikhombisi-ndlela - zinikeza ulwazimagama olusebenzayo lokuxhumana kwansuku zonke. Ukujwayela kohlelo lolimi lwesiShayina kwenza inkhulumomphendvulwano ifinyeleleke ngokumangazayo uma amathoni nesilulumagama esiyisisekelo sekwaziwa kahle.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_desc: Isakhiwo somusho: Isihloko + Isikhathi + Indawo + Isenzo + Into. Isibonelo: 我 (I) 明天 (kusasa) 在图书馆 (emtatsheni wezincwadi) 学习 (isifundo) 中文 (isiShayina) = 我明天在图书馆学习中文.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp0: Ukubuza imibuzo: engeza u-吗 (ma) esitatimendeni semibuzo yebo/cha. 你是学生 (ungumfundi) → 你是学生吗? (Ungumfundi?). Noma sebenzisa amagama ombuzo: 什么 (shénme, ini), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, kuphi), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, nini).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp1: Asking questions: add 吗 (ma) to a statement for yes/no questions. 你是学生 (you are a student) → 你是学生吗? (Are you a student?). Or use question words: 什么 (shénme, what), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, where), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, when).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp2: Izinombolo namanani: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). Ezitolo: 這个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) — Yimalini le? 太贵了 (tài guì le) — Kubiza kakhulu! 便宜一点 (piányí yīdiǎn) — Sicela ushibhe kancane.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp3: Ukudla noku-oda: 我要一碗米饭 (Wǒ yào yī wǎn mǐfàn) — Ngifuna indishi yerayisi. 我不吃肉 (Wǒ bù chī ròu) — Angiyidli inyama. 好吃! (Hǎochī!) — Kumnandi!
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp4: Umongo wamasiko: ukushintshanisa amakhadi ebhizinisi ngezandla ezimbili; ukukhuluma nabadala ngokusemthethweni; ukubaluleka kwe-面子 (miànzi, 'face' — reputation, dignity); inhlonipho yokuphana izipho. Ulimi namasiko akuhlukaniseki.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_task: Lingisa (bhala noma rekhoda) ingxoxo endaweni yokudlela yamaShayina. Faka phakathi: ukubingelela uweta, ukubuza ukuthi yini enhle, uku-oda izitsha ezimbili nesiphuzo (usebenzisa amagama okulinganisa afanele), ukubuza inani, nokuvalelisa. Khomba okungenani ukuhwebelana okungu-10. Chasisa nge-Pinyin nokuhumusha kwesiNgisi.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_tp2: Ukudla, isiko, kanye nempilo yansuku zonke
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_desc: Ukushintsha kwesimo sezulu kuyinselelo enkulu yenkathi yethu. Ukukhishwa kwabantu kwamagesi abamba ukushisa kufudumeza Umhlaba ngezinga elingakaze libonwe, kuphazamisa isimo sezulu, ukuncibilika kweqhwa, nesimiso esisongela imvelo nemiphakathi yabantu. Ukuqonda isayensi - umjikelezo wekhabhoni, izindawo zokuthipha, kanye nezihibe zempendulo - kubalulekile kunoma yisiphi isakhamuzi esinolwazi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp0: Umjikelezo wekhabhoni: I-CO₂ ihamba phakathi komkhathi, izilwandle, umhlaba (izitshalo nge-photosynthesis), nezinto eziphilayo (ngokuphefumula). Ukushiswa kwezinto ezimbiwa phansi kukhipha ikhabhoni egcinwe izigidi zeminyaka, okuphazamisa umjikelezo.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp1: Umphumela we-greenhouse: imisebe yelanga ifudumeza Umhlaba; Umhlaba ukhipha imisebe ye-infrared; amagesi abamba ukushisa (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O vapour) amuncela futhi akhiphe kabusha ukushisa, afudumale phezulu. Ngaphandle kwawo, uMhlaba ubuyoba -18°C; ngayo (yemvelo), 15°C; ngcono = ukufudumala okuyingozi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp2: Isimo samanje (2024): i-CO₂ yomkhathi idlula 420 ppm (ngaphambi kwemboni: 280 ppm). Izinga lokushisa elimaphakathi lomhlaba likhuphuke ngo-1.2°C ngaphezu kwamazinga angaphambi kwezimboni. Isivumelwano saseParis sihlose ukunciphisa izinga lokushisa libe ngu-1.5°C.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp3: Amaphuzu anikeza izeluleko zesimo sezulu: imikhawulo lapho izinguquko ziba ukuziqinisa. I-permafrost encibilikayo ikhipha i-CH₄; ukuncibilika kweqhwa lase-Arctic kuveza ulwandle olumnyama, kubambe ukushisa okwengeziwe; Ukugawulwa kwamahlathi e-Amazon kubeka engcupheni yokuguqula ihlathi lemvula libe yi-savanna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp4: Ubulungiswa besimo sezulu: amazwe asathuthuka anikela kancane ekukhiqizweni kwegesi kodwa ahlushwa kakhulu imithelela yesimo sezulu (ukukhuphuka kwezinga lolwandle, ukushisa okukhulu, ukwehluleka kwezitshalo). Ubukhulu bokuziphatha kanye nezepolitiki besenzo sezulu azihlukaniseki nesayensi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_task: Dweba futhi uchaze umjikelezo wekhabhoni, ubonisa ukugeleza kwemvelo kanye nokuphazamiseka komuntu. Bala: uma izwe likhipha i-500 Mt CO₂ ngonyaka futhi litshala izihlahla ezithatha i-50 Mt / ngonyaka ngenkathi ishintshela ezintweni ezivuselelekayo zonga i-100 Mt / ngonyaka, mingaki iminyaka yokufinyelela i-net zero (kungacabangi izinyathelo ezintsha)? Linganisa izinyathelo ezintathu ezengeziwe izwe elingazithatha.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp2: Amaphuzu amathiphu kanye nobulungiswa besimo sezulu
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_desc: Izinhlobonhlobo zezinto eziphilayo - izinhlobonhlobo zezinto eziphilayo eMhlabeni - ziyisisekelo sezinto eziphilayo ezinempilo ezisinikeza ukudla, amanzi ahlanzekile, imithi kanye nesimo sezulu esizinzile. Njengamanje sibhekene nokushabalala kwenqwaba yesithupha, okuqhutshwa ukucekelwa phansi kwezindawo zokuhlala, ukungcoliswa komhlaba, izinhlobo ezihlaselayo kanye nokushintsha kwesimo sezulu. Ukuqonda izimiso zemvelo kwembula ukuthi kungani zonke izinhlobo zezilwane ezilahlekile zibalulekile.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp0: Amasevisi e-ecosystem: izinzuzo zemvelo ezinikezayo mahhala — impova (ibalulekile ku-75% wezitshalo zokudla), ukuhlanzwa kwamanzi, ukulawulwa kwezikhukhula, ukugcinwa kwekhabhoni, ukwakheka kwenhlabathi, nokuvikelwa kogu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp1: Ukushabalala kwenqwaba yesithupha: izinhlobo zezilwane zizoshabalala ngokushesha ngokuphindwe ka-100–1,000 kunezinga lemvelo elingemuva. ~1 million izinhlobo ezisengozini njengamanje. Izimbangela eziyinhloko: ukushintsha kokusetshenziswa komhlaba (ukulahlekelwa indawo yokuhlala), ukuxhashazwa ngokweqile, ukungcola, izinhlobo ezihlaselayo, ukushintsha kwesimo sezulu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp2: Izinhlobo ze-Keystone: izinhlobo ezidlala indima enkulu ngokungenakulinganiswa ku-ecosystem yazo. Ukuzisusa kubangela ukuwa kwe-ecosystem - isb. izimpisi e-Yellowstone zazilawula izinyamazane, okwavumela uhlaza ukuba lubuyele, luthinta imifula.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp3: Ama-Biomes: imiphakathi emikhulu yezemvelo echazwa isimo sezulu nezimila - amahlathi emvula ashisayo (ubuningi bezinhlobonhlobo zezinto eziphilayo), amahlathi ashisayo, indawo enotshani/i-savanna, ugwadule (izimo ezimbi kakhulu), i-tundra (i-permafrost), ulwandle (i-biome enkulu kunazo zonke).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp4: Amasu okongiwa kwemvelo: izindawo ezivikelekile (iziqiwu kazwelonke, iziqiwi zasolwandle), ukugaywa kabusha (ukubuyisela izinhlobo zemvelo nezinqubo), ukongiwa kwe-ex-situ (ama-zoo, amabhange embewu), isivumelwano se-CITES (silawula ukuhwebelana kwezilwane ezisengozini).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_task: Cwaninga nge-ecosystem eyodwa esengozini (isb. izixhobo zamakhorali, ihlathi lemvula lase-Amazon, i-peat bogs). Nge-ecosystem oyikhethile: (a) chaza ukuhlukahluka kwayo kwemvelo, (b) chaza izinsongo ezintathu, (c) linganisa inani lezomnotho lamasevisi ayo e-ecosystem, (d) hlola amasu amathathu okonga imvelo nokusebenza kwawo.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_name: Ukusimama kusho ukuhlangabezana nezidingo zamanje ngaphandle kokubeka engcupheni ikhono lezizukulwane ezizayo ukuhlangabezana nezazo (incazelo yeBrundtland, 1987). Ukushintshela emhlabeni osimeme kudinga izinguquko emandleni, ekudleni, kwezokuthutha, nasekusetshenzisweni - futhi kuhilela wonke umuntu kusukela kohulumeni nezinkampani kuya kubantu ngabanye.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_desc: Izinjongo Zokuthuthukiswa Okusimeme (ama-SDG): Imigomo eyi-17 eyamukelwe yiwo wonke amazwe angamalungu e-UN ngo-2015, eqondise ubumpofu, ezempilo, imfundo, amandla ahlanzekile, isenzo sezulu, kanye nokuhlukahluka kwemvelo ngo-2030.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp0: Amandla avuselelekayo: amandla elanga, umoya, amanzi, i-geothermal, namandla ahamba ngamagagasi akhiqiza ugesi onokukhipha okuncane kwesisi esibamba ukushisa. Izindleko zelanga nezomoya zehle ngo-90%+ kusukela ngo-2010 - manje ziyimithombo yamandla eshibhe kunayo yonke eyake yakhiwa.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp1: Umnotho oyindilinga: esikhundleni se-take-make-dispose, izinto ezisetshenziswayo ziphinda zisetshenziswe, zilungiswe, futhi zigaywe kabusha kumaluphu avaliwe. Yehlisa ukumosha, yonga izinsiza, futhi idale namathuba emisebenzi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp2: Izinhlelo zokudla: ezolimo zibalelwa ku- ~25% wesisi esingcolisa umoya emhlabeni. Ukunciphisa ukusetshenziswa kwenyama (ikakhulukazi inyama yenkomo), ukusika imfucuza yokudla, nokushintshela ekulimeni okusimeme (organic, agroforestry) yizici ezinkulu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp3: Isenzo somuntu ngamunye sibalulekile: izinyathelo zekhabhoni zihluka kakhulu. Ukundiza, ukudla inyama, nokushayela izimoto zikaphethiloli kuyisinqumo somuntu esinomthelela omkhulu kakhulu. Kepha uguquko oluhlelekile - inqubomgomo kahulumeni, ukusebenza kwebhizinisi, ingqalasizinda - kunomthelela omkhulu kakhulu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp4: Bala i-carbon footprint yakho yanyanga zonke usebenzisa i-calculator eku-inthanethi. Khomba imisebenzi yakho emithathu enomthelela omkhulu. Cwaninga futhi uphakamise inguquko eyodwa yomuntu siqu kanye noshintsho olulodwa lwesistimu (uhulumeni noma inqubomgomo yebhizinisi) olunganciphisa umkhondo wakho. Okwamanje: umkhondo wamanje, umkhondo oqondiwe, nomugqa wesikhathi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp0: Umnotho oyindilinga || Amasistimu okudla kanye nesenzo somuntu ngamunye ngokumelene nesistimu
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp2: Food systems and individual vs. systemic action
learnUni_mathematics_f5_desc: Ukuhlaziya kwangempela kuyisisekelo esiqinile sokubala, okufakazela imiphumela mayelana nemikhawulo, ukuqhubeka, ukuhlukanisa, nokuhlanganisa kusetshenziswa izincazelo ezinembile zika-ε-δ. Ithatha indawo yokucabanga enembile ngezimpikiswano ezinengqondo ezingangeni manzi - ushintsho oluyisisekelo ekuvuthweni kwezibalo oludingekayo ezingeni lenyuvesi.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp0: ε-δ umkhawulo: lim_{x→a} f(x) = L kusho ukuthi ε>0 ngayinye kukhona δ>0 ngendlela yokuthi 0<|x−a|<δ isho |f(x)−L|<ε. Lokhu kususa ukungaqondakali emcabangweni 'wokusondela'.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp1: I-Bolzano-Weierstrass theorem: konke ukulandelana okuhlanganisiwe kokuthi ℝⁿ kunokulandelana okuguquguqukayo. I-Heine-Borel: isethi engaphansi ethi ℝⁿ ihlangene uma ivaliwe futhi iboshwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp2: Ithiyori Yenani Elimaphakathi: uma u-f eqhubekayo kokuthi [a,b] kanye no-f(a) kanye no-f(b) benezimpawu eziphambene, kukhona u-c ∈ (a,b) no-f(c) = 0. Kufakazelwe ngokuqinile kusuka ekupheleleni kokuthi ℝ.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp3: Ukuqhubeka okufanayo: u-δ owodwa usebenza kubo bonke x kanyekanye — unamandla kunokuqhubeka okuqondile. Wonke umsebenzi oqhubekayo kusethi ehlangene uyaqhubeka ngokufanayo.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp4: I-Riemann vs. Lebesgue integral: okubalulekile kwe-Lebesgue kwelula okuka-Riemann ngokulinganisa amasethi (ithiyori yokulinganisa) futhi isingatha imisebenzi eminingi kakhulu, okuhlanganisa imikhawulo yokulandelana.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_task: Usebenzisa incazelo ethi ε-δ, fakazela ukuthi lim_{x→3} (2x−1) = 5. Bese usebenzisa i-IVT ukukhombisa ukuthi u-x⁵ − x − 1 = 0 unesixazululo okungenani esisodwa sangempela. Fakazela ukuthi u-f(x) = 1/x akaqhubeki ngokufanayo ku-(0,1) kodwa ungo-[0.5, 2].
learnUni_mathematics_f6_desc: I-algebra ye-Abstract ihlanganisa ukusebenza kwe-arithmetic ezakhiweni ezingacacile: amaqembu (ukusebenza okukodwa), izindandatho (imisebenzi emibili), nezinkambu (imisebenzi emibili enokuphambene). Lokhu kuhlanganisa izibalo ezihlukene futhi kusekela i-cryptography yesimanje (amajika ayi-elliptic phezu kwezinkambu ezinomkhawulo) kanye ne-physics (amaqembu e-symmetry ku-particle physics).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp0: Ama-axiom eqembu: ukuvalwa (a★b ∈ G), ukuhlangana ((a★b)★c = a★(b★c)), ubunikazi (e★a = a), okuphambene (a★a⁻¹ = e). Izibonelo: (ℤ+), (ℚ\{0},×), iqembu le-dihedral Dₙ (ama-symmetries we-n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp1: Ithiyori kaLagrange: uma u-H eyiqembu elincane leqembu G, bese kuba ngu-|H| ihlukanisa |G|. Isexwayiso: ukuhleleka kwanoma iyiphi into ehlukanisa |G|. Amaqembu amancane avamile avumela ukwakhiwa kweqembu le-quotient G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp2: Ithiyori yokukhala: (R+,×) lapho (R+) kuyiqembu le-abelia, × ihlanganisa futhi iyasabalalisa. Izizinda ezihlanganisiwe (azikho izihlukanisi ezinguziro). Imibono ihlanganisa amaqoqo amancane amaringi. Izizinda ezinhle eziyinhloko (ama-PID): konke okuhle okukhiqizwe into eyodwa.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp3: Izinkambu: yonke i-elementi ye-nonzero inokuphenduka okuphindaphindekayo. Izibonelo: ℚ, ℝ, ℂ, nezinkambu ezinomkhawulo 𝔽_p = ℤ/pℤ (p prime). Izinkambu eziphelile zisekela ukubethela kwe-AES kanye namakhodi okulungisa amaphutha.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp4: Ithiyori ye-Galois: ixhuma izimpande ze-polynomials nethiyori yeqembu. Iqembu le-Galois le-polynomial lithwebula ama-symmetries ezimpande zayo. I-polynomial ixazululeka ngama-radicals uma iqembu layo le-Galois liyiqembu elingaxazululeka - ichaza ukungaxazululeki kwezibalo ezijwayelekile ze-degree≥5.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_task: Fakazela ukuthi ℤ₆ ngaphansi kokwengezwa yiqembu. Thola wonke ama-subgroups futhi uqinisekise ithiyori kaLagrange. Fakazela ℤ₂×ℤ₃ ≅ ℤ₆ ngokubonisa i-isomorphism esobala. Bese ubonisa ℤ₂×ℤ₂ ≇ ℤ₄ ngokuthola indawo ebahlukanisayo.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_desc: Ukuhlaziya okuyinkimbinkimbi kunweba ukubala kuye emisebenzini yokuhlukahluka okuyinkimbinkimbi. Imisebenzi ye-Holomorphic (eyinkimbinkimbi-ehlukile) ihlukaniseka ngokungenamkhawulo futhi ifaka ikhodi yolwazi lomhlaba kudatha yendawo. Ithiyori esemqoka ye-Cauchy, i-calculus yensalela, kanye nemephu evumelanayo iyenza ibe namandla kuyo yonke i-physics, ubunjiniyela, kanye nethiyori yezinombolo.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp0: Ukwehlukanisa okuyinkimbinkimbi: f'(z) = lim_{h→0} [f(z+h)−f(z)]/h (h ∈ ℂ). Izibalo ze-Cauchy-Riemann: uma u-f = u+iv ethi i-holomorphic kusho ukuthi ∂u/∂x = ∂v/∂y kanye no-∂u/∂y = −∂v/∂x.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp1: Ithiyori ebalulekile ye-Cauchy: ye-holomorphic f ngaphakathi kanye nekhontoyutha elula evaliwe C, ∮_C f(z) dz = 0. Ifomula ye-Cauchy: f(z₀) = (1/2πi) ∮_C f(z)/(z−z₀) dz.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp2: Uchungechunge luka-Taylor no-Laurent: imisebenzi ye-holomorphic inweba njengochungechunge lwamandla. Uchungechunge lwe-Laurent luvumela amandla amabi - abalulekile eduze kobunye obubodwa (izigxobo, ubunye obubalulekile).
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp3: Ithiyori yensalela: ∮_C f(z) dz = 2πi × Σ Res(f, zₖ) yazo zonke izigxobo zₖ ngaphakathi kwe-C. Insalela ku-simple pole z₀: Res = lim_{z→z₀} (z−z₀)f(z). Isetshenziselwa ukuhlola okuhlanganisiwe kwangempela ngokukhetha okuhlakaniphile kwekhonta.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp4: Ukumepha okuvumelanayo: imisebenzi ye-holomorphic eno-non-zero ogcina ama-engeli endaweni. Ukuguqulwa kwe-Möbius kwemephu imibuthano/imigqa ukuya emibuthanweni/imigqa. Isetshenziswa ku-fluid dynamics, electrostatics, kanye ne-cartography.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_task: Qinisekisa ukuthi u-f(z)=z² une-holomorphic usebenzisa izibalo ze-Cauchy-Riemann. Bala ∮_{|z|=2} dz/(z²−1) usebenzisa i-theorem yensalela: thola izigxobo, hlola ukuthi yiziphi ezingaphakathi |z|=2, hlanganisa izinsalela, bese usebenzisa i-theoem. Qinisekisa ngezingxenye ezincane.
learnUni_physics_f2_desc: Izibalo zika-Maxwell zihlanganisa ugesi, uzibuthe, nezinto ezibonakalayo zibe uhlaka olulodwa oluhle. Babikezela amaza kagesi ahamba ngo-c, achaza imisebe, futhi akha isisekelo sabo bonke ubunjiniyela bukagesi. Ukuziqonda ezingeni le-vector calculus kuwuphawu lwemfundo yefiziksi.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp0: Izibalo zikaMaxwell: ∇·E = ρ/ε₀, ∇·B = 0, ∇×E = −∂B/∂t, ∇×B = μ₀(J + ε₀∂E/∂t). Ndawonye ahlanganisa zonke izenzakalo ze-electromagnetic classical.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp1: Amagagasi kagesi: esikhaleni esikhululekile, u-E no-B anelisa ∇²E = μ₀ε₀∂²E/∂t², anikeza isivinini samagagasi c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀) ≈ 3×10⁸ m/s. Ukukhanya kuyigagasi likagesi.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp2: I-Poynting vector S = (1/μ₀) E×B: isiqondiso kanye nezinga lokugeleza kwamandla kagesi. Ukucindezela kwemisebe: Amaza e-EM athwala umfutho p = U/c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp3: Izimo zomngcele ezindaweni ezibonakalayo: i-tangential E kanye no-B evamile kuyaqhubeka. Inquma ukuboniswa kanye nokuphindwaphindwa (izibalo ze-Fresnel zinikeza ama-amplitudes; umthetho ka-Snell unikeza ama-engeli).
learnUni_physics_f2_kp4: Ukunwetshwa kwe-Multipole: kude nokusabalalisa kwenkokhiso, izinkambu zibuswa amagama aholayo — i-monopole (1/r²), i-dipole (1/r³), i-quadrupole (1/r⁴). Ama-dipoles ama-oscillating asakaza amagagasi e-EM - isisekelo sama-antenna.
learnUni_physics_f2_task: Kusukela ezilinganisweni zika-Maxwell ku-vacuum (ρ=0, J=0), thola isibalo samagagasi kagesi ka-E. Bonisa c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀). Bese ubhala izinkambu zegagasi lendiza elisakazeka ku-z-direction futhi ubonise ukuthi u-E, B, no-k ancikene futhi athi |E|/|B| = c.
learnUni_physics_f3_desc: Imishini yezibalo ithola i-macroscopic thermodynamics kusukela ekuziphatheni kwezibalo kwezakhi ezincane kakhulu. Ukusatshalaliswa kwe-Boltzmann, umsebenzi wokuhlukanisa, kanye ne-entropy njengelogi ye-microstates ixhuma i-atomic physics ku-thermal phenomena yansuku zonke — ukusuka emisebeni yomzimba omnyama ukuya ekuguqukeni kwesigaba.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp0: Ukusabalalisa kwe-Boltzmann: amathuba e-microstate enamandla E ngu-P ∝ e^{−E/k_BT}. Izinga lokushisa eliphakeme livumela ukusebenza kwezimo zamandla aphezulu. Le equation eyodwa ingaphansi kwekhemistri, i-astrophysics, kanye nebhayoloji.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp1: Umsebenzi wokuhlukanisa Z = Σᵢ e^{−βEᵢ} (β=1/k_BT). Amandla amahhala F = −k_BT ln Z. Wonke amanani e-thermodynamic alandela: ⟨E⟩ = −∂ln Z/∂β, entropy S = −∂F/∂T, ingcindezi P = −∂F/∂V.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp2: I-Boltzmann entropy: S = k_B ln Ω (Ω = inombolo yama-microstates). Umthetho wesibili: Ω inyuka ngokuzenzakalelayo → S njalo ikhuphuka kumasistimu angawodwa. Umcibisholo wesikhathi uvela kuzibalo.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp3: Izibalo ze-Quantum: ama-bosons alalela ukusatshalaliswa kwe-Bose-Einstein (izinhlayiya eziningi esimweni ngasinye → uketshezi oluningi, ama-lasers, i-Bose-Einstein condensate). Ama-Fermions alalela i-Fermi-Dirac (isifunda esisodwa → isakhiwo se-electron yezinsimbi, ama-white dwarfs, izinkanyezi ze-neutron).
learnUni_physics_f3_kp4: Izinguquko zesigaba: ekushiseni okubalulekile kwe-Tc, ipharamitha ye-oda iyagxuma (i-oda lokuqala) noma ikhuphuka ngokuqhubekayo (i-2nd order). Imodeli yokuqamba ithwebula i-ferromagnetism. Eduze kwephuzu elibucayi: imithetho yokukala yendawo yonke, ubude bokuhlobana obuhlukene, izigaba zendawo yonke.
learnUni_physics_f3_task: Thola umsebenzi wokuhlukanisa wesistimu enamazinga amabili (amandla 0 kanye no-ε). Thola ⟨E⟩, C_V = ∂⟨E⟩/∂T, kanye ne-entropy S. Sketch C_V vs. T (Schottky peak). Humusha ukuphakama ngokomzimba. Sebenzisa isici se-Boltzmann ukuze ulinganise ingxenye yama-molecule esimweni sokujabula kokuthi T = 300 K uma ε = 0.025 eV.
learnUni_physics_f4_desc: I-Quantum mechanics iyitiyori ebonakalayo evivinywe ngokunembe kakhulu, elungile ezindaweni eziyi-12 zamadesimali ekuqaguleni kwe-QED. Ingena esikhundleni se-trajectories yakudala ngamagagasi aguqukayo ngaphansi kwesibalo se-Schrödinger futhi ichaza ama-athomu, ama-molecule, ama-lasers, ama-semiconductors, nezikena ze-MRI. Kuyadida futhi ngokwefilosofi.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp0: Umsebenzi we-Wavefunction ψ(x,t): |ψ|² amathuba okuminyana. Ukujwayela: ∫|ψ|² dx = 1. Ukuvela kwesikhathi: iℏ ∂ψ/∂t = Ĥψ. Izimo ezinganyakazi: Ĥψ_n = E_n ψ_n — i-energy eigenstates.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp1: Isikwele esingenamkhawulo kahle: ψ_n = √(2/L) isono(nπx/L), E_n = n²π²ℏ²/(2mL²). Amazinga e-Quantised energy - kuchaza i-atomic spectra. Amandla wephoyinti elinguziro E₁ > 0 ngisho naku-T=0.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp2: I-Quantum harmonic oscillator: E_n = (n+½)ℏω, n=0,1,2,... Ukuphakamisa/ukwehlisa ama-opharetha â±. I-Ground state inomsebenzi wamagagasi we-Gaussian. Imodela ukudlidliza kwamangqamuzana nenani lenkundla.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp3: I-athomu ye-Hydrojeni: amandla alinganayo we-Coulomb. Izixazululo ezilebulwe ngezinombolo ze-quantum n (amandla), l (umfutho we-angular), m (magnetic). Izimo ze-Orbital (s, p, d, f) zinquma ukuhlangana kwamakhemikhali.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp4: I-Entanglement kanye nethiyori kaBell: izinhlayiya ezimbili zingahlotshaniswa ngezindlela ezingenakuchazwa izinto eziguquguqukayo zendawo ezifihliwe. Ukungalingani kwe-Bell kuphuliwe ngokuhlola - kufakazela ukungeyona indawo ye-quantum mechanics. Isisekelo se-quantum cryptography.
learnUni_physics_f4_task: Xazulula kahle isikwele esingapheli esingu-1D: bhala u-ψ_n kanye no-E_n. Bala i-E₁ ye-electron ku-L = 1 nm kahle. Izinhlayiya zilungiswa ngo-ψ = (1/√2)(ψ₁ + ψ₂). (a) Ingabe lena i-energy eigenstate? (b) Bala ⟨E⟩. (c) Chaza ukuthi i-⟨x⟩ ishintsha kanjani ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. (d) Chaza ukuthi kwenzekani uma ukala amandla.
learnUni_physics_f5_name: I-Optics & Photonics || I-Optics yesimanje ithatha ukukhanya njengamaza kagesi (wave optics) nanjengama-photon (quantum optics). I-Wave Optics ichaza ukuphazamiseka, i-diffraction, kanye ne-polarization ngokuqondile. I-Photonics - isayensi nobuchwepheshe bokukhiqiza nokulawula ama-photon - isekela ama-lasers, ama-optical fibres, amaseli elanga, kanye nobuchwepheshe be-quantum obusafufusa.
learnUni_physics_f5_desc: I-Wave Optics: ukuphazamiseka kanye nokwehluka kuvela kumgomo we-Huygens-Fresnel (iphoyinti ngalinye elingaphambili lamagagasi liwumthombo wesibili). Ukuhlukana kabili kwe-Young kunikeza isikhala se-fringe Δy = λL/d.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp0: I-Fourier Optics: ilensi yenza uguquko lweFourier endizeni egxile. Ukuhlunga kwendawo - ukuvimbela amaza athile wendawo - kuyisisekelo sokucutshungulwa kwesithombe kanye ne-microscope.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp1: I-Laser physics: ukuguquguquka kwesibalo sabantu okutholwe ngokumpompa i-optical noma ngogesi. Ukukhishwa okukhuthazwayo kukhiqiza ukukhanya okuhambisanayo, oku monochromatic, okuqondisayo. Ama-laser cavities akhetha izindlela. Izicelo: ukuhlinzwa, i-lidar, ama-tweezers optical, ukuskena ibhakhodi.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp2: Izintambo ezibonakalayo: ukukhanya okuphelele kwangaphakathi (i-engeli > i-engeli ebalulekile θ_c = i-arcsin(n₂/n₁)) ibamba ukukhanya kumongo. Imicu yemodi eyodwa yokuxhumana okude; imodi eminingi yamabanga amafushane. I-Attenuation ~0.2 dB/km ku-1550 nm.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp3: I-Quantum optics: izibalo ze-photon (ezihambisanayo vs. ezishisayo vs. ukukhanya okuminyanisiwe), imithombo ye-photon eyodwa, amapheya e-photon abambene (ngokuguqulwa okuzenzakalelayo kwepharamethikhi). Izicelo: Ukusabalalisa ukhiye we-quantum (iphrothokholi ye-BB84), i-quantum teleportation.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp4: I-diffraction grating enemigqa engu-500/mm ikhanyiswa ukukhanya kuka-λ=600 nm. Thola ama-engeli we-m=1 kanye ne-m=2 ye-diffraction order. Bala amandla okuxazulula R = mN ku-N = 1000 imigqa. Bese uklama i-optical fibre enomongo n₁=1.50 kanye ne-cladding n₂=1.45: thola i-engeli ebalulekile kanye nendawo yokuvula izinombolo NA = √(n₁²−n₂²).
learnUni_physics_f5_tp0: I-Laser physics || Imicu yokubona kanye ne-quantum optics
learnUni_physics_f5_tp2: I-Physical chemistry isebenzisa i-physics - thermodynamics, kinetics, quantum mechanics - ezinhlelweni zamakhemikhali. Ichaza ukuthi kungani ukusabela kwenzeka (i-thermodynamics), ukuthi kuqhubeka kanjani ngokushesha (kinetics), nokuthi yini enquma ukwakheka kwamangqamuzana (i-quantum chemistry). Iwumgogodla wetiyori wawo wonke amakhemikhali.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_name: Amandla amahhala e-Gibbs: ΔG = ΔH − TΔS. ΔG <0: ngokuzenzakalelayo; ΔG > 0: okuzenzakalelayo; ΔG = 0: ukulingana. Ekulinganisweni: ΔG° = −RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_desc: Physical chemistry applies physics — thermodynamics, kinetics, quantum mechanics — to chemical systems. It explains why reactions occur (thermodynamics), how fast they proceed (kinetics), and what determines molecular structure (quantum chemistry). It is the theoretical backbone of all chemistry.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp0: Gibbs free energy: ΔG = ΔH − TΔS. ΔG < 0: spontaneous; ΔG > 0: non-spontaneous; ΔG = 0: equilibrium. At equilibrium: ΔG° = −RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp1: I-Chemical kinetics: isilinganiso = k[A]ᵐ[B]ⁿ. I-oda lokuqala: t₁/₂ = ln2/k. I-Arrhenius equation: k = Ae^{−Ea/RT}. Ithiyori yesimo soguquko: isilinganiso esinqunywa i-ΔG‡ (Gibbs energy of transition state).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp2: I-Molecular orbital theory: i-atomic orbitals ihlanganisa (LCAO) ukuze yakhe isibopho (amandla aphansi) kanye ne-antibonding (amandla aphezulu) ama-MO. Ukuhleleka kwebhondi = ½(ukuhlanganisa - ama-electron anqamula ukubopha).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp3: I-Spectroscopy: I-UV-Vis (I-Beer-Lambert: A=εcl, izinguquko zika-elekthronikhi), i-IR (ukudlidliza kwamangqamuzana - izigxivizo zeminwe ezisebenzayo zeqembu), i-NMR (izindawo ezizungezile ze-nuclear spin zinikeza ukuxhumana ne-stereochemistry), i-mass spec (isisindo samangqamuzana nokuhlukana).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp4: Izakhiwo ezihlanganisayo (kuncike enanini lezinhlayiya ezincibilikayo, hhayi ubunikazi): ukuphakama kwephoyinti elibilayo (ΔT_b = K_b m), ukucindezeleka kwendawo yokuqandisa (ΔT_f = K_f m), ukucindezela kwe-osmotic (Π = MRT). Isetshenziswa ku-cryoscopy kanye ne-osmometry.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_task: Ngokusabela okuthi N₂ + 3H₂ → 2NH₃ kokuthi 298 K, ΔH° = −92 kJ/mol kanye ne-ΔS° = −198 J/mol·K. (a) Bala u-ΔG° kanye no-K. (b) Ingabe ukusabela kuyazenzekela kokuthi 298 K? Ngo 600 K? (c) Humusha ukuthi izinga lokushisa nokucindezela kuthinta kanjani isivuno kunqubo ye-Haber. Hlangana nomgomo ka-Le Chatelier.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_desc: I-University organic chemistry ifunda izindlela zokusabela ezingeni le-electron, i-stereochemistry, ukuhlelwa kokuhlanganisa, nokuguqulwa kweqembu elisebenzayo. I-Mastery ibalulekile kwi-pharmacology, isayensi yezinto zokwakha, i-biochemistry, kanye ne-chemical biology.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp0: I-formalism yomcibisholo ogobile: imicibisholo enekhanda eligcwele ibonisa ukunyakaza kwama-electron pair (i-nucleophile ukuya ku-electrophile). Imicibisholo enekhanda eliyingxenye ibonisa izindlela ezinkulu. Yonke imicibisholo kufanele iqale emthonjeni we-electron (ipheya eyodwa noma ibhondi).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp1: Indlela ye-SN2: ukuhlasela okuhlangene kwesinyathelo esisodwa ngemuva → ukuguqulwa kokucushwa (ukuguqulwa kwe-Walden). Okuthandwayo: i-nucleophile eqinile, i-substrate eyinhloko, i-polar aprotic solvent (DMF, DMSO, acetone).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp2: Indlela ye-SN1: izinyathelo ezimbili nge-carbocation emaphakathi. Okuthandwayo: i-tertiary substrate, i-polar protic solvent (amanzi, i-ethanol). Isilinganiso = k[substrate] kuphela. Inikeza i-racemisation.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp3: I-Stereochemistry: izikhungo ze-chiral, ama-enantiomers, ama-diastereomer. Imithetho ye-Cahn-Ingold-Prelog (CIP) yabela ukucushwa kwe-R/S. Umsebenzi wokubuka ulinganiswa nge-polarimetry. I-Thalidomide: I-R-enantiomer yokwelapha, i-S-enantiomer teratogenic - ukubaluleka kokuhlanzeka kwe-stereochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp4: Ukuhlaziywa kwe-Retrosynthetic (Corey): hlela ukuhlanganisa emuva — thola ukunqanyulwa (ukunqamula amabhondi angukhiye) ukuze uveze izinto zokuqala ezitholakala kalula. Ukuvikela isu leqembu, ukuguqulwa kwamaqembu okusebenzayo, kanye nokulandelela isimo se-oxidation kungamakhono abalulekile.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_task: Phakamisa indlela ephelele enemicibisholo egobile yokuthi: (a) Ukusabela kwe-SN2 ka-(R)-2-bromobutane nge-NaOH — bonisa ukulungiselelwa komkhiqizo, (b) ukusabela kwe-SN1 kokuthi (CH₃)₃CBr ngamanzi — bonisa i-carbocation, racemisation, kanye nama-stereoisomers womabili womkhiqizo. Chaza ukuthi kungani i-substrate efanayo ingakwazi ukwenza zombili izindlela kanyekanye.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_desc: I-Inorganic chemistry ihlanganisa amakhemikhali wokuxhumanisa, i-organometallics, izinto zokwakha eziqinile, kanye ne-bioinorganic chemistry. I-Transition metals ne-chemistry yazo ecebile ye-d-orbital isekela i-catalysis yezimboni, izinto ezisebenzayo, nezinqubo ezibalulekile zebhayoloji.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp0: Izakhiwo zokuxhumanisa: i-ion + yensimbi emaphakathi (izisekelo ze-Lewis ezinikela ngamapheya ama-electron). Umphumela we-Chelate: i-polydentate ligands (EDTA) yakha ama-complexes azinzile kune-monodentate - inzuzo ye-thermodynamic evela ku-entropy.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp1: I-Crystal field theory (CFT): i-d-orbitals ihlukaniswa endaweni ye-ligand. Ukuhlukaniswa kwe-Octahedral Δ_o kuhlukanisa amasethi angu-t₂g (phansi) kanye ne-e_g (phezulu). Ama-ligand enkundla aqinile (CN⁻, CO) → enkulu Δ_o → i-spin ephansi. Inkambu ebuthaka (F⁻, H₂O) → encane Δ_o → i-spin ephezulu.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp2: Umbala kanye nezibuthe ezivela ku-CFT: ukuguqulwa kwe-d-d kudonsa ukukhanya okubonakalayo → umbala ohambisanayo oboniwe. Ama-high-spin complexes angama-paramagnetic (ama-electron angabhanqiwe); low-spin kukhona diamagnetic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp3: Ikhemikhali ye-Organometallic: ibhondi ye-metal-carbon (metal carbonyls M(CO)ₙ, metallocenes, catalyst ka-Wilkinson [RhCl(PPh₃)₃] ye-hydrogenation). Umthetho wama-electron angu-18 ubikezela ukuzinza kwezakhiwo ze-organometallic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp4: Ikhemikhali ye-Bioinorganic: I-Fe ku-hemoglobin (ebophezelayo i-O₂), amaqoqo e-Fe-S (ukudluliswa kwe-electron), i-Zn ku-carbonic anhydrase, i-Mg ku-chlorophyll (photosynthesis), i-Cu ku-cytochrome c oxidase (ukuphefumula), i-Co ku-Vitamin B₁₂.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_task: Dweba umdwebo ohlukanisayo we-octahedral we-[Fe(CN)₆]³⁻ kanye ne-[Fe(H₂O)₆]³⁺. Yabela ama-electron usebenzisa i-CFT, nquma isimo sokujikeleza kanye nenombolo yama-electron angabhanqiwe ngayinye. Qagela ukuthi yikuphi okumunca ukukhanya kwamandla aphezulu nokuthi kungani. Bala isimo se-oxidation se-Fe endaweni ngayinye eyinkimbinkimbi futhi uhlonze ama-ligand njengenkambu eqinile noma ebuthakathaka usebenzisa uchungechunge lwe-spectrochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_desc: Ikhemistri yokuhlaziya ihlinzeka ngamathuluzi okuhlonza izinto kanye nokukala ukugxila kwazo kumatrices ayinkimbinkimbi. Amasu okuhlaziya esimanje - i-HPLC, i-GC-MS, i-NMR, ukumuncwa kwe-athomu - abalulekile kuyo yonke imithi, ukuqapha indawo ezungezile, ukuphepha kokudla, i-forensics, kanye nokuxilongwa komtholampilo.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp0: Ukuhlaziywa kwe-Titrimetric: i-acid-base, i-complexometric (EDTA), i-redox, ne-recipitation titrations. Ukutholwa kwephoyinti lokugcina: izinkomba, amamitha we-pH, i-condumetry, i-potentiometry. Izixazululo ezijwayelekile, izindinganiso eziyinhloko, kanye ne-back-titration.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp1: I-Chromatography: Isigaba esimile sibambezela izingxenye ngokwehlukana. I-GC (ukuhlaziya okuguquguqukayo, ukutholwa kokushisa), i-HPLC (engaguquguquki, ukutholwa kwe-UV/fluorescence/MS), IC (ukushintshana kwe-ion), i-SFC (uketshezi oluphakeme kakhulu). Ukulungiswa R = 2(t₂−t₁)/(w₁+w₂).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp2: I-mass spectrometry: i-electron ionization (EI) ikhiqiza ama-radical cations ahlukana ngokwesimo. High-resolution MS inikeza ifomula yamangqamuzana aqondile. I-LC-MS/MS inikeza ukukhetha kumatrices webhayoloji ayinkimbinkimbi.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp3: I-NMR spectroscopy: ¹H NMR: i-chemical shift (δ, ppm) ibonisa indawo ezungezile, ukuhlanganisa (J, Hz) kubonisa ukuxhumana kwe-H okuseduze, ukuhlanganisa kunikeza isilinganiso sezinhlobo ze-H. ¹³C amasu we-NMR ne-2D (COSY, HMBC, NOESY) anquma ukwakheka okugcwele kwe-3D.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp4: Ukuqinisekisa indlela: umkhawulo wokutholwa (i-LOD), umkhawulo wokulinganisa (LOQ), umugqa (R²), ukunemba (% ukutakula), ukunemba (RSD%), ukukhetha (akukho ukuphazamiseka), ukuqina (okungakhiqizwa kabusha kuwo wonke amalebhu). Iyadingeka ekuhanjisweni kokulawula (i-FDA, i-EMA).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_task: I-organic compound engaziwa ibonisa: MW = 122 by MS; I-IR: i-OH ebanzi yokwelula 3200–3500, carbonyl 1680 cm⁻¹; ¹H NMR: δ 7.8 (d, 2H), 7.5 (d, 2H), 3.9 (s, 3H). Phakamisa isakhiwo. Qinisekisa ukubuka ngakunye kwe-spectroscopic. Bese uchaza ukuthi ungayiqinisekisa kanjani indlela ye-HPLC ukuze ulinganise le nhlanganisela kuthebhulethi eyenza imithi.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_name: I-Biochemistry || I-Biochemistry ihlola izinqubo zamakhemikhali zokuphila - i-enzyme catalysis, izindlela ze-metabolic, ukuphindaphinda kwe-DNA, nokusayina kwamaseli. Ihlanganisa amakhemikhali nemithi: ukuqonda i-enzyme kinetics kwenza ukwakheka kwezidakamizwa; ukuqonda i-metabolism kuveza okuhlosiwe kokwelapha isifo sikashukela, umdlavuza, nokukhuluphala; I-DNA biochemistry isekela ukuhlelwa kofuzo kwe-CRISPR.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_desc: I-enzyme kinetics: I-Michaelis-Menten equation v = Vmax[S]/(Km+[S]). I-Km: ukugxila kwe-substrate ku-half-maximal velocity - kubonisa ukuhambisana kwe-enzyme-substrate. I-Vmax: isilinganiso esiphezulu ku-saturate substrate. Ilayini ngesakhiwo se-Lineweaver-Burk (1/v vs. 1/[S]).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp0: Ukuvimbela i-Enzyme: ukuncintisana (i-inhibitor ibopha indawo esebenzayo, ikhulisa i-Km ebonakalayo, i-Vmax ingashintshiwe); okungezona ukuncintisana (i-inhibitor ibopha kwenye indawo, inciphisa i-Vmax, i-Km ingashintshiwe); engaphenduki (covalent - aspirin acetylates COX unomphela).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp1: I-Metabolism: i-catabolism (i-glucose → 2 pyruvate nge-glycolysis, 2 ATP; umjikelezo we-Krebs 2 ATP; i-oxidative phosphorylation ~32 ATP nge-proton gradient yonkana ulwelwesi lwangaphakathi lwe-mitochondrial). Isamba ≈36 ATP ngeglucose ngayinye.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp2: I-DNA biochemistry: i-helix ephindwe kabili iqiniswe ngokumataniswa kwesisekelo kwe-Watson-Crick (A:T, G:C) nokupakishwa kwesisekelo (π-π ukusebenzisana). I-DNA replication semi-conservative: I-DNA polymerase ingeza u-5'→3', idinga i-primer (RNA). Izinga lephutha ~1 kokungu-10⁹ ngemva kokuhlola ukuhlolwa.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp3: Ukwakheka nokugoqeka kwamaprotheni: okuyisisekelo (ukulandelana kwe-amino acid) → okwesibili (α-helix: H-bond i kuya ku-i+4; β-sheet: imicu ehambisanayo noma ephikisanayo) → ephakeme (i-3D fold, i-hydrophobic collapse) → i-quaternary (amayunithi amaningi). Ama-chaperones asiza ukugoqa; ukugoqa okungalungile kubangela izifo (i-Alzheimer, i-Parkinson, izifo ze-prion).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp4: I-enzyme ine-Km = 2 mM kanye ne-Vmax = 60 μmol/min. (a) Bala v kokuthi [S] = 1, 2, 6 mM. (b) Dweba iziza ze-Michaelis-Menten kanye ne-Lineweaver-Burk zazo zombili izifunda ezingavinjiwe nezivimbele ukuncintisana (inhibitor doubles apparent apparent Km). (c) Ukwakhiwa kwezidakamizwa: phakamisa ukuthi ulwazi lwejiyomethri yendawo esebenzayo ye-enzyme lungaqondisa kanjani ukwakheka kwe-transition-state analogue inhibitor.
learnUni_biology_f2_name: I-ecology yasenyuvesi isebenzisa amamodeli obuningi ekuguquguqukeni kwabantu, ukusebenzisana kwezinhlobo zezilwane, kanye nomsebenzi we-ecosystem. I-Conservation biology isebenzisa ithiyori ye-ecological - inani elincane labantu elisebenzayo, i-reserve design, i-corridor ecology - ukuvikela izinhlobonhlobo zezinto eziphilayo emhlabeni oshintsha ngokushesha kwemvelo.
learnUni_biology_f2_desc: Amamodeli wabantu: ukukhula kwelogistic dN/dt = rN(1−N/K) lapho u-r kuyizinga elingaphakathi lokukhula kanye no-K ethwele umthamo. Isivuno esiphezulu esimeme (MSY) esivunwe ku-N = K/2 lapho i-dN/dt iphezulu.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp0: Imodeli ye-predator-prey ye-Lotka-Volterra: dN/dt = rN−aNP (inyamazane); dP/dt = baNP−mP (umzingeli). Izibalo zabantu ziyanyakaza ngomjikelezo - kuboniswa idatha ye-hare-lynx. Ukuhlaziywa kokuqina nge-eigenvalues ​​ye-Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp1: I-Island biogeography (MacArthur & Wilson): S_eq kusuka kubhalansi yokuthuthela kwelinye izwe (yehla ngo-S) kanye nezilinganiso zokushabalala (zikhuphuka nge-S). Iziqhingi ezinkulu, eziseduze zinokunotha kwezinhlobo eziphakeme → Inkulumo-mpikiswano ye-SLOSS ekwakhiweni kwendawo ebekiwe.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp2: Ithiyori ye-Metapopulation (Levins): inethiwekhi yabantu bendawo exhunywe ngokuhlakazeka. Amapheshana athathwe yingxenyana p ayaguquka: dp/dt = cp(1−p) − ep. Ukuhlala okubalulekile okungaphansi lapho ukushabalala komhlaba kungenakugwema.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp3: I-Conservation genomics: amathuluzi ezakhi zofuzo zabantu (i-FST, usayizi wesibalo esisebenzayo Ne, i-inbreeding coefficient F) ihlonza izigaba zofuzo ezihlukene, ilinganise ukugeleza kwezakhi zofuzo, futhi ihlole ukucindezeleka kokuzalanisa ezinhlelweni zokuzalanisa ezivalelwe.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp4: Isibalo sezimpisi ezingama-200 (K=1000, r=0.3/unyaka) sivunwa minyaka yonke. (a) Bala izinga lokukhula kwesibalo sabantu ku-N=200 naku-MSY. (b) Isiphi isivuno saminyaka yonke esilingana nezinga lokukhula kwa-MSY? (c) Isibalo sabantu sesibili esiqhingini esingumakhelwane sine-Ne=15 - yiziphi izingozi lokhu okubhekana nazo, futhi yiziphi izenzo zokongiwa kwemvelo ezifanele?
learnUni_biology_f2_task: A population of 200 wolves (K=1000, r=0.3/yr) is harvested annually. (a) Calculate the population growth rate at N=200 and at MSY. (b) What annual harvest equals the growth rate at MSY? (c) A second population on a neighbouring island has Ne=15 — what risks does this face, and what conservation actions are appropriate?
learnUni_biology_f3_name: I-Cell & Molecular Biology || Ibhayoloji yamaseli ezingeni lenyuvesi iphenya ngokudluliswa kwezimpawu, umjikelezo wamaseli, i-epigenetics, kanye nezindlela zamangqamuzana ezifo. Ibhayoloji yamangqamuzana yesimanje - i-PCR, i-gene cloning, i-RNA-seq, i-CRISPR - inikeza amathuluzi okufunda, ukubhala, nokuhlela ama-genome. Lobu buchwepheshe buguqula imithi, ezolimo, nesayensi eyisisekelo.
learnUni_biology_f3_desc: Ukulawulwa komjikelezo weseli: ama-cyclin nama-CDK (ama-cyclin-dependent kinases) ashayela ukuguqulwa komjikelezo weseli. Ama-CDK inhibitors (p21, p27) asebenza njengamabhuleki. I-Rb tumor suppressor sequesters E2F transcription factor ize yenziwe i-phosphorylated yi-Cyclin D-CDK4/6.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp0: Izindlela zokudlulisa isignali: Ukwenziwa kusebenze kwe-RTK (receptor tyrosine kinase) → i-RAS/MAPK cascade → transcription factor phosphorylation → izinguquko zesisho sofuzo. Indlela ye-PI3K/Akt/mTOR: ukukhula nokuphila. Zombili zivame ukuguqulwa kumdlavuza.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp1: I-Epigenetics: izinguquko ezizuzwayo ekukhulumeni kofuzo ngaphandle kokushintsha kokulandelana kwe-DNA. Ukuguqulwa kwe-Histone (i-acetylation - esebenzayo; i-methylation - incike komongo), i-DNA methylation (izakhi zofuzo ze-CpG methylation), ukulungiswa kabusha kwe-chromatin. Ukuhlelwa kabusha kwe-Epigenetic ku-embryogenesis nomdlavuza.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp2: Ibhayoloji ye-RNA: ukuhlanganisa (ama-spliceosomes asusa ama-intron), okunye ukuhlanganisa (ufuzo olulodwa → amaprotheni amaningi - ~95% wezakhi zofuzo zomuntu zihlukaniswe ngokuhlukile), i-RNA engafaki ikhodi (i-miRNA ithulisa i-mRNA, i-lncRNA ilawula i-chromatin), ama-ribozymes.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp3: I-CRISPR-Cas9: umhlahlandlela we-RNA uqondisa i-Cas9 ukuthi iqondise ukulandelana (eduze nokulandelana kwe-PAM). I-Cas9 ihlukanisa izintambo zombili. Lungisa nge-NHEJ (okunephutha → ukungqongqoza) noma i-HDR (isifanekiso → ukuhlela okunembile). Izicelo: ukwelapha ngofuzo, ezolimo, ucwaningo oluyisisekelo, ukuxilonga.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp4: Iseli lomdlavuza: (1) ukuguqulwa kwe-RAS okusebenzayo, (2) kususwe isakhi sofuzo se-Rb, (3) ukuguqulwa kwe-p53. Landelela imiphumela yamangqamuzana yokushintshashintsha ngakunye ngomjikelezo weseli nezindlela zokusayina. Khomba: iyiphi indawo yokuhlola ehlulekayo ngayinye, imiphi imiphumela yokwanda kwamaseli, kanye namasu amabili okwelapha aqondise lezi zinkinga.
learnUni_biology_f3_tp2: I-Neuroscience ihlanganisa i-molecular biology, physiology, kanye nesayikholoji ukuchaza ukuthi ubuchopho bukhiqiza kanjani ukuziphatha. Ukusuka eziteshini ze-ion kuye kumasekethe e-neural kuya ekwazini, kungomunye wemingcele eyinkimbinkimbi nethokozisayo kubhayoloji. Izifo ze-neurological zithinta umuntu oyedwa kwabangu-6 emhlabeni jikelele - ukuziqonda kudinga ulwazi olujulile lokwakheka nokusebenza kobuchopho.
learnUni_biology_f4_name: Amandla esenzo: i-threshold depolarisation ivula amashaneli e-Na⁺ anagesi kagesi (ukususwa ngokushesha kwe-polarisation ku-+40 mV) → ukungasebenzi kwamashaneli e-Na⁺ + ukuvulwa kwamashaneli e-K⁺ (repolarisation) → hyperpolarisation (isikhathi esiphikisayo). Konke-noma-lutho, kusakazeka ngaphandle kokuncishiswa nge-axon.
learnUni_biology_f4_desc: Ukudluliswa kwe-Synaptic: I-Ca²⁺ iqala ukuhlangana kwevesicle ye-SNARE-mediated → ukukhululwa kwe-neurotransmitter → ukubophezela kwe-postsynaptic receptor. Ionotropic receptors (AMPA, GABA_A): i-ion flux esheshayo. Ama-Metabotropic receptors (mGluR, β-adrenergic): ama-cascades e-G-protein ahamba kancane.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp0: Ipulasitiki ye-Synaptic: I-LTP (amandla esikhathi eside) — I-NMDA receptor coincidence detector (idinga kokubili ukubopha kwe-glutamate KANYE ne-postsynaptic depolarisation) → ukufakwa kwe-AMPA receptor → ukwanda kwamandla e-synaptic. Isisekelo samangqamuzana sokufunda nenkumbulo.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp1: Ama-Neural circuits: i-excitatory (glutamatergic) kanye ne-inhibitory (GABAergic) neurons yakha amasekhethi aphindaphindiwe. Ibhalansi ye-E/I: ukuphazamiseka kubangela isithuthwane (ukuvuthwa ngokweqile) noma i-anesthesia (ukuvimbela ngokweqile). I-Oscillations (i-theta, i-gamma) ihlanganisa ulwazi futhi ivumelanise izifunda zobuchopho.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp2: Synaptic plasticity: LTP (long-term potentiation) — NMDA receptor coincidence detector (requires both glutamate binding AND postsynaptic depolarisation) → AMPA receptor insertion → increased synaptic strength. Molecular basis of learning and memory.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp3: Neural circuits: excitatory (glutamatergic) and inhibitory (GABAergic) neurons form recurrent circuits. E/I balance: disruption causes epilepsy (excess excitation) or anaesthesia (excess inhibition). Oscillations (theta, gamma) encode information and synchronise brain regions.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp4: Izindlela zesifo sezinzwa: I-Alzheimer's (ama-amyloid-β plaques aphazamisa ukudluliswa kwe-synaptic; tau hyperphosphorylation destabilises microtubules → neuronal death), i-Parkinson (ukulahlekelwa kwe-neuron ye-dopaminergic ku-substantia nigra; imizimba ye-α-synuclein Lewy), i-Huntington's (i-polyglutamine eyandayo → ukwanda kwe-protein ye-polyglutamine i-neurodegeneration).
learnUni_biology_f4_task: Urekhoda nge-hippocampal neuron. Ukukhuthazwa kwe-high-frequency ye-presynaptic neuron kubangela i-LTP. Chaza isinyathelo ngesinyathelo izehlakalo zamangqamuzana: ukwenziwa kusebenze kwe-NMDA receptor, Ca²⁺ signaling, CaMKII activation, AMPA receptor phosphorylation and insertion, kanye nezinguquko zesikhathi eside zesakhiwo. Bese uchaza ukuthi kungani ukuvimba ama-NMDA receptors kuvimbela ukwakheka kwe-LTP.
learnUni_biology_f5_desc: I-Immunology iwucwaningo lwezindlela zokuzivikela zomzimba. Amasosha omzimba ayazibandlulula kubantu abangazithandi, abhubhisa amagciwane namaseli omdlavuza, futhi adala inkumbulo ye-immunological. I-Dysregulation idala izifo ze-autoimmune, ukungezwani komzimba, kanye nokuntuleka kokuzivikela komzimba. Ama-immunotherapies esimanje - ama-checkpoint inhibitors, amaseli e-CAR-T, imigomo ye-mRNA - aguqula umuthi.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp0: Ukungazweli komzimba: ama-pathogen recognition receptors (PRRs, isb. Toll-like receptors) athola amaphethini wamamolekyuli ahlobene ne-pathogen (ama-PAMP). Yenza kusebenze i-NF-κB → ama-cytokines avuthayo (IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β). Gcwalisa i-cascade opsonises kanye nama-lyses pathogens.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp1: Ukuzivikela okuguquguqukayo: amaseli aveza ama-antigen (amaseli e-dendritic, ama-macrophage) acubungula ama-antigen futhi ethule ama-peptide ku-MHC I (kuya kuma-CD8⁺ amaseli e-cytotoxic T) noma i-MHC II (kumaseli T angumsizi we-CD4⁺). Ukukhethwa kwama-clonal kanye nokwandiswa kwama-lymphocyte e-antigen-specific.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp2: Ukuqaliswa kwe-B cell kanye nama-antibodies: Ukusebenza okuncike ku-T kudinga umsizi wamaseli we-T (ukuxhumana kwe-CD40L-CD40 + ama-cytokines). Ukusabela kwesikhungo se-Germinal: somatic hypermutation + affinity maturation + class switching (IgM → IgG, IgA, IgE). Amaseli enkumbulo B akhona amashumi eminyaka.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp3: Ukubekezelela amasosha omzimba kanye ne-autoimmunity: ukubekezelelana okuphakathi - amaseli e-T azenzakalelayo asusiwe ku-thymus (ukukhetha okungalungile). Ukubekezelelana kwe-peripheral - amaseli T alawulayo (Tregs) acindezela amaseli asebenzayo. Ukwehluleka: i-systemic lupus erythematosus, i-rheumatoid arthritis, uhlobo lwesifo sikashukela sohlobo 1.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp4: I-Cancer immunotherapy: I-PD-1/PD-L1 ye-checkpoint inhibitors ivimba ukuvinjelwa kokuzivikela komzimba kwesimila → ukuvuselelwa kabusha kwe-T cell (pembrolizumab, nivolumab - Nobel Prize 2018). Ukwelashwa kweseli ye-CAR-T: amaseli esiguli esingunjiniyela anesamukeli se-chimeric antigen esiqondise i-tumor antigen - izimpendulo ezimangalisayo ku-B cell leukemia.
learnUni_biology_f5_task: Isiguli siveza izifo ezibangelwa amagciwane kanye namazinga aphansi kakhulu e-immunoglobulin. Igazi le-peripheral libonisa ama-B cell angekho kodwa ama-T cell avamile. Thola ukuntuleka kokuzivikela komzimba (i-agammaglobulinemia exhunywe ku-X - ukuguqulwa kwe-BTK). Chaza isisekelo samangqamuzana: ukuthi i-BTK ivamise ukusayina kanjani phakathi nokuthuthukiswa kwamaseli e-B, yini engahambi kahle, nokuthi ukwelapha nge-immunoglobulin (IVIG) nge-intravenous (IVIG) kusebenza kanjani.
learnUni_biology_f5_tp2: Ukubekezelelana, ukuzivikela komzimba, kanye ne-cancer immunotherapy
learnUni_computer_science_f2_name: Ama-algorithms nezakhiwo zedatha || Ama-algorithms nezakhiwo zedatha ziwumongo wethiyori wesayensi yekhompyutha. Isakhiwo sedatha esifanele senza i-algorithm isebenze kahle; okungalungile kwenza kungenzeki. Ukuhlaziywa kwe-Big-O, ama-algorithms wegrafu, kanye nezinhlelo eziguqukayo kungamathuluzi ayisisekelo wonke unjiniyela wesoftware okufanele abe yingcweti.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_desc: I-Big-O: O(1) njalo, O(log n) ukusesha kanambambili, O(n) iskena somugqa, O(n log n) hlanganisa uhlobo, O(n²) ukuhlunga kwebhamuza, O(2ⁿ) okuchazile. Ω (indlela engcono kakhulu), Θ (iboshwe ngokuqinile). Ukuhlaziywa kwe-amortized kwamalungu afanayo aguqukayo.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp0: Izakhiwo eziyinhloko: amalungu afanayo (O(1) ukufinyelela), uhlu oluxhunyiwe (O(1) ukufakwa kwekhanda), ithebula le-hashi (isilinganiso esingu-O(1) wonke ama-ops), i-BST (O(log n) ebhalansile), inqwaba (O(log n) faka/khipha), i-trie (ukusebenza kwesiqalo seyunithi yezinhlamvu).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp1: Core structures: array (O(1) access), linked list (O(1) head insert), hash table (average O(1) all ops), BST (O(log n) balanced), heap (O(log n) insert/extract), trie (string prefix operations).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp2: Ama-algorithms wegrafu: BFS (indlela emfushane engenasisindo, O(V+E)), DFS (ukutholwa komjikelezo, uhlobo lwe-topological), Dijkstra (indlela emfushane enesisindo, O((V+E)log V)), Bellman-Ford (izisindo ezimbi, O(VE)), Floyd-Warshall (wonke amapheya, O(V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp3: Ukuhlelwa kwe-Dynamic: isakhiwo esincane esilungile + izinkinga ezingaphansi ezigqagqene. Ukukhumbula (phezulu-phansi) vs. ukufakwa kwethebula (phansi-phezulu). Izinkinga zakudala: 0/1 Knapsack, LCS, Hlela Ibanga, Ukuphindaphindeka kwe-Matrix Chain, Ukushintsha Kwemali.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp4: Ukuphelela kwe-NP: P (isikhathi se-polynomial-solvable), i-NP (isikhathi se-polynomial singaqinisekiswa). Izinkinga eziphelele ze-NP (SAT, TSP, Clique) — ayikho i-algorithm ye-polynomial eyaziwayo. I-Cook-Levin theorem: I-SAT iphelele nge-NP. Ukwehliswa kufakazela ubulukhuni be-NP.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_task: Sebenzisa i-algorithm ye-Dijkstra (i-pseudocode enomugqa wokuqala) kugrafu enamanodi angu-6. Igijime isinyathelo ngesinyathelo, ubonisa ithebula lebanga nesimo somugqa wokubaluleka ekuphindaphindweni ngakunye. Fakazela ubunkimbinkimbi besikhathi O((V+E)log V). Bese uchaza: uma igrafu ibinomphetho ongemuhle, kungani i-Dijkstra yehluleka, futhi i-Bellman-Ford iyisingatha kanjani?
learnUni_computer_science_f2_tp1: Ama-algorithms wegrafu || Uhlelo olunamandla kanye nokuphelela kwe-NP
learnUni_computer_science_f2_tp2: Amasistimu Okusebenza || Amasistimu okusebenza ayingqimba yesofthiwe phakathi kwehadiwe nezinhlelo zokusebenza - izinqubo zokuphatha, inkumbulo, ukugcinwa, nokuphepha. Ukuqonda okwangaphakathi kwe-OS kukuvumela ukuthi ubhale ikhodi esebenzayo, ngesikhathi esifanayo, uqonde ukusebenza kwesistimu, futhi uklame amasistimu asabalalisiwe avikelekile.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_name: Inqubo vs. intambo: inqubo inendawo yayo yekheli kanye nezinsiza; imicu yabelana ngesikhala sekheli lenqubo. Ukushintshwa kokuqukethwe: I-OS igcina/ibuyisela isimo se-CPU (ababhalisa, i-PC, i-stack pointer). Ukuhlela: I-FCFS, i-SJF, i-Round Robin, Okubalulekile, Umugqa Wamaleveli amaningi.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_desc: Izingozi zokushintshaniswa kwezimali: izimo zomjaho, umnqamulajuqu (Izimo ze-Coffman: ukukhishwa inyumbazane, ukubamba bese ulinda, akukho kukhululwa, ukulinda okuyisiyingi), indlala, ukukhiya. Ukuvumelanisa: i-mutex, i-semaphore, i-monitor (isimo esiguquguqukayo), amalokhi okufunda-bhala.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp0: Ukuphatha inkumbulo: ukuphegina — hlukanisa indawo yekheli elibonakalayo libe amakhasi anosayizi ongashintshi aklanywe kumafreyimu aphathekayo usebenzisa ithebula lekhasi. I-TLB igcina izinguqulo zakamuva. Ama-algorithms okushintsha ikhasi: FIFO, LRU, Clock (ithuba lesibili). Ukubhuqa uma usebenza isethi > RAM.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp1: Amasistimu wefayela: Isendlalelo se-VFS (Virtual File System) sokuphatheka. Ama-inode: imethadatha yefayela + izinkomba zokuvimba idatha. Ukwenza ijenali (ext4, NTFS) ukuze uthole ukungaguquguquki kokuphahlazeka. Izihlahla ze-B ezisetshenziswa ku-HFS+, NTFS kunkomba yemibhalo. Amaleveli e-RAID 0,1,5,6 — ukusebenza nokungadingeki ukuhwebelana.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp2: Isakhiwo sokuphepha: ukuvikelwa kwendandatho (imodi yomsebenzisi vs. imodi ye-kernel, ama-syscalls njengomngcele olawulwayo), ukulawulwa kokufinyelela okusekelwe emandleni, ukulawula ukufinyelela okuphoqelekile (SELinux/AppArmor), ama-hypervisors (uhlobo 1 lwensimbi engenalutho: VMware ESXi, Xen; uhlobo 2 oluphethwe: VirtualBox). Iziqukathi (i-Docker) zisebenzisa amaqoqo nezikhala zamagama — akuwona ama-VM eqiniso.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp3: Izinqubo ezintathu zabelana ngezinsiza u-R1 no-R2. I-P1: iphethe u-R1, idinga u-R2. I-P2: iphethe u-R2, idinga u-R1. P3: idinga kokubili. (a) Dweba igrafu yokwabiwa kwensiza futhi uthole ukuthi i-deadlock. (b) Bonisa isimo esiphephile usebenzisa i-Algorithm Yebhange: Max=[R1:2,R2:1], [R1:1,R2:2], [R1:2,R2:2]; Iyatholakala=[R1:1,R2:1]. Thola ukulandelana kokwenza okuphephile. (c) Phakamisa umthetho olandelwayo ukuze kunqandwe lokhu kugoqana.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp2: Ubunjiniyela besofthiwe busebenzisa izindlela ezihlelekile ekwakheni isofthiwe ethembekile, elondolozekayo, nengakala. Imikhuba yesimanje - i-Agile, i-DevOps, i-microservices, i-CI/CD - iguqule ukuthi isoftware yethulwa kanjani. Iziyalo zobunjiniyela eziyinhloko - izidingo, izakhiwo, ukuhlolwa, nokuphepha - zihlala zibalulekile kungakhathaliseki ukuthi iyiphi indlela.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_desc: Software engineering applies systematic methods to building reliable, maintainable, scalable software. Modern practices — Agile, DevOps, microservices, CI/CD — have transformed how software is delivered. Core engineering disciplines — requirements, architecture, testing, and security — remain essential regardless of methodology.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp0: I-Agile (I-Scrum, i-XP, i-Kanban): ukugijima okuphindaphindayo kwamaviki angu-2, ukuma kwansuku zonke, ukubukwa kwe-sprint, ukulungiswa kwe-backlog.
