I-DevOps: ukuthuthukiswa nokusebenza kuhlanganisiwe; Amapayipi e-CI/CD (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions) enza ngokuzenzakalelayo ukwakha, ukuhlola, ukusebenzisa kukho konke ukuzibophezela.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp1: Amaphethini ezakhiwo zesofthiwe: okugqinsiwe (I-UI → ingqondo yebhizinisi → ukufinyelela kwedatha), ama-microservices (amasevisi asebenza ngokuzimele anesizindalwazi sakho, axhumana nge-REST/gRPC/umlayezo), aqhutshwa izenzakalo (amasevisi asabela emicimbini — Kafka, RabbitMQ), CQRS+Event Sourcing.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp2: Amaphethini wedizayini (i-GoF): Okudala (I-Singleton, Imboni, Umakhi, I-Prototype), Isakhiwo (I-adaptha, Umhlobisi, Ingaphambili, Ummeleli), Ukuziphatha (Umbukeli, Isu, Umyalo, Indlela Yesifanekiso, I-Iterator). Yazi ukuthi usifaka nini isicelo — ungasebenzisi ngokweqile.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp3: Isu lokuhlola: iyunithi (esheshayo, ehlukanisiwe — ukuncika mbumbulu), ukuhlanganiswa (izingxenye eziningi), inkontileka (ukuhambisana kwe-API), isistimu (ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni), ukwamukela (ukuqinisekiswa kwendaba yomsebenzisi). I-TDD: i-red-green-refactor. Ukuhlolwa kokuguqula izakhi kuqinisekisa ikhwalithi yokuhlola.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp4: Ukuphepha kubunjiniyela besofthiwe (OWASP Top 10): umjovo (SQL, umyalo), ukufakazela ubuqiniso okuphukile, i-XSS, izinkomba zento eqondile engavikelekile, ukungalungiswa kahle kwezokuphepha. Ukumodela okusongelayo (i-STRIDE), ukubuyekezwa kwekhodi evikelekile, ukuskena kokuba sengozini kokuxhomekeka (Snyk, Dependabot).
learnUni_computer_science_f4_task: Dala uhlelo lokusebenza lokwabelana ngokugibela: (a) Bhala izindaba zabasebenzisi ezi-5 ezinemibandela yokwamukela. (b) Dweba umdwebo we-C4 wezakhiwo (umongo, isiqukathi, amazinga ezingxenye). (c) Thola amaphethini edizayini ama-3 asetshenzisiwe bese uqinisekisa. (d) Bhala izivivinyo zamayunithi (i-pseudocode) yomsebenzi ohlanganisa 'imali yokugibela': imali eyisisekelo, amanani akhuphukayo, inani elincane lemali yokugibela, nezimo zomkhawulo (ibanga elinguziro, okokufaka okungekuhle). (e) Khomba 3 ubungozi bezokuphepha kanye nokuncishiswa kwe-OWASP.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_tp0: I-Agile, i-DevOps, ne-CI/CD || Imidwebo yezakhiwo namaphethini omklamo
learnUni_computer_science_f4_tp2: Ukufunda Ngomshini ne-AI || Ukufunda ngomshini (ML) kwenza amasistimu afunde kudatha. Ukufunda okujulile - amanethiwekhi e-neural anezendlalelo eziningi - aqhubekisele phambili impumelelo embonweni, olimini, nasemidlalweni. Ukuqonda ithiyori ye-ML (i-bias-variance, VC dimension, regularisation) kanye nokuzijwayeza (PyTorch, hyperparameter tuning, deployment) manje kuyikhono eliwumgogodla kwisayensi yekhompyutha.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_name: Ukufunda okugadiwe: nciphisa ukulahlekelwa L(θ) phezu kwedatha yokuqeqeshwa ngokwehla kwegradient θ ← θ − α∇L. I-Stochastic gradient descent (SGD), i-Adam optimiser. Ukulawula: I-L2 (ukubola kwesisindo, izisindo ezinciphayo), i-L1 (i-sparsity), ukuyeka (okungahleliwe ama-neurons angama-zero ngesikhathi sokuqeqeshwa).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_desc: I-Neural network architecture: ixhumeke ngokugcwele (dense), convolutional (CNN — weight sharing, translation invariance — ilungele izithombe), okuvamile (RNN, LSTM, GRU — sequential data), indlela yokunaka (Transformer — self-attention, O(n²) complexity, but parallelization).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp0: Ukuhwebelana ngokuchema nokuhluka: iphutha lokuqeqeshwa ≈ ukuchema²; iphutha lokuhlola − iphutha lokuqeqeshwa ≈ ukuhluka. Ukulinganisa okuncane: ukuchema okuphezulu (imodeli ilula kakhulu). Ukulingana ngokweqile: ukuhluka okuphezulu (imodeli ibamba ngekhanda idatha yokuqeqeshwa). Ukulawulwa, idatha eyengeziwe, namamodeli alula akhuluma ngokulingana ngokweqile.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp1: Ukuhlola okungaphezu kokunemba: kumakilasi angalingani - ukunemba (TP/TP+FP), khumbula (TP/TP+FN), F1 = 2PR/(P+R), AUC-ROC (indawo engaphansi kwejika lesici somamukeli). Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-k-fold cross-fold kunikeza isilinganiso esiqinile sokwenza okuvamile.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp2: Amamodeli esisekelo ne-AI enomthwalo wemfanelo: amamodeli olimi amakhulu (GPT, BERT) aqeqeshwe kusengaphambili kudatha ebanzi, alungiselwe kahle imisebenzi ethile. Ama-hallucinations, ukuchema, nokusebenzisa kabi kuyizingozi ezinkulu. Umthetho we-EU AI (2024) uhlukanisa amasistimu e-AI ngobungozi futhi ubeka izidingo zezicelo ezinobungozi obukhulu.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp3: Wakha isihlukanisi semizwa (izibuyekezo ezinhle/ezimbi). Ukunemba kokuqeqeshwa: 97%; ukunemba kokuqinisekisa: 68%. (a) Thola inkinga. (b) Bhala izindlela ezi-4 zokuyilungisa. (c) Idathasethi yakho ivuma ngo-90% - bala ukunemba, ukunemba, ukukhumbula, kanye no-F1 uma uhlukanisa yonke into njengephozithivu. Kungani i-F1 iyimethrikhi engcono? (d) Dweba amajika anembayo-recall amamodeli amabili bese uchaza ukuthi iyiphi ongayikhetha emsebenzini wokuxilongwa kwezokwelapha.
learnUni_economics_f1_name: I-Microeconomics || I-Microeconomics ihlaziya ukuthathwa kwezinqumo ngemizi, amafemu, nezimakethe. Ithiyori yabathengi neqinile, izinhlaka zemakethe kusukela emqhudelwaneni ophelele kuye koyedwa, izinto zangaphandle, kanye nethiyori yegeyimu ihlinzeka ngekhithi yamathuluzi okuhlaziya yokuqonda amanani, imiphumela yemakethe, kanye nemithelela yenhlalakahle yenqubomgomo.
learnUni_economics_f1_desc: Ithiyori yabathengi: ukukhulisa ukusetshenziswa kuncike emkhawulweni wesabelomali. Ngokwesilinganiso esiphezulu: MU_x/P_x = MU_y/P_y (ukusetshenziswa kwemajini okulinganayo ngephawundi ngalinye). Amajika okunganaki + umugqa wesabelomali → isimo se-tangency MRS = isilinganiso senani.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp0: Ithiyori eqinile: ukukhulisa inzuzo lapho uMR = MC. Ukuncintisana okuphelele: P = MR = MC ekulinganisweni kwesikhathi eside, inzuzo yezomnotho engekho. Umgijimi omfushane: ukuvala shaqa uma P < min(AVC).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp1: Izakhiwo zemakethe: i-monopoly (MR <P, ukulahlekelwa kwesisindo = ukulahlekelwa kwezenhlalakahle, ukuzimela kwemvelo okulawulwa yi-cap cap noma izindleko-plus); oligopoly (Cournot — quantity competition, Bertrand — price competition → marginal cost pricing).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp2: Izinto zangaphandle nezimpahla zomphakathi: ingaphandle elibi → ukukhiqizwa ngokweqile (intela ye-Pigouvian = u-MEC uyalungisa). Ingaphandle elihle → ukukhiqizwa ngaphansi (uxhaso luyalungisa). Izimpahla zomphakathi: azikhetheki + ezingeyona imbangi → inkinga yomgibeli wamahhala → ukuhlinzekwa kancane ngemakethe.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp3: Ithiyori yomdlalo: i-Nash equilibrium (akukho ukuchezuka okunenzuzo okuhlangene). Inkinga yeziboshwa: isu elibusayo liholela kumphumela we-Pareto-inferior. Imidlalo ephindiwe: ukubambisana kuyasimeme ngamasu okuqalisa uma isici sesaphulelo siphezulu ngokwanele. Ithiyori yendali: inani lokuqala (ibhidi elingaphansi kwevelu), inani lesibili/u-Vickrey (isu eliyinhloko lokubhida inani langempela).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp4: Izindiza ezimbili ziqhudelana emzileni. Ngayinye ingasetha intengo Ephezulu noma Ephansi. I-payoff matrix (inzuzo engu-£m): {H,H}=(10,10), {H,L}=(2,15), {L,H}=(15,2), {L,L}=(5,5). (a) Thola ukulingana kwe-Nash. (b) Ingabe iPareto ilungile? (c) Uma igeyimu iphindwa unomphela, ukubambisana kungagcinwa nini (umbandela wokuthola kusici sesaphulelo esingu-δ)? (d) Umthetho wokuncintisana ukubheka kanjani ukudidiyela amanani endiza?
learnUni_economics_f2_name: I-Econometrics ihlinzeka ngamathuluzi ezibalo okuhlola amathiyori ezomnotho kanye nokulinganisa ubudlelwano bembangela kusuka kudatha yokubuka. Ukwehla kwe-OLS, okuguquguqukayo kwezinsimbi, nezindlela zedatha yephaneli zingamahhashi okusebenza. 'Inguquko yokwethembeka' yesimanje igcizelela ukukhonjwa okuqinile kwemithelela eyimbangela kusetshenziswa izivivinyo zemvelo.
learnUni_economics_f2_desc: OLS: nciphisa u-Σεᵢ² ukuze ulinganisele u-β̂ = (X'X)⁻¹X'y. U-Gauss-Markov: I-OLS IBLUE ngaphansi kwe-endogeneity, i-homoskedasticity, ayikho i-multicollinearity ephelele. Ukungachemi: E[β̂] = β. Ukuvumelana: β̂ →_p β njengo-n → ∞.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp0: I-Endogeneity: E[ε|X] ≠ 0 ngenxa yokuchema okuguquguqukayo okushiywe, ukuhlehla kwesizathu, noma iphutha lokulinganisa → I-OLS echemile futhi engahambisani. Isixazululo se-IV: thola ithuluzi Z elihlotshaniswa no-X (ukufaneleka: Cov(Z,X) ≠ 0) kodwa hhayi no-ε (okungafakiwe: Cov(Z,ε) = 0).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp1: Idatha yephaneli: Yᵢₜ = α + βXᵢₜ + μᵢ + εᵢₜ. Imiphumela engaguquki (ngaphakathi kwesilinganiso): iqeda ukuhlukahluka okungaguquki kwesikhathi μᵢ. Imiphumela engahleliwe: isebenza kahle kakhulu uma μᵢ ingahlobene no-X (ukuhlola: Hausman). Umehluko wokuqala: Δyᵢₜ = βΔxᵢₜ + Δεᵢₜ.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp2: Umehluko-ku-umehluko (DiD): qhathanisa namaqembu okwelashwa nokulawula ngaphambi / ngemva kokuguqulwa kwenqubomgomo. β_DiD = (Ȳ_{ukwelashwa,okuthunyelwe} − Ȳ_{treatment,pre}) − (Ȳ_{control,post} − Ȳ_{control,pre}). Ukuqagela okubalulekile: izitayela ezifanayo (ukungabikho kokwelashwa, womabili amaqembu abezovela ngokufanayo).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp3: Ukuyeka ukuhlehla (RD): ukwelashwa kwabiwa ngokusekelwe ekutheni okuguquguqukayo okusebenzayo kweqa umkhawulo. Qhathanisa imiphumela ngenhla nangaphansi kokunqamuka - ukwenza okungahleliwe kwendawo. I-RD ebukhali: konke kweqa umkhawulo. I-Fuzzy RD: okunye kuphela - sebenzisa njengethuluzi.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp4: Ufuna ukulinganisa umthelela oyimbangela wemfundo yasenyuvesi emalini etholwayo. I-OLS inikeza u-β̂ = 0.08 (i-premium yamaholo engu-8% ngonyaka wemfundo). (a) Kungani i-OLS ngokunokwenzeka inokwenzelela? (b) Phakamisa ithuluzi — chaza ukuthi kungani lenelisa ukuhambisana nemikhawulo yokukhishwa. (c) Chaza isu le-DiD usebenzisa isilingo semvelo (isb. ushintsho lwemali yokufunda) ngokuqagela kwamathrendi afanayo. (d) Humusha idizayini yokuyeka ukuhlehla eduze komkhawulo wokufaneleka wokufunda.
learnUni_economics_f3_desc: Umnotho wokuziphatha uhlanganisa imininingwane yengqondo ekuhlaziyeni umnotho. Abantu abanangqondo ngokuphelele - abafuni ukulahlekelwa, bachemile okwamanje, bethonywa uhlaka kanye nezinkambiso zomphakathi. Lokhu kuchezuka kuyabikezelwa futhi kuhlelekile, kunika amandla idizayini yenqubomgomo engcono ngokugudluza nokukhetha kwezakhiwo.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp0: I-Prospect theory (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979): abantu bahlola imiphumela ehlobene nendawo eyireferensi. Umsebenzi wevelu: i-concave for gains (ukwenqaba ubungozi), i-convex yokulahlekelwa (ukufuna ubungozi), ikhuphuka ngokulahleka kunezinzuzo (λ ≈ 2 — i-coefficient yokulahlekelwa yokulahlekelwa).
learnUni_economics_f3_kp1: Ukulinganisa okungenzeka: abantu abakhuluphele ngokweqile amathuba amancane (kuchaza ilotho nomshwalense) kanye namathuba angaphansi kwesisindo esikhulu. I-Cumulative prospect theory iphatha amalotho ahlanganisiwe.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp2: Ukuchema kwamanje: isaphulelo se-quasi-hyperbolic U = u₀ + βΣδᵗuₜ ngo-β < 1. Idala ukungahambisani kwesikhathi — izinhlelo ezenziwe manje ngeke zilandelwe. Kuchaza ukudla ngokweqile, ukonga kancane, ukuzindela. Osophistice bayazi ukuthi bachemile; abangenalwazi abakwenzi - imithelela ehlukene yenqubomgomo.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp3: Ithiyori ye-Nudge (Thaler & Sunstein, 2008): ukukhetha kwezakhiwo kubumba izinqumo ngaphandle kokukhawulela inkululeko. Imithetho ezenzakalelayo (ukubhaliswa okuzenzakalelayo kwempesheni), imilayezo evamile yomphakathi ('imizi eminingi ikhokha ngesikhathi'), nokwenza kube lula kunciphisa izithiyo ekuziphatheni okufiselekayo.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp4: Ezomnotho zokuhlola nama-RCT: ithiyori yokuhlolwa kwelebhu kuzilungiselelo ezilawulwayo. Ukungenelela kokuhlolwa kwenkundla (RCTs) esikalini. I-Randomistas (Banerjee, Duflo - Nobel 2019) iguqule umnotho wentuthuko ngokuhlola ukungenelela okuthile.
learnUni_economics_f3_task: Imodeli yomuntu ochemile manje (β=0.7, δ=0.95) enquma ukuthi uzojima namuhla (izindleko c=5 izinsiza) ukuze kuzuze esikhathini esizayo (B=10 izinsiza ezitholwe ngesonto elizayo). (a) Ingabe umuntu ngamunye uhlela ngeSonto ukuzivocavoca ngoMsombuluko? (b) Lapho kufika uMsombuluko, ingabe bayajima ngempela? (c) Chaza ukuphambana kwesikhathi. (d) Baklame ithuluzi lokuzibophezela elizobasiza, futhi liqhathanise nesijeziso sezimali.
learnUni_economics_f4_name: I-Development Economics || I-Development economics icwaninga ngezimbangela zobumpofu kanye nezinqubomgomo ezikhuthaza ukuchuma. Umnotho wesimanje wokuthuthuka ususukile emibonweni emikhulu waya ebufakazini obunamandla bokungenelela okuthile - kusetshenziswa ama-RCT, ukuhlola kwemvelo, nedatha enkulu. Umkhakha ubandakanya ukukhula, izikhungo, ezempilo, imfundo nokungalingani.
learnUni_economics_f4_desc: Imodeli yokukhula kancane: Y = AK^α L^{1−α}. Isimo esizinzile: utshalomali = ukwehla kwenani; izinga lokonga nokukhula kwabantu kunquma isilinganiso se-K/L. Ukuncipha kwembuyiselo → ukuhlangana okunemibandela. I-Residual A (inani eliphelele lokukhiqiza) iqhuba ukukhula okuhlala isikhathi eside - kodwa ingaphandle kwe-Solow.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp0: Ukukhula kwe-Endogenous (Romer 1990): ulwazi K̃ lungena ekukhiqizeni ngaphandle kokuncipha kwembuyiselo. Umkhakha we-R&D ukhiqiza imibono emisha. Ukuchitheka kolwazi (okungeyona imbangi, okungabandakanyiwe ngokwengxenye) → ukunikezwa okuncane kokuqamba izinto ezintsha ngaphandle kokuvikelwa kwe-IP noma uxhaso lwe-R&D.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp1: Izikhungo nokukhula (i-Acemoglu & Robinson): izikhungo ezibandakanya wonke umuntu (amalungelo empahla, umthetho womthetho, izimakethe ezincintisanayo) zikhuthaza ukukhula. Izikhungo ezikhishwayo (ifa lekoloniyali - izikhungo zamakoloni eziphila njengezifiki) zibamba amazwe ebuphofini. Umlando ubalulekile — ukuphikelela.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp2: Ama-RCT asathuthuka: I-Duflo & Banerjee (u-Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab, J-PAL) basebenzisa ama-RCT ukuze bahlole ukungenelela okuthile - ukukhishwa kwezikelemu, izikweletu ezincane, ukudluliselwa kwemali okunemibandela, ukugudluzwa komanyolo. Imiphumela ivame ukumangaza — ithiyori ngaphandle kokudukisa idatha.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp3: Izingibe zobuphofu kanye nama-CCT: izingibe zobumpofu zivela ezindlekweni ezingaguquki zokutshalwa kwezimali (imfundo, ezempilo, umanyolo) imindeni ehola kancane engakwazi ukuzikhokhela, ukuvimbela ukuzuza komkhiqizo. Ukudluliswa kwemali okunemibandela (i-Oportunidades yase-Mexico, i-Bolsa Família yase-Brazil) inikeza imali engenayo ehambisana nokuya esikoleni nokunakekelwa kwezempilo - ukunqamula ugibe ngemiphumela elinganiselwe yesikhathi eside.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp4: Poverty traps and CCTs: poverty traps arise from fixed costs of investment (education, health, fertiliser) that low-income households cannot afford, preventing productivity gains. Conditional cash transfers (Mexico's Oportunidades, Brazil's Bolsa Família) provide income conditioned on school attendance and healthcare — breaking the trap with measured long-run effects.
learnUni_economics_f4_task: Qhathanisa iSouth Korea neNigeria: bobabili babenamazinga emali engenayo efanayo (~$300 GDP/capita) ngo-1960. Ngo-2023 iSouth Korea ine ~$33,000, Nigeria ~$2,100. Ukusebenzisa (a) Imodeli ye-Solow - yikuphi ukonga kanye nokwehluka kwenani labantu okuchaza ukwehlukana? (b) Imodeli ye-Romer - amandla okusungula abaluleke kangakanani? (c) I-Acemoglu & Robinson - qhathanisa umlando wamakholoni kanye nemizila yesikhungo. Phetha ngesincomo senqubomgomo esisekelwe ebufakazini esisodwa saseNigeria, ucaphuna i-RCT efanele.
learnUni_law_f0_name: Umthethosisekelo Nomthetho Womphakathi || Umthetho womthethosisekelo uchaza ubudlelwano phakathi kombuso nabantu ngabanye, naphakathi kwamagatsha kahulumeni. Umthetho womphakathi ulawula ukusetshenziswa kwamandla ombuso. Ukuqonda imigomo yomthethosisekelo - ukuhlukaniswa kwamandla, ukubusa komthetho, amalungelo ayisisekelo - kuyisisekelo sazo zonke izifundo zomthetho kanye nokuba yisakhamuzi sentando yeningi.
learnUni_law_f0_desc: Umthethosisekelo: ungahle uhlanganiswe (i-USA, Germany, France - idokhumenti ebhaliwe eyodwa) noma ungabi nekhodi (UK — umthetho wezomthetho, umthetho ojwayelekile, kanye nezivumelwano). Ukulandelana kwezinkambiso: izinkambiso zomthethosisekelo zinqoba umthetho ojwayelekile.
learnUni_law_f0_kp0: Ukwehlukaniswa kwamandla (Montesquieu): umthetho (iPhalamende/iCongress), abaphathi (uhulumeni/umongameli), ezobulungiswa (izinkantolo). Amasheke namabhalansi avimbela ukugcwala kwamandla. Ukubuyekezwa kobulungiswa: izinkantolo zingachitha imithetho engahambelani nomthethosisekelo.
learnUni_law_f0_kp1: Umthetho womthetho (Dicey): akekho ongaphezu komthetho; isijeziso kuphela ngokwephula umthetho ocacile; ukufinyelela okulinganayo ezinkantolo. Empeleni: ukuzimela kophiko lwezobulungiswa, ukuvinjelwa kokuvalelwa okungekho emthethweni (habeas corpus), ukulinganiswa kwesenzo sombuso.
learnUni_law_f0_kp2: Amalungelo ayisisekelo: I-European Convention on Human Rights (Izihloko 2–14: ilungelo lokuphila, ukwenqatshelwa kokuhlushwa, ukuquliswa kwecala ngendlela efanele, ubumfihlo, inkululeko yokukhuluma, ukuvinjelwa kokubandlululwa). Ukusebenza okuvundlile vs. ukusetshenziswa kwamalungelo.
learnUni_law_f0_kp3: Umyalelo womthethosisekelo we-EU: ubukhulu bomthetho we-EU (Costa v. ENEL, 1964), umphumela oqondile (Van Gend en Loos, 1963), umgomo wokulinganisa, ukuxhaswa. I-Post-Brexit: I-UK ayisekho ngaphansi komthetho we-EU.
learnUni_law_f0_kp4: Hlaziya isikhundla somthethosisekelo sophiko lwezobulungiswa oluzimele embusweni wentando yeningi. Usebenzisa izibonelo zezinhlelo zomthetho ezintathu ezihlukene (e-UK, e-USA, eJalimane), qhathanisa: ukuthi ukuzimela kwezomthetho kuvikelwa kanjani, ububanzi bokubuyekezwa kwezomthetho komthetho, kanye necala elilodwa lapho izinkantolo zachitha khona noma zilinganiselwe izinyathelo zokuphatha. Linganisa ukuthi ukubuyekezwa kokwahlulela kuyahambisana nokuba semthethweni kwentando yeningi.
learnUni_law_f0_task: Izimiso zomthethosisekelo || Umthetho kanye namalungelo ayisisekelo
learnUni_law_f0_tp2: Umthetho wenkontileka ulawula izivumelwano ezibophezela ngokusemthethweni. Inquma ukuthi inkontileka yakhiwa nini, yini izinhlangothi ezibophezelekile ukuba ziyenze, ukuthi yini eyenzekayo uma izibopho zingahlangatshezwana nazo (ukwephulwa), nokuthi yiziphi izikhambi ezikhona. Umthetho wenkontileka usekela ezohwebo, ukuqashwa, kanye nobudlelwano obuningi bezomthetho phakathi kwezinhlangano ezizimele.
learnUni_law_f1_name: Izici zenkontileka evumelekile: ukunikezwa (isiphakamiso esiqinisekile okufanele siboshwe ekwamukelweni), ukwamukela (ngokungangabazeki, okuhambisana nomnikelo — umthetho 'wesithombe sesibuko'), ukucatshangelwa (okuthile kwenani okushintshiwe - ukucatshangelwa kwesikhathi esidlule akukhona ukucatshangelwa), inhloso yokudala ubudlelwano obusemthethweni.
learnUni_law_f1_desc: Imigomo yenkontileka: imigomo ecacile (eshiwo ngokusobala), imigomo eshiwo (okushiwo umthetho - Umthetho Wokuthengiswa Kwezimpahla; noma izinkantolo - ukuhlolwa kokusebenza kwebhizinisi). Izimo (ukwephulwa kuvumela ukunqanyulwa + komonakalo), iziqinisekiso (ukwephulwa kuvumela umonakalo kuphela), amagama angenangqondo (ikhambi lincike emiphumeleni yokwephulwa komthetho).
learnUni_law_f1_kp0: Izici ezicindezelayo: ukuhlanekezela amaqiniso (isitatimende esingamanga esidala inkontileka → ukuhoxiswa + komonakalo), ukucindezelwa (ingcindezi engekho emthethweni → engenzeki), ithonya elingafanele (inzuzo engalungile ethathiwe → ayinakwenzeka), iphutha (iphutha eliyisisekelo elihlangene/elilinye izwe → elingenalutho noma elingenamsebenzi).
learnUni_law_f1_kp1: Terms of a contract: express terms (stated explicitly), implied terms (implied by statute — Sale of Goods Act; or by courts — business efficacy test). Conditions (breach allows termination + damages), warranties (breach allows damages only), innominate terms (remedy depends on consequences of breach).
learnUni_law_f1_kp2: Vitiating factors: misrepresentation (false statement of fact inducing a contract → rescission + damages), duress (illegitimate pressure → voidable), undue influence (unfair advantage taken → voidable), mistake (mutual/unilateral fundamental mistake → void or voidable).
learnUni_law_f1_kp3: Ukwephulwa kwemithetho nezilungiso: ukwephulwa okulindelekile (ukwenqaba ukwenza umsebenzi ngaphambi kwesikhathi esifanele → umuntu ongenacala angase amukele futhi amangalele ngokushesha). Amakhambi: umonakalo (oyinhloko — ubeka umuntu omsulwa esikhundleni njengokungathi kwenziwe isivumelwano), ukusebenza okuthile (okulingana — kuphoqelela ukusebenza, okunikezwe lapho umonakalo unganele), umyalo, i-quantum meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp4: Izigaba zokukhululwa: kufanele zifakwe (isaziso, isiginesha, noma inkambo yokusebenza); kuhunyushwe ngokuqinile (contra proferentem — ukungaqondakali ngokumelene neqembu elithembele kumshwana); kuncike ku-UCTA 1977 kanye ne-CRA 2015 (izigaba ezingenangqondo ezingaphoqeleleki kuzinkontileka zabathengi).
learnUni_law_f1_task: Umakhi ucaphuna u-£50,000 wokuvuselela indlu. Umnikazi womuzi uyakwamukela. Ngesikhathi somsebenzi, umakhi uthola izinkinga zesakhiwo ezingalindelekile futhi ufuna u-£70,000 ngaphezulu. Umnikazi womuzi usayina isivumelwano esisha ngaphansi kwengcindezi. Lapho kuqedwa, umninikhaya uyenqaba ukukhokha u-£20,000 owengeziwe. Yazisa: (a) ingabe inkontileka yokuqala iyasebenza? (b) Ingabe ukuhluka kuyaphoqelelwa? (c) Imaphi amakhambi umakhi anawo? (d) Isiphi isivikelo umninikhaya angase asiphakamise?
learnUni_law_f2_name: Umthetho Wobugebengu || Umthetho wobugebengu uchaza ukuziphatha okwenqatshelwe umbuso futhi uhlinzekela ukujeziswa kwabenzi bobubi. Ivikela abantu ngabanye nomphakathi ekulimaleni, igweme ukwenza okubi, futhi izwakalise ukulahlwa kokuziphatha okuhlangene. Ukuqonda umthetho wobugebengu kudinga ukuba namandla kwe-actus reus, mens rea, ukuzivikela, kanye nemigomo yecala lobugebengu.
learnUni_law_f2_desc: Izingxenye zobugebengu: actus reus (isenzo esinecala — sihlanganisa isenzo sokuzithandela, ukweqiwa lapho kukhona umsebenzi, umphumela, izimo) kanye ne-mens rea (umqondo onecala — inhloso, ubudedengu, noma ubudedengu). Umgomo wokuziqondanela: I-AR ne-MR kufanele ziqondane ngesikhathi.
learnUni_law_f2_kp0: Izinga labesilisa liyaphendula: inhloso eqondile (inhloso iwukuletha umphumela), inhloso egobile (umphumela cishe othize, obonwa kusengaphambili kanjalo— R v Woolin), ukunganaki okucabangelayo (Cunningham — ukuzifaka engozini), ubudedengu benhloso (ukuchezuka okukhulu ezingeni lomuntu onengqondo).
learnUni_law_f2_kp1: Ukubulala: ukubulala (ukubulala okungekho emthethweni + inhloso yokubulala noma ukudala i-GBH — isigwebo sikadilikajele esiyisibopho); ukubulala ngokuzithandela (ukubulala okuncishiswe ukulahlekelwa ukulawula noma ukuncishiswa kwesibopho); involuntary manslaughter (unlawful mans or gross negligence — no murder MR).
learnUni_law_f2_kp2: Ukuzivikela: ukuzivikela (amandla alinganayo okuxosha usongo olungekho emthethweni — okunengqondo kodwa hhayi ukwahlulela okuphelele); imvume (imikhawulo yalokho okungavunyelwa — R v Brown); ukudakwa (ukudakwa ngokuzithandela akukho ukuzivikela enjongweni ethile, ukuzivikela okuyingxenye enjongweni eyisisekelo); ukusangana (imithetho kaM'Naghten — ukukhubazeka kokucabanga ngenxa yesifo sengqondo → ukungabi nacala ngenxa yokusangana).
learnUni_law_f2_kp3: Amacala e-Inchoate nokubamba iqhaza: ukuzama (okungaphezu nje kwesenzo sokulungiselela ngenhloso); uzungu (isivumelwano sokwenza icala); isikhuthazo/usizo (Umthetho Wobugebengu Obunzulu wezi-2007). Ibhizinisi elihlanganyelwe: umhlanganyeli emsebenzini weqembu unesibopho sezomthetho uma ebone kusengaphambili ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi uthishanhloko enze icala noMR odingekayo.
learnUni_law_f2_kp4: U-D no-V bayalwa. D ushaya u-V ngenhloso yokudala umonakalo omkhulu. U-V, ongaziwa ngu-D, unesimo sogebhezi olungavamile ('igobolondo leqanda'). V uyafa. Cela u-D ngecala lobugebengu: (a) Iyini i-actus reus yokubulala? (b) Ingabe u-D unaye uMR ngokubulala? (c) Ingabe umthetho wogebhezi oluncane uyasebenza emthethweni wobugebengu? (d) Ingabe kukhona ukuzivikela okungaphelele okukhona? Uyini umphumela okungenzeka?
learnUni_law_f2_tp2: Umthetho Wamazwe Ngamazwe || Umthetho wamazwe ngamazwe ulawula ubudlelwano phakathi kwezifunda kanye, ngokwandayo, abantu ngabanye kanye nezinhlangano zamazwe ngamazwe. Ngokungafani nomthetho wasekhaya, awunalo igunya eliphakathi lokuphoqelela - ukuthobela kuncike emvumeni, ekuvumelaneni, kanye nengcindezi yamazwe ngamazwe. Umthetho wamazwe ngamazwe womphakathi uhlanganisa izivumelwano, ukusetshenziswa kwamandla, ubukhosi, namalungelo abantu.
learnUni_law_f3_name: Imithombo yomthetho wamazwe ngamazwe (Art. 38 ICJ Statute): izivumelwano (ezibophezela amaqembu — pacta sunt servanda — Vienna Convention 1969), umthetho wesintu wamazwe ngamazwe (umkhuba wezwe ongaguquki + opinio juris — obophezela kuzo zonke izifundazwe), izimiso zomthetho jikelele, kanye nezinqumo zokwahlulela/imibhalo yezazi (imithombo engaphansi).
learnUni_law_f3_desc: International law governs relations between states and, increasingly, individuals and international organisations. Unlike domestic law, it lacks a central enforcement authority — compliance depends on consent, reciprocity, and international pressure. Public international law covers treaties, use of force, sovereignty, and human rights.
learnUni_law_f3_kp0: Sources of international law (Art. 38 ICJ Statute): treaties (binding on parties — pacta sunt servanda — Vienna Convention 1969), customary international law (consistent state practice + opinio juris — binding on all states), general principles of law, and judicial decisions/scholarly writings (subsidiary sources).
learnUni_law_f3_kp1: Ubukhosi bombuso: umgomo wokuthi amazwe anegunya eliphakeme endaweni yawo futhi ayalingana ngaphansi komthetho wamazwe ngamazwe. Ukungangeneleli: umsebenzi wokungagxambukeli ezindabeni zangaphakathi zezinye izifundazwe — kubukela phansi imfundiso ye-Responsibility to Protect (R2P).
learnUni_law_f3_kp2: Ukusetshenziswa kwamandla: I-Athikili 2(4) I-UN Charter iyakwenqabela ukusongela noma ukusetshenziswa kwamandla kunoma yimuphi umbuso. Okuhlukile: ukuzivikela (I-Article 51 — kufanele kube kudingekile futhi kulingane, kubikwe kuMkhandlu Wezokuphepha) kanye nokugunyazwa koMkhandlu Wezokuphepha (Isahluko VII — ukusongela ukuthula, ukwephulwa kokuthula, isenzo sobudlova).
learnUni_law_f3_kp3: Umthetho wamazwe ngamazwe wobugebengu: izinkantolo zaseNuremberg zasungula icala lomuntu ngamunye ngaphansi komthetho wamazwe ngamazwe. I-Rome Statute (2002) idale i-ICC - amandla okubulala abantu, ubugebengu obubhekiswe esintwini, ubugebengu bempi, kanye nobudlova. 'Ukulandela imiyalo' akukona ukuzivikela okuphelele.
learnUni_law_f3_kp4: Umthetho wolwandle (UNCLOS 1982): ulwandle lwendawo (12 miles nautical - sovereignty full), indawo yezomnotho ekhethekile (200 nm - amalungelo ezinsiza ezizimele), izilwandle eziphakeme (ngaphesheya kwegunya lezwe - inkululeko yokuhamba). Ukuxazululwa kwengxabano: I-International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea (ITLOS).
learnUni_law_f3_task: I-State A ihlasela i-State B, ifuna ukuzivikela ngemuva kokuhlasela kwe-inthanethi okubangelwa izinsizakalo zezobunhloli zakwa-B. Hlaziya: (a) Ingabe ukuhlasela ku-inthanethi kuhlanganisa ukuhlasela okuhlomile ngaphansi kwe-Article 51? (b) Ingabe impendulo ka-A iyadingeka futhi ilinganiselwe? (c) Iyiphi indima uMkhandlu Wezokuphepha we-UN ongafeza? (d) Ngabe abaholi boMbuso A bangabhekana nokushushiswa e-ICC? Yini okufanele ifakazelwe? Calula izinhlinzeko zesivumelwano ezifanele namacala angamazwe ngamazwe.
learnUni_law_f3_tp2: Umthetho wamazwe ngamazwe wobugebengu kanye ne-UNCLOS
learnUni_law_f4_desc: Izindlela zomthetho amakhono okucabanga kwezomthetho: ukufunda amacala, ukuhumusha imithetho, ukwakha izimpikiswano, nokubhala ngokusemthethweni. I-Jurisprudence (ithiyori yezomthetho/ifilosofi yomthetho) ihlola ubunjalo, imithombo, nezinjongo zomthetho ngokwawo — ibuza ukuthi ingabe umthetho nokuziphatha kuhlukene yini, yini eyenza umthetho ube semthethweni, nokuthi amajaji kufanele anqume kanjani amacala anzima.
learnUni_law_f4_kp0: Isizathu somthetho wecala: ratio decidendi (isimiso somthetho okunqunywa ngaso icala — okubophezela ezinkantolo eziphansi ngaphansi kwe-stare decisis), i-obiter dicta (izinkulumo ezivele zenzeka — zikholisa kuphela). Ukwehlukanisa (ukukhawulela isandulela), ukuhoxisa (inkantolo ephakeme iphikisana necala langaphambili), kanye nokusuka (Inkantolo Ephakeme isuka esandulweni sayo).
learnUni_law_f4_kp1: Incazelo engokomthetho: umthetho oqondile (sebenzisa incazelo evamile yamagama), umthetho wegolide (gwema imiphumela engenangqondo), umthetho wobubi (iyiphi inzondo iPhalamende eyayifuna ukuyelapha — Indaba ka-Heydon). Indlela yesimanje enenhloso (yayiyini inhloso yePhalamende?). I-ECHR s.3 HRA 1998: umthetho kufanele ufundwe ngokuhambisana namalungelo eNgqungquthela ngangokunokwenzeka.
learnUni_law_f4_kp2: I-Legal positivism (u-Austin, uHart): umthetho iqiniso lezenhlalo — imithetho evumelekile edalwe izinqubo ezaziwayo, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi yikuphi okuqukethwe kokuziphatha. 'Umthetho wokuqashelwa' kaHart ukhomba umthetho ovumelekile. Ithesis yokuhlukanisa umthetho/ukuziphatha.
learnUni_law_f4_kp3: Ithiyori yomthetho wemvelo: umthetho kumele uhambisane nezimiso zokuziphatha — umthetho ongalungile awuwona umthetho weqiniso (lex iniusta non est lex — Aquinas, inner moral of law kaFuller). Imithetho yamaNazi esetshenziswa yizinkantolo - inkulumo-mpikiswano yangemva kwempi yokuthi ukuvuma okusemthethweni kuvumele ububi yini.
learnUni_law_f4_kp4: 'Umthetho njengobuqotho' kaRonald Dworkin: umthetho awuqukethe nje imithetho kodwa izimiso (ilungelo lokukhathazeka okulinganayo nenhlonipho). Amajaji kufanele athole 'impendulo efanele' eyodwa efanelana kangcono nezinqumo zesikhathi esidlule kanye nokuziphatha kwezepolitiki. Amacala anzima: izimiso, hhayi nje imithetho, ziqondisa izinqumo. I-Critique ye-positivism ka-Hart.
learnUni_law_f4_task: Umthetho uthi 'azikho izimoto epaki'. Yeluleka ukuthi ngakunye kwalokhu kwenqatshelwe yini: (a) ibhayisikili, (b) imoto yokudlala yengane, (c) i-ambulensi esabela esimweni esiphuthumayo, (d) ithange lesikhumbuzo sempi. Sebenzisa yomithathu imithetho yendabuko yokutolika okusemthethweni. Bese, usebenzisa i-positivism ka-Hart kanye nomthetho ka-Dworkin njengobuqotho, chaza ukuthi i-theorist ngayinye ingabhekana kanjani 'ne-penumbra yokungaqiniseki' emthethweni.
learnUni_medicine_f0_desc: I-Anatomy yisifundo sesakhiwo somzimba womuntu - izitho zawo, izicubu, nezinhlelo. Ulwazi olunzulu lwe-anatomy luyisisekelo esingenakushintshwa somuthi wezokwelapha: awukwazi ukuxilonga noma ukwelapha lokho ongakwazi ukukubona ngeso lengqondo. I-anatomy yezokwelapha ihlanganisa i-gross anatomy, histology, embryology, kanye ne-radiological anatomy.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp0: I-anatomical terminology: izindiza (i-sagittal, i-coronal, i-transverse), izinkomba (i-medial / lateral, ephakeme / ephansi, yangaphambili / ngemuva, i-proximal / distal), izifunda, nokunyakaza (i-flexion/extension, abduction/adduction, rotation, pronation/supination).
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp1: I-anatomy yesistimu yenhliziyo: inhliziyo ilele ku-mediastinum. Uhlangothi lwesokudla (igazi le-venous lesistimu) → ukujikeleza kwamaphaphu. Uhlangothi lwesokunxele (okunomoya-mpilo) → ukujikeleza kwesistimu. Imithambo yenhliziyo: ukwehla kwangaphambili kwesobunxele (LAD), i-circumflex kwesokunxele (LCx), umthambo we-coronary wesokudla (RCA). I-LAD infarct = 'umenzi womfelokazi'.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp2: Uhlelo lwe-musculoskeletal: amathambo angama-206 kuhlaka lwamathambo abantu abadala. Amalunga: i-fibrous (i-sutures), i-cartilaginous (i-symphysis pubis), i-synovial (amalunga anyakazayo kakhulu - i-hip, idolo, ihlombe). I-Brachial plexus (C5-T1) ilawula isitho esingenhla - izilonda zezimpande zemizwa zikhiqiza amaphethini athile okuntuleka.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp3: I-viscera yesisu: i-peritoneum (imigqa ye-parietal odongeni lwesisu; i-visceral ivala izitho). Izitho ze-retroperitoneal (SADPUCKER): izindlala ze-suprarenal, i-aorta, i-duodenum (2nd-4th), ama-pancreas, ureters, ikholoni (ekhuphukayo / eyehla), izinso, i-esophagus, i-rectum.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp4: I-Neuroanatomy: I-12 cranial nerves (I Olfactory, II Optic, III Oculomotor, IV Trochlear, V Trigeminal, VI Abducens, VII Facial, VIII Vestibulocochlear, IX Glossopharyngeal, X Vagus, XI Accessory, XII Hypoglossal). Umgogodla uphela ku-L1-L2 - ukubhoboza i-lumbar ku-L3-L4.
learnUni_medicine_f0_task: Isiguli sibonisa ubuthakathaka engalweni yaso yangakwesokudla, ukulahlekelwa ukuzwa kwe-pinprick emunweni omncane kanye nephambili ephakathi, kanye nokonakala kwemisipha yesandla. Yenza isilonda sibe sasendaweni ngokwe-anatomically: (a) iyiphi inzwa ethintekile? (b) Sikuphi isilonda - ku-plexus ye-brachial noma i-nerve enegama? (c) Yini okungenzeka iyimbangela? (d) Yisiphi isakhiwo se-anatomical esicindezelwe? Faka umdwebo onelebula we-plexus efanele.
learnUni_medicine_f1_desc: I-Physiology ichaza indlela amasistimu omzimba asebenza ngayo - indlela inhliziyo empompa ngayo igazi, indlela izinso ezihlunga futhi zilawule ngayo ama-electrolyte, indlela amaphaphu ashintshana ngayo amagesi, nendlela amahomoni axhumanisa ngayo izitho ezikude. Ixhumanisa i-anatomy (isakhiwo) nemithi yomtholampilo (ukungasebenzi kahle). I-Physiology iyisisekelo semishini yokuxilongwa.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp0: I-Cardiac physiology: Indlela ye-Frank-Starling - ivolumu ye-stroke iyanda ngokukhuphuka kwevolumu yokuphela kwe-diastolic (ukulayisha kuqala) - inhliziyo inwebeka ngokuqhubekayo → amandla amakhulu. Ukuphuma kwenhliziyo = izinga lokushaya kwenhliziyo × umthamo wokushaya. Ingcindezi ye-arterial eshoyo = ukuphuma kwenhliziyo × ukumelana okuphelele kwe-peripheral.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp1: I-physiology yokuphefumula: ivolumu ye-tidal (500 mL ekuphumuleni), umthamo obalulekile, indawo efile (~ 150 mL - imigudu yomoya engabandakanyeki ekushintsheni kwegesi). Ukufaniswa kwe-Ventilation-perfusion (V/Q): i-V/Q ekahle = 1. Ukungafani kubangela i-hypoxaemia (i-O₂ ephansi). I-Hypercapnia (i-CO₂ ephezulu) iyisisusa esiyinhloko sokuphefumula.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp2: I-Physiology yezinso: izinga lokuhlunga kwe-glomerular (i-GFR evamile ~ 100 mL/min). Ukumuncwa kabusha kweshubhu (Na⁺, i-glucose, ama-amino acid) kanye nokukhishwa (H⁺, izidakamizwa). I-Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone System (RAAS): umfutho wegazi ophansi → i-renin → Ang II → i-aldosterone → Na⁺ nokugcinwa kwamanzi → i-BP iyakhuphuka.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp3: I-Endocrine physiology: i-insulin (ama-β-cell, ukumuncwa kwe-glucose ngemisipha/amafutha, ukuhlanganiswa kwe-glycogen, ivimbela i-gluconeogenesis), i-glucagon (amangqamuzana a-α, aphikisana ne-insulin - i-glycogenolysis, i-gluconeogenesis), i-cortisol (i-HPA axis - impendulo yokucindezeleka, i-anti-inflammatory, ikhuphula i-glucose yegazi), i-thyroid gland).
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp4: I-Neurophysiology: amandla esenzo, i-neuromuscular junction (i-acetylcholine → i-nicotinic receptor → amandla epuleti lokugcina → amandla esenzo → ukufinyela kwemisipha ngendlela ye-filament eslayidayo). Isistimu yezinzwa ezizenzakalelayo: uzwela (ukulwa / indiza - i-noradrenaline) ngokumelene ne-parasympathetic (ukuphumula / ukugaya - i-acetylcholine).
learnUni_medicine_f1_task: Isiguli sitholwa sidindilizile sine-BP 80/50, ukushaya kwenhliziyo okungu-120, nokuphefumula ukuphefumula okungu-28/min. Igesi yegazi ibonisa i-pH 7.25, pCO₂ 30 mmHg, HCO₃⁻ 13 mEq/L. Hlaziya: (a) Hlobo luni lokuphazamiseka kwe-acid-base lolu? (b) Ingabe sikhona isinxephezelo sokuphefumula? (c) Bala igebe le-anion (Na=138, Cl=100, HCO₃=13). (d) Yiziphi izindlela zokusebenza komzimba (i-RAAS, ukuphefumula, izinso) ezizosebenza emahoreni alandelayo ukuya emahoreni ukuze kulungiswe lokhu?
learnUni_medicine_f2_desc: I-Pathology isifundo sesayensi sezifo - izimbangela zaso (i-aetiology), izindlela (pathogenesis), izinguquko zesakhiwo (i-morphology), nemiphumela yokusebenza. I-pathology ejwayelekile ihlola izinqubo ezivamile ezifweni eziningi: ukuvuvukala, i-neoplasia, i-thrombosis, nokuwohloka. I-pathology ehlelekile isebenza ezithweni ezithile nezifo.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp0: Ukuvuvukala: acute (imizuzu-izinsuku - izinguquko ze-vascular, ukungena kwe-neutrophil, okuqondiswa yi-histamine, i-prostaglandins, i-kinins, umphelelisi). Okungapheli (izinyanga-iminyaka - ama-macrophages, i-lymphocytes, i-fibroblasts - ukwakheka kwe-granuloma ku-TB, i-Crohn's, i-sarcoidosis).
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp1: I-Neoplasia: i-benign (ihlukanisiwe kahle, igoqekile, ayihlaseli) iqhathaniswa ne-malignant (ihlukaniswe kabi, ihlaselayo, i-metastasising). Izimpawu zomdlavuza (u-Hanahan no-Weinberg): ukwanda okuqhubekayo, ukugwema abacindezeli ukukhula, ukumelana nokufa kwamangqamuzana, ukungafi okuphindaphindayo, i-angiogenesis, ukuhlasela/i-metastasis, ukungazinzi kwe-genome, ukuvuvukala okukhuthaza isimila.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp2: I-Thrombosis: I-Virchow's triad — ukulimala kwe-endothelial (okubaluleke kakhulu), ukugeleza kwegazi okungavamile (i-turbulence noma stasis), kanye ne-hypercoagulability. I-Arterial thrombi: i-platelet-rich, emhlophe. I-venous thrombi (DVT): ebomvu (RBC-fibrin). I-Pulmonary Embolism: I-DVT fragment ihlala ekujikelezeni kwamaphaphu.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp3: Ukulimala kweseli nokufa: ischaemia (ukuncipha kwe-ATP → Na⁺/K⁺ ukwehluleka kwephampu → ukuvuvukala kweseli → necrosis). I-Apoptosis (ukufa kweseli okuhleliwe - i-caspase cascade, i-nuclear condensation, imizimba ye-apoptotic - akukho ukuvuvukala). I-Necrosis (i-passive, i-cell rupture → ukuvuvukala). Izinhlobo: i-coagulative, i-liquefactive (ubuchopho), i-caseous (TB), i-gangrenous.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp4: I-Atherossteosis: isifo esiqhutshwa yi-lipid, isifo esingapheli sokuvuvukala kwezindonga ze-arterial. Amangqamuzana egwebu (ama-macrophage agila i-LDL ene-oxidised) → imivimbo yamafutha → ama-fibrous plaques → ama-plaque ayinkimbinkimbi (izilonda, ukopha, ukubala, ukushayeka kwenhliziyo). Izici eziyingozi: umfutho wegazi ophakeme, i-hyperlipidemia, ukubhema, isifo sikashukela, umlando womndeni.
learnUni_medicine_f2_task: Umuntu obhemayo oneminyaka engama-65 onesifo sikashukela sohlobo 2 uveza ubuhlungu besifuba obuvela kungazelelwe obuphuma engalweni yangakwesokunxele, i-diaphoresis, kanye nokuphakama kwe-ST ku-ECG. I-Troponin I iphakeme ngokuphawulekayo. Chaza: (a) inqubo yokugula ebangela i-MI eyingozi isebenzisa i-Virchow's triad kanye ne-atherosclerosis, (b) kwenzekani ku-cardiomyocyte ngemva kwemizuzu engu-30, amahora angu-6, namahora angu-24 e-ischemia, (c) uhlobo lwe-necrosis oluba umphumela, kanye (d) nokulandelana kokuvuvukala nokuphulukisa emasontweni alandelayo.
learnUni_medicine_f2_tp2: Ukulimala nokufa kweseli || Ikhemisi || I-Pharmacology icwaninga ukuthi izidakamizwa zisebenzisana kanjani nezinhlelo zebhayoloji. I-Pharmacokinetics (lokho umzimba okwenzayo emthini) kanye ne-pharmacodynamics (okwenziwa umuthi emzimbeni) kusekela ukunquma okunengqondo. Wonke umuthi unesamukeli, indlela, kanye nephrofayili yomphumela ongemuhle okufanele kwaziwe ngokusebenza komtholampilo okuphephile.
learnUni_medicine_f3_name: I-Pharmacokinetics - ADME: Ukumuncwa (i-bioavailability F = ingxenyenamba efinyelela ukujikeleza kwesistimu), Ukusabalalisa (ivolumu yokusabalalisa i-Vd = umthamo / [i-plasma], izidakamizwa eziboshwe kakhulu ngamaprotheni zine-Vd ephansi), i-Metabolism (ikakhulukazi i-CYP450 ye-hepatic enzymes - umphumela wokuqala wokudlula), Ukuqedwa (isigamu se-renal / ℃ = 9 × = ₂₂ = i-renal isigamu / ℃ 6 ℃ = 9 × 3 × 3 ₂.
learnUni_medicine_f3_desc: I-Pharmacodynamics: izidakamizwa zisebenza kuma-receptors (ama-GPCR, amashaneli e-ion, ama-nuclear receptors, ama-enzyme-axhumene). I-Agonist (yenza i-receptor isebenze), umphikisi (amabhulokhi - anokuncintisana noma angancintisani). I-EC50: ukugxila kukhiqiza umphumela omkhulu ongu-50%. Ukusebenza kahle (umphumela omkhulu) vs. potency (EC50).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp0: Ukusebenzisana kwe-Drug receptor: ukulawulwa kwe-receptor (ngemuva kokuphikisana okungapheli - kuchaza izenzakalo eziphindaphindiwe), ukwehla (ngemuva kwe-agonism engapheli - ukubekezelelana). Ama-receptors ayisipele. Ama-agonists ayingxenye: ukusebenza kahle kwe-submaximal ngisho naku-100% yokuhlala kwama-receptor - angenza njengabaphikisi phambi kwe-agonist egcwele.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp1: Amakilasi ezidakamizwa abalulekile: ama-beta-blockers (abaphikisi abancintisana nabo ku-β₁/₂-adrenoceptors - anciphisa izinga lokushaya kwenhliziyo kanye ne-BP), ama-ACE inhibitors (ama-angiotensin aguqula i-enzyme → i-Ang II engaphansi → i-vasodilation + i-aldosterone engaphansi → i-BP encishisiwe), ama-statins (HMG-CoA reductase → i-cholesterol ephansi enciphisa i-LDL). → i-plasma ephansi ye-LDL).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp2: Ukusabela okungalungile kwezidakamizwa (ADR): Uhlobo A (oluthuthukisiwe - olubikezelwayo, oluncike kumthamo, isb. ukopha nge-warfarin), Uhlobo B (oluyinqaba - olungalindelekile, olune-immune-mediated, isb. i-anaphylaxis nge-penicillin), Uhlobo C (ukusetshenziswa okungamahlalakhona), Uhlobo D (kulibaziseke - i-carcinogenesis, i-teratogenesis), Uhlobo Lokuqeda (ukuphela kokusetshenziswa). Ukusebenzisana kwezidakamizwa: ama-CYP inducers (i-rifampicin inciphisa umphumela wezinto zokuvimbela inzalo ezithathwa ngomlomo), ama-CYP inhibitors (i-erythromycin inyusa amazinga e-simvastatin → i-myopathy).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp3: Isiguli esine-atrial fibrillation siqaliswa nge-warfarin (okuhloswe ngaso i-INR 2-3) bese siba nesifo sokuphefumula esidinga i-erythromycin. Emasontweni amabili kamuva INR = 5.8 ngokopha kwezinsini. Chaza: (a) indlela ye-warfarin nokuthi kungani i-INR igadwa, (b) ukusebenzisana kwe-pharmacokinetic ne-erythromycin, (c) ikuphi ukwelashwa okudingekayo manje, (d) iziphi izinyathelo zesikhathi esizayo zokunquma okufanele zithathwe. Bandakanya isigaba sezidakamizwa, i-receptor/enzyme, namapharamitha athile e-kinetic.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp4: Adverse drug reactions (ADR): Type A (augmented — predictable, dose-dependent, e.g. bleeding with warfarin), Type B (bizarre — unpredictable, immune-mediated, e.g. anaphylaxis with penicillin), Type C (chronic use), Type D (delayed — carcinogenesis, teratogenesis), Type E (end of use — withdrawal). Drug interactions: CYP inducers (rifampicin reduces effect of oral contraceptives), CYP inhibitors (erythromycin raises simvastatin levels → myopathy).
learnUni_medicine_f3_task: A patient with atrial fibrillation is started on warfarin (target INR 2-3) and then develops a respiratory infection requiring erythromycin. Two weeks later INR = 5.8 with gum bleeding. Explain: (a) warfarin's mechanism and why INR is monitored, (b) the pharmacokinetic interaction with erythromycin, (c) what treatment is needed now, (d) what future prescribing precautions should be taken. Include drug class, receptor/enzyme, and specific kinetic parameters.
learnUni_medicine_f3_tp2: Izigaba zezidakamizwa eziyisihluthulelo kanye nokusabela okubi
learnUni_medicine_f4_name: Izikhungo Zemithi Yezokwelapha || Imithi yokwelapha ihlanganisa i-anatomy, physiology, pathology, kanye ne-pharmacology ekunakekelweni kwesiguli. Ukuthatha umlando kanye nokuhlolwa komzimba kungamakhono ayisisekelo omtholampilo adala ukuhlonza okuhlukile. Ubungcweti, izimiso zokuziphatha kwezokwelapha, kanye nemithi esekelwe ebufakazini izisekelo zokusebenza okuhle komtholampilo.
learnUni_medicine_f4_desc: Ukuthatha umlando: ukwethula isikhalazo (i-PC), umlando wokwethula isikhalazo (i-HPC - SOCRATES: indawo, ukuqala, uhlamvu, imisebe, izinhlangano, inkambo yesikhathi, izici ezikhulisayo / ezikhululayo, ukuqina), umlando wezokwelapha owedlule (PMH), umlando wezidakamizwa (DHx), umlando womndeni (FHx), umlando womphakathi (SHx - ukubhema, utshwala, umsebenzi, ubudlelwano), ukubuyekezwa.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp0: Ukuhlolwa komtholampilo: ukuhlolwa okuvamile → izimpawu ezibalulekile (BP, HR, RR, SpO₂, izinga lokushisa, i-GCS) → ukuhlolwa okuqondene nesistimu. Indlela ye-ABCDE yokuhlola okunamandla: Indlela Yomoya, Ukuphefumula, Ukujikeleza, Ukukhubazeka (i-neuro), Ukuchayeka. Isikolo se-NEWS2 seziguli eziwohlokayo.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp1: Izimiso zokuziphatha kwezokwelapha (izimiso ezine — Beauchamp & Childress): ukuzimela (hlonipha ilungelo lesiguli lokunquma), ukusizakala (ukwenza ngendlela ezuzisa isiguli), ukungabi yindoda (okokuqala, ungalimazi — primum non nocere), ubulungisa (ukwabiwa kwezinsiza ngendlela efanele, ukuphathwa ngokulinganayo). Ukungqubuzana phakathi kwezimiso kuvamile ekusebenzeni.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp2: Imvume enolwazi: idinga umthamo (ukuqonda, ukugcina, ukukala, ukuxhumana), ulwazi (ubungozi bezinto ezibonakalayo, ezinye izindlela, imiphumela yokungaphathwa kahle), kanye nokuzinikela (akukho ukuphoqelelwa). Umthetho Wamandla Engqondo ka-2005 (e-UK): uma untula amandla, isinqumo seqembu elithakaselekayo ± amandla ahlala njalo ommeli.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp3: Imithi esekelwe ebufakazini (EBM): ukubuyekezwa okuhlelekile + ukuhlaziya imeta (ubufakazi obuphezulu bemibuzo yomtholampilo), ama-RCT, izifundo zeqembu, izifundo zokulawula amacala, uchungechunge lwamacala, umbono wochwepheshe. Ukuhlola okubalulekile: hlola ukufaneleka kwangaphakathi (ingabe ucwaningo beluqhutshwa kahle?), ukuba semthethweni kwangaphandle (ingabe imiphumela iyasebenza esigulini sami?), kanye nokubaluleka komtholampilo (NNT, usayizi womphumela).
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp4: Owesifazane oneminyaka engu-45 ubudala onesifo sokuwa owaziwayo ungeniswe equlekile. Umlingani wakhe uthi sekuphele isonto lonke engazisebenzisi izinqamuleli zakhe. Akanawo amandla ommeli futhi akakwazi nokuvuma. Usebenzisa izimiso ezine zezimiso zokuziphatha kwezokwelapha kanye noMthetho Wokukwazi Kwengqondo, hlaziya: (a) ingabe ukwelashwa kunganikezwa ngaphandle kwemvume? (b) iyiphi inqubo yenzuzo engcono? (c) lapho eseluleme, yini okufanele kuxoxwe ngayo? (d) ungabhekana kanjani nesivumelwano nemithi?
learnUni_medicine_f4_tp2: Izisekelo Zengqondo || Isayikholoji yaseNyuvesi iwumkhakha wesayensi — isebenzisa izindlela zokuhlola, izibalo, nobufakazi obubuyekezwe ontanga ukuze kufundwe ingqondo nokuziphatha. Izinhlaka zayo ezinkulu zetiyori zisukela ekuncishisweni kwebhayoloji kuye kokwakhiwa komphakathi. Ukuqonda umlando nefilosofi yesayikholoji kuqondanisa zonke izifundo ezalandela.
learnUni_psychology_f0_name: Imibono emikhulu: yebhayoloji (ubuchopho, izakhi zofuzo, amahomoni), ingqondo (ukucubungula ulwazi, izethulo zengqondo), ukuziphatha (Skinner - isimo, ukufunda okusebenzayo), ingqondo (uFreud - ukungazi, ukucindezelwa, izindlela zokuzivikela), ubuntu (uMaslow, uRogers - ukuzenzela), social (Tajfel, Milgram - ithonya).
learnUni_psychology_f0_desc: Izindlela zocwaningo: okokuhlola (sebenzisa i-IV, ukukala i-DV, ukudideka kokulawula), ukuhlobana (ubudlelwano bokulinganisa, r = −1 kuya ku-+1, ayikwazi ukucabangela imbangela), ukuqaphela (imvelo, umhlanganyeli), ucwaningo lwecala (ukujula kodwa ukulinganiselwa okujwayelekile), inhlolovo (amasampula amakhulu, ukuchema kokuzibika). Ngaphakathi vs. phakathi kwedizayini yezihloko.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp0: Izisekelo zezibalo: null hypothesis significance testing (NHST) — p-value < 0.05 Convention (Fisherian). Usayizi womphumela (Cohen's d, η²) - ubalulekile ngisho noma kungenjalo ngokwezibalo. Inkinga yokuphindaphinda: okuningi okutholakele okudala kwehluleka ukuphindaphinda (ukuqala komphakathi, ukuqedwa kwe-ego) - isayensi evulekile kanye nokubhalisa ngaphambilini kuyizimpendulo.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp1: Izimiso zokuziphatha (ikhodi ye-BPS): imvume enolwazi, ilungelo lokuhoxa, ukuvikelwa ekulimaleni, ukugcinwa kuyimfihlo, ukuxoxisana. Ucwaningo lwaseJele laseStanford (Zimbardo 1971) kanye nezifundo ze-Milgram zasusa inkulumo-mpikiswano ehlala njalo ngengozi yocwaningo eyamukelekayo. Ukubuyekezwa kwekomidi le-IRB/lekhomithi sekuyimpoqo manje.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp2: Statistical foundations: null hypothesis significance testing (NHST) — p-value < 0.05 convention (Fisherian). Effect size (Cohen's d, η²) — practically significant even if not statistically. Replication crisis: many classic findings fail to replicate (social priming, ego depletion) — open science and pre-registration are responses.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp3: Ethics (BPS code): informed consent, the right to withdraw, protection from harm, confidentiality, debriefing. The Stanford Prison Experiment (Zimbardo 1971) and Milgram studies sparked lasting debate on acceptable research risk. IRB/ethics committee review is now mandatory.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp4: Izisekelo zebhayoloji zokuziphatha: uhlelo lwezinzwa (CNS + PNS + ANS). Isakhiwo sobuchopho: i-brainstem (imisebenzi ebalulekile), uhlelo lwe-limbic (umzwelo, inkumbulo - i-hippocampus, i-amygdala), i-basal ganglia (ukulawula imoto, umvuzo), i-cerebral cortex (ukuqonda okuphezulu, ubuntu). I-Neuroimaging: i-fMRI (ukugeleza kwegazi), i-EEG (isikhathi), i-PET (imephu ye-neurotransmitter).
learnUni_psychology_f0_task: Hlola ngokujulile isimangalo esithi 'i-psychology iyisayensi'. Empendulweni yakho: (a) chaza 'isayensi' usebenzisa umbandela wokuqamba amanga we-Popper, (b) hlola izinga izindlela ezinkulu zesayensi yezengqondo ezihlangabezana nalo mbandela, (c) xoxa ngenkinga yokuphindaphinda nokuthi ivezani nge-NHST, (d) phakamisa izinguquko ezimbili zendlela yokusebenza ezingaqinisa izifakazelo zesayensi yesayensi yengqondo.
learnUni_psychology_f1_name: I-Developmental Psychology || Isayikholoji yentuthuko ifunda ukuthi abantu bashintsha kanjani kuyo yonke iminyaka yokuphila - kusukela ekukhuleni kwangaphambi kokubeletha kuya ebuntwaneni, ebuntwaneni, ebusheni, ebusheni nasebudaleni. Ihlola ukukhula kwengqondo, ukuhlalisana, imizwa, nokuziphatha, kanye nokuxhumana phakathi kokuvuthwa kwezinto eziphilayo kanye nolwazi lwendawo ezungezile.
learnUni_psychology_f1_desc: Izigaba zokukhula kwengqondo kaPiaget: inzwa (0-2y, into unomphela), preoperational (2-7y, egocentrism, akukho ukongiwa), ukusebenza okuphathekayo (7-12y, ukongiwa kwemvelo, ukuguqulwa), ukusebenza okusemthethweni (12+y, ukucabanga okungabonakali, ukucabanga okucatshangelwayo).
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp0: Ithiyori ye-sociocultural ka-Vygotsky: I-Zone of Proximal Development (ZPD) — igebe phakathi kwalokho okungenziwa ingane iyodwa kanye nokweseka omunye onolwazi oluthe xaxa. Ulimi luyithuluzi eliyinhloko lengqondo. Kuqhathaniswa nokugxila kukaPiaget ekuhloleni yedwa.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp1: Ithiyori yokunamathisela (i-Bowlby, i-Ainsworth): izinsana zakha ibhondi yokunamathisela eyinhloko ebalulekile ekuthuthukisweni. Inqubo Yesimo Esiyinqaba ihlukanisa okunamathiselwe: okuvikelekile (65%), okungavikelekile-okugwema (20%), okungavikelekile-okungaqondakali (15%), okungahlelekile. Amamodeli okusebenza angaphakathi aqondisa ubudlelwano besikhathi esizayo.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp2: Ukuthuthukiswa kwentsha: Ubunikazi buka-Erikson vs. isigaba sokudideka. Ukuthuthukiswa kokuziphatha kukaKohlberg: okwandulelayo (ukuzicabangela), okuvamile (imithetho yezenhlalakahle), i-postconventional (izimiso zomhlaba wonke). Ubuchopho bentsha: i- limbic system ivuthwa ngaphambi kwe-prefrontal cortex - ukuthatha ingozi, ukuguquguquka kwemizwelo.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp3: Ukukhula nokuguga kwabantu abadala: Izigaba zakamuva zika-Erikson — ukusondelana uma uqhathaniswa nokuzihlukanisa (umuntu omdala osemusha), ukukhiqiza ngokumelene nokuma (omdala ophakathi), ubuqotho ngokumelene nokuphelelwa ithemba (omdala omdala). Ukuguga kwengqondo: isivinini sokucubungula siyehla; ubuhlakani obucwebezelayo (ulwazi oluqoqiwe) luhlala luzinzile lube ngama-70s. Ukuguga okuphumelelayo: Imodeli ye-SOC ka-Baltes (ukukhethwa, ukuthuthukiswa, isinxephezelo).
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp4: Ingane eneminyaka engu-4 ubudala iboniswa izibuko ezimbili ezinamanani alinganayo amanzi, bese amanzi aphuma engilazini eyodwa athululelwa engilazini ende, encane. Ingane ithi ingilazi ende inamanzi amaningi. (a) Ingane ikusiphi isigaba sePiageian? (b) Yikuphi ukulinganiselwa kwengqondo okuchaza lokhu? (c) U-Vygotsky angasichaza kanjani isimo esifanayo ngendlela ehlukile? (d) Yakha ucwaningo ukuze uhlole ukuthi isikafula singasheshisa ikhono lokongiwa kwemvelo. Cabangela izindaba zokuziphatha.
learnUni_psychology_f2_name: I-Clinical psychology isebenzisa isayensi yokusebenza kwengqondo ekuhloleni, ekuxilongeni, nasekwelashweni kwezimo zempilo yengqondo. I-psychology engavamile ihlola imvelo, izimbangela, kanye nenkambo yokuphazamiseka kwengqondo. Ihlanganisa ukuqonda okujulile kwe-psychopathology nokungenelela okusekelwe ebufakazini okufana ne-CBT, i-DBT, nokwelashwa kwengqondo.
learnUni_psychology_f2_desc: Ukuchaza okungavamile: ukuphindaphindeka kwezibalo, ukuchezuka ezinkambisweni zomphakathi, ukwehluleka ukusebenza ngendlela efanele (i-Rosenhan), kanye nenqubo yezempilo yengqondo efanelekile (Jahoda). I-DSM-5 (APA) kanye ne-ICD-11 (WHO) ihlinzeka ngemibandela yokuxilonga yokuphazamiseka kwengqondo - izinhlelo zezigaba ezinemikhawulo eyaziwayo.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp0: I-Major Depressive Disorder: I-cognitive triad (Beck - imibono engemihle ngokuqondene nawe, umhlaba, ikusasa), ukungabi namandla okufundile (Seligman), i-monoamine hypothesis (i-serotonin encishisiwe ne-noradrenaline). Ukwelashwa: I-SSRIs (i-pharmacotherapy yomugqa wokuqala), i-CBT (ukuhlelwa kabusha kwengqondo, ukuqaliswa kokuziphatha), ukwelashwa okuhlangene okuphezulu.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp1: Major depressive disorder: cognitive triad (Beck — negative views of self, world, future), learned helplessness (Seligman), monoamine hypothesis (reduced serotonin and noradrenaline). Treatment: SSRIs (first-line pharmacotherapy), CBT (cognitive restructuring, behavioural activation), combination therapy superior.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp2: I-Schizophrenia: izimpawu ezinhle (i-allucinations, ukukhohlisa, inkulumo engahlelekile), izimpawu ezimbi (i-flat touch, i-alogia, i-avolition). I-Dopamine hypothesis (umsebenzi oweqile we-D2 receptor endleleni ye-mesolimbic). Ama-Antipsychotics: Abaphikisi be-D2. I-Genetic heritability ~ 80% (MZ concordance 48%).
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp3: I-Cognitive Behavioral therapy (CBT): U-Aaron Beck - imicabango ezenzakalelayo ne-schemas engalungile igcina ukuphazamiseka. Imodeli ye-ABC: Ukwenza kusebenze umcimbi → Izinkolelo → Imiphumela. Ukungenelela: amarekhodi emicabango, ukuhlolwa kokuziphatha, ukuchayeka kanye nokuvimbela impendulo (ERP ye-OCD). Isisekelo sobufakazi: ukwesekwa okuqinile kwe-RCT yokucindezeleka, ukukhathazeka, i-OCD, i-PTSD.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp4: Imodeli ye-biopsychosocial (Engel): ukuphazamiseka kwengqondo kuvela ezintweni eziphilayo (izakhi zofuzo, amakhemikhali obuchopho), ezengqondo (ukuqonda, ubuntu, umlando wokufunda), kanye nezenhlalo (zokuhlukumezeka, ubumpofu, ubudlelwano, isiko). Ichaza ukuthi kungani kungekho ukwelashwa okukodwa okusebenzela wonke umuntu nokuthi kungani ukuhlola okuphelele kubalulekile.
learnUni_psychology_f2_task: Owesifazane oneminyaka engu-28 uveza isimo sengqondo esiphansi, ukuncipha kwesisindo esingu-6kg, ukuvuka ekuseni kakhulu, ukungakwazi ukugxilisa ingqondo, nokuzizwa engelutho izinyanga ezi-3. Akanazo izimpawu zengqondo. (a) Nikeza ukuxilongwa okuhlukile usebenzisa i-DSM-5. (b) Chaza izimpawu zakhe usebenzisa imodeli yengqondo ka-Beck. (c) Chaza amaseshini angu-4 okuqala e-CBT nokuthi yini ongahlose ukuyifinyelela kuleyo naleyo. (d) Ngokusebenzisa imodeli ye-biopsychosocial, khomba isici esisodwa sebhayoloji, esisodwa esingokwengqondo, kanye nesokugcina umphakathi.
learnUni_psychology_f3_desc: I-cognitive psychology ifunda izinqubo zengqondo - ukunaka, ukubona, inkumbulo, ulimi, ukucabanga, nokuxazulula izinkinga - kusetshenziswa isingathekiso sokucubungula ulwazi. Isekela isayense yezemfundo (indlela yokufundisa ngempumelelo) kanye nezinhlelo zokusebenza zomtholampilo (kungani inkumbulo inephutha, ukuthi ukunaka kwehluleka kanjani ku-ADHD, ukuthi ukucabanga kuhamba kabi kanjani ekucindezelekeni).
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp0: Amamodeli enkumbulo: Imodeli yezitolo eziningi ze-Atkinson-Shiffrin (izinzwa → STM → LTM ngokuzijwayeza). Imodeli yenkumbulo esebenzayo (i-Baddeley & Hitch): iluphu ye-phonological, i-visuospatial sketchpad, i-episodic buffer, isikhulu esiphezulu. Amaleveli okucubungula (u-Craik & Lockhart): umbhalo wekhodi ojulile, onemininingwane kakhudlwana → ukugcinwa okungcono.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp1: Amaphutha enkumbulo: ukucaciswa kombhalo wekhodi (uThomson & Tulving — izimpawu lapho kuthathwa kufanele zifane nomxholo wombhalo wekhodi). Umphumela wemininingwane engamanga (Loftus): imininingwane yangemva komcimbi ishintsha inkumbulo. Ubufakazi bofakazi bokuzibonela abuthembeki kakhulu - ukuzethemba akubikezeli ukunemba. Izinkumbulo ezingamanga zingatshalwa.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp2: Ukunakwa: ukunaka okukhethiwe (umphumela wephathi kaCherry, imodeli yokunciphisa i-Treisman). Ukunaka okuhlukene: ukusebenza kwemisebenzi emibili ekhawulelwe ukucubungula kwesiteshi esisodwa emazingeni okuqonda. Ubumpumputhe bokunganaki (Simons & Chabris — ukuhlolwa kwe-gorilla). Ukunaka okuqhubekayo nokuqapha kuyehla.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp3: Ulimi: I-Chomsky's universal grammar — innate language acquisition device (LAD). I-critical period hypothesis: ulimi kufanele lutholwe ngaphambi kokuthomba ukuze lube nekhono eligcwele (i-Genie case study). Ukuhlobana kolimi (Sapir-Whorf): ulimi luthonya umcabango — inguqulo eqinile inqatshiwe, inguqulo ebuthakathaka iyasekelwa.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp4: Ukuxazulula izinkinga nokucabanga: i-heuristics (ukutholakala - yahlulela amathuba ngokuthi izibonelo zifika kalula kanjani engqondweni; ukumela - hlulela ngokufana ne-prototype; ukubambelela). Ukuqinisekisa ukuchema (ukuthambekela kokufuna ubufakazi obuqinisekisayo). Ithiyori yenqubo ekabili (Kahneman): Isistimu 1 (esheshayo, ezenzakalelayo, i-heuristic) vs. Isistimu 2 (ehamba kancane, ehlosiwe, ehlaziya).
learnUni_psychology_f3_task: U-Loftus & Palmer (1974) ubonise ukuthi isenzo esisetshenziswa lapho kubuzwa ngengozi yemoto ('ephihliziwe', 'ishayisa', 'iqhume') ithinte isivinini esilinganiselwe kanye nemibiko yakamuva yengilazi ephukile. (a) Chaza umphumela usebenzisa ithiyori ye-schema kanye nomthelela wolwazi olunganembile. (b) Yakha impinda enokuthuthukiswa okubili kokufaneleka kwangaphakathi. (c) Xoxa ngomphumela wokuxoxisana namaphoyisa kanye nobufakazi bofakazi bokuzibonela enkantolo. (d) Hlola ubuqiniso bemvelo bocwaningo lwenkumbulo yaselabhorethri.
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp1: Amaphutha enkumbulo kanye nobufakazi bofakazi bokuzibonela
learnUni_psychology_f4_desc: Isayikholoji yebhayoloji ihlola izisekelo zemizwa, amahomoni, kanye nezakhi zofuzo zokuziphatha nezinqubo zengqondo. Ihlanganisa i-psychology ne-neuroscience - ichaza indlela ubuchopho obukhiqiza ngayo ukwazi, indlela amahomoni ashintsha ngayo isimo sengqondo nokuziphatha, nokuthi ukuhlukahluka kwezakhi zofuzo kuthonya kanjani ubuntu nempilo yengqondo.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp0: Amahomoni nokuziphatha: i-cortisol (impendulo yokucindezeleka — i-axis ye-HPA: i-hypothalamus → CRH → i-pituitary → ACTH → i-adrenal cortex → i-cortisol). Ukucindezeleka okungapheli: ukunciphisa ivolumu ye-hippocampal (i-cortisol enobuthi kuma-neurons), inkumbulo ekhubazekile nokusebenza komzimba. I-Testosterone: isixhumanisi sobudlova sinesizotha futhi sincike komongo.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp1: I-Genetics of behaviour: heritability = ingxenye yokuhluka ngenxa yomehluko wezakhi zofuzo. Izifundo ezimbili: i-MZ (efanayo) vs. DZ (yobuzalwane). Izifundo zokutholwa. Intelligence heritability ~50-80% (kuncike kokuqukethwe). I-Schizophrenia: h²≈80%, alukho ufuzo olulodwa - i-polygenic, i-genetic heterogeneity ephezulu. I-GWAS ihlonza okuhlukile okuningi okujwayelekile okunemiphumela emincane.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp2: Ukuziphendukela kwemvelo nokuziphatha: ukufaneleka okuhlanganisiwe (Hamilton), ukukhethwa kwezihlobo, i-reciprocal altruism (Trivers). I-Evolutionary psychology: amamojula okubona ubuso, ukutholwa komkhohlisi, okuthandwa ngumngane womshado, ukutholwa kolimi. Ukugxeka: izindaba ezijwayela ukuzivumelanisa nezimo ngokuvamile azinamanga - zidinga ubufakazi bokuthuthukisa.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp3: Ukuqaphela: inkinga enzima (Chalmers — kungani kukhona isipiliyoni sokuqonda nhlobo?) vs. Izinkinga ezilula (ukuxhumanisa ukwazi nezimo zobuchopho). I-Neural correlates of consciousness (NCC): ithiyori yendawo yokusebenza yomhlaba wonke (Baars/Dehaene), ithiyori yolwazi edidiyelwe (Tononi). Ucwaningo lwe-Split-Brain (Sperry): ama-hemispheres amabili angaba nokuqwashisa okuzimele.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp4: Ukulala nokuphupha: izigaba zokulala: izigaba ze-NREM 1-3 (ukukhanya kwe-N1 → i-N3 igagasi elihamba kancane, elibuyiselayo) kanye ne-REM (ukunyakaza kwamehlo okusheshayo — ukuphupha, ukuqinisa inkumbulo). Ukuntuleka kokulala: kukhubaza ukunaka, inkumbulo, umsebenzi wokuzivikela komzimba, imizwa. I-Neuroscience of dreaming: i-dorsolateral prefrontal cortex ivaliwe (ukunciphisa ukucabanga okujulile - kuchaza ukungaqondakali kwephupho).
learnUni_psychology_f4_task: Xoxa ngesisekelo sebhayoloji sengcindezi. (a) Chaza i-axis ye-SAM (i-sympathetic-adrenal medullary — adrenaline, fast) kanye ne-HPA axis (cortisol, slow) izimpendulo ku-stressor esinamandla. (b) Iyini imiphumela yesikhathi eside yokucindezeleka okungapheli ku-hippocampus namasosha omzimba? (c) Chaza idizayini yocwaningo ekabili yokwehlukanisa iminikelo yofuzo kanye nemvelo ukuze kube sengozini yengcindezi. (d) Hlola incazelo yebhayoloji ye-PTSD (i-post-traumatic stress disorder) kanye nemithelela yayo yomtholampilo.
learnUni_sociology_f0_desc: I-Sociology ihlola umphakathi uwonke - izakhiwo zawo, izikhungo, ukungalingani, kanye namandla. Abasunguli bethiyori - uMarx, Weber, noDurkheim - banikeze ama-akhawunti aphikisanayo wokuthi umphakathi wanamuhla usebenza kanjani. Imibono yesimanje yakhela phezu futhi inselele lezi zisekelo. Ithiyori yokufunda ibalulekile ukuze wenze umqondo wobufakazi bezenhlalo.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp0: I-Durkheim: umphakathi i-reality sui generis — inkulu kunesamba sabantu. Amaqiniso omphakathi (izikhungo, izinkambiso, izimiso) avimbela ukuziphatha. I-Anomie: ukuwohloka okujwayelekile ekushintsheni komphakathi okusheshayo → ukuphambuka okukhulayo namazinga okuzibulala. Ubumbano lwemishini (imiphakathi yendabuko) ngokumelene nobumbano lwezinto eziphilayo (isimanjemanje, ukuncika okukhethekile).
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp1: I-Marx: ukuthanda izinto ezibonakalayo zomlando - isisekelo somphakathi (ubudlelwano bezomnotho, amandla/ubudlelwano bokukhiqiza) sibumba i-superstructure (umthetho, isiko, inkolo, ipolitiki). Ubunxiwankulu: onxiwankulu bangabanikazi bezindlela zokukhiqiza; ama-proletariat athengisa amandla okusebenza, ayaxhashazwa (inani elingaphezulu), futhi azizwe ehlukanisiwe. I-Ideology yenza ngokwemvelo ukungalingani.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp2: I-Weber: isenzo senhlalo — ukuqonda incazelo eqondile yokuziphatha (Verstehen). Izinhlobo ezintathu zegunya: lendabuko, i-charismatic, enengqondo-esemthethweni. I-Bureaucracy: uhlobo olufanele - ukubusa, imithetho, ubuchwepheshe - kokubili okusebenzayo nokululaza ubuntu ('ikheji lensimbi'). I-Protestant Ethic kanye nomoya we-capitalism: imibono ingabangela ukuguqulwa kwezinto ezibonakalayo.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp3: Ukusebenza kahle (Parsons, Merton): umphakathi wuhlelo oluzilawulayo; izikhungo zenza imisebenzi yokunakekela uhlelo. Ukugxeka: kuziba ukungqubuzana, okusekelwe ekuvumelaneni ngokweqile, nge-teleological. Imibono yokungqubuzana (Dahrendorf): ukungqubuzana kujwayelekile futhi kungumthombo woshintsho emphakathini, hhayi i-pathology.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp4: Ithiyori yesimanje: I-Giddens (isakhiwo - isakhiwo kanye ne-ejensi kuyakha ngokulinganayo), i-Bourdieu (inhloko-dolobha: ezomnotho, amasiko, ezenhlalo, ezingokomfanekiso; habitus; inkambu), i-Habermas (isenzo sokuxhumana ngokumelene nesenzo samasu - umhlaba olawulwa yizinhlelo). I-Postmodernism (i-Baudrillard, i-Lyotard): izindaba ezinhle zigoqekile; iqiniso liwukulingisa.
learnUni_sociology_f0_task: Usebenzisa okungenani imibono emithathu yetiyetha, hlaziya izimbangela zenhlalo yabantu zokungalingani kwezemfundo. Ngombono ngamunye: sho isimangalo esibalulekile setiyori, khomba indlela ekhiqiza ukungalingani, caphuna ucwaningo olulodwa olunobufakazi, futhi uhlole okushiwo yinqubomgomo. Phetha ngokuhlola ukuthi yimuphi umbono onikeza incazelo ephelele kakhulu.
learnUni_sociology_f1_desc: Izakhiwo zomphakathi amaphethini aqhubekayo obudlelwano bomphakathi kanye nezikhungo ezakha ukuziphatha komuntu ngamunye kanye namathuba okuphila. Umndeni, imfundo, inkolo, umnotho, abezindaba kanye nombuso yizikhungo ezinkulu. Izazi zezenhlalakahle zihlola ukuthi lezi zakhiwo zikhiqiza kanjani ukungalingani nokuthi zishintsha kanjani ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp0: Umndeni: umbono we-functionalist (Murdock — jikelele, umndeni we-nuclear onemisebenzi emine: ezocansi, zokuzala, ezomnotho, ezemfundo). Umbono we-Marxist (Engels — umndeni ukhiqiza kabusha uhlelo lwesigaba sonxiwankulu kanye ne-patriarchy). Ukugxeka kwabesifazane (Oakley — abasebenzi basekhaya abangakhokhelwa, ukuhlukaniswa ngokobulili). I-Postmodern: ukuhlukahluka kwamafomu omndeni.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp1: Imfundo: i-functionalist (i-Durkheim - ubumbano lomphakathi namakhono; u-Davis/Moore - ukuhlunga ngokufanele). I-Marxist (Bowles & Gintis — ikharikhulamu efihliwe ikhiqiza ubudlelwano bekilasi; isimiso sokuxhumana — izibuko zesikole indawo yokusebenza). Ukukhiqizwa kwamasiko (i-Bourdieu — capital yamasiko inquma impumelelo yezemfundo).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp2: Inkolo: Durkheim - inkolo ihlambalaza izindinganiso zomphakathi ezihlangene; yenza umsebenzi wokuhlanganisa. I-Marx - inkolo 'yi-opium yabantu' - imibono evumela ukungalingani. I-Weber - inkolo ingaba amandla okuguqula umphakathi (iCalvinism kanye ne-capitalism). I-secularisation thesis: inkolo iyehla ngokubaluleka emiphakathini yesimanje (ephikiswayo).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp3: Isimo namandla: Ukubuka kwe-Pluralist (amaqembu ezithakazelo amaningi aqhudelanayo). Elite theory (Mills, Pareto) — amandla agxile ku-elite encane. Umbono we-Marxist - umbuso usebenzela izintshisekelo zesigaba esibusayo. I-Gramscian hegemony - isigaba esibusayo sigcina amandla ngokuvuma kwemibono, hhayi nje ukuphoqelela.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp4: Imidiya nomphakathi: ithiyori yokusethwa kwe-ajenda (McCombs & Shaw — media inquma ukuthi umphakathi ucabangani ngakho, hhayi ukuthi yini okufanele uyicabange). Imodeli yenaliti ye-Hypodermic (imidiya ijova imilayezo ngokuthula) iqhathaniswa nokusetshenziswa kanye nethiyori yokwanelisa (izethameli zikhetha ngenkuthalo imidiya ngezidingo zazo). Imidiya yedijithali: amabhamuza okuhlunga, i-algorithmic curation, ulwazi olunganembile.
learnUni_sociology_f1_task: Sebenzisa imibono emibili ephambene yesayensi yezokuhlalisana kwabantu (isb. ukusebenza kahle kanye ne-Marxism) ukuze uhlaziye uhlelo lwemfundo ezweni lakini. Ngombono ngamunye: chaza indima yemfundo emphakathini, khomba ukuthi ubani ohlomulayo futhi oncishwe amathuba, caphuna ucwaningo olulodwa olunobufakazi, bese uphakamisa umthelela wenqubomgomo. Bese uhlola ukuthi yimuphi umbono ohlinzeka nge-akhawunti eyanele yemiphumela yemfundo yabafundi bekilasi labasebenzi.
learnUni_sociology_f2_name: Ukungalingani komphakathi - ukusatshalaliswa okungalingani kwezinsiza, amathuba, namandla - into esemqoka yenhlalakahle yabantu. Isigaba, ubulili, uhlanga/ubuhlanga, kanye nobudala ubukhulu obukhulu bokuhlukaniswa. I-Intersectionality iveza ukuthi lezi zilinganiso ziyahlangana futhi ziyasebenzisana. Ukuqonda ukungalingani kudinga kokubili ukuhlaziywa kwesakhiwo kanye nokunaka kokuhlangenwe nakho okuphilayo.
learnUni_sociology_f2_desc: Isigaba somphakathi: Ukubuka kuka-Weber okunezinhlangothi eziningi (isigaba + isimo + iqembu). I-Goldthorpe's class schema (NS-SEC): esekelwe ebuhlotsheni bokuqashwa. I-Savage et al.'s Great British Class Survey (2013): amakilasi ayisikhombisa afaka 'elite' kanye 'ne-precariat'. Ikilasi lithinta impilo, imfundo, ubulungiswa bobugebengu, nokubamba iqhaza kwezepolitiki.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp0: Ukungalingani ngokobulili: i-patriarchy — ukubusa kwabesilisa okuhlelekile kwezikhungo zenhlalo, ezomnotho, nezepolitiki. Igebe lenkokhelo yobulili: abesifazane bathola u-~80% wemali etholwa amadoda ngehora e-UK (2023). Uphahla lwengilazi (izithiyo ezingabonakali ezindimeni eziphezulu) kanye ne-glass cliff (abesifazane abaqokwe ebuholini ezimweni ezibucayi). I-Sociology of masculinity: I-Connell's hegemonic masculinity.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp1: Ubuhlanga nobuzwe: i-primordialism (i-ethnic identity as natural, fixed) vs. Constructionism (uhlanga/ubuhlanga njengoba bakhelwe emphakathini — izinhlanga ezihlukene zichazwa ngokwehlukile emiphakathini nezikhathi ezahlukene). Ukucwasa ngokwezikhungo (Umbiko kaMacpherson - Amaphoyisa Kamasipala): izinqubo zokucwasa ezifakwe ezinhlanganweni, hhayi nje ukucwasa komuntu ngamunye.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp2: I-Intersectionality (Kimberlé Crenshaw): izilinganiso zobunikazi eziningi (ikilasi, ubulili, uhlanga, ukukhubazeka, ubulili) zisebenzelana ngokuphindaphindiwe, hhayi okungeziwe. Ukuhlangenwe nakho kowesifazane omnyama ngokubandlululwa akukhona nje 'ukucwasa ngokwebala + nokucwasa ngobulili' - ukuhlukana kwemigwaqo kudala izinhlobo ezihlukile zokungabi namathuba ezingabanjwanga yedwa.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp3: Ukuhamba komphakathi: okuphuma phakathi kwezizukulwane (ikilasi lezingane elihlobene nelabazali) kanye nelokuzalwa (indlela yomsebenzi womuntu ngamunye). Ukuhamba komphakathi wase-UK: kuhlotshaniswa kakhulu nesigaba sabazali/imali engenayo. Ukuhamba okuphelele (ukunyakaza okuya phezulu komphakathi wonke) vs. ukuhamba okuhlobene (indawo ekusabalaliseni). Vula uma kuqhathaniswa namasistimu wokuhlukanisa avaliwe.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp4: Usebenzisa impambanandlela njengohlaka lwakho lokuhlaziya, hlaziya isimo sabesifazane abamnyama abakhubazekile emakethe yezabasebenzi yase-UK. Sebenzisa: ubufakazi bomphumela wobukhulu obunye ngokwehlukana, ubufakazi bokuthi basebenzisana kanjani, i-akhawunti eyodwa yetiyori, kanye nemithelela yenqubomgomo yokulwa nokubandlulula. Phetha ngokuhlola ukuthi ingabe impambana-mgwaqo iwusizo kakhulu ekuhlaziyeni kunokuhlaziya kwe-eksisi eyodwa.
learnUni_sociology_f3_desc: Ucwaningo lwesayensi yezokuhlalisana kwabantu lusebenzisa uhla lwezindlela zobuningi kanye nekhwalithi ukuze kuphenywe izigigaba zomphakathi. Ukukhethwa kwendlela kubonisa kokubili izithiyo ezingokoqobo kanye nokuzibophezela okujulile kwe-epistemological - mayelana nalokho okubalulekile njengolwazi olusebenzayo lwezenhlalo. I-Reflexivity - ukuqaphela komcwaningi isikhundla sabo siqu ocwaningweni - isici esihlukile sesayensi yezenhlalakahle esezingeni eliphezulu.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp0: Izindlela zobuningi: izinhlolovo zomphakathi (uhlu lwemibuzo oluhlelekile, amasampula amakhulu, ummeleli, ojwayelekile), izibalo ezisemthethweni (idatha kahulumeni - ubugebengu, ukuzalwa, imali engenayo - kodwa ebonisa izinqubo zokuqopha, hhayi 'iqiniso lenhlalo'), ukuhlaziya okuqukethwe (ukubhala amakhodi okuhlelekile kwemibhalo noma imidiya). I-Positivist epistemology: umhlaba wenhlalo ungafundwa ngendlela efanele ngezindlela zesayensi.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp1: Izindlela zokufaneleka: izingxoxo ezijulile (ezihlelekile noma ezingahlelekile - idatha ecebile, enengqikithi), amaqembu okugxilwe kuwo (i-dynamics yeqembu, ukwenza incazelo ehlangene), i-ethnography (ukubuka komhlanganyeli - umcwaningi ugxila esimweni somphakathi, ngokuvamile izinyanga noma iminyaka). I-epistemology yokuchaza: incazelo yakhiwe, ayilinganiswa.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp2: Sampling: amathuba (okungahleliwe, stratified, cluster — generalisable) vs. purposive (theory, snowball — okukhethelwe ukujula nokufaneleka, hhayi ukumela). Usayizi wesampula uma uqhathaniswa nokujula: inani lidinga i-n enkulu; Ikhwalithi izuza ukugcwaliswa kwethiyori.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp3: Ukuthembeka (umphumela ofanayo uma uphindaphindwa - amandla ohlolo oluningi), ukuqinisekiswa (kukala lokho elikufunayo - amandla ekhwalithi). Imvume enolwazi, ukungaziwa, ukuvikelwa ekulimaleni. I-reflexivity yomcwaningi: ukuvuma ukuthi ubunikazi bomcwaningi buthinta kanjani ukuqoqwa nokuhumusha idatha.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp4: Izindlela ezixubile: ezilandelanayo (ikhwalithi bese kuba nenani, noma okuphambene nalokho), ngesikhathi esifanayo (zombili ngasikhathi sinye, imiphumela ihlanganisiwe). Unxantathu: usebenzisa izindlela eziningi ukuze uhlangane esiphethweni esifanayo. Isibonelo: inhlolovo yobuningi ikhomba igebe lokuzuza ekilasini; izingxoxo ezisezingeni eliphezulu zichaza izindlela.
learnUni_sociology_f3_task: Ufuna ukufunda ukuthi kungani abafundi besigaba esisebenzayo bengamelwe kakhulu emanyuvesi aphezulu. Dala ucwaningo lwezindlela ezixubile: (a) isigaba sobuningi usebenzisa inhlolovo nedatha esemthethweni - cacisa umbuzo wakho wocwaningo, isampula, izilinganiso, nokuhlaziya. (b) Isigaba sekhwalithethivu kusetshenziswa izingxoxo - isu lokusampula, umhlahlandlela wenhlolokhono (imibuzo eyi-8), nendlela yokuhlaziya. (c) Uzozihlanganisa kanjani zombili izigaba? (d) Thola izinselele ezimbili zokuziphatha eziqondene ngqo nokucwaninga abantu abasha abasengozini.
learnUni_history_f0_desc: I-Historiography iwucwaningo lokuthi umlando ubhalwe kanjani - imibono, izindlela, kanye nezincazelo ezisetshenziswa osomlando. Iyabuza: ingabe ulwazi lomlando olunenhloso lungenzeka? Ukuthi ungubani isazi-mlando, indlela abuka ngayo izinto, kanye nomzuzwana ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kuyibumba kanjani imilando abayibhalayo? I-historiography eyingcweti ibalulekile ekuhloleni noma iyiphi impikiswano yomlando.
learnUni_history_f0_kp0: Imithombo yomlando: eyinhloko (yadalwa ngaleso sikhathi - imibhalo, izinto zobuciko, ubufakazi bomlomo, izithombe), okwesibili (ukuhlaziywa kwemithombo eyinhloko yizazi-mlando), ephakeme (ama-syntheses - izincwadi zokufunda, i-encyclopaedias). Ukugxekwa komthombo: ubunikazi, usuku, izethameli, inhloso, ukuchema, ukuqinisekiswa.
learnUni_history_f0_kp1: Umlando we-Rankean: umlando 'njengoba wawunjalo ngempela' (wie es eigentlich gewesen) — ukubuyisela okuhlosiwe kwesikhathi esedlule ngemithombo eyinhloko. Ubungcweti bomlando wekhulu le-19. Ukugxeka: akunakwenzeka ukuba nenhloso ngokugcwele; imithombo ngokwayo iyingxenye.
learnUni_history_f0_kp2: Isikole i-Annales (Braudel, Bloch, Febvre): ukusuka emicimbini namadoda amakhulu kuya ezakhiweni zesikhathi eside (longue durée — geography, economic, mentality). Umlando ophelele - ukuhlanganisa zonke izici zokuhlangenwe nakho komuntu. Unethonya elikhulu emlandweni womphakathi.
learnUni_history_f0_kp3: I-Postmodernism kanye 'nokuphenduka kolimi': Okumhlophe (I-Metahistory) - ukulandisa komlando kwakhiwe njengezinhlobo zemibhalo (amahlaya, inhlekelele, ezothando, ukubhuqa) - izazi-mlando ziyakha kunokuba zithole okwedlule. I-Derrida: lungisa umbhalo. Imithelela: i-relativism, 'imilando' eminingi evumelekile.
learnUni_history_f0_kp4: Ubuwena nomlando: umlando kabani? Umlando wamakholoni wabhalwa amakholoni - izifundo ze-subaltern (i-Spivak, i-Guha) zibuyisela imibono yabantu ababebunjwe koloni. Umlando wabesifazane, umlando wabaNsundu, umlando wezabasebenzi - konke kwabekela inselele ukulandisa kwendabuko 'kwendoda enkulu'. Izifundo zenkumbulo: indlela imiphakathi ekhumbula futhi ikhohlwe ngayo okwedlule.
learnUni_history_f0_task: Qhathanisa izindlela ezintathu zomlando (i-Rankean positivism, i-Annales, i-postmodernism) ekuphatheni kwabo isenzakalo esifanayo - isb. i-French Revolution. Indlela ngayinye: sho indlela ewumongo ngayo, imiphi imibuzo eyibuzayo, imiphi imithombo/izindlela ezisebenzisayo, nokuthi ingaphetha ngokuthini. Linganisa: ingabe ulwazi olubalulekile lomlando lungenzeka?
learnUni_history_f1_desc: Umhlaba wasendulo wakhiqiza izisekelo zempucuko yaseNtshonalanga neyase-Asia: i-polis yamaGreki, iRiphabhulikhi yamaRoma nombuso, amakhosi aseShayina, izifunda zamadolobha aseMesophothamiya, nombuso waseGibhithe. Ukuqonda izimiso zabo zezombangazwe, umnotho, kanye nezimpumelelo zabo zamasiko kwembula umsuka wezikhungo ezisaphikelelayo namuhla—umthetho, intando yeningi, ifilosofi, inkolo, nobudolobha.
learnUni_history_f1_kp0: IGreece yasendulo: i-polis (idolobha-lesifunda) njengeyunithi yezepolitiki eyisisekelo. Idemokhrasi yase-Athene (ikhulu lesi-5 BCE): umhlangano (ekklesia), umkhandlu (boule), izinkantolo zomthetho. I-Sparta: i-oligarchy yezempi. Izimpi ZasePheresiya (490-479 BCE). Impi yasePeloponnesian (431-404 BCE - Ukuhlaziywa kwamaqiniso kaThucydides). Ukunqotshwa kweMacedonian kanye nezwe lamaGreki.
learnUni_history_f1_kp1: IRoma Yasendulo: IRiphabhulikhi (509-27 BCE) - SPQR (ISenethi NamaRoma), ama-tribunes, consuls, populares vs. optimates. UJulius Caesar, ukuwa kweRiphabhulikhi, u-Augustus kanye noMphathi. Umthetho wamaRoma, ubunjiniyela (imisele yamanzi, imigwaqo), kanye nokuphathwa kwesifundazwe. Yenqaba futhi uwe - Inkulumompikiswano yaseGibbon, Pirenne.
learnUni_history_f1_kp2: IMesophothamiya neGibhithe: Izifunda zedolobha laseSumerian (ukubhala, amaziggurats, Ikhodi yase-Ur-Nammu c.2100 BCE). Ikhodi kaHammurabi (c.1754 BCE) - Imithetho engama-282, 'iso ngeso'. Izwe likapharaonic laseGibhithe - ubukhosi baphezulu, izakhiwo ezinkulu. Umbuso Omusha (1550-1070 BCE) - Tutankhamun, Ramesses II.
learnUni_history_f1_kp3: I-Han China (206 BCE–220 CE): i-bureaucracy emaphakathi (i-Confucian meritocracy ngezivivinyo zenkonzo yomphakathi), ukuhweba ngoSilk Road, izinto ezintsha (iphepha, ikhampasi, i-seismograph). Qhathanisa noMbuso WaseRoma — impucuko 'yakudala' ngasikhathi sinye emikhawulweni ehlukile yenethiwekhi yokuhweba.
learnUni_history_f1_kp4: Umnotho wasendulo: ikakhulukazi ezolimo, umsebenzi wezigqila uphakathi kokukhiqizwa kwamaGreki namaRoma. Ukuhweba amabanga amade (Silk Road, Mediterranean): izimpahla zikanokusho, okusanhlamvu, izinsimbi. Inkulumo-mpikiswano: Umbono ka-Finley 'we-primitivist' (iminotho yasendulo ihluke kakhulu - akukho sizinda sokukhula) vs. Indlela yokuqhathanisa yokuqhathanisa ka-Scheidel.
learnUni_history_f1_task: Qhathanisa izinhlelo zezepolitiki zase-Athens yakudala kanye neRiphabhulikhi yaseRoma. Kokunye: chaza umthethosisekelo, chaza ukuthi obani ababenamalungelo ezepolitiki, chaza ukuthi amandla asakazwa futhi abhekwa kanjani, futhi uhlole ukuthi 'intando yeningi' noma 'i-oligarchic' ngayinye yayinjani. Bese uhlaziya ukuthi kungani zombili lezi zinhlelo zagcina sezivumele ukubusa kobushiqela - lokhu kusitshelani ngezimo ezidingekayo zentando yeningi?
learnUni_history_f1_tp0: IGreece Yasendulo kanye ne-polis || IRoma Lasendulo: IRiphabhulikhi Nombuso
learnUni_history_f2_name: Inkathi yanamuhla yasekuqaleni yashintsha umhlaba: INguquko Yenguquko yenza kabusha ubuciko nokufunda, iNguquko yahlukanisa eLobukholwa, ukwanda kweYurophu kwasungula imibuso yomhlaba wonke nokuhweba ngezigqila, futhi iNguquko Yesayensi yashintsha indlela abantu abayiqonda ngayo imvelo. Ukukhanya kwaveza imibono yezepolitiki - inkululeko, amalungelo, isizathu - eyaqhuba iNguquko YaseMelika neFrance.
learnUni_history_f2_desc: I-Renaissance (14th-17th c.): ukuvuselelwa kwemfundo yakudala, ubuntu (Erasmus, More — gxila emandleni omuntu esikhundleni segunya laphezulu), ubuciko obusha (uLeonardo, uMichelangelo, uRaphael - umbono, imvelo), umshini wokunyathelisa (Gutenberg c.1440 - ukuguqulwa kolwazi ukusabalala).
learnUni_history_f2_kp0: INguquko (1517): Imibono kaLuther engama-95—yayibekela inselele incwadi yezono, igunya likapapa, nokulamula kobupristi. I-Sola scriptura, i-sola fide. Impi Yabalimi, UMkhandlu WaseTrent, Izimpi Zenkolo (isiFulentshi: 1562-98, Impi Yeminyaka Engamashumi Amathathu: 1618-48 — Ukuthula kwaseWestphalia 1648 → isimiso sobukhosi bombuso).
