learnUni_history_f2_kp1: Ukunwetshwa kwe-European and colonialism: Ukuhlola isiPutukezi neSpanishi (1490s-1500s), i-Columbian Exchange (izitshalo, izifo, abantu abagqilaziwe), ukunqotshwa kwamazwe aseMelika (Cortés, Pizarro - inhlekelele yezibalo zabantu bomdabu). Ukuhweba ngezigqila e-Transatlantic: abantu base-Afrika abayizigidi eziyi-12 bagqilazwe, abayizigidi ezi-2 bafa bewela.
learnUni_history_f2_kp2: European expansion and colonialism: Portuguese and Spanish exploration (1490s-1500s), Columbian Exchange (crops, diseases, enslaved people), conquest of the Americas (Cortés, Pizarro — demographic catastrophe for indigenous peoples). Transatlantic slave trade: 12 million Africans enslaved, 2 million died crossing.
learnUni_history_f2_kp3: I-Scientific Revolution (16th-17th c.): I-Copernicus (i-heliocentrism, i-1543), i-Galileo (imishini kanye ne-telescope), i-Kepler (imithetho yeplanethi), i-Newton (i-Principia Mathematica 1687 - amandla adonsela phansi, imithetho yokunyakaza). Indlela entsha: ukuhlolwa, izibalo, ukungabaza kwegunya lasendulo.
learnUni_history_f2_kp4: The Enlightenment (18th c.): isizathu, inkululeko, kanye nenqubekelaphambili. Locke (amalungelo emvelo, uhulumeni ngemvume), uVoltaire (ukubekezelelana ngokwenkolo, inkulumo ekhululekile), uRousseau (intando evamile), iMontesquieu (ukuhlukaniswa kwamandla). I-American Revolution (1776 - Ithonya lika-Locke kuSimemezelo Sokuzimela), i-French Revolution (1789 - Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité).
learnUni_history_f2_task: Hlaziya izimbangela zeNguquko yesiFulentshi ka-1789. Sebenzisa ukuhlaziywa kwezizathu eziningi: (a) izimbangela zesakhiwo zesikhathi eside (inkinga yezezimali, ukungalingani kwezenhlalakahle ngaphansi kwesistimu ye-Estates, imibono yokukhanyiselwa), (b) izimbangela zesikhashana (ukwehluleka kokuvuna, inkinga ye-Estates-General), (c) indima yemibono ngokumelene nezimo ezibonakalayo. Linganisa ukuthi iyiphi into eyodwa oyibheka njengebaluleke kakhulu, bese uvikela impendulo yakho kwenye incazelo.
learnUni_history_f3_desc: Ikhulunyaka lama-20 nelama-21 laletha ukucekelwa phansi okungakaze kubonwe ngaphambili (izimpi zomhlaba ezimbili, ukuqothulwa kohlanga, izikhali zenuzi) kanye nenqubekelaphambili emangalisayo (ukuchithwa kwekoloni, amalungelo abantu, inguquko kwezobuchwepheshe). Ukuqonda lesi sikhathi kudinga ukusebenzelana nemithombo eyinhloko, izincazelo ezincintisanayo, namafa angakaxazululiwe alolonga isikhathi sethu samanje.
learnUni_history_f3_kp0: Impi Yezwe I (1914-1918): idala inkulumo-mpikiswano — impikiswano ka-Fischer (ubudlova baseJalimane nezinjongo zempi) vs. Albertini (ukubala kabi nokubambeka komfelandawonye). Impi ye-trench, ukubhujiswa kwezobuchwepheshe (~ 17 million efile). ISivumelwano SaseVersailles (1919): isigatshana secala lempi, ukubuyisela - thesis 'seeds of WWII'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp1: Ubushiqela: IJalimane lobuNazi (uHitler — i-racial ideology, Führerprinzip, genocide — Holocaust, 6 million Jews; total war and Holocaust as intentionalist vs. functionalist historiographical debate). ISoviet Union (uStalin - ukuqoqwa, ama-gulags, ukwesaba okukhulu). Ingoma ka-Hannah Arendt ethi 'Origins of Totalitarianism'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp2: I-Decolonization (1945-1975): ukunyakaza kokuzimela kulo lonke elase-Asia, e-Afrika, nase-Caribbean. Ukuzimela kanye nokuhlukaniswa kwamaNdiya (1947 - udlame, ~ 1 million efile). Impi yase-Algeria (1954-62). Inhlekelele yaseCongo. Umongo weMpi Yomshoshaphansi: I-USA ne-USSR zombili ziphikisana nobukholoni kunkulumo kodwa zisekela abalingani abanegunya. Neo-colonialism: ukuzimela kwezepolitiki ngaphandle kokuzimela kwezomnotho.
learnUni_history_f3_kp3: I-Cold War (1947-1991): umbango wemibono, wezomnotho, kanye nowezwe phakathi kwe-USA ne-USSR. Imfundiso ye-Containment (Kennan), Impi YaseKorea, Inhlekelele Yezikhali ZaseCuba (1962 - eseduze nempi yenuzi), Impi yaseVietnam, iDétente, umjaho wezikhali kaReagan. Ukuwa kwe-USSR (1991): I-glasnost/perestroika kaGorbachev, ukuwa koDonga lwaseBerlin (1989).
learnUni_history_f3_kp4: Umhlaba wangemva kuka-1991: unipolarity ('Ukuphela Komlando' kaFukuyama vs. 'Clash of Civilizations' kaHuntington), 9/11 kanye ne-War on Terror, inkinga yezezimali yango-2008, i-Arab Spring, ukukhuphuka kweChina, ubhubhane lwe-COVID-19, ubunzima besimo sezulu. Ukuhwebelana kwembulunga yonke kanye nokunganeliseki kwakho - ubuzwe, ukungalingani, kanye nokuhlehla ngokumelene nenkululeko yamazwe ngamazwe.
learnUni_history_f3_task: Hlola izimbangela zokuQothulwa Kwesizwe. I-eseyi yakho kufanele: (a) izibandakanye nenkulumompikiswano yomlando wamabomu/ukusebenza, (b) ihlaziye izimo zesakhiwo (ukuphikisa, amandla ombuso, impi) kanye ne-ejensi (indima kaHitler, ama-SS, ababukele), (c) isebenzise okungenani imithombo emithathu eyinhloko noma yesibili, (d) ihlole ukuthi ukuQothulwa Kwesizwe kwakuyisenzakalo esiyingqayizivele yini (i-Modernology) UkuQothulwa Kwesizwe') noma ngokuyinhloko umphumela wemibono yamaNazi eyeqisayo.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_name: I-Epistemology || I-Epistemology igatsha lefilosofi eliphathelene nolwazi - imvelo yalo, imithombo, ububanzi, kanye nemikhawulo. Kusho ukuthini ukwazi okuthile? Siluhlukanisa kanjani ulwazi nenkolelo nje? Iyini imithombo yolwazi (isizathu, isipiliyoni, ubufakazi)? Le mibuzo ixhumene nokungabaza, isayensi, kanye nemikhuba yansuku zonke ye-epistemic.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_desc: Ukuhlaziywa kolwazi lwendabuko: umuntu S uyazi ukuthi u-P uma (i) P uyiqiniso, (ii) S ukholelwa u-P, (iii) u-S unesizathu sokukholelwa P. I-akhawunti yeqiniso eqinisekisiwe (JTB). U-Gettier (1963): izibonelo eziphikisanayo zibonisa ukuthi i-JTB ayanele ngolwazi - inkinga ye-Gettier idale iminyaka engu-60 yezimpendulo.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp0: The traditional analysis of knowledge: a person S knows that P iff (i) P is true, (ii) S believes P, (iii) S is justified in believing P. The justified true belief (JTB) account. Gettier (1963): counterexamples show JTB is not sufficient for knowledge — the Gettier problem spawned 60 years of responses.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp1: Imithombo yolwazi: empiricism (Locke, Hume, Berkley) — lonke ulwazi oluvela kokuhlangenwe nakho; ayikho imibono ezalwa. I-Rationalism (Descartes, Leibniz, Kant) - ulwazi oluthile luyi-priori (ngaphambi kokuhlangenwe nakho), olusekelwe ekucabangeni. I-Kant's synthesis: ingqondo ibeka izigaba (isikhala, isikhathi, imbangela) kokuhlangenwe nakho.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp2: Ukungabaza: Indlela kaDescartes yokungabaza - Ukungqubuzana kweDemoni Elibi - kuphela 'isamba se-cogito ergo' esisinda ekungabazeni okukhulu. I-Pyrrhonian scepticism: misa ukwahlulela kuzo zonke izindaba ezingabonakali. Contemporary: Ubuchopho buka-Putnam ku-vat, ka-Moore ethi 'nansi isandla' impendulo evamile, isimo sengqondo.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp3: Ulwazi lwesayensi: I-Popper's falsificationism - isayensi ithuthuka ngokuqagela okunesibindi kanye nemizamo eqinile yokuqamba amanga, hhayi ngokufakwa. I-Kuhn's paradigm shifts - isayensi evamile efakwe ama-revolutions. I-Lakatos: izinhlelo zocwaningo (umgogodla oqinile + ibhande elivikelayo). Feyerabend: 'noma yini ihamba' - i-epistemological anarchism.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp4: I-Social epistemology kanye nobufakazi: okuningi kwalokho esikwaziyo kuvela kwabanye. Ubufakazi buwumthombo oyisisekelo wolwazi (anti-reductionism — Coady). Kodwa ukuchema kweziphathimandla, amabhamuza okuhlunga, nokungavumelani kochwepheshe kudala izinselele ezinkulu. Ukungabi nabulungisa kwe-Epistemic (Fricker): ukungabi nabulungisa kobufakazi (ukunikeza ukwethembeka okuncane ngenxa yokucwasa), ukungabi nabulungisa kwe-hermeneutical (ukuntuleka kwemiqondo yokuqonda ulwazi lwakho).
learnUni_philosophy_f0_task: Hlaziya ngokucophelela isimangalo sokuthi ukungabaza okukhulu akunakuphikiswa. Empendulweni yakho: (a) yisho izimpikiswano ezingabazayo zika-Descartes (ukuphupha, idemoni elibi) kanye nempendulo ye-cogito, (b) thula umqondo ovamile kaMoore kanye nezimpendulo zika-Wittgenstein ezithi 'On Certainty', (c) chaza isimo se-epistemic futhi uhlole ukuthi iyayichitha noma iyayigwema yini inkinga, (d) cabangela ukuthi ingabe ukwenqaba ukungabaza kwansuku zonke kuyiqiniso yini.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_desc: Izimiso zokuziphatha zihlola uhlobo lokuziphatha kanye nendlela okufanele senze ngayo. Izinkolelo-mbono ezintathu ezinkulu zokuziphatha - i-consequentialism, i-deontology, kanye nezimiso zokuziphatha okuhle - zinikeza izimpendulo ezihlukene. I-Metaethics ibuza ukuthi izitatimende zokuziphatha ziyiqiniso noma zingamanga, futhi uma kunjalo, ngamuphi umqondo. Izimiso zokuziphatha ezisetshenziswayo zisebenzisa ithiyori ukubhekana nezinkinga zangempela zokuziphatha kwezokwelapha, ezombusazwe, nakwezemvelo.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp0: I-Utilitarianism (i-Bentham, i-Mill): isenzo esifanele sikhulisa injabulo/usizo oluhlanganisiwe (okuhle kakhulu inombolo enkulu). Act utilitarianism (isenzo ngasinye sahlulelwa ngemiphumela) vs. umthetho wokusebenziseka kalula (landela imithetho ngokuvamile ekhulisa ukusetshenziswa). Ukuphikiswa: ubulungisa (ukuvuna izitho zomzimba), ubuqotho, ukufuna ngenkani.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp1: I-Kantian deontology: ukubaluleka kokuziphatha okuvela kumgomo (umsebenzi, hhayi imiphumela). I-Categorical Imperative: (1) yenza kuphela ezimisweni ongazenza emhlabeni wonke, (2) phatha abantu njalo njengeziphetho kubo, hhayi nje njengezindlela, (3) yenza njengelungu lombuso weziphetho. Imisebenzi ephelele (isb. ungalokothi uqambe amanga) vs. imisebenzi engaphelele (yiba usizo lapho kungenzeka).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp2: Izimiso zokuhle (i-Aristotle): gxila kumlingiswa kunemithetho noma imiphumela. Ubuhle (isibindi, ubulungisa, ukuzithiba, ukuhlakanipha) yizimo ezizinzile zokwenza kahle, ezitholwa ngokwenza (eudaimonia - ukuchuma komuntu njengomgomo). Imfundiso yencazelo: ubuhle buphakathi kokweqisa kanye nokuntula.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp3: I-Metaethics: i-moral realism (injongo amaqiniso okuziphatha akhona - ukungewona kwemvelo kukaMoore, ukungokoqobo kukaCornell), i-moral anti-realism (ithiyori yephutha: Mackie - zonke izimangalo zokuziphatha zingamanga; expressivism: Ayer, Blackburn - izimangalo zokuziphatha ziveza izimo zengqondo; relativism: ukuziphatha kuyahlukahluka phakathi kwamasiko). Inkinga ye-is-ought (Hume): ayikwazi ukuthola 'okufanele' ku-'is'.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp4: Izimiso zokuziphatha ezisetshenziswayo: ukukhipha isisu (ubuntu, ukuzimela komzimba — umhlukumezi kaThomson), i-euthanasia (ukuzimela ngokumelene nobungcwele bokuphila, umthambeka oshelelayo), ubulungisa bomhlaba wonke (Singer — abantu abacebile banesibopho sokunikela ukuze kuncishiswe ubumpofu bomhlaba wonke; Rawls — global difference principle), izimiso zokuziphatha kwezilwane (umbono wamalungelo omculi).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_task: Inkinga yetroli: inqola ebalekile izobulala abantu aba-5 ngaphandle kwalapho uyiphambukisela emzileni oseceleni lapho izobulala khona 1. (a) Ithiyori ngayinye kwezintathu eziyinhloko ithi kufanele wenzeni, futhi ngani? (b) Kokuhlukile 'kwebhuloho lezinyawo', ungamisa inqola ngokuphusha indoda enkulu isuke ebhulohweni. Ingabe lokhu kuyayishintsha impendulo yakho? Kungani noma kungani kungenjalo? (c) Iqiniso elifakazelayo lokuthi abantu abaningi bayashintsha esimweni sokuqala kodwa hhayi elesibili lisitshelani ngesisekelo sokuziphatha esingokwengqondo (kunokuba esinengqondo)?
learnUni_philosophy_f2_desc: Ifilosofi yengqondo ihlola uhlobo lwezimo zengqondo - ukwazi, inhloso, nobudlelwane bomqondo nomzimba. Inkinga enzima yokwazi ibuza ukuthi kungani kukhona isipiliyoni sokuziphendulela nhlobo. I-Functionalism, i-physicalism, kanye ne-dualism inikeza ama-akhawunti aqhudelanayo. Lezi zingxoxo zihlobene ngqo nobuhlakani bokwenziwa kanye nesayensi yengqondo.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp0: Inkinga yengqondo nomzimba: ububili bezinto (Descartes — ingqondo nomzimba yizinto ezihlukene; inkinga yokusebenzisana), ubumbaxambili bempahla (izakhiwo zengqondo yizinto ezingezona ezomzimba zobuchopho), i-physicalism/izinto ezibonakalayo (izimo zengqondo ziyafana noma zibonwa yizimo zobuchopho obuphathekayo). Ukuqeda ukuthanda izinto ezibonakalayo (Churchland) - i-psychology yabantu ingamanga; i-neuroscience izothatha indawo yayo.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp1: Ukusebenza kahle (i-Putnam, i-Fodor): izimo zengqondo zichazwa ngezindima zazo zokusebenza (ubudlelwano bokufaka nokuphumayo), hhayi i-substrate yazo ebonakalayo. Ukufezeka okuningi: isimo sengqondo esifanayo singabonakala ngezinhlelo ezihlukahlukene zomzimba (i-silicon kanye nama-neurons). Ukuphikiswa: Ikhwalithi ehlanekezelwe ye-Ned Block, ikhwalithi engekho.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp2: I-consciousness kanye ne-qualia: i-qualia yizinto ezizimele, ezimangalisayo zesipiliyoni ('ukuthi kunjani' ukubona okubomvu, ukuzwa ubuhlungu). Inkinga enzima (i-Chalmers): ngisho ne-akhawunti ephelele yomzimba yobuchopho ngeke ichaze ukuthi kungani kunokuzibonela. Ukuhlolwa kwemicabango ye-zombie yefilosofi: umuntu ofana nami ngokomzimba kodwa ongazi lutho.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp3: Inhloso: 'mayelana' nezimo zengqondo - izinkolelo nezifiso ziphathelene nezinto. Brentano: inhloso kuwuphawu lwengqondo. Ukungqubuzana kweGumbi lesiShayina likaSearle ngokumelene ne-AI eqinile: izimpawu zekhompuyutha ezikhohlisayo aziqondi — ayinayo inhloso. Impendulo kaDennett: ukuma ngamabomu.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp4: Ubunikazi bomuntu siqu: yini ekwenza ube umuntu ofanayo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi? Ukuqhubeka kwengqondo (Locke - inkumbulo; Parfit - ukuxhumana kwengqondo nokuqhubeka, alikho iqiniso elijulile mayelana nobunikazi), ukuqhubeka kwezinto eziphilayo (ubuchopho), ubunikazi bokulandisa (Ricoeur). I-Parfit's 'dived we stand': amacala e-fission abonisa ukuthi ungubani akuyona into ebalulekile - ukusinda yilokho okubalulekile.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_task: Chaza inkinga enzima yokwazi nokuthi kungani i-physicalism ilwa nayo. (a) Yisho inkinga ngokuqondile (Chalmers). (b) Yethula izimpendulo ezimbili ze-physicalist (isb. uhlobo lwetiyori ye-identity, amathiyori ezinga eliphezulu lokuqaphela) kanye nokuphikisa. (c) Hlola ukuthi ama-zombies efilosofi angacatshangwa yini nokuthi yini elandelayo uma kunjalo. (d) Xoxa ngemithelela yenkinga enzima yokwazi okuzenzela - ingabe i-AI ingake ibe nonembeza wangempela?
learnUni_philosophy_f3_desc: Ifilosofi yezombangazwe ihlola izisekelo ezivamile zezikhungo zezombusazwe - yini ethethelela igunya lombuso, buyini ubulungisa, amandla ezombusazwe kufanele asatshalaliswe kanjani? Kusukela kuzazi zefilosofi ka-Plato kuya evelini lika-Rawls lokungazi kuya ku-libertarianism ka-Nozick, lezi zinhlaka zikhiqiza ama-akhawunti ahlukene kahulumeni osemthethweni kanye nomphakathi onobulungisa.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp0: Ukuthethelela izwe: isiko lenkontileka yezenhlalo. Hobbes (Leviathan, 1651): ngaphandle kombuso, ukuphila 'kuyedwa, kumpofu, kubi, kuyisihluku, futhi kufushane'; ama-agent anengqondo enza isivumelwano sokuyeka inkululeko yemvelo ukuze avikeleke. I-Locke: isimo semvelo sinokuthula; umbuso owakhiwe ukuvikela amalungelo emvelo (impilo, inkululeko, impahla); uhulumeni ngemvume, uguquko olulungisiwe uma lwephula amalungelo.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp1: I-Rousseau (Inkontileka Yomphakathi, 1762): intando evamile - lokho izakhamuzi ezizokwenza ukuze kuzuze wonke umuntu, okuhlukile kwentando yabo bonke (inani lezintshisekelo zangasese). Igunya elisemthethweni lidinga intando yeningi yokubamba iqhaza. Ukwehlukaniswa: ubunikazi bezakhiwo budala ukungalingani futhi konakalisa ubuhle bemvelo.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp2: Rawls (Theory of Justice, 1971): the original position + veil of ignorance — ama-rational agents akhetha izimiso engazi isikhundla sabo emphakathini. Izimiso ezimbili: (1) inkululeko eyisisekelo elinganayo, (2) umgomo womehluko — ukungalingani kuvunyelwe kuphela uma kuzuza okuncane kakhulu. Ifilosofi yepolitiki enenkululeko enkulu yekhulu lama-20.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp3: U-Nozick (I-Anarchy, State, kanye ne-Utopia, 1974): impendulo ye-libertarian ku-Rawls. Ithiyori yokufaneleka: ukusatshalaliswa nje = kutholwe ngokudluliswa nje noma ngokutholwa koqobo. Isimo esincane yisimo esinezizathu eziningi kakhulu. Izimiso ezinephethini zokusabalalisa (njenge-Rawls') zidinga ukuphulwa okuqhubekayo kwamalungelo omuntu ngamunye.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp4: Izinselelo zesimanje: ubukhomanisi (MacIntyre, Sandel, Taylor) - ubuntu obukhululekile bushaya indiva umthethosisekelo wezenhlalo wobunikazi; imiphakathi, amasiko, kanye nezimpahla ezabelwanayo zibalulekile. I-Feminism: I-Wollstonecraft, i-Beauvoir ('ubulili besibili'), i-Okin - ithiyori ye-liberal indiva ukwakheka kobulili kwendima 'yangasese'. I-Postcolonialism: I-Fanon - Ifilosofi yezombusazwe yaseNtshonalanga ishaya indiva udlame lwamakholoni.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_task: URawls noNozick bamele amafilosofi amabili ezepolitiki abaluleke kakhulu ekhulwini lama-20. (a) Chaza isikhundla sokuqala sikaRawls kanye nezimiso ezimbili zobulungisa. (b) Chaza ithiyori kaNozick yokufaneleka kanye nempikiswano kaWilt Chamberlain. (c) Khomba ukungezwani okuyisisekelo phakathi kwabo mayelana nohlobo lobulungisa. (d) Usebenzisa isibonelo esiphathekayo (isb. ukwabiwa kabusha kwengcebo ngentela), bonisa ukuthi isazi sefilosofi ngasinye singacabanga kanjani. Phetha ngesakho isikhundla esilungisiwe.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_name: I-Metaphysics & Ontology || I-Metaphysics iphenya izici ezibaluleke kakhulu zeqiniso: yini ekhona, yiziphi izigaba eziyisisekelo zokuba khona, ingabe kukhona inkululeko yokuzikhethela, yini isikhathi, ingabe zikhona izinto ezingabonakali? I-Ontology yisifundo sokuba njalo. Lena imibuzo engaqondakali kakhulu kufilosofi, nokho izimpendulo zayo zinemiphumela yesayensi, izimiso zokuziphatha, kanye nempilo yansuku zonke.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_desc: Ubukhona kanye ne-ontology: Inkomba ye-Quine - ukuba yiyo ukuba yinani lokuhlukahluka okuboshiwe. Yiziphi izigaba ze-ontological ezikhona? Imininingwane (izinto zomuntu ngamunye) vs. Universal (izakhiwo, ubudlelwano - iqiniso: izinto ezikhona zonke zikhona ngokuzimela; igama lokuqamba: kukhona imininingwane kuphela).
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp0: Inkululeko yokuzikhethela kanye ne-determinism: i-hard determinism (zonke izenzakalo ezinqunywe ngesizathu → akukho nkululeko yokuzikhethela), ukuhambisana (inkululeko yokuzikhethela iyahambisana ne-determinism — isenzo samahhala = esingaphoqwa yizici zangaphandle, noma ngabe kunqunyiwe, i-Frankfurt hierarchical mesh theory), i-libertarian free will (i-agent causation, indeterminism). Inselele ye-Neuroscience: Ukuhlolwa kwe-Libet kubonisa umsebenzi we-neural wandulela inhloso enengqondo.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp1: Ubunjalo besikhathi: Uchungechunge (okushubile — okwedlule, okwamanje, okuzayo) vs. B-series (okungenasici — ngaphambili/kamuva/ngasikhathi sinye). Iphrezentheshini (imanje kuphela ekhona), i-eternalism/four-dimensionalism (isikhathi esedlule, samanje, nesakusasa zingokoqobo ngokulinganayo — 'indawo ezungezile'). Ukuhlobana kwesikhathi esisodwa kuyinselelo yokubonisana.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp2: I-Modal kanye nemihlaba engenzeka: i-semantics yomhlaba engenzeka (Lewis) Iqiniso lemodal langempela: yonke imihlaba engenzeka ikhona. I-Actualism: umhlaba wangempela kuphela okhona; imihlaba engenzeka iyinto engabonakali (Plantinga). Isetshenziselwa ukuhlaziya okungelona iqiniso, isidingo, kanye nengqikithi.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp3: Isizathu: Ukujwayelekile kwe-Humean (isizathu = ukuhlangana okuqhubekayo - akukho ukuxhumana okudingekayo). Ukuhlaziywa kwe-Counterfactual (Lewis): U-C ubangele u-E uma emhlabeni oseduze kakhulu lapho u-C engenzeki khona, u-E angenzeki. Ithiyori ye-Interventionist (Woodward): U-C ubangela u-E uma ukungenelela ku-C kuzoshintsha u-E. Amandla e-Causal (Armstrong, Inyoni): izincazelo azidala ngokwe-ontologically.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp4: Ingabe inkululeko yokuzikhethela iyahambisana ne-determinism? Bhala i-eseyi yefilosofi eyakhiwe: (a) chaza i-determinism futhi uhlonze ukungahambisani okubonakala sengathi uyavumelana nenkululeko yokuzikhethela, (b) wethula impendulo ehambisanayo - hlukanisa 'ukunqunywa' kusukela 'ekuphoqweni', ucaphuna uFrankfurt noma u-Dennett, (c) wethula ukuphikisa okungahambelani (impikiswano yomphumela - i-Lidbet assess, i-implications) phetha ngokuhlola kwakho inkulumo-mpikiswano. Khomba ukuphikisana okunembayo kwefilosofi kulo lonke.
